However, most existing approaches rely on direct action prediction, lacking the ability to reason over long-horizon trajectories and evaluate their consequences, which limits performance in complex decision-making tasks. In this work, we introduce World-Value-Action (WAV) model, a unified framework that enables implicit planning in VLA systems. Rather than performing explicit trajectory optimization, WAV model learn a structured latent representation of future trajectories conditioned on visual observations and language instructions. A learned world model predicts future states, while a trajectory value function evaluates their long-horizon utility. Action generation is then formulated as inference in this latent space, where the model progressively concentrates probability mass on high-value and dynamically feasible trajectories. We provide a theoretical perspective showing that planning directly in action space suffers from an exponential decay in the probability of feasible trajectories as the horizon increases. In contrast, latent-space inference reshapes the search distribution toward feasible regions, enabling efficient long-horizon decision making. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that the WAV model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving significant improvements in task success rate, generalization ability, and robustness, especially in long-horizon and compositional scenarios.

</details>


### [373] [DigiForest: Digital Analytics and Robotics for Sustainable Forestry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14652)
*Marco Camurri,Enrico Tomelleri,Matías Mattamala,Sebastián Barbas Laina,Martin Jacquet,Jens Behley,Sunni Kanta Prasad Kushwaha,Fang Nan,Nived Chebrolu,Leonard Freißmuth,Marvin Chayton Harms,Meher V. R. Malladi,Fan Yang,Jonas Frey,Cesar Cadena,Marco Hutter,Janine Schweier,Kostas Alexis,Cyrill Stachniss,Maurice Fallon,Stefan Leutenegger*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DigiForest是一个大规模精准林业系统，利用数字技术和自主机器人实现森林监测、库存管理、决策支持和选择性采伐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 森林覆盖地球陆地面积的三分之一，对全球生物多样性、气候调节和人类福祉至关重要。欧洲森林覆盖约40%的陆地面积，林业部门对实现欧盟气候中和与生物多样性目标具有核心作用。当前实践需要进一步创新来应对可持续森林管理、长效木制品使用和森林生态系统韧性等挑战。

Method: DigiForest采用四大组件：(1) 自主异构移动机器人（空中、腿式和背负式）进行树木级数据采集；(2) 自动提取树木性状以建立森林库存；(3) 决策支持系统用于预测森林生长和辅助决策；(4) 使用专用自主采伐机进行低影响选择性采伐。这些技术已在芬兰、英国和瑞士等多个地点的真实森林环境中广泛验证。

Result: 该技术已在芬兰、英国和瑞士等多个地点的真实森林环境中得到广泛验证，表明其在实际林业应用中的可行性和有效性。

Conclusion: DigiForest代表了精准林业的创新方法，通过整合数字技术和自主机器人系统，为可持续森林管理、气候目标和生物多样性保护提供了技术解决方案。

Abstract: Covering one third of Earth's land surface, forests are vital to global biodiversity, climate regulation, and human well-being. In Europe, forests and woodlands reach approximately 40% of land area, and the forestry sector is central to achieving the EU's climate neutrality and biodiversity goals; these emphasize sustainable forest management, increased use of long-lived wood products, and resilient forest ecosystems. To meet these goals and properly address their inherent challenges, current practices require further innovation. This chapter introduces DigiForest, a novel, large-scale precision forestry approach leveraging digital technologies and autonomous robotics. DigiForest is structured around four main components: (1) autonomous, heterogeneous mobile robots (aerial, legged, and marsupial) for tree-level data collection; (2) automated extraction of tree traits to build forest inventories; (3) a Decision Support System (DSS) for forecasting forest growth and supporting decision-making; and (4) low-impact selective logging using purpose-built autonomous harvesters. These technologies have been extensively validated in real-world conditions in several locations, including forests in Finland, the UK, and Switzerland.

</details>


### [374] [A multi-platform LiDAR dataset for standardized forest inventory measurement at long term ecological monitoring sites](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14635)
*Michael R. Chang,Anna Candotti,Karl von Ellenrieder,Enrico Tomelleri,Marco Camurri*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究构建了一个多平台LiDAR参考数据集，集成了无人机、地面和背包移动激光扫描，用于森林结构测量与生态观测的校准和整合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为支持3D结构数据与生态观测、标准异速生长模型的校准、基准测试和整合，需要高质量的参考数据集。现有数据集往往缺乏多平台集成和与长期生态观测站点的明确联系。

Method: 在ICOS森林样地采集多平台LiDAR数据：无人机激光扫描(ULS)测量冠层覆盖，地面激光扫描(TLS)详细测绘树干，背包移动激光扫描(MLS)结合实时SLAM高效获取林下数据。采用无标记、SLAM感知协议减少野外和处理时间，结合手动和自动方法进行数据配准。

Result: 生成了包含约3.33亿点的TLS点云，辅以ULS和MLS数据，完整覆盖冠层和林下层次。数据集以LAZ和E57格式提供，包含UTM坐标和配准报告，支持可重复性。该数据集为测试配准方法、评估扫描效率、连接点云与分割、定量结构模型和生物量估算提供了基准。

Conclusion: 该多平台LiDAR数据集为森林生态系统研究提供了重要的参考基准，展示了如何将TLS、MLS和ULS结合用于重复调查和数字孪生。通过与长期ICOS站点关联，实现了3D结构与数十年生态和通量测量的明确连接。

Abstract: We present a curated multi-platform LiDAR reference dataset from an instrumented ICOS forest plot, explicitly designed to support calibration, benchmarking, and integration of 3D structural data with ecological observations and standard allometric models. The dataset integrates UAV-borne laser scanning (ULS) to measure canopy coverage, terrestrial laser scanning (TLS) for detailed stem mapping, and backpack mobile laser scanning (MLS) with real-time SLAM for efficient sub-canopy acquisition. We focus on the control plot with the most complete and internally consistent registration, where TLS point clouds (~333 million points) are complemented by ULS and MLS data capturing canopy and understory strata. Marker-free, SLAM-aware protocols were used to reduce field and processing time, while manual and automated methods were combined. Final products are available in LAZ and E57 formats with UTM coordinates, together with registration reports for reproducibility. The dataset provides a benchmark for testing registration methods, evaluating scanning efficiency, and linking point clouds with segmentation, quantitative structure models, and allometric biomass estimation. By situating the acquisitions at a long-term ICOS site, it is explicitly linked to 3D structure with decades of ecological and flux measurements. More broadly, it illustrates how TLS, MLS, and ULS can be combined for repeated inventories and digital twins of forest ecosystems.

</details>


### [375] [Model-Based Reinforcement Learning Exploits Passive Body Dynamics for High-Performance Biped Robot Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14565)
*Tomoya Kamimura,Haruka Washiyama,Akihito Sano*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究利用基于模型的深度强化学习，通过机器人身体的被动特性（如弹簧）来生成双足机器人的行走和奔跑运动，证明了被动元素能帮助机器人高效获得鲁棒且节能的运动模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于探索具身智能中身体被动特性对运动学习的重要性。传统人形机器人通常缺乏被动元素，而生物系统则利用身体的被动特性实现高效运动。研究者希望通过对比有/无被动元素的机器人模型，验证被动特性在运动生成中的优势。

Method: 在仿真器中构建了两个双足机器人模型：一个包含被动元素（如弹簧），另一个类似传统人形机器人，不含被动元素。使用基于模型的深度强化学习方法训练两个模型生成行走和奔跑运动。特别关注了被动元素模型中吸引子对学习过程的影响。

Result: 包含被动元素的模型训练受到系统吸引子的显著影响：虽然轨迹能快速收敛到极限环，但获得高奖励需要较长时间。然而，这种吸引子驱动的学习最终产生了鲁棒且能量效率高的运动。相比之下，无被动元素的模型学习过程不同。结果表明，通过身体与地面之间的动态相互作用产生的稳定极限环，被动元素能帮助机器人高效获得高性能运动。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了在机器人身体中实现被动特性对于未来具身AI的重要性。被动元素能够促进稳定极限环的形成，从而产生鲁棒、节能的运动模式。这为设计更高效、更自然的机器人运动控制提供了重要启示。

Abstract: Embodiment is a significant keyword in recent machine learning fields. This study focused on the passive nature of the body of a biped robot to generate walking and running locomotion using model-based deep reinforcement learning. We constructed two models in a simulator, one with passive elements (e.g., springs) and the other, which is similar to general humanoids, without passive elements. The training of the model with passive elements was highly affected by the attractor of the system. This lead that although the trajectories quickly converged to limit cycles, it took a long time to obtain large rewards. However, thanks to the attractor-driven learning, the acquired locomotion was robust and energy-efficient. The results revealed that robots with passive elements could efficiently acquire high-performance locomotion by utilizing stable limit cycles generated through dynamic interaction between the body and ground. This study demonstrates the importance of implementing passive properties in the body for future embodied AI.

</details>


### [376] [CT-VIR: Continuous-Time Visual-Inertial-Ranging Fusion for Indoor Localization with Sparse Anchors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14545)
*Yu-An Liu,Li Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于样条的连续时间状态估计方法，用于视觉-惯性-测距融合定位，通过虚拟锚点构建和异常值剔除解决几何退化问题，在异步多传感器采样下平衡定位精度、轨迹一致性和融合效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉惯性里程计(VIO)长期精度会因缺乏全局约束而退化，超宽带(UWB)等测距传感器可缓解漂移，但高精度测距需要良好部署的锚点，这在狭窄或低功耗环境中难以保证。现有视觉-惯性-测距(VIR)融合方法多基于离散时间滤波或优化，难以在异步多传感器采样下平衡定位精度、轨迹一致性和融合效率。

Method: 提出基于样条的连续时间状态估计方法：1)预处理阶段，利用VIO运动先验和UWB测距测量构建虚拟锚点并剔除异常值，缓解几何退化并提高测距可靠性；2)估计阶段，使用B样条在连续时间参数化位姿轨迹，将惯性、视觉和测距约束表示为滑动窗口图中的因子，联合优化样条控制点和少量辅助参数以获得连续时间轨迹估计。

Result: 在公开数据集和真实世界实验中验证了所提方法的有效性和实际潜力，表明该方法能够有效解决几何退化问题，在异步多传感器采样下实现良好的定位精度、轨迹一致性和融合效率平衡。

Conclusion: 提出的基于样条的连续时间状态估计方法能够有效融合视觉、惯性和测距信息，通过虚拟锚点构建和连续时间参数化解决了现有方法在几何退化、异步采样和效率平衡方面的局限性，为移动机器人定位提供了更鲁棒和高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Visual-inertial odometry (VIO) is widely used for mobile robot localization, but its long-term accuracy degrades without global constraints. Incorporating ranging sensors such as ultra-wideband (UWB) can mitigate drift; however, high-accuracy ranging usually requires well-deployed anchors, which is difficult to ensure in narrow or low-power environments. Moreover, most existing visual-inertial-ranging (VIR) fusion methods rely on discrete time-based filtering or optimization, making it difficult to balance positioning accuracy, trajectory consistency, and fusion efficiency under asynchronous multi-sensor sampling. To address these issues, we propose a spline-based continuous-time state estimation method for VIR fusion localization. In the preprocessing stage, VIO motion priors and UWB ranging measurements are used to construct virtual anchors and reject outliers, thereby alleviating geometric degeneration and improving range reliability. In the estimation stage, the pose trajectory is parameterized in continuous time using a B-spline, while inertial, visual, and ranging constraints are formulated as factors in a sliding-window graph. The spline control points, together with a small set of auxiliary parameters, are then jointly optimized to obtain a continuous-time trajectory estimate. Evaluations on public datasets and real-world experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and practical potential of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [377] [CooperDrive: Enhancing Driving Decisions Through Cooperative Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14454)
*Deyuan Qu,Qi Chen,Takayuki Shimizu,Onur Altintas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CooperDrive是一个轻量级协同感知框架，通过车辆间对象级信息共享增强遮挡和非视距场景下的感知能力，提升自动驾驶安全性和反应时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在遮挡和非视距场景中感知受限，延迟反应会增加碰撞风险，需要增强环境感知能力以实现更早、更安全的驾驶决策。

Method: 提出CooperDrive框架：1) 保留车辆原有感知、定位和规划栈；2) 采用轻量级对象级共享和融合策略；3) 重用检测器BEV特征估计车辆姿态，无需额外编码器；4) 重建BEV表示并低延迟输入规划器；5) 利用扩展对象集提前预测潜在冲突并主动调整速度和轨迹。

Result: 真实世界闭环测试显示：在遮挡严重的非视距交叉口，CooperDrive提高了反应提前时间、最小碰撞时间和停车余量，仅需90 kbps带宽，平均端到端延迟为89 ms。

Conclusion: CooperDrive通过轻量级协同感知有效增强了自动驾驶在遮挡和非视距场景下的安全性，将反应式行为转变为预测性驾驶决策，具有实际部署可行性。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles equipped with robust onboard perception, localization, and planning still face limitations in occlusion and non-line-of-sight (NLOS) scenarios, where delayed reactions can increase collision risk. We propose CooperDrive, a cooperative perception framework that augments situational awareness and enables earlier, safer driving decisions. CooperDrive offers two key advantages: (i) each vehicle retains its native perception, localization, and planning stack, and (ii) a lightweight object-level sharing and fusion strategy bridges perception and planning. Specifically, CooperDrive reuses detector Bird's-Eye View (BEV) features to estimate accurate vehicle poses without additional heavy encoders, thereby reconstructing BEV representations and feeding the planner with low latency. On the planning side, CooperDrive leverages the expanded object set to anticipate potential conflicts earlier and adjust speed and trajectory proactively, thereby transforming reactive behaviors into predictive and safer driving decisions. Real-world closed-loop tests at occlusion-heavy NLOS intersections demonstrate that CooperDrive increases reaction lead time, minimum time-to-collision (TTC), and stopping margin, while requiring only 90 kbps bandwidth and maintaining an average end-to-end latency of 89 ms.

</details>


### [378] [BIEVR-LIO: Robust LiDAR-Inertial Odometry through Bump-Image-Enhanced Voxel Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14421)
*Patrick Pfreundschuh,Turcan Tuna,Cedric Le Gentil,Roland Siegwart,Cesar Cadena,Helen Oleynikova*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BIEVR-LIO：一种新颖的激光雷达惯性里程计方法，通过高分辨率地图表示和地图引导的点采样策略，在几何信息稀疏的挑战性环境中提高鲁棒性和精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动机器人进入几何信息稀疏的挑战性环境时，传统激光雷达惯性里程计（LIO）因缺乏足够的几何约束而精度下降甚至发散，需要一种能利用细微几何变化提高鲁棒性的方法。

Method: 提出高分辨率地图表示法，将表面存储为紧凑的体素级定向高度图像，可直接用于配准而无需计算中间几何基元；同时提出地图引导的点采样策略，专注于几何信息丰富的区域进行配准。

Result: 在多种传感器、平台和环境中的实验表明，该方法在约束良好的场景中达到最先进性能，在挑战性场景中相比基线方法有显著改进；捕获的精细几何信息可用于机器人运动的高程地图等下游任务。

Conclusion: BIEVR-LIO通过创新的地图表示和采样策略，有效解决了几何信息稀疏环境中的里程计鲁棒性问题，为移动机器人在挑战性环境中的可靠定位提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Reliable odometry is essential for mobile robots as they increasingly enter more challenging environments, which often contain little information to constrain point cloud registration, resulting in degraded LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (LIO) accuracy or even divergence. To address this, we present BIEVR-LIO, a novel approach designed specifically to exploit subtle variations in the available geometry for improved robustness. We propose a high-resolution map representation that stores surfaces as compact voxel-wise oriented height images. This representation can directly be used for registration without the calculation of intermediate geometric primitives while still supporting efficient updates. Since informative geometry is often sparsely distributed in the environment, we further propose a map-informed point sampling strategy to focus registration on geometrically informative regions, improving robustness in uninformative environments while reducing computational cost compared to global high-resolution sampling. Experiments across multiple sensors, platforms, and environments demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in well-constrained scenes and substantial improvements in challenging scenarios where baseline methods diverge. Additionally, we demonstrate that the fine-grained geometry captured by BIEVR-LIO can be used for downstream tasks such as elevation mapping for robot locomotion.

</details>


### [379] [RoSLAC: Robust Simultaneous Localization and Calibration of Multiple Magnetometers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14353)
*Qiyang Lyu,Zhenyu Wu,Wei Wang,Hongming Shen,Danwei Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出RoSLAC方法，通过交替优化同时估计机器人位姿和磁力计校准参数，解决GPS缺失环境下AMR定位问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GPS信号弱或无GPS的封闭/半封闭环境中，AMR定位面临挑战。基础设施定位方法成本高、维护难，车载传感器方法受几何特征模糊和动态障碍物遮挡影响。AMF定位不依赖外部基础设施或几何特征，但磁力计测量受传感器平台铁磁材料畸变影响，传统旋转校准方法不适用于大型重型平台。

Method: 提出鲁棒的同时定位与校准(RoSLAC)方法，基于交替优化迭代高效估计平台位姿和磁力计校准参数。该方法避免了传统磁力计校准需要旋转传感器的限制。

Result: 在高保真仿真和真实环境中的广泛评估表明，RoSLAC方法在保持低计算成本的同时，相比最先进的磁力计校准技术实现了高定位精度。

Conclusion: RoSLAC方法为GPS缺失环境下的AMR定位提供了一种有效的解决方案，通过同时进行定位和校准，克服了传统校准方法的局限性，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Localization of autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) in enclosed or semi-enclosed environments such as offices, hotels, hospitals, indoor parking facilities, and underground spaces where GPS signals are weak or unavailable remains a major obstacle to the deployment of fully autonomous systems. Infrastructure-based localization approaches, such as QR codes and RFID, are constrained by high installation and maintenance costs as well as limited flexibility, while onboard sensor-based methods, including LiDAR- and vision-based solutions, are affected by ambiguous geometric features and frequent occlusions caused by dynamic obstacles such as pedestrians. Ambient magnetic field (AMF)-based localization has therefore attracted growing interest in recent years because it does not rely on external infrastructure or geometric features, making it well-suited for AMR applications such as service robots and security robots. However, magnetometer measurements are often corrupted by distortions caused by ferromagnetic materials present on the sensor platform, which bias the AMF and degrade localization reliability. As a result, accurate magnetometer calibration to estimate distortion parameters becomes essential. Conventional calibration methods that rely on rotating the magnetometer are impractical for large and heavy platforms. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a robust simultaneous localization and calibration (RoSLAC) approach based on alternating optimization, which iteratively and efficiently estimates both the platform pose and magnetometer calibration parameters. Extensive evaluations conducted in high-fidelity simulation and real-world environments demonstrate that the proposed RoSLAC method achieves high localization accuracy while maintaining low computational cost compared with state-of-the-art magnetometer calibration techniques.

</details>


### [380] [CART: Context-Aware Terrain Adaptation using Temporal Sequence Selection for Legged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14344)
*Kartikeya Singh,Youngjin Kim,Yash Turkar,Karthik Dantu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CART是一种基于上下文感知地形适应的高层控制器，通过整合本体感觉和外感觉实现稳健地形理解，在复杂地形上提升腿式机器人行走稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有地形适应方法主要依赖视觉传感器先验经验，在复杂越野地形上容易失败，存在视觉-纹理悖论（所见与所感不一致）。需要开发能整合多模态感知（视觉与本体感觉）的稳健地形理解方法。

Method: 提出CART高层控制器，基于上下文感知地形适应方法，整合机器人本体感觉（proprioception）和外感觉（exteroception），利用振动稳定性作为学习地形特性的评估指标。

Result: 在IsaacSim模拟器中使用ANYmal-C机器人，真实世界使用Boston Dynamics SPOT机器人进行测试。相比多模态感知的SOTA基线，模拟中平均成功率提升5%，真实世界稳定性分别提升45%和24%，且不增加运动任务完成时间。

Conclusion: CART通过整合本体感觉和外感觉的上下文感知地形适应，有效解决了视觉-纹理悖论，在复杂地形上实现了更稳健的腿式机器人行走，为多模态地形理解提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Animals in nature combine multiple modalities, such as sight and feel, to perceive terrain and develop an understanding of how to walk on uneven terrain in a stable manner. Similarly, legged robots need to develop their ability to stably walk on complex terrains by developing an understanding of the relationship between vision and proprioception. Most current terrain adaptation methods are susceptible to failure on complex, off-road terrain as they rely on prior experience, particularly observations from a vision sensor. This experience-based learning often creates a Visual-Texture Paradox between what has been seen and how it actually feels. In this work, we introduce CART, a high-level controller built on a context-aware terrain adaptation approach that integrates proprioception and exteroception from onboard sensing to achieve a robust understanding of terrain. We evaluate our method on multiple terrains using an ANYmal-C robot on the IsaacSim simulator and a Boston Dynamics SPOT robot for our real-world experiments. To evaluate the learned contextual terrain properties, we adapt vibrational stability on the base of the robot as a metric. We compare CART with various state-of-the-art baselines equipped with multimodal sensing in both simulation and the real world. CART achieves an average success rate improvement of 5% over all baselines in simulation and improves the overall stability up to 45% and 24% in the real world without increasing the time taken by the robot to accomplish locomotion tasks.

</details>


### [381] [UMI-3D: Extending Universal Manipulation Interface from Vision-Limited to 3D Spatial Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14089)
*Ziming Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: UMI-3D是通用操作接口(UMI)的多模态扩展，通过集成低成本LiDAR传感器解决原系统在遮挡、动态场景和跟踪失败等问题，提升数据收集的鲁棒性和可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原始UMI依赖单目视觉SLAM，在遮挡、动态场景和跟踪失败时表现不佳，限制了其在真实环境中的应用。需要开发更鲁棒的数据收集系统来支持大规模操作任务学习。

Method: 在腕戴式接口中集成轻量级低成本LiDAR传感器，实现LiDAR-centric SLAM；开发硬件同步的多模态感知流水线和统一的时空校准框架，对齐视觉观测与LiDAR点云；保持原始2D视觉运动策略公式。

Result: UMI-3D显著提高收集数据的质量和可靠性，直接转化为策略性能提升；在标准操作任务上实现高成功率，并能学习原始视觉系统难以处理的任务（如大变形物体操作和关节物体操作）；保持便携性和可访问性。

Conclusion: UMI-3D通过多模态感知解决了原始UMI的局限性，为大规模数据收集和具身智能研究提供了鲁棒、可扩展的平台，所有硬件和软件组件均已开源。

Abstract: We present UMI-3D, a multimodal extension of the Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) for robust and scalable data collection in embodied manipulation. While UMI enables portable, wrist-mounted data acquisition, its reliance on monocular visual SLAM makes it vulnerable to occlusions, dynamic scenes, and tracking failures, limiting its applicability in real-world environments. UMI-3D addresses these limitations by introducing a lightweight and low-cost LiDAR sensor tightly integrated into the wrist-mounted interface, enabling LiDAR-centric SLAM with accurate metric-scale pose estimation under challenging conditions. We further develop a hardware-synchronized multimodal sensing pipeline and a unified spatiotemporal calibration framework that aligns visual observations with LiDAR point clouds, producing consistent 3D representations of demonstrations. Despite maintaining the original 2D visuomotor policy formulation, UMI-3D significantly improves the quality and reliability of collected data, which directly translates into enhanced policy performance. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate that UMI-3D not only achieves high success rates on standard manipulation tasks, but also enables learning of tasks that are challenging or infeasible for the original vision-only UMI setup, including large deformable object manipulation and articulated object operation. The system supports an end-to-end pipeline for data acquisition, alignment, training, and deployment, while preserving the portability and accessibility of the original UMI. All hardware and software components are open-sourced to facilitate large-scale data collection and accelerate research in embodied intelligence: \href{https://umi-3d.github.io}{https://umi-3d.github.io}.

</details>


### [382] [Scale-Invariant Sampling in Multi-Arm Bandit Motion Planning for Object Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14026)
*Servet B. Bayraktar,Andreas Orthey,Marc Toussaint*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种尺度不变采样策略，用于解决狭窄空间物体提取问题，通过生长-收缩搜索找到高熵采样尺度，利用PCA确定提取方向，显著提升成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在拆卸任务中，物体提取（如螺栓、螺钉、销钉）常发生在毫米级狭窄空间。基于采样的规划器虽然能提供完备性保证，但几乎所有运动都会与环境碰撞，采样成为瓶颈

Method: 提出尺度不变采样策略：1）使用生长-收缩搜索探索配置空间，寻找有用且高熵的采样尺度；2）找到有用尺度后，利用主成分分析（PCA）确定物体提取的有用方向；3）将采样器嵌入多臂老虎机快速探索随机树（MAB-RRT）规划器中

Result: 在8个具有挑战性的3D物体提取场景（螺栓、齿轮、杆、销、插座）上进行测试。与经典采样策略（均匀采样、基于障碍物采样、窄通道采样）和现代策略（配对向量、基于物理规划、拆卸广度优先搜索）相比，尺度不变采样在7/8场景中将成功率提高了一个数量级

Conclusion: 尺度不变采样是拆卸任务中通用物体提取的重要概念，能有效解决狭窄空间采样瓶颈问题，显著提升规划成功率

Abstract: Object extraction tasks often occur in disassembly problems, where bolts, screws, or pins have to be removed from tight, narrow spaces. In such problems, the distance to the environment is often on the millimeter scale. Sampling-based planners can solve such problems and provide completeness guarantees. However, sampling becomes a bottleneck, since almost all motions will result in collisions with the environment. To overcome this problem, we propose a novel scale-invariant sampling strategy which explores the configuration space using a grow-shrink search to find useful, high-entropy sampling scales. Once a useful sampling scale has been found, our framework exploits this scale by using a principal components analysis (PCA) to find useful directions for object extraction. We embed this sampler into a multi-arm bandit rapidly-exploring random tree (MAB-RRT) planner and test it on eight challenging 3D object extraction scenarios, involving bolts, gears, rods, pins, and sockets. To evaluate our framework, we compare it with classical sampling strategies like uniform sampling, obstacle-based sampling, and narrow-passage sampling, and with modern strategies like mate vectors, physics-based planning, and disassembly breadth first search. Our experiments show that scale-invariant sampling improves success rate by one order of magnitude on 7 out of 8 scenarios. This demonstrates that scale-invariant sampling is an important concept for general purpose object extraction in disassembly tasks.

</details>


### [383] [Towards Multi-Object-Tracking with Radar on a Fast Moving Vehicle: On the Potential of Processing Radar in the Frequency Domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14013)
*Tim Hansen,Arturo Gomez-Chavez,Ilya Shimchik,Andreas Birk*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出在频域处理雷达数据以提高抗噪性和结构误差鲁棒性，特别针对自动驾驶赛车超车场景，展示了基于傅里叶变换的雷达里程计方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于特征的雷达处理方法对噪声和结构误差敏感，特别是在高动态场景（车辆自运动加多个未知运动物体）中表现不佳。论文旨在开发更鲁棒的雷达数据处理方法，特别针对自动驾驶赛车中的超车等复杂场景

Method: 采用频域处理雷达数据，使用基于相关性的方法（如配准）。提出了FS2D（Fourier SOFT in 2D）方法，利用傅里叶变换在频域进行数据处理，能够同时获取场景中所有运动结构的信息

Result: 使用Boreas数据集进行了初步实验，展示了仅使用雷达的里程计（radar-only-odometry）结果，证明了频域处理方法相比传统特征方法的优越鲁棒性

Conclusion: 频域处理雷达数据具有更高的噪声和结构误差鲁棒性，特别适合高动态场景，且能同时获取场景中所有运动结构信息。该方法为自动驾驶赛车等复杂应用场景提供了有效的雷达数据处理方案

Abstract: We promote in this paper the processing of radar data in the frequency domain to achieve higher robustness against noise and structural errors, especially in comparison to feature-based methods. This holds also for high dynamics in the scene, i.e., ego-motion of the vehicle with the sensor plus the presence of an unknown number of other moving objects. In addition to the high robustness, the processing in the frequency domain has the so far neglected advantage that the underlying correlation based methods used for, e.g., registration, provide information about all moving structures in the scene. A typical automotive application case is overtaking maneuvers, which in the context of autonomous racing are used here as a motivating example. Initial experiments and results with Fourier SOFT in 2D (FS2D) are presented that use the Boreas dataset to demonstrate radar-only-odometry, i.e., radar-odometry without sensor-fusion, to support our arguments.

</details>


### [384] [Goal2Skill: Long-Horizon Manipulation with Adaptive Planning and Reflection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13942)
*Zhen Liu,Xinyu Ning,Zhe Hu,Xinxin Xie,Weize Li,Zhipeng Tang,Chongyu Wang,Zejun Yang,Hanlin Wang,Yitong Liu,Zhongzhu Pu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个双系统框架用于长时程具身操作，将高层语义推理与低层运动执行分离，通过VLM规划器和VLA执行器形成闭环，在RMBench任务上取得显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA系统依赖有限观测窗口和端到端动作预测，在长时程、记忆依赖、部分可观测、遮挡和多阶段依赖任务中表现脆弱，需要持久记忆、自适应任务分解和显式执行失败恢复能力。

Method: 采用双系统框架：高层规划器作为基于VLM的智能体模块，维护结构化任务记忆，执行目标分解、结果验证和错误驱动修正；低层执行器作为基于VLA的视觉运动控制器，通过基于扩散的动作生成执行子任务，使用几何保持的滤波观测。两者形成规划与执行的闭环。

Result: 在代表性RMBench任务上，该框架显著优于基线方法，平均成功率32.4%，而最强基线仅为9.8%。消融研究证实结构化记忆和闭环恢复对长时程操作的重要性。

Conclusion: 提出的双系统框架通过分离高层推理与低层执行，结合结构化记忆和闭环恢复机制，有效解决了长时程具身操作中的记忆依赖、部分可观测和自适应任务分解等挑战。

Abstract: Recent vision-language-action (VLA) systems have demonstrated strong capabilities in embodied manipulation. However, most existing VLA policies rely on limited observation windows and end-to-end action prediction, which makes them brittle in long-horizon, memory-dependent tasks with partial observability, occlusions, and multi-stage dependencies. Such tasks require not only precise visuomotor control, but also persistent memory, adaptive task decomposition, and explicit recovery from execution failures. To address these limitations, we propose a dual-system framework for long-horizon embodied manipulation.
  Our framework explicitly separates high-level semantic reasoning from low-level motor execution. A high-level planner, implemented as a VLM-based agentic module, maintains structured task memory and performs goal decomposition, outcome verification, and error-driven correction. A low-level executor, instantiated as a VLA-based visuomotor controller, carries out each sub-task through diffusion-based action generation conditioned on geometry-preserving filtered observations. Together, the two systems form a closed loop between planning and execution, enabling memory-aware reasoning, adaptive replanning, and robust online recovery. Experiments on representative RMBench tasks show that the proposed framework substantially outperforms representative baselines, achieving a 32.4% average success rate compared with 9.8% for the strongest baseline. Ablation studies further confirm the importance of structured memory and closed-loop recovery for long-horizon manipulation.

</details>


### [385] [Beyond Conservative Automated Driving in Multi-Agent Scenarios via Coupled Model Predictive Control and Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13891)
*Saeed Rahmani,Gözde Körpe,Zhenlin,Xu,Bruno Brito,Simeon Craig Calvert,Bart van Arem*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MPC-RL集成框架在无信号交叉口多车交互中平衡安全与效率，相比单独MPC和端到端RL表现更优，碰撞率降低21%，成功率提升6.5%，并展示出更好的跨场景零样本迁移能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无信号交叉口的自动驾驶面临复杂多车交互挑战，需要平衡安全与效率。传统MPC依赖人工规则导致过于保守，而深度RL虽能学习自适应行为但难以保证安全性和泛化能力，因此需要结合两者优势。

Method: 提出MPC-RL集成框架，结合模型预测控制的结构化约束处理能力和强化学习的自适应学习能力。MPC提供安全基础，RL学习优化策略，在训练中展示出更快的损失稳定化。

Result: 在三种交通密度水平下，MPC-RL均优于单独MPC和端到端RL。相比纯MPC，碰撞率降低21%，成功率提升6.5%。零样本迁移到高速公路汇入场景时，MPC方法比端到端PPO表现更好，显示MPC骨架对跨场景鲁棒性的重要作用。

Conclusion: MPC-RL集成方法能改善多智能体交叉口场景中安全性能与效率的平衡，MPC组件为跨驾驶环境的泛化提供了坚实基础，同时训练负担更轻，收敛更快。

Abstract: Automated driving at unsignalized intersections is challenging due to complex multi-vehicle interactions and the need to balance safety and efficiency. Model Predictive Control (MPC) offers structured constraint handling through optimization but relies on hand-crafted rules that often produce overly conservative behavior. Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) learns adaptive behaviors from experience but often struggles with safety assurance and generalization to unseen environments. In this study, we present an integrated MPC-RL framework to improve navigation performance in multi-agent scenarios. Experiments show that MPC-RL outperforms standalone MPC and end-to-end RL across three traffic-density levels. Collectively, MPC-RL reduces the collision rate by 21% and improves the success rate by 6.5% compared to pure MPC. We further evaluate zero-shot transfer to a highway merging scenario without retraining. Both MPC-based methods transfer substantially better than end-to-end PPO, which highlights the role of the MPC backbone in cross-scenario robustness. The framework also shows faster loss stabilization than end-to-end RL during training, which indicates a reduced learning burden. These results suggest that the integrated approach can improve the balance between safety performance and efficiency in multi-agent intersection scenarios, while the MPC component provides a strong foundation for generalization across driving environments. The implementation code is available open-source.

</details>


### [386] [Mosaic: An Extensible Framework for Composing Rule-Based and Learned Motion Planners](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13853)
*Nick Le Large,Marlon Steiner,Lingguang Wang,Willi Poh,Jan-Hendrik Pauls,Ömer Şahin Taş,Christoph Stiller*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Mosaic框架通过仲裁图整合规则式和基于学习的规划器，实现透明、可追溯的决策，在保证安全性的同时提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶中，规则式规划器可解释但适应性差，学习式规划器适应性强但透明度和安全性不足，需要结合两者优势。

Method: 使用仲裁图结构化决策框架，将轨迹验证和评分与轨迹生成解耦，通过统一评分和最优轨迹选择整合不同类型规划器。

Result: 在nuPlan基准测试中，Mosaic在Val14闭环基准上达到95.48 CLS-NR和93.98 CLS-R，创下新纪录，故障碰撞减少30%；在interPlan基准上获得54.30 CLS-R，比最佳组件规划器提升23.3%。

Conclusion: Mosaic框架成功整合了规则式和基于学习的规划器，实现了透明、可追溯的决策，在保持安全性的同时显著提升了性能，无需重新训练或额外数据。

Abstract: Safe and explainable motion planning remains a central challenge in autonomous driving. While rule-based planners offer predictable and explainable behavior, they often fail to grasp the complexity and uncertainty of real-world traffic. Conversely, learned planners exhibit strong adaptability but suffer from reduced transparency and occasional safety violations. We introduce Mosaic, an extensible framework for structured decision-making that integrates both paradigms through arbitration graphs. By decoupling trajectory verification and scoring from the generation of trajectories by individual planners, every decision becomes transparent and traceable. Trajectory verification at a higher level introduces redundancy between the planners, limiting emergency braking to the rare case where all planners fail to produce a valid trajectory. Through unified scoring and optimal trajectory selection, rule-based and learned planners with complementary strengths and weaknesses can be combined to yield the best of both worlds. In experimental evaluation on nuPlan, Mosaic achieves 95.48 CLS-NR and 93.98 CLS-R on the Val14 closed-loop benchmark, setting a new state of the art, while reducing at-fault collisions by 30% compared to either planner in isolation. On the interPlan benchmark, focused on highly interactive and difficult scenarios, Mosaic scores 54.30 CLS-R, outperforming its best constituent planner by 23.3% - all without retraining or requiring additional data. The code is available at github.com/KIT-MRT/mosaic.

</details>


### [387] [Failure Identification in Imitation Learning Via Statistical and Semantic Filtering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13788)
*Quentin Rolland,Fabrice Mayran de Chamisso,Jean-Baptiste Mouret*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FIDeL：一种策略无关的故障检测模块，通过最优传输匹配和语义过滤区分机器人执行中的真实故障与良性异常


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模仿学习策略在受控环境中表现良好，但在实际部署中脆弱，无法区分故障状态与良性异常。现有视觉异常检测方法能检测异常但无法区分故障类型。

Method: 1) 利用AD方法构建正常演示的紧凑表示；2) 通过最优传输匹配对齐观测数据生成异常分数和热图；3) 扩展保形预测推导时空阈值；4) 使用视觉语言模型进行语义过滤区分良性异常与真实故障。

Result: 在BotFails数据集上，FIDeL在异常检测方面比现有方法提升5.30% AUROC，在故障检测准确率上提升17.38%。

Conclusion: FIDeL提供了一种有效的策略无关故障检测框架，能可靠区分机器人执行中的真实故障与良性异常，显著优于现有方法。

Abstract: Imitation learning (IL) policies in robotics deliver strong performance in controlled settings but remain brittle in real-world deployments: rare events such as hardware faults, defective parts, unexpected human actions, or any state that lies outside the training distribution can lead to failed executions. Vision-based Anomaly Detection (AD) methods emerged as an appropriate solution to detect these anomalous failure states but do not distinguish failures from benign deviations. We introduce FIDeL (Failure Identification in Demonstration Learning), a policy-independent failure detection module. Leveraging recent AD methods, FIDeL builds a compact representation of nominal demonstrations and aligns incoming observations via optimal transport matching to produce anomaly scores and heatmaps. Spatio-temporal thresholds are derived with an extension of conformal prediction, and a Vision-Language Model (VLM) performs semantic filtering to discriminate benign anomalies from genuine failures. We also introduce BotFails, a multimodal dataset of real-world tasks for failure detection in robotics. FIDeL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, yielding +5.30% percent AUROC in anomaly detection and +17.38% percent failure-detection accuracy on BotFails compared to existing methods.

</details>


### [388] [Empirical Prediction of Pedestrian Comfort in Mobile Robot Pedestrian Encounters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13677)
*Alireza Jafari,Hong-Son Nguyen,Yen-Chen Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究通过实验分析移动机器人与行人交互的运动学变量与主观舒适度的关系，开发了基于最小距离、最小投影碰撞时间和复合变量的舒适度预测器，为社交合规机器人路径规划提供量化依据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前移动机器人研究主要关注行人客观安全（如碰撞避免），但缺乏对行人主观舒适度的考虑。量化舒适度是机器人理解和响应人类情感的主要挑战，这阻碍了机器人在公共空间（如人行道）中实现真正的社交合规性。

Method: 采用一对一实验方法，让移动机器人与志愿者进行交互试验。通过统计分析行人报告的舒适度与运动学变量之间的关系，基于实证发现设计了三种舒适度估计器/预测器：基于最小距离、基于最小投影碰撞时间，以及包含所有研究运动学变量的复合估计器。

Result: 统计分析显示大多数运动学变量与行人舒适度存在中度但显著的相关性。复合估计器在所有预测器中达到最高的预测率和分类性能，其优势比为3.67，意味着当它识别行人为舒适时，该行人实际舒适而非不舒适的可能性几乎是4倍。

Conclusion: 该研究为将行人感受纳入机器人路径规划提供了量化工具，使移动机器人能够更好地理解和响应人类情感，从而实现更社交合规的行为，特别是在公共空间中的安全舒适交互。

Abstract: Mobile robots joining public spaces like sidewalks must care for pedestrian comfort. Many studies consider pedestrians' objective safety, for example, by developing collision avoidance algorithms, but not enough studies take the pedestrian's subjective safety or comfort into consideration. Quantifying comfort is a major challenge that hinders mobile robots from understanding and responding to human emotions. We empirically look into the relationship between the mobile robot-pedestrian interaction kinematics and subjective comfort. We perform one-on-one experimental trials, each involving a mobile robot and a volunteer. Statistical analysis of pedestrians' reported comfort versus the kinematic variables shows moderate but significant correlations for most variables. Based on these empirical findings, we design three comfort estimators/predictors derived from the minimum distance, the minimum projected time-to-collision, and a composite estimator. The composite estimator employs all studied kinematic variables and reaches the highest prediction rate and classifying performance among the predictors. The composite predictor has an odds ratio of 3.67. In simple terms, when it identifies a pedestrian as comfortable, it is almost 4 times more likely that the pedestrian is comfortable rather than uncomfortable. The study provides a comfort quantifier for incorporating pedestrian feelings into path planners for more socially compliant robots.

</details>


### [389] [Vision-and-Language Navigation for UAVs: Progress, Challenges, and a Research Roadmap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13654)
*Hanxuan Chen,Jie Zheng,Siqi Yang,Tianle Zeng,Siwei Feng,Songsheng Cheng,Ruilong Ren,Hanzhong Guo,Shuai Yuan,Xiangyue Wang,Kangli Wang,Ji Pei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 对无人机视觉语言导航领域的全面综述，涵盖任务定义、技术演进、资源生态、挑战分析和未来研究方向


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机视觉语言导航是具身人工智能的关键挑战，需要系统梳理该领域从任务定义到最新技术进展的完整框架，为研究者提供结构化参考

Method: 建立方法论分类体系，追踪从早期模块化方法到基于大基础模型的智能体系统的技术演进；系统回顾仿真器、数据集和评估指标等关键资源；分析现实部署的主要挑战

Result: 提供了该领域的全面结构化综述，包括技术分类、资源生态系统分析、现实部署挑战识别，以及未来研究路线图

Conclusion: 无人机视觉语言导航领域已从模块化方法发展到基于大基础模型的智能体系统，但仍面临仿真到现实的鸿沟、动态环境感知、语言歧义推理等挑战，未来应关注多智能体集群协调和空地协同机器人等前沿方向

Abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV-VLN) represents a pivotal challenge in embodied artificial intelligence, focused on enabling UAVs to interpret high-level human commands and execute long-horizon tasks in complex 3D environments. This paper provides a comprehensive and structured survey of the field, from its formal task definition to the current state of the art. We establish a methodological taxonomy that charts the technological evolution from early modular and deep learning approaches to contemporary agentic systems driven by large foundation models, including Vision-Language Models (VLMs), Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, and the emerging integration of generative world models with VLA architectures for physically-grounded reasoning. The survey systematically reviews the ecosystem of essential resources simulators, datasets, and evaluation metrics that facilitates standardized research. Furthermore, we conduct a critical analysis of the primary challenges impeding real-world deployment: the simulation-to-reality gap, robust perception in dynamic outdoor settings, reasoning with linguistic ambiguity, and the efficient deployment of large models on resource-constrained hardware. By synthesizing current benchmarks and limitations, this survey concludes by proposing a forward-looking research roadmap to guide future inquiry into key frontiers such as multi-agent swarm coordination and air-ground collaborative robotics.

</details>


### [390] [A Mechanistic Analysis of Sim-and-Real Co-Training in Generative Robot Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13645)
*Yu Lei,Minghuan Liu,Abhiram Maddukuri,Zhenyu Jiang,Yuke Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文通过理论分析和实验研究揭示了sim-and-real协同训练的内在机制，识别出结构化表示对齐和重要性重加权两个关键效应，并提出了一种改进的协同训练方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管协同训练（结合有限真实数据和丰富替代数据）在生成式机器人策略训练中广泛应用且经验上成功，但其有效性的内在机制仍不清楚。本文旨在探究sim-and-real协同训练的工作机制，理解其何时及为何有效。

Method: 通过理论分析和实证研究相结合的方法：1）识别协同训练的两个内在效应；2）在玩具模型上进行受控实验验证；3）在sim-and-sim和sim-and-real机器人操作任务上进行广泛实验；4）基于分析提出改进的协同训练方法。

Result: 识别出两个关键效应：1）结构化表示对齐（跨域表示对齐与域可辨别性的平衡），对下游性能起主要作用；2）重要性重加权效应（域依赖的动作权重调制），起次要作用。实验验证了这些效应，提出的简单方法在先前方法基础上获得一致改进。

Conclusion: 该研究为协同训练提供了统一的理论解释，揭示了其内在工作机制，提出的方法优于现有技术，有助于推动该方向的研究发展。

Abstract: Co-training, which combines limited in-domain real-world data with abundant surrogate data such as simulation or cross-embodiment robot data, is widely used for training generative robot policies. Despite its empirical success, the mechanisms that determine when and why co-training is effective remain poorly understood. We investigate the mechanism of sim-and-real co-training through theoretical analysis and empirical study, and identify two intrinsic effects governing performance. The first, \textbf{``structured representation alignment"}, reflects a balance between cross-domain representation alignment and domain discernibility, and plays a primary role in downstream performance. The second, the \textbf{``importance reweighting effect"}, arises from domain-dependent modulation of action weighting and operates at a secondary level. We validate these effects with controlled experiments on a toy model and extensive sim-and-sim and sim-and-real robot manipulation experiments. Our analysis offers a unified interpretation of recent co-training techniques and motivates a simple method that consistently improves upon prior approaches. More broadly, our aim is to examine the inner workings of co-training and to facilitate research in this direction.

</details>


### [391] [Evolvable Embodied Agent for Robotic Manipulation via Long Short-Term Reflection and Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13533)
*Jianzong Wang,Botao Zhao,Yayun He,Junqing Peng,Xulong Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: EEAgent框架利用视觉语言模型实现机器人自我进化，通过长短时反射优化机制动态调整提示，在复杂任务中实现最先进性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人方法存在训练需求大、跨任务泛化困难、缺乏可解释性等局限，需要开发能够基于环境反馈自适应进化的通用机器人系统

Method: 提出EEAgent框架，利用大型视觉语言模型进行环境理解和策略规划，引入长短时反射优化机制，基于历史经验和新学教训动态优化提示，实现持续自我进化

Result: 在六个VIMA-Bench任务上的评估显示，该方法创造了新的最先进水平，在复杂场景中显著优于基线方法

Conclusion: EEAgent框架通过结合视觉语言模型和反射优化机制，实现了机器人的自我进化能力，为通用机器人系统的发展提供了有前景的方向

Abstract: Achieving general-purpose robotics requires empowering robots to adapt and evolve based on their environment and feedback. Traditional methods face limitations such as extensive training requirements, difficulties in cross-task generalization, and lack of interpretability. Prompt learning offers new opportunities for self-evolving robots without extensive training, but simply reflecting on past experiences.However, extracting meaningful insights from task successes and failures remains a challenge. To this end, we propose the evolvable embodied agent (EEAgent) framework, which leverages large vision-language models (VLMs) for better environmental interpretation and policy planning. To enhance reflection on past experiences, we propose a long short-term reflective optimization (LSTRO) mechanism that dynamically refines prompts based on both past experiences and newly learned lessons, facilitating continuous self-evolution, thereby enhancing overall task success rates. Evaluations on six VIMA-Bench tasks reveal that our approach sets a new state-of-the-art, notably outperforming baselines in complex scenarios.

</details>


### [392] [Stability Principle Underlying Passive Dynamic Walking of Rimless Wheel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13530)
*Fumihiko Asano*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 重新分析无轮缘轮被动行走的稳定性原理，通过线性化运动方程研究稳定性与能量守恒定律的关系


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然已知无轮缘轮在重力作用下产生的被动步态总是渐近稳定且1周期的，但其内在稳定性原理仍有进一步研究的空间。本文旨在重新审视站立相稳定性与能量守恒定律的关系，提供对内在稳定性原理更深入的理解。

Method: 基于运动方程的线性化重新考虑站立相稳定性，通过数学分析研究稳定性与能量守恒定律的关系。利用动能递推公式等数学工具进行理论分析。

Result: 通过数学分析揭示了无轮缘轮被动行走的内在稳定性原理，阐明了稳定性与能量守恒定律之间的深层关系，提供了对这一经典模型稳定性机制的更深入理解。

Conclusion: 无轮缘轮的被动步态稳定性不仅源于冲击姿态约束和恢复机械能约束这两个必要条件，还与能量守恒定律有本质联系。通过线性化分析和数学推导，本文深化了对这一简单模型内在稳定性原理的理解。

Abstract: Rimless wheels are known as the simplest model for passive dynamic walking. It is known that the passive gait generated only by gravity effect always becomes asymptotically stable and 1-period because a rimless wheel automatically achieves the two necessary conditions for guaranteeing the asymptotic stability; one is the constraint on impact posture and the other is the constraint on restored mechanical energy. The asymptotic stability is then easily shown by the recurrence formula of kinetic energy. There is room, however, for further research into the inherent stability principle. In this paper, we reconsider the stability of the stance phase based on the linearization of the equation of motion, and investigate the relation between the stability and energy conservation law. Through the mathematical analysis, we provide a greater understanding of the inherent stability principle.

</details>


### [393] [A transformable slender microrobot inspired by nematode parasites for interventional endovascular surgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13513)
*Xin Yang,Dongliang Fan,Yunteng Ma,Yuxuan Liao,Diancheng Li,U Kei Cheang,Bo Peng,Hongqiang Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 受线虫启发开发的可变形细长磁性微型机器人，用于血管介入手术，具有高灵活性、运动能力和药物输送潜力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心血管疾病每年导致约1790万人死亡，传统治疗方法面临血管空间狭窄、拓扑结构复杂和手术风险高的挑战。现有机器人系统在多功能性和机动性之间存在权衡。受在人体血管系统中生活的线虫启发，开发一种新型微型机器人来解决这些限制。

Method: 基于线虫启发，开发可变形细长磁性微型机器人。通过实验和分析优化制造工艺和几何结构，最终创建长径比大于100的原型（直径小于200微米，长度大于20毫米）。机器人由超薄聚合物细线上的均匀分布磁性珠粒和头部的大珠粒组成。

Result: 原型展现出卓越的灵活性（最大曲率0.904 mm⁻¹）和运动能力（最大速度125 mm/s）。能够通过半径0.84 mm的急转弯和三维空间分布的孔洞。在介入手术应用中，成功导航通过狭窄血管模具，包裹并运输比机器人重95倍的药物，并最终释放到目标位置。还展示了在动脉瘤栓塞中的应用潜力，以及通过直径1.2 mm医用针头的出色可注射性。

Conclusion: 受线虫启发的可变形细长磁性微型机器人在心血管介入手术中展现出巨大潜力，解决了现有机器人系统在多功能性和机动性之间的权衡问题，为微创治疗提供了新的可能性。

Abstract: Cardiovascular diseases account for around 17.9 million deaths per year globally, the treatment of which is challenging considering the confined space and complex topology of the vascular network and high risks during operations. Robots, although promising, still face the dilemma of possessing versatility or maneuverability after decades of development. Inspired by nematodes, the parasites living, feeding, and moving in the human body's vascular system, this work develops a transformable slender magnetic microrobot. Based on the experiments and analyses, we optimize the fabrication and geometry of the robot and finally create a slender prototype with an aspect ratio larger than 100 (smaller than 200 microns in diameter and longer than 20 mm in length), which possesses uniformly distributed magnetic beads on the body of an ultrathin polymer string and a big bead on the head. This prototype shows great flexibility (largest curvature 0.904 mm-1) and locomotion capability (the maximum speed: 125 mm/s). Moreover, the nematode-inspired robot can pass through sharp turns with a radius of 0.84 mm and holes distributed in three-dimensional (3D) space. We also display the potential application in interventional surgery of the microrobot by navigating it through a narrow blood vessel mold to wrap and transport a drug (95 times heavier than the robot) by deforming the robot's slender body and releasing the drug to the aim position finally. Moreover, the robot also demonstrates the possible applications in embolization by transforming and winding itself into an aneurysms phantom and exhibits its outstanding injectability by being successfully withdrawn and injected through a medical needle (diameter: 1.2 mm) of a syringe.

</details>


### [394] [RadarSplat-RIO: Indoor Radar-Inertial Odometry with Gaussian Splatting-Based Radar Bundle Adjustment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13492)
*Pou-Chun Kung,Yuan Tian,Zhengqin Li,Yue Liu,Eric Whitmire,Wolf Kienzle,Hrvoje Benko*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 首个基于高斯溅射的雷达束调整框架，联合优化雷达位姿与场景几何，显著降低漂移误差


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 雷达SLAM对恶劣天气和光照条件更具鲁棒性，但现有方法严重依赖帧间里程计导致显著漂移。虽然回环检测可以纠正长期误差，但需要重访地点且依赖鲁棒的地点识别。视觉里程计通常使用束调整联合优化位姿和地图，但雷达的等效束调整方法尚未充分探索。

Method: 提出首个基于高斯溅射的雷达束调整框架，使用密集可微的场景表示，联合优化雷达传感器位姿和场景几何，利用完整的距离-方位角-多普勒数据，首次将多帧束调整的优势引入雷达SLAM。

Result: 当与现有雷达惯性里程计前端集成时，该方法显著降低了位姿漂移并提高了鲁棒性。在多个室内场景中，相比先前的雷达惯性里程计，平均绝对平移误差减少了90%，旋转误差减少了80%。

Conclusion: 该研究首次实现了雷达束调整框架，通过高斯溅射表示联合优化雷达位姿和场景几何，显著提升了雷达SLAM的精度和鲁棒性，为雷达SLAM领域带来了多帧优化的新范式。

Abstract: Radar is more resilient to adverse weather and lighting conditions than visual and Lidar simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). However, most radar SLAM pipelines still rely heavily on frame-to-frame odometry, which leads to substantial drift. While loop closure can correct long-term errors, it requires revisiting places and relies on robust place recognition. In contrast, visual odometry methods typically leverage bundle adjustment (BA) to jointly optimize poses and map within a local window. However, an equivalent BA formulation for radar has remained largely unexplored. We present the first radar BA framework enabled by Gaussian Splatting (GS), a dense and differentiable scene representation. Our method jointly optimizes radar sensor poses and scene geometry using full range-azimuth-Doppler data, bringing the benefits of multi-frame BA to radar for the first time. When integrated with an existing radar-inertial odometry frontend, our approach significantly reduces pose drift and improves robustness. Across multiple indoor scenes, our radar BA achieves substantial gains over the prior radar-inertial odometry, reducing average absolute translational and rotational errors by 90% and 80%, respectively.

</details>


### [395] [RobotPan: A 360$^\circ$ Surround-View Robotic Vision System for Embodied Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13476)
*Jiahao Ma,Qiang Zhang,Peiran Liu,Zeran Su,Pihai Sun,Gang Han,Wen Zhao,Wei Cui,Zhang Zhang,Zhiyuan Xu,Renjing Xu,Jian Tang,Miaomiao Liu,Yijie Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出RobotPan系统，通过六相机+LiDAR实现360°环绕视觉，使用前馈框架从稀疏视图预测度量尺度3D高斯，实现实时渲染、重建和流式传输。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人视觉接口通常局限于狭窄的前向视野，多相机需要繁琐的手动切换，且运动抖动会导致头戴式显示器的模拟器眩晕。需要满足几何和实时约束的360°视觉覆盖系统。

Method: 提出RobotPan前馈框架：1) 将多视图特征提升到统一球坐标系表示；2) 使用分层球形体素先验解码高斯，在机器人附近分配精细分辨率，远处分配粗糙分辨率以减少计算冗余；3) 在线融合更新动态内容，防止静态区域无界增长。

Result: 实验表明RobotPan在质量上与现有前馈重建和视图合成方法相当，同时产生显著更少的高斯，实现实用的实时部署。发布了专门用于机器人360°新视图合成和度量3D重建的多传感器数据集。

Conclusion: RobotPan系统实现了满足几何和实时约束的360°环绕视觉，通过紧凑的3D高斯表示和分层分辨率分配，在保持质量的同时减少计算冗余，支持机器人导航、操作和移动的实际部署。

Abstract: Surround-view perception is increasingly important for robotic navigation and loco-manipulation, especially in human-in-the-loop settings such as teleoperation, data collection, and emergency takeover. However, current robotic visual interfaces are often limited to narrow forward-facing views, or, when multiple on-board cameras are available, require cumbersome manual switching that interrupts the operator's workflow. Both configurations suffer from motion-induced jitter that causes simulator sickness in head-mounted displays. We introduce a surround-view robotic vision system that combines six cameras with LiDAR to provide full 360$^\circ$ visual coverage, while meeting the geometric and real-time constraints of embodied deployment. We further present \textsc{RobotPan}, a feed-forward framework that predicts \emph{metric-scaled} and \emph{compact} 3D Gaussians from calibrated sparse-view inputs for real-time rendering, reconstruction, and streaming. \textsc{RobotPan} lifts multi-view features into a unified spherical coordinate representation and decodes Gaussians using hierarchical spherical voxel priors, allocating fine resolution near the robot and coarser resolution at larger radii to reduce computational redundancy without sacrificing fidelity. To support long sequences, our online fusion updates dynamic content while preventing unbounded growth in static regions by selectively updating appearance. Finally, we release a multi-sensor dataset tailored to 360$^\circ$ novel view synthesis and metric 3D reconstruction for robotics, covering navigation, manipulation, and locomotion on real platforms. Experiments show that \textsc{RobotPan} achieves competitive quality against prior feed-forward reconstruction and view-synthesis methods while producing substantially fewer Gaussians, enabling practical real-time embodied deployment. Project website: https://robotpan.github.io/

</details>


### [396] [Robust Energy-Aware Routing for Air-Ground Cooperative Multi-UAV Delivery in Wind-Uncertain Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13441)
*Tianshun Li,Hongliang Lu,Yanggang Sheng,Zhongzhen Wang,Haoang Li,Xinhu Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BER是一个在线风险敏感规划框架，用于风敏感卡车辅助无人机配送，通过时间依赖能量图路由平衡即时能耗和不确定性感知风险，显著提高任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在现实卡车-无人机物流系统中，无人机必须在部分可观测的时变风条件下安全返回，而现有路由方法大多假设静态或确定性能量模型，在动态风环境中不可靠。

Method: 提出电池高效路由(BER)框架，将问题建模为时间依赖能量图上的路由，边成本根据风致空气动力学效应演化；连续评估返回可行性，平衡即时能耗和不确定性感知风险；嵌入分层空地配送架构，结合任务分配、路由和分散轨迹执行。

Result: 在虚幻引擎环境生成的合成ER图和准真实风日志上的广泛仿真表明，BER相比静态和贪婪基线显著提高任务成功率，减少风致故障。

Conclusion: 结果强调了集成实时能量预算和环境感知对于动态风条件下无人机配送规划的重要性。

Abstract: Ensuring energy feasibility under wind uncertainty is critical for the safety and reliability of UAV delivery missions. In realistic truck-drone logistics systems, UAVs must deliver parcels and safely return under time-varying wind conditions that are only partially observable during flight. However, most existing routing approaches assume static or deterministic energy models, making them unreliable in dynamic wind environments. We propose Battery-Efficient Routing (BER), an online risk-sensitive planning framework for wind-sensitive truck-assisted UAV delivery. The problem is formulated as routing on a time dependent energy graph whose edge costs evolve according to wind-induced aerodynamic effects. BER continuously evaluates return feasibility while balancing instantaneous energy expenditure and uncertainty-aware risk. The approach is embedded in a hierarchical aerial-ground delivery architecture that combines task allocation, routing, and decentralized trajectory execution. Extensive simulations on synthetic ER graphs generated in Unreal Engine environments and quasi-real wind logs demonstrate that BER significantly improves mission success rates and reduces wind-induced failures compared with static and greedy baselines. These results highlight the importance of integrating real-time energy budgeting and environmental awareness for UAV delivery planning under dynamic wind conditions.

</details>


### [397] [Singularity Avoidance in Inverse Kinematics: A Unified Treatment of Classical and Learning-based Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13405)
*Vishnu Rudrasamudram,Hariharasudan Malaichamee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文系统综述了奇异鲁棒逆运动学方法，提出分类框架和基准测试协议，实验评估12种IK求解器，发现纯学习方法在奇异配置下失败，而混合方法通过经典细化获得成功。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 奇异配置导致任务空间移动性丧失、关节速度无界和求解器发散，现有综述缺乏连接经典奇异鲁棒IK与快速增长的学习方法之间的桥梁，需要统一处理并填补关键评估空白。

Method: 提出系统分类法按保留的几何结构和鲁棒性保证（形式化vs经验性）分类方法；建立基准测试协议，在Franka Panda机器人上评估12种IK求解器，通过四个互补面板测量误差随条件数退化、速度放大、分布外鲁棒性和计算成本。

Result: 纯学习方法即使在条件良好的目标上也失败（MLP：0%成功率，约10mm平均误差），而混合预热架构（IKFlow 59%-100%，CycleIK 0%-98.6%，GGIK 0%-100%）通过经典细化拯救学习求解器，DLS能从高达207mm的初始误差收敛。

Conclusion: 该研究为奇异鲁棒IK提供了统一框架和评估标准，揭示了纯学习方法的局限性，证明了混合方法的有效性，并指出深入评估奇异区域是未来工作的重点。

Abstract: Singular configurations cause loss of task-space mobility, unbounded joint velocities, and solver divergence in inverse kinematics (IK) for serial manipulators. No existing survey bridges classical singularity-robust IK with rapidly growing learning-based approaches. We provide a unified treatment spanning Jacobian regularization, Riemannian manipulability tracking, constrained optimization, and modern data-driven paradigms. A systematic taxonomy classifies methods by retained geometric structure and robustness guarantees (formal vs. empirical). We address a critical evaluation gap by proposing a benchmarking protocol and presenting experimental results: 12 IK solvers are evaluated on the Franka Panda under position-only IK across four complementary panels measuring error degradation by condition number, velocity amplification, out-of-distribution robustness, and computational cost. Results show that pure learning methods fail even on well-conditioned targets (MLP: 0% success, approx. 10 mm mean error), while hybrid warm-start architectures - IKFlow (59% to 100%), CycleIK(0% to 98.6%), GGIK (0% to 100%) - rescue learned solvers via classical refinement, with DLS converging from initial errors up to 207 mm. Deeper singularity-regime evaluation is identified as immediate future work.

</details>


### [398] [Boundary Sampling to Learn Predictive Safety Filters via Pontryagin's Maximum Principle](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13325)
*James Dallas,Thomas Lew,John Talbot,Jonathan DeCastro,Somil Bansal,John Subosits*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于庞特里亚金极大值原理的采样方法，用于指导学习型安全滤波器的数据收集，提高高维系统中安全约束的学习效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学习型安全滤波器在高维系统中面临数据采集效率低下的问题，特别是难以有效采样可能导致安全违规的状态。需要一种方法来集中学习资源于安全关键状态附近。

Method: 使用庞特里亚金极大值原理(PMP)表征刚好避免安全违规的边界轨迹，用这些轨迹指导学习型Hamilton-Jacobi可达性分析的数据收集，集中学习安全临界状态，最终学习控制屏障值函数用于安全滤波。

Result: 在共享控制自动驾驶赛车应用中，PMP采样提高了学习效率，实现了更快的收敛速度、更低的故障率、改进的安全集重构，且计算时间约为3毫秒。

Conclusion: PMP引导的采样方法有效解决了学习型安全滤波器在高维系统中的数据效率问题，通过集中学习安全临界状态，显著提升了安全约束的学习效果和实际应用性能。

Abstract: Safety filters provide a practical approach for enforcing safety constraints in autonomous systems. While learning-based tools scale to high-dimensional systems, their performance depends on informative data that includes states likely to lead to constraint violation, which can be difficult to efficiently sample in complex, high-dimensional systems. In this work, we characterize trajectories that barely avoid safety violations using the Pontryagin Maximum Principle. These boundary trajectories are used to guide data collection for learned Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability, concentrating learning efforts near safety-critical states to improve efficiency. The learned Control Barrier Value Function is then used directly for safety filtering. Simulations and experimental validation on a shared-control automotive racing application demonstrate PMP sampling improves learning efficiency, yielding faster convergence, reduced failure rates, and improved safe set reconstruction, with wall times around 3ms.

</details>


### [399] [Vectorizing Projection in Manifold-Constrained Motion Planning for Real-Time Whole-Body Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13323)
*Shrutheesh R Iyer,I-Chia Chang,Andrew Z. Liu,Yan Gu,Zachary Kingston*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于CPU SIMD加速的流形约束运动规划器，通过并行化投影式约束满足方法，实现比现有方法快100-1000倍的速度提升，首次实现实时约束运动规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流形约束运动规划算法对于复杂系统（如人形机器人）需要数十秒计算时间，在动态环境中不实用。需要开发实时约束运动规划方法以满足实际应用需求。

Method: 重新审视基于投影的约束满足方法，通过并行化视角将相关组件转换为可并行结构，利用CPU SIMD并行性规划满足约束的解决方案。

Result: 相比现有最先进方法实现100-1000倍加速，首次实现实时约束运动规划。在实际人形机器人上展示实时全身准静态规划生成能力。

Conclusion: 提出的SIMD加速流形约束运动规划器使实时约束运动规划成为可能，为复杂机器人系统在动态环境中的应用开辟了新途径。

Abstract: Many robot planning tasks require satisfaction of one or more constraints throughout the entire trajectory. For geometric constraints, manifold-constrained motion planning algorithms are capable of planning collision-free path between start and goal configurations on the constraint submanifolds specified by task. Current state-of-the-art methods can take tens of seconds to solve these tasks for complex systems such as humanoid robots, making real-world use impractical, especially in dynamic settings. Inspired by recent advances in hardware accelerated motion planning, we present a CPU SIMD-accelerated manifold-constrained motion planner that revisits projection-based constraint satisfaction through the lens of parallelization. By transforming relevant components into parallelizable structures, we use SIMD parallelism to plan constraint satisfying solutions. Our approach achieves up to 100-1000x speed-ups over the state-of-the-art, making real-time constrained motion planning feasible for the first time. We demonstrate our planner on a real humanoid robot and show real-time whole-body quasi-static plan generation. Our work is available at https://commalab.org/papers/mcvamp/.

</details>


### [400] [Utilizing Inpainting for Keypoint Detection for Vision-Based Control of Robotic Manipulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13309)
*Sreejani Chatterjee,Venkatesh Mullur,Abhinav Gandhi,Berk Calli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于自然视觉特征的机器人配置空间视觉伺服框架，通过数据驱动方法训练关键点检测算法，无需外部标记或精确的相机标定和机器人模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种能够在机器人上无法或不希望放置外部标记的场景下，鲁棒地检测和跟踪自然特征或关键点的方法，用于基于视觉的控制。

Method: 1) 创建数据收集管道：在机器人身体上附加ArUco标记，标记其中心作为关键点，然后使用修复方法去除标记并重建被遮挡区域，生成自动标记的自然（无标记）机器人图像；2) 训练关键点检测算法；3) 引入运行时修复模型实时重建机器人被遮挡区域；4) 集成无迹卡尔曼滤波器（UKF）优化关键点估计。

Result: 获得了成功的控制结果，这种无模型、纯基于视觉的控制策略在完全可见和部分遮挡情况下都能利用自然机器人特征进行运行时控制。

Conclusion: 提出了一种新颖的视觉伺服框架，通过数据驱动方法和修复技术实现了基于自然特征的机器人配置空间控制，消除了对精确相机标定和机器人模型的依赖，并在遮挡情况下保持了鲁棒性。

Abstract: In this paper we present a novel visual servoing framework to control a robotic manipulator in the configuration space by using purely natural visual features. Our goal is to develop methods that can robustly detect and track natural features or keypoints on robotic manipulators that would be used for vision-based control, especially for scenarios where placing external markers on the robot is not feasible or preferred at runtime. For the model training process of our data driven approach, we create a data collection pipeline where we attach ArUco markers along the robot's body, label their centers as keypoints, and then utilize an inpainting method to remove the markers and reconstruct the occluded regions. By doing so, we generate natural (markerless) robot images that are automatically labeled with the marker locations. These images are used to train a keypoint detection algorithm, which is used to control the robot configuration using natural features of the robot. Unlike the prior methods that rely on accurate camera calibration and robot models for labeling training images, our approach eliminates these dependencies through inpainting. To achieve robust keypoint detection even in the presence of occlusion, we introduce a second inpainting model, this time to utilize during runtime, that reconstructs occluded regions of the robot in real time, enabling continuous keypoint detection. To further enhance the consistency and robustness of keypoint predictions, we integrate an Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) that refines the keypoint estimates over time, adding to stable and reliable control performance. We obtained successful control results with this model-free and purely vision-based control strategy, utilizing natural robot features in the runtime, both under full visibility and partial occlusion.

</details>


### [401] [GeoVision-Enabled Digital Twin for Hybrid Autonomous-Teleoperated Medical Responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13248)
*Parham Kebria,Soheil Sabri,Laura J Brattain*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于GeoVision的数字孪生架构，用于混合自主-遥操作医疗响应系统，通过实时同步的数字孪生体增强远程医疗操作的情境感知和决策能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对灾害影响和基础设施有限环境中的紧急医疗响应需求，传统地面控制界面在远程医疗操作中存在情境感知不足的问题，需要更直观的远程操作支持系统

Method: 提出集成感知与自适应导航的数字孪生架构，该架构通过GeoVision能力实现实时同步的数字孪生体，镜像系统状态、环境动态、患者状况和任务目标

Result: 数字孪生为远程临床和操作人员提供平台及其操作环境的直观、持续更新的虚拟表示，相比传统地面控制界面，显著增强了情境感知和知情决策能力

Conclusion: 基于GeoVision的数字孪生架构为混合自主-遥操作医疗响应系统提供了有效的解决方案，通过实时虚拟表示改善了远程医疗操作中的决策支持和操作效率

Abstract: Remote medical response systems are increasingly being deployed to support emergency care in disaster-affected and infrastructure-limited environments. Enabled by GeoVision capabilities, this paper presents a Digital Twin architecture for hybrid autonomous-teleoperated medical response systems. The proposed framework integrates perception and adaptive navigation with a Digital Twin, synchronized in real-time, that mirrors system states, environmental dynamics, patient conditions, and mission objectives. Unlike traditional ground control interfaces, the Digital Twin provides remote clinical and operational users with an intuitive, continuously updated virtual representation of the platform and its operational context, enabling enhanced situational awareness and informed decision-making.

</details>


### [402] [Weakly-supervised Learning for Physics-informed Neural Motion Planning via Sparse Roadmap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13204)
*Ruiqi Ni,Yuchen Liu,Ahmed H. Qureshi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出H-NTFields框架，结合稀疏路图的弱监督与物理信息PDE正则化，解决复杂多房间环境中现有物理信息方法难以扩展的问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的运动规划方法（如NTFields）通过求解Eikonal方程学习值函数，但在复杂多房间环境中难以扩展，仅增加样本无法解决局部极小值或保证全局一致性

Method: 提出分层神经时间场（H-NTFields），结合稀疏路图的弱监督（提供旅行时间的上下界作为全局拓扑锚点）与物理信息PDE正则化（强制局部几何保真度和障碍物感知传播）

Result: 在18个Gibson环境和真实机器人平台上实验表明，H-NTFields显著提高了鲁棒性，优于现有物理信息方法，同时通过连续值表示实现快速摊销推理

Conclusion: H-NTFields通过结合弱监督路图与物理信息正则化，有效解决了复杂多房间环境中的运动规划问题，提高了方法的可扩展性和鲁棒性

Abstract: The motion planning problem requires finding a collision-free path between start and goal configurations in high-dimensional, cluttered spaces. Recent learning-based methods offer promising solutions, with self-supervised physics-informed approaches such as Neural Time Fields (NTFields) solving the Eikonal equation to learn value functions without expert demonstrations. However, existing physics-informed methods struggle to scale in complex, multi-room environments, where simply increasing the number of samples cannot resolve local minima or guarantee global consistency. We propose Hierarchical Neural Time Fields (H-NTFields), a weakly-supervised framework that combines weak supervision from sparse roadmaps with physics-informed PDE regularization. The roadmap provides global topological anchors through upper and lower bounds on travel times, while PDE losses enforce local geometric fidelity and obstacle-aware propagation. Experiments on 18 Gibson environments and real robotic platforms show that H-NTFields substantially improves robustness over prior physics-informed methods, while enabling fast amortized inference through a continuous value representation.

</details>


### [403] [Learning Versatile Humanoid Manipulation with Touch Dreaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13015)
*Yaru Niu,Zhenlong Fang,Binghong Chen,Shuai Zhou,Revanth Senthilkumaran,Hao Zhang,Bingqing Chen,Chen Qiu,H. Eric Tseng,Jonathan Francis,Ding Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HTD：基于Transformer的多模态人形机器人控制方法，通过触觉预测增强学习接触感知表示，在接触丰富的操作任务中显著提升成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决人形机器人在现实世界中的全身定位操作挑战，需要同时保证全身稳定性、灵巧手部操作和接触感知，特别是在频繁接触变化的环境中

Method: 1. 开发基于强化学习的全身控制器保证下半身和躯干稳定；2. 构建VR遥操作与人体运动映射结合的全身数据收集系统；3. 提出HTD模型：多模态编码器-解码器Transformer，将触觉作为核心模态与多视角视觉、本体感知结合；4. 采用行为克隆训练，通过触觉预测（预测未来手部关节力和触觉潜在表示）增强接触感知表示学习

Result: 在五个接触丰富的任务（Insert-T、图书整理、毛巾折叠、猫砂铲除、茶水服务）中，HTD相比最强基线实现了90.9%的相对成功率提升；消融实验显示潜在空间触觉预测比原始触觉预测更有效，带来30%的相对成功率增益

Conclusion: 结合稳健的全身执行、可扩展的人形数据收集和预测性触觉中心学习，能够实现现实世界中多功能、高灵巧性的人形机器人操作

Abstract: Humanoid robots promise general-purpose assistance, yet real-world humanoid loco-manipulation remains challenging because it requires whole-body stability, dexterous hands, and contact-aware perception under frequent contact changes. In this work, we study dexterous, contact-rich humanoid loco-manipulation. We first develop an RL-based whole-body controller that provides stable lower-body and torso execution during complex manipulation. Built on this controller, we develop a whole-body humanoid data collection system that combines VR-based teleoperation with human-to-humanoid motion mapping, enabling efficient collection of real-world demonstrations. We then propose Humanoid Transformer with Touch Dreaming (HTD), a multimodal encoder--decoder Transformer that models touch as a core modality alongside multi-view vision and proprioception. HTD is trained in a single stage with behavioral cloning augmented by touch dreaming: in addition to predicting action chunks, the policy predicts future hand-joint forces and future tactile latents, encouraging the shared Transformer trunk to learn contact-aware representations for dexterous interaction. Across five contact-rich tasks, Insert-T, Book Organization, Towel Folding, Cat Litter Scooping, and Tea Serving, HTD achieves a 90.9% relative improvement in average success rate over the stronger baseline. Ablation results further show that latent-space tactile prediction is more effective than raw tactile prediction, yielding a 30% relative gain in success rate. These results demonstrate that combining robust whole-body execution, scalable humanoid data collection, and predictive touch-centered learning enables versatile, high-dexterity humanoid manipulation in the real world. Project webpage: humanoid-touch-dream.github.io.

</details>


### [404] [XRZero-G0: Pushing the Frontier of Dexterous Robotic Manipulation with Interfaces, Quality and Ratios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13001)
*James Wang,Primo Pu,Zephyr Fung,Alex Wang,Sam Wang,Bender Deng,Kevin Wang,Zivid Liu,Chris Pan,Panda Yang,Andy Zhai,Lucy Liang,Shalfun Li,Johnny Sun,Jacky Xu,Will Tian,Kai Yan,Kohler Ye,Scott Li,Qian Wang,Roy Gan,Hao Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: XRZero-G0系统通过硬件软件协同设计，结合VR界面和专用夹爪，构建闭环数据收集-训练-评估流程，实现低成本大规模机器人操作数据收集，通过少量真实机器人数据与大量机器人无关数据的混合策略，达到与纯真实数据相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量、动作对齐的演示数据获取是扩展灵巧机器人操作基础模型的主要瓶颈。现有机器人无关的人类演示系统（如UMI范式）存在硬件人机工程学不佳、开环工作流程以及缺乏系统数据混合策略等限制。

Method: 提出XRZero-G0硬件软件协同设计系统：1）配备顶视摄像头和双专用夹爪的VR界面提高收集效率；2）闭环数据收集、检查、训练和评估流程确保数据可靠性；3）研究机器人无关数据的经验缩放行为和最优混合比例。

Result: 系统实现85%数据有效性率，建立透明质量控制机制。实验表明，少量真实机器人数据与大规模机器人无关数据（如10:1比例）混合可达到与纯真实数据集相当的性能，同时将采集成本降低20倍。构建2000小时机器人无关数据集，实现零样本跨具身迁移到目标物理机器人。

Conclusion: XRZero-G0提供了一种高度可扩展的通用真实世界操作方法，通过硬件软件协同设计和数据混合策略，解决了机器人操作数据收集的瓶颈问题，为大规模基础模型训练提供了可行方案。

Abstract: The acquisition of high-quality, action-aligned demonstration data remains a fundamental bottleneck in scaling foundation models for dexterous robot manipulation. Although robot-free human demonstrations (e.g., the UMI paradigm) offer a scalable alternative to traditional teleoperation, current systems are constrained by sub-optimal hardware ergonomics, open-loop workflows, and a lack of systematic data-mixing strategies. To address these limitations, we present XRZero-G0, a hardware-software co-designed system for embodied data collection and policy learning. The system features an ergonomic, virtual reality interface equipped with a top-view camera and dual specialized grippers to directly improve collection efficiency. To ensure dataset reliability, we propose a closed-loop collection, inspection, training, and evaluation pipeline for non-proprioceptive data. This workflow achieves an 85% data validity rate and establishes a transparent mechanism for quality control. Furthermore, we investigate the empirical scaling behaviors and optimal mixing ratios of robot-free data. Extensive experiments indicate that combining a minimal volume of real-robot data with large-scale robot-free data (e.g., a 10:1 ratio) achieves performance comparable to exclusively real-robot datasets, while reducing acquisition costs by a factor of twenty. Utilizing XRZero-G0, we construct a 2,000-hour robot-free dataset that enables zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer to a target physical robot, demonstrating a highly scalable methodology for generalized real-world manipulation.Our project repository: https://github.com/X-Square-Robot/XRZero-G0

</details>


### [405] [RMGS-SLAM: Real-time Multi-sensor Gaussian Splatting SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12942)
*Dongen Li,Yi Liu,Junqi Liu,Zewen Sun,Zefan Huang,Shuo Sun,Jiahui Liu,Chengran Yuan,Hongliang Guo,Francis E. H. Tay,Marcelo H. Ang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种紧耦合的LiDAR-惯性-视觉3D高斯溅射SLAM框架，用于大规模真实场景的实时位姿估计和逼真建图，通过并行处理、级联策略和闭环优化实现了效率、精度和渲染质量的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于3D高斯溅射的SLAM方法在大规模真实环境中难以同时实现低延迟位姿估计、与传感器流同步的3D高斯重建以及长期全局一致性，需要一种能够平衡这些需求的解决方案。

Method: 提出紧耦合的LiDAR-惯性-视觉3DGS SLAM框架，采用并行处理架构同时执行状态估计和3D高斯基元初始化与全局高斯优化；引入级联策略结合前馈预测和基于体素的主成分分析几何先验来提升初始化质量和加速优化收敛；在优化的全局高斯地图上直接进行闭环，通过基于高斯的GICP配准估计闭环约束，然后进行位姿图优化。

Result: 在公开数据集和自建的大规模室外闭环SLAM序列上进行了广泛实验，结果表明该方法在多样且具有挑战性的真实场景中实现了实时效率、定位精度和渲染质量之间的良好平衡。

Conclusion: 该方法成功解决了大规模真实环境中3D高斯溅射SLAM的挑战，通过并行处理、级联优化和直接高斯地图闭环等创新，实现了实时位姿估计和逼真建图的联合优化，为大规模场景的实时SLAM提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Real-time 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS)-based Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) in large-scale real-world environments remains challenging, as existing methods often struggle to jointly achieve low-latency pose estimation, 3D Gaussian reconstruction in step with incoming sensor streams, and long-term global consistency. In this paper, we present a tightly coupled LiDAR-Inertial-Visual (LIV) 3DGS-based SLAM framework for real-time pose estimation and photorealistic mapping in large-scale real-world scenes. The system executes state estimation and 3D Gaussian primitive initialization in parallel with global Gaussian optimization, thereby enabling continuous dense mapping. To improve Gaussian initialization quality and accelerate optimization convergence, we introduce a cascaded strategy that combines feed-forward predictions with voxel-based principal component analysis (voxel-PCA) geometric priors. To enhance global consistency in large scenes, we further perform loop closure directly on the optimized global Gaussian map by estimating loop constraints through Gaussian-based Generalized Iterative Closest Point (GICP) registration, followed by pose-graph optimization. In addition, we collected challenging large-scale looped outdoor SLAM sequences with hardware-synchronized LiDAR-camera-IMU and ground-truth trajectories to support realistic and comprehensive evaluation. Extensive experiments on both public datasets and our dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a strong balance among real-time efficiency, localization accuracy, and rendering quality across diverse and challenging real-world scenes.

</details>


### [406] [DINO-Explorer: Active Underwater Discovery via Ego-Motion Compensated Semantic Predictive Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12933)
*Yuhan Jin,Nayari Marie Lessa,Mariela De Lucas Alvarez,Melvin Laux,Lucas Amparo Barbosa,Frank Kirchner,Rebecca Adam*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DINO-Explorer：基于语义惊奇信号的水下主动感知框架，通过动作条件化预测和自运动补偿实现高效事件检测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自主水下航行器（AUV）作为被动数据记录器，会捕获大量视频供离线审查，但经常错过具有高科学价值的瞬态事件。需要转向主动感知，需要一个因果在线信号来突出重要现象，同时抑制机动引起的视觉变化。

Method: 提出DINO-Explorer框架，在冻结的DINOv3基础模型的潜在空间中操作，使用轻量级动作条件化循环预测器预测短期语义演化。采用仿效传出副本的模块，利用全局池化光流来抵消自诱导的视觉变化而不抑制真实的环境新奇性。

Result: 在固定操作点下，系统保留了78.8%的后发现人类审查共识事件，触发确认率为56.8%。自运动补偿相对于未补偿的惊奇信号基线减少了45.5%的误报。在回放侧帕累托消融研究中，DINO-Explorer在选定操作点将遥测带宽减少了48.2%，同时保持了62.2%的峰值F1分数。

Conclusion: DINO-Explorer提供了一个鲁棒、带宽高效的注意力机制，成功将数据传输集中在人类验证的新奇事件周围，有效提升了水下监测的科学选择性。

Abstract: Marine ecosystem degradation necessitates continuous, scientifically selective underwater monitoring. However, most autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) operate as passive data loggers, capturing exhaustive video for offline review and frequently missing transient events of high scientific value. Transitioning to active perception requires a causal, online signal that highlights significant phenomena while suppressing maneuver-induced visual changes. We propose DINO-Explorer, a novelty-aware perception framework driven by a continuous semantic surprise signal. Operating within the latent space of a frozen DINOv3 foundation model, it leverages a lightweight, action-conditioned recurrent predictor to anticipate short-horizon semantic evolution. An efference-copy-inspired module utilizes globally pooled optical flow to discount self-induced visual changes without suppressing genuine environmental novelty. We evaluate this signal on the downstream task of asynchronous event triage under variant telemetry constraints. Results demonstrate that DINO-Explorer provides a robust, bandwidth-efficient attention mechanism. At a fixed operating point, the system retains 78.8% of post-discovery human-reviewer consensus events with a 56.8% trigger confirmation rate, effectively surfacing mission-relevant phenomena. Crucially, ego-motion conditioning suppresses 45.5% of false positives relative to an uncompensated surprise signal baseline. In a replay-side Pareto ablation study, DINO-Explorer robustly dominates the validated peak F1 versus telemetry bandwidth frontier, reducing telemetry bandwidth by 48.2% at the selected operating point while maintaining a 62.2% peak F1 score, successfully concentrating data transmission around human-verified novelty events.

</details>


### [407] [E2E-Fly: An Integrated Training-to-Deployment System for End-to-End Quadrotor Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12916)
*Fangyu Sun,Fanxing Li,Linzuo Zhang,Yu Hu,Renbiao Jin,Shuyu Wu,Wenxian Yu,Danping Zou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: E2E-Fly是一个集成框架，将敏捷四旋翼平台与完整的训练、验证和部署工作流相结合，首次系统性地将可微分物理学习与四旋翼的训练、验证和现实世界部署统一起来。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决四旋翼从仿真到现实训练的挑战，包括视觉渲染效率低、物理建模不准确、传感器差异未建模以及缺乏将可微分物理学习集成到端到端训练的统一平台。现有系统缺乏系统性的零样本迁移管道，阻碍了可重复性和现实世界部署。

Method: 1) 集成框架包含高性能仿真器，支持可微分物理学习和强化学习，并针对常见四旋翼任务设计结构化奖励；2) 两阶段验证策略：仿真到仿真迁移和硬件在环测试；3) 通过专用低级控制接口和全面的仿真到现实对齐方法部署到两个物理四旋翼平台，包括系统辨识、域随机化、延迟补偿和噪声建模。

Result: 成功训练了六个端到端控制任务，并在现实世界中进行了部署，验证了框架的有效性。

Conclusion: E2E-Fly是首个系统性地将可微分物理学习与四旋翼的训练、验证和现实世界部署统一起来的工作，为解决仿真到现实迁移挑战提供了完整的解决方案。

Abstract: Training and transferring learning-based policies for quadrotors from simulation to reality remains challenging due to inefficient visual rendering, physical modeling inaccuracies, unmodeled sensor discrepancies, and the absence of a unified platform integrating differentiable physics learning into end-to-end training. While recent work has demonstrated various end-to-end quadrotor control tasks, few systems provide a systematic, zero-shot transfer pipeline, hindering reproducibility and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we introduce E2E-Fly, an integrated framework featuring an agile quadrotor platform coupled with a full-stack training, validation, and deployment workflow. The training framework incorporates a high-performance simulator with support for differentiable physics learning and reinforcement learning, alongside structured reward design tailored to common quadrotor tasks. We further introduce a two-stage validation strategy using sim-to-sim transfer and hardware-in-the-loop testing, and deploy policies onto two physical quadrotor platforms via a dedicated low-level control interface and a comprehensive sim-to-real alignment methodology, encompassing system identification, domain randomization, latency compensation, and noise modeling. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to systematically unify differentiable physical learning with training, validation, and real-world deployment for quadrotors. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework for training six end-to-end control tasks and deploy them in the real world.

</details>


### [408] [Tree Learning: A Multi-Skill Continual Learning Framework for Humanoid Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12909)
*Yifei Yan,Linqi Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Tree Learning框架，通过根-分支层次参数继承机制解决人形机器人多技能持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，支持周期性/非周期性运动，在Unity仿真中实现100%技能保留率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人强化学习从单任务向多技能范式演进时，如何高效扩展新技能同时避免灾难性遗忘成为关键挑战。现有方法要么依赖复杂的MoE模型拓扑调整，要么需要训练极大规模模型，难以轻量部署。

Method: 提出Tree Learning多技能持续学习框架：1) 根-分支层次参数继承机制，通过参数重用为分支技能提供运动先验；2) 结合相位调制和插值的多模态前馈适应机制，支持周期性和非周期性运动；3) 任务级奖励塑形策略加速技能收敛。

Result: Unity仿真实验表明，相比同时多任务训练，Tree Learning在各种代表性运动技能上获得更高奖励，保持100%技能保留率，实现无缝多技能切换和实时交互控制。在超级马里奥式交互场景和古典中国园林自主导航两个任务中验证了性能和泛化能力。

Conclusion: Tree Learning框架通过参数继承机制从根本上防止灾难性遗忘，支持多种运动类型，实现了高效的多技能持续学习，为人形机器人轻量部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: As reinforcement learning for humanoid robots evolves from single-task to multi-skill paradigms, efficiently expanding new skills while avoiding catastrophic forgetting has become a key challenge in embodied intelligence. Existing approaches either rely on complex topology adjustments in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models or require training extremely large-scale models, making lightweight deployment difficult.
