To address this, we propose Tree Learning, a multi-skill continual learning framework for humanoid robots. The framework adopts a root-branch hierarchical parameter inheritance mechanism, providing motion priors for branch skills through parameter reuse to fundamentally prevent catastrophic forgetting. A multi-modal feedforward adaptation mechanism combining phase modulation and interpolation is designed to support both periodic and aperiodic motions. A task-level reward shaping strategy is also proposed to accelerate skill convergence. Unity-based simulation experiments show that, in contrast to simultaneous multi-task training, Tree Learning achieves higher rewards across various representative locomotion skills while maintaining a 100% skill retention rate, enabling seamless multi-skill switching and real-time interactive control. We further validate the performance and generalization capability of Tree Learning on two distinct Unity-simulated tasks: a Super Mario-inspired interactive scenario and autonomous navigation in a classical Chinese garden environment.

</details>


### [409] [FastGrasp: Learning-based Whole-body Control method for Fast Dexterous Grasping with Mobile Manipulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12879)
*Heng Tao,Yiming Zhong,Zemin Yang,Yuexin Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FastGrasp：一个基于学习的移动机器人快速抓取框架，通过两阶段强化学习整合抓取引导、全身控制和触觉反馈，实现高速运动下的稳定抓取和多样化物体操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在高速运动下的冲击稳定、实时全身协调以及跨多样化物体和场景的泛化方面存在根本性挑战，受限于固定底座、简单夹爪或缓慢的触觉响应能力

Method: 采用两阶段强化学习策略：第一阶段通过条件变分自编码器基于物体点云生成多样化抓取候选；第二阶段通过最优抓取选择引导移动底座、机械臂和手爪的协调运动；触觉传感实现实时抓取调整以处理冲击效应和物体变化

Result: 在仿真和真实场景中展示了优越的抓取性能，通过有效的仿真到真实转移实现了跨多样化物体几何形状的鲁棒操作

Conclusion: FastGrasp框架成功解决了移动机器人快速抓取中的关键挑战，整合了抓取引导、全身控制和触觉反馈，实现了高速运动下的稳定操作和跨多样化物体的泛化能力

Abstract: Fast grasping is critical for mobile robots in logistics, manufacturing, and service applications. Existing methods face fundamental challenges in impact stabilization under high-speed motion, real-time whole-body coordination, and generalization across diverse objects and scenarios, limited by fixed bases, simple grippers, or slow tactile response capabilities. We propose \textbf{FastGrasp}, a learning-based framework that integrates grasp guidance, whole-body control, and tactile feedback for mobile fast grasping. Our two-stage reinforcement learning strategy first generates diverse grasp candidates via conditional variational autoencoder conditioned on object point clouds, then executes coordinated movements of mobile base, arm, and hand guided by optimal grasp selection. Tactile sensing enables real-time grasp adjustments to handle impact effects and object variations. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior grasping performance in both simulation and real-world scenarios, achieving robust manipulation across diverse object geometries through effective sim-to-real transfer.

</details>


### [410] [OVAL: Open-Vocabulary Augmented Memory Model for Lifelong Object Goal Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12872)
*Jiahua Pei,Yi Liu,Guoping Pan,Yuanhao Jiang,Houde Liu,Xueqian Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OVAL是一个用于长期开放词汇目标导航的终身记忆框架，通过结构化记忆描述符和概率探索策略提升多目标导航效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物体目标导航方法在单一物体导航中表现良好，但在长期连续目标导航中存在局限性，主要问题是终身记忆表示的应用受限，阻碍了在长时间内有效导航到连续目标的能力

Method: 提出了OVAL终身开放词汇记忆框架，引入记忆描述符来结构化管理记忆模型，并提出基于概率的探索策略，采用多值前沿评分来增强终身探索效率

Result: 大量实验证明了所提出系统的高效性和鲁棒性

Conclusion: OVAL框架通过结构化记忆管理和概率探索策略，有效解决了长期开放词汇目标导航中的记忆表示和探索效率问题

Abstract: Object Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) refers to an agent navigating to an object in an unseen environment, which is an ability often required in the accomplishment of complex tasks. While existing methods demonstrate proficiency in isolated single object navigation, their limitations emerge in the restricted applicability of lifelong memory representations, which ultimately hinders effective navigation toward continual targets over extended periods. To address this problem, we propose OVAL, a novel lifelong open-vocabulary memory framework, which enables efficient and precise execution of long-term navigation in semantically open tasks. Within this framework, we introduce memory descriptors to facilitate structured management of the memory model. Additionally, we propose a novel probability-based exploration strategy, utilizing a multi-value frontier scoring to enhance lifelong exploration efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and robustness of the proposed system.

</details>


### [411] [Evolving the Complete Muscle: Efficient Morphology-Control Co-design for Musculoskeletal Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12855)
*Lidong Sun,Wentao Zhao,Ye Wang,Huaping Liu,Fuchun Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于肌肉骨骼机器人形态与控制的协同设计方法，通过同时优化肌肉强度、速度和刚度，并利用谱设计进化框架在低维流形上进行高效探索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有肌肉骨骼机器人研究通常使用固定肌肉生理参数模型，这种静态物理设置无法适应复杂任务的多样化动态需求，从而限制了机器人的性能上限。需要开发能够同时优化多个生理属性的形态与控制协同设计方法。

Method: 提出完整的肌肉骨骼形态进化空间，同时进化肌肉强度、速度和刚度。为解决这种全面进化导致的探索空间指数级扩张问题，提出了谱设计进化（SDE）框架。SDE通过整合双侧对称先验与主成分分析（PCA），将复杂肌肉参数投影到低维谱流形上，实现高效的形态探索。

Result: 在MyoSuite框架上对四种任务（行走、楼梯、丘陵和崎岖地形）进行评估，该方法相比固定形态和标准进化基线表现出更优的学习效率和运动稳定性。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了同时优化多个肌肉生理参数的重要性，提出的谱设计进化框架能够有效解决高维形态空间的探索问题，为肌肉骨骼机器人的形态与控制协同设计提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Musculoskeletal robots offer intrinsic compliance and flexibility, providing a promising paradigm for versatile locomotion. However, existing research typically relies on models with fixed muscle physiological parameters. This static physical setting fails to accommodate the diverse dynamic demands of complex tasks, inherently limiting the robot's performance upper bound. In this work, we focus on the morphology and control co-design of musculoskeletal systems. Unlike previous studies that optimize single physiological attributes such as stiffness, we introduce a Complete Musculoskeletal Morphological Evolution Space that simultaneously evolves muscle strength, velocity, and stiffness. To overcome the exponential expansion of the exploration space caused by this comprehensive evolution, we propose Spectral Design Evolution (SDE), a high-efficiency co-optimization framework. By integrating a bilateral symmetry prior with Principal Component Analysis (PCA), SDE projects complex muscle parameters onto a low-dimensional spectral manifold, enabling efficient morphological exploration. Evaluated on the MyoSuite framework across four tasks (Walk, Stair, Hilly, and Rough terrains), our method demonstrates superior learning efficiency and locomotion stability compared to fixed-morphology and standard evolutionary baselines.

</details>


### [412] [PAINT: Partner-Agnostic Intent-Aware Cooperative Transport with Legged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12852)
*Zhihao Cao,Tianxu An,Chenhao Li,Stelian Coros,Marco Hutter*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PAINT是一个轻量级分层学习框架，用于无需外部传感器的腿部机器人协作运输，通过本体感知反馈推断伙伴意图，实现跨地形、负载和伙伴的鲁棒协作运输。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 协作运输需要机器人在物理交互中推断伙伴意图，同时在复杂环境中保持稳定的移动操作。传统方法难以捕捉和建模交互信号，且依赖外部传感器（如力扭矩传感器）或负载跟踪，限制了实际部署的轻量化和可扩展性。

Method: PAINT采用分层学习框架：高层策略通过意图估计器和师生训练方案推断伙伴交互力矩；底层移动骨干确保鲁棒执行。该方法将意图理解与地形鲁棒移动解耦，无需外部力扭矩传感或负载跟踪，实现轻量部署。框架支持扩展到去中心化多机器人运输，并可通过替换底层移动骨干在不同机器人平台上迁移。

Result: 大量仿真和真实世界实验表明，PAINT能在多样化地形、负载和伙伴条件下实现顺从的协作运输。框架自然扩展到去中心化多机器人运输，并能通过替换底层移动骨干在不同机器人平台上迁移。结果显示，负载耦合交互中的本体感知信号为伙伴无关的意图感知协作运输提供了可扩展接口。

Conclusion: PAINT证明了通过本体感知反馈直接推断伙伴意图的可行性，为协作腿部运输提供了轻量高效的解决方案。该框架的伙伴无关特性、地形鲁棒性和可扩展性使其在实际部署中具有显著优势，为物理交互中的意图理解提供了新思路。

Abstract: Collaborative transport requires robots to infer partner intent through physical interaction while maintaining stable loco-manipulation. This becomes particularly challenging in complex environments, where interaction signals are difficult to capture and model. We present PAINT, a lightweight yet efficient hierarchical learning framework for partner-agonistic intent-aware collaborative legged transport that infers partner intent directly from proprioceptive feedback. PAINT decouples intent understanding from terrain-robust locomotion: A high-level policy infers the partner interaction wrench using an intent estimator and a teacher-student training scheme, while a low-level locomotion backbone ensures robust execution. This enables lightweight deployment without external force-torque sensing or payload tracking. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate compliant cooperative transport across diverse terrains, payloads, and partners. Furthermore, we show that PAINT naturally scales to decentralized multi-robot transport and transfers across robot embodiments by swapping the underlying locomotion backbone. Our results suggest that proprioceptive signals in payload-coupled interaction provide a scalable interface for partner-agnostic intent-aware collaborative transport.

</details>


### [413] [GGD-SLAM: Monocular 3DGS SLAM Powered by Generalizable Motion Model for Dynamic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12837)
*Yi Liu,Haoxuan Xu,Hongbo Duan,Keyu Fan,Zhengyang Zhang,Peiyu Zhuang,Pengting Luo,Houde Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GGD-SLAM：一种用于动态环境的SLAM框架，采用通用运动模型，无需预定义语义标注或深度输入，通过序列注意力机制和动态特征增强器分离静态与动态组件，在动态场景中实现最先进的相机姿态估计和密集重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统视觉SLAM算法基于静态环境假设，在动态环境中性能显著下降。现有方法通常依赖预定义语义标注或深度输入，限制了实际应用。需要开发一种无需这些先验信息、能有效处理动态环境的SLAM系统。

Method: 1. 采用FIFO队列管理输入帧，通过序列注意力机制提取动态语义特征；2. 集成动态特征增强器分离静态和动态组件；3. 设计静态信息采样方法填充被遮挡区域；4. 提出针对动态环境的干扰自适应SSIM损失函数，增强系统鲁棒性。

Result: 在真实世界动态数据集上的实验表明，GGD-SLAM在动态场景的相机姿态估计和密集重建方面达到了最先进的性能，显著优于依赖静态环境假设的传统方法。

Conclusion: GGD-SLAM通过通用运动模型和创新的动态处理机制，成功解决了动态环境中的SLAM挑战，无需预定义语义标注或深度输入，为实际动态场景的定位与建图提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Visual SLAM algorithms achieve significant improvements through the exploration of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representations, particularly in generating high-fidelity dense maps. However, they depend on a static environment assumption and experience significant performance degradation in dynamic environments. This paper presents GGD-SLAM, a framework that employs a generalizable motion model to address the challenges of localization and dense mapping in dynamic environments - without predefined semantic annotations or depth input. Specifically, the proposed system employs a First-In-First-Out (FIFO) queue to manage incoming frames, facilitating dynamic semantic feature extraction through a sequential attention mechanism. This is integrated with a dynamic feature enhancer to separate static and dynamic components. Additionally, to minimize dynamic distractors' impact on the static components, we devise a method to fill occluded areas via static information sampling and design a distractor-adaptive Structure Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) loss tailored for dynamic environments, significantly enhancing the system's resilience. Experiments conducted on real-world dynamic datasets demonstrate that the proposed system achieves state-of-the-art performance in camera pose estimation and dense reconstruction in dynamic scenes.

</details>


### [414] [VULCAN: Vision-Language-Model Enhanced Multi-Agent Cooperative Navigation for Indoor Fire-Disaster Response](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12831)
*Shengding Liu,Qiben Yan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VULCAN：基于多模态感知和视觉语言模型的多智能体协同导航框架，专为室内火灾救援设计，在模拟真实火灾场景中评估现有方法并揭示其关键失效模式


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 室内火灾灾害对自主搜救构成严峻挑战，现有多智能体导航系统主要基于视觉感知且设计用于良性室内环境，在火灾驱动的动态条件下性能显著下降，需要更鲁棒的感知和危险感知规划

Method: 提出VULCAN框架，基于多模态感知和视觉语言模型，扩展Habitat-Matterport3D基准，模拟物理真实的火灾场景（包括烟雾扩散、热危害和传感器退化），评估代表性多智能体协同导航基线方法

Result: 揭示了现有方法在火灾场景中的关键失效模式，强调了鲁棒感知和危险感知规划对于可靠多智能体搜救的必要性

Conclusion: VULCAN框架通过多模态感知和视觉语言模型为室内火灾灾害响应提供了有效的多智能体协同导航解决方案，填补了现有系统在恶劣环境下的性能缺陷

Abstract: Indoor fire disasters pose severe challenges to autonomous search and rescue due to dense smoke, high temperatures, and dynamically evolving indoor environments. In such time-critical scenarios, multi-agent cooperative navigation is particularly useful, as it enables faster and broader exploration than single-agent approaches. However, existing multi-agent navigation systems are primarily vision-based and designed for benign indoor settings, leading to significant performance degradation under fire-driven dynamic conditions. In this paper, we present VULCAN, a multi-agent cooperative navigation framework based on multi-modal perception and vision-language models (VLMs), tailored for indoor fire disaster response. We extend the Habitat-Matterport3D benchmark by simulating physically realistic fire scenarios, including smoke diffusion, thermal hazards, and sensor degradation. We evaluate representative multi-agent cooperative navigation baselines under both normal and fire-driven environments. Our results reveal critical failure modes of existing methods in fire scenarios and underscore the necessity of robust perception and hazard-aware planning for reliable multi-agent search and rescue.

</details>


### [415] [Multi-modal panoramic 3D outdoor datasets for place categorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13142)
*Hojung Jung,Yuki Oto,Oscar M. Mozos,Yumi Iwashita,Ryo Kurazume*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了两个多模态全景3D户外数据集用于语义场所分类，包含六个类别：森林、海岸、居住区、城市区域和室内/室外停车场，并比较了多种分类方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为语义场所分类任务提供高质量的多模态全景3D户外数据集，填补现有数据集的空白，支持自动驾驶、机器人导航和环境感知等应用。

Method: 创建了两个数据集：第一个使用FARO激光扫描仪获取650个静态全景扫描，包含密集的3D颜色和反射率点云；第二个使用Velodyne激光扫描仪在驾驶过程中获取34,200个实时全景扫描，包含稀疏的3D反射率点云。数据集在日本福冈市采集，并公开可用。

Result: 在语义场所分类任务中，密集数据集的最佳分类准确率达到96.42%，稀疏数据集的最佳分类准确率达到89.67%。

Conclusion: 提出的多模态全景3D户外数据集为语义场所分类提供了有价值的资源，实验结果表明即使在稀疏点云数据上也能获得较高的分类准确率，为自动驾驶等应用提供了重要支持。

Abstract: We present two multi-modal panoramic 3D outdoor (MPO) datasets for semantic place categorization with six categories: forest, coast, residential area, urban area and indoor/outdoor parking lot. The first dataset consists of 650 static panoramic scans of dense (9,000,000 points) 3D color and reflectance point clouds obtained using a FARO laser scanner with synchronized color images. The second dataset consists of 34,200 real-time panoramic scans of sparse (70,000 points) 3D reflectance point clouds obtained using a Velodyne laser scanner while driving a car. The datasets were obtained in the city of Fukuoka, Japan and are publicly available in [1], [2]. In addition, we compare several approaches for semantic place categorization with best results of 96.42% (dense) and 89.67% (sparse).

</details>


### [416] [Actuation space reduction to facilitate insightful shape matching in a novel reconfigurable tendon driven continuum manipulator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12792)
*Sabyasachi Dash,John Golden,Girish Krishnan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种肌腱驱动连续体机械臂的可重构肌腱布线设计，通过主动旋转间隔盘实现肌腱重路由，并基于曲率-扭率空间模式开发简化的顺序形状匹配控制策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统肌腱驱动连续体机械臂的肌腱布线固定，限制了其空间变形能力。通过可重构肌腱布线可以实现定制化的空间变形，但增加了从期望形状到执行器输入的映射复杂性，需要新的控制方法。

Method: 1) 设计可主动旋转间隔盘以重路由肌腱；2) 将骨干形状投影到曲率-扭率空间，识别对全局形状影响最大的间隔盘；3) 采用顺序形状匹配策略：先旋转近端和中端间隔盘近似全局形状，再调整远端间隔盘微调末端执行器位置。

Result: 提出的驱动框架提供了一种无模型替代方案，绕过了可重构肌腱驱动连续体机械臂建模的复杂性，通过简化的顺序控制策略实现了有效的形状匹配。

Conclusion: 可重构肌腱布线增强了连续体机械臂的变形能力，基于曲率-扭率空间模式识别的顺序形状匹配策略提供了一种实用且简化的控制方法，避免了复杂建模需求。

Abstract: In tendon driven continuum manipulators (TDCMs), reconfiguring the tendon routing enables tailored spatial deformation of the backbone. This work presents a design in which tendons can be rerouted either prior to or after actuation by actively rotating the individual spacer disks. Each disk rotation thus adds a degree of freedom to the actuation space, complicating the mapping from a desired backbone curve to the corresponding actuator inputs. However, when the backbone shape is projected into an intermediate space defined by curvature and torsion (C-T), patterns emerge that highlight which disks are most influential in achieving a global shape. This insight enables a simplified, sequential shape-matching strategy: first, the proximal and intermediate disks are rotated to approximate the global shape; then, the distal disks are adjusted to fine-tune the end-effector position with minimal impact on the overall shape. The proposed actuation framework offers a model-free alternative to conventional control approaches, bypassing the complexities of modeling reconfigurable TDCMs.

</details>


### [417] [Reliability-Guided Depth Fusion for Glare-Resilient Navigation Costmaps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12753)
*Shang-En Tsai,Wei-Cheng Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于深度可靠性建模的抗眩光代价地图构建方法，通过预测像素级测量可信度来减少反射表面导致的虚假障碍物


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决反射地板和玻璃表面的镜面眩光对RGB-D深度测量的干扰问题，这种干扰会产生空洞和尖峰，在占用网格代价地图中积累为持久的幻影障碍物

Method: 提出显式深度可靠性建模方法：1）轻量级深度可靠性地图（DRM）估计器预测镜面干扰下的像素级测量可信度；2）可靠性引导融合（RGF）机制利用该信号在将损坏的测量值累积到地图之前调节占用更新

Result: 在配备Intel RealSense D435和Jetson Orin Nano的真实移动机器人平台上实验表明，该方法在真实反射地板和玻璃表面条件下显著减少虚假障碍物插入并改善自由空间保持，同时仅引入适度的计算开销

Conclusion: 将眩光视为测量可靠性问题，为在安全关键室内环境中提高代价地图正确性和导航鲁棒性提供了一种实用且轻量级的解决方案

Abstract: Specular glare on reflective floors and glass surfaces frequently corrupts RGB-D depth measurements, producing holes and spikes that accumulate as persistent phantom obstacles in occupancy-grid costmaps. This paper proposes a glare-resilient costmap construction method based on explicit depth-reliability modeling. A lightweight Depth Reliability Map (DRM) estimator predicts per-pixel measurement trustworthiness under specular interference, and a Reliability-Guided Fusion (RGF) mechanism uses this signal to modulate occupancy updates before corrupted measurements are accumulated into the map. Experiments on a real mobile robotic platform equipped with an Intel RealSense D435 and a Jetson Orin Nano show that the proposed method substantially reduces false obstacle insertion and improves free-space preservation under real reflective-floor and glass-surface conditions, while introducing only modest computational overhead. These results indicate that treating glare as a measurement-reliability problem provides a practical and lightweight solution for improving costmap correctness and navigation robustness in safety-critical indoor environments.

</details>


### [418] [FeaXDrive: Feasibility-aware Trajectory-Centric Diffusion Planning for End-to-End Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12656)
*Baoyun Wang,Zhuoren Li,Ming Liu,Xinrui Zhang,Bo Leng,Lu Xiong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FeaXDrive：一种面向端到端自动驾驶的可行性感知轨迹中心扩散规划方法，通过轨迹中心化建模改善物理可行性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端扩散规划方法生成的轨迹存在物理可行性不足的问题，包括局部几何不规则、违反轨迹级运动学约束、偏离可行驶区域等。传统的噪声中心化公式与轨迹空间可行性表征不够匹配。

Method: 提出轨迹中心化扩散规划框架FeaXDrive，将干净轨迹作为统一对象进行可行性感知建模。包含：自适应曲率约束训练改善几何和运动学可行性；反向扩散采样中的可行驶区域引导增强区域一致性；可行性感知GRPO后训练平衡轨迹空间可行性。

Result: 在NAVSIM基准测试中，FeaXDrive实现了强大的闭环规划性能，同时显著提高了轨迹空间可行性。

Conclusion: 研究强调了在端到端扩散规划中显式建模轨迹空间可行性的重要性，为更可靠、物理基础的自动驾驶规划器提供了方向。

Abstract: End-to-end diffusion planning has shown strong potential for autonomous driving, but the physical feasibility of generated trajectories remains insufficiently addressed. In particular, generated trajectories may exhibit local geometric irregularities, violate trajectory-level kinematic constraints, or deviate from the drivable area, indicating that the commonly used noise-centric formulation in diffusion planning is not yet well aligned with the trajectory space where feasibility is more naturally characterized. To address this issue, we propose FeaXDrive, a feasibility-aware trajectory-centric diffusion planning method for end-to-end autonomous driving. The core idea is to treat the clean trajectory as the unified object for feasibility-aware modeling throughout the diffusion process. Built on this trajectory-centric formulation, FeaXDrive integrates adaptive curvature-constrained training to improve intrinsic geometric and kinematic feasibility, drivable-area guidance within reverse diffusion sampling to enhance consistency with the drivable area, and feasibility-aware GRPO post-training to further improve planning performance while balancing trajectory-space feasibility. Experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark show that FeaXDrive achieves strong closed-loop planning performance while substantially improving trajectory-space feasibility. These findings highlight the importance of explicitly modeling trajectory-space feasibility in end-to-end diffusion planning and provide a step toward more reliable and physically grounded autonomous driving planners.

</details>


### [419] [Contextual Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Reef Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12645)
*Melvin Laux,Yi-Ling Liu,Rina Alo,Sören Töpper,Mariela De Lucas Alvarez,Frank Kirchner,Rebecca Adam*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用上下文多任务强化学习来训练自主水下航行器的控制策略，以解决水下环境不确定性和任务变化带来的挑战，提高策略的鲁棒性和可重用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主水下航行器在海洋生态系统监测中具有潜力，但受到高度不确定和非平稳水下动力学的限制。传统单任务强化学习容易过拟合训练环境，限制了学习策略的长期实用性。

Method: 采用上下文多任务强化学习范式，训练单个上下文依赖策略来解决多个相关监测任务。在HoloOcean模拟的珊瑚礁环境中进行实验，评估策略的样本效率、零样本泛化能力和对水流变化的鲁棒性。

Result: 通过多任务强化学习，能够学习到可重用于不同任务的控制器（如在某个珊瑚礁检测牡蛎，在另一个珊瑚礁检测珊瑚）。实验评估了上下文策略在样本效率、对未见任务的零样本泛化能力以及水流变化鲁棒性方面的表现。

Conclusion: 上下文多任务强化学习能够有效学习自主水下珊瑚礁监测的鲁棒且可泛化的控制策略，提高训练效率和策略的可重用性，为实现更可持续的自主珊瑚礁监测程序迈出一步。

Abstract: Although autonomous underwater vehicles promise the capability of marine ecosystem monitoring, their deployment is fundamentally limited by the difficulty of controlling vehicles under highly uncertain and non-stationary underwater dynamics. To address these challenges, we employ a data-driven reinforcement learning approach to compensate for unknown dynamics and task variations.Traditional single-task reinforcement learning has a tendency to overfit the training environment, thus, limit the long-term usefulness of the learnt policy. Hence, we propose to use a contextual multi-task reinforcement learning paradigm instead, allowing us to learn controllers that can be reused for various tasks, e.g., detecting oysters in one reef and detecting corals in another. We evaluate whether contextual multi-task reinforcement learning can efficiently learn robust and generalisable control policies for autonomous underwater reef monitoring. We train a single context-dependent policy that is able to solve multiple related monitoring tasks in a simulated reef environment in HoloOcean. In our experiments, we empirically evaluate the contextual policies regarding sample-efficiency, zero-shot generalisation to unseen tasks, and robustness to varying water currents. By utilising multi-task reinforcement learning, we aim to improve the training effectiveness, as well as the reusability of learnt policies to take a step towards more sustainable procedures in autonomous reef monitoring.

</details>


### [420] [Habitat-GS: A High-Fidelity Navigation Simulator with Dynamic Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12626)
*Ziyuan Xia,Jingyi Xu,Chong Cui,Yuanhong Yu,Jiazhao Zhang,Qingsong Yan,Tao Ni,Junbo Chen,Xiaowei Zhou,Hujun Bao,Ruizhen Hu,Sida Peng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Habitat-GS是一个基于3D高斯泼溅的具身AI仿真器，支持真实感渲染和可驱动高斯化身，用于训练具身智能体在人类环境中的导航能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前仿真器依赖网格光栅化，视觉真实感有限，且对人类化身的支持仅限于网格表示，这阻碍了智能体在真实人类场景中的泛化能力。

Method: 扩展Habitat-Sim，集成3D高斯泼溅渲染器实现实时真实感渲染，支持多种来源的3DGS资产导入，并引入高斯化身模块，使化身既能作为视觉实体又能作为导航障碍物。

Result: 在点目标导航任务中，在3DGS场景训练的智能体展现出更强的跨域泛化能力，混合域训练策略最有效；高斯化身能实现有效的人类感知导航；性能基准测试验证了系统在不同场景复杂度和化身数量下的可扩展性。

Conclusion: Habitat-GS通过集成3D高斯泼溅渲染和高斯化身，为具身AI提供了视觉真实且支持动态人类的仿真环境，促进了智能体在人类环境中的导航能力泛化。

Abstract: Training embodied AI agents depends critically on the visual fidelity of simulation environments and the ability to model dynamic humans. Current simulators rely on mesh-based rasterization with limited visual realism, and their support for dynamic human avatars, where available, is constrained to mesh representations, hindering agent generalization to human-populated real-world scenarios. We present Habitat-GS, a navigation-centric embodied AI simulator extended from Habitat-Sim that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting scene rendering and drivable gaussian avatars while maintaining full compatibility with the Habitat ecosystem. Our system implements a 3DGS renderer for real-time photorealistic rendering and supports scalable 3DGS asset import from diverse sources. For dynamic human modeling, we introduce a gaussian avatar module that enables each avatar to simultaneously serve as a photorealistic visual entity and an effective navigation obstacle, allowing agents to learn human-aware behaviors in realistic settings. Experiments on point-goal navigation demonstrate that agents trained on 3DGS scenes achieve stronger cross-domain generalization, with mixed-domain training being the most effective strategy. Evaluations on avatar-aware navigation further confirm that gaussian avatars enable effective human-aware navigation. Finally, performance benchmarks validate the system's scalability across varying scene complexity and avatar counts.

</details>


### [421] [Machine Learning-Based Real-Time Detection of Compensatory Trunk Movements Using Trunk-Wrist Inertial Measurement Units](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12591)
*Jannis Gabler,Clément Lhoste,Max Quast,Laura Mayrhuber,Andrea Ronco,Olivier Lambercy,Paulius Viskaitis,Dane Donegan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 使用两个惯性测量单元和机器学习实现卒中后代偿性躯干运动的实时检测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卒中后常见的代偿性躯干运动(CTMs)会导致不良运动模式，限制对受影响结构的针对性训练。目前缺乏客观、连续的CTM检测方法，现有测量设置复杂且难以实时应用。

Method: 使用两个惯性测量单元(IMU)配置，通过机器学习进行实时CTM检测。从10名健康参与者收集数据，模拟损伤条件(肘部支具限制屈伸，阻力带诱导屈肌协同模式)。使用光学运动捕捉(OMC)和手动标注视频作为参考。通过系统位置缩减分析确定手腕和躯干作为最小但足够的传感位置。采用极端梯度提升分类器(XGBoost)，使用留一受试者交叉验证。

Result: 双IMU模型表现出强大的判别性能(宏F1=0.80±0.07，MCC=0.73±0.08；ROC-AUC>0.93)，性能与基于OMC的模型相当，预测时间适合实时应用。可解释性分析显示躯干动力学和手腕-躯干交互特征起主导作用。在4名神经系统疾病参与者的初步评估中，模型保持良好判别能力(ROC-AUC~0.78)，但阈值依赖性能有所降低且变化较大。

Conclusion: 稀疏可穿戴传感是实现治疗和日常生活中CTM可扩展、实时监测的可行途径，但临床泛化仍面临挑战。

Abstract: Compensatory trunk movements (CTMs) are commonly observed after stroke and can lead to maladaptive movement patterns, limiting targeted training of affected structures. Objective, continuous detection of CTMs during therapy and activities of daily living remains challenging due to the typically complex measurements setups required, as well as limited applicability for real-time use. This study investigates whether a two-inertial measurement unit configuration enables reliable, real-time CTM detection using machine learning. Data were collected from ten able-bodied participants performing activities of daily living under simulated impairment conditions (elbow brace restricting flexion-extension, resistance band inducing flexor-synergy-like patterns), with synchronized optical motion capture (OMC) and manually annotated video recordings serving as reference. A systematic location-reduction analysis using OMC identified wrist and trunk kinematics as a minimal yet sufficient set of anatomical sensing locations. Using an extreme gradient boosting classifier (XGBoost) evaluated with leave-one-subject-out cross-validation, our two-IMU model achieved strong discriminative performance (macro-F1 = 0.80 +/- 0.07, MCC = 0.73 +/- 0.08; ROC-AUC > 0.93), with performance comparable to an OMC-based model and prediction timing suitable for real-time applications. Explainability analysis revealed dominant contributions from trunk dynamics and wrist-trunk interaction features. In preliminary evaluation using recordings from four participants with neurological conditions, the model retained good discriminative capability (ROC-AUC ~ 0.78), but showed reduced and variable threshold-dependent performance, highlighting challenges in clinical generalization. These results support sparse wearable sensing as a viable pathway toward scalable, real-time monitoring of CTMs during therapy and daily living.

</details>


### [422] [Scalable Trajectory Generation for Whole-Body Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12565)
*Yida Niu,Xinhai Chang,Xin Liu,Ziyuan Jiao,Yixin Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AutoMoMa是一个GPU加速框架，通过统一AKR建模和并行轨迹优化，实现了大规模、物理有效的协调移动操作轨迹数据生成，速度比CPU基线快80倍以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人在非结构化环境中需要协调全身运动（移动基座和机械臂），但现有数据采集方法（遥操作或规划）要么劳动密集，要么计算成本高昂，缺乏可扩展的物理有效轨迹数据生成管道。

Method: AutoMoMa将AKR建模（将基座、机械臂和物体运动学整合为单一链）与并行轨迹优化相结合，利用GPU加速实现高效轨迹生成。

Result: 达到每GPU小时5,000个轨迹片段（比CPU基线快80倍以上），生成了超过50万个物理有效轨迹，涵盖330个场景、多样化的关节物体和多个机器人本体。

Conclusion: AutoMoMa解决了移动操作研究中数据稀缺的核心瓶颈，展示了在真实世界非结构化环境中可泛化的全身机器人策略，为协调移动操作研究提供了之前缺失的基础设施。

Abstract: Robots deployed in unstructured environments must coordinate whole-body motion -- simultaneously moving a mobile base and arm -- to interact with the physical world. This coupled mobility and dexterity yields a state space that grows combinatorially with scene and object diversity, demanding datasets far larger than those sufficient for fixed-base manipulation. Yet existing acquisition methods, including teleoperation and planning, are either labor-intensive or computationally prohibitive at scale. The core bottleneck is the lack of a scalable pipeline for generating large-scale, physically valid, coordinated trajectory data across diverse embodiments and environments. Here we introduce AutoMoMa, a GPU-accelerated framework that unifies AKR modeling, which consolidates base, arm, and object kinematics into a single chain, with parallelized trajectory optimization. AutoMoMa achieves 5,000 episodes per GPU-hour (over $80\times$ faster than CPU-based baselines), producing a dataset of over 500k physically valid trajectories spanning 330 scenes, diverse articulated objects, and multiple robot embodiments. Prior datasets were forced to compromise on scale, diversity, or kinematic fidelity; AutoMoMa addresses all three simultaneously. Training downstream IL policies further reveals that even a single articulated-object task requires tens of thousands of demonstrations for SOTA methods to reach $\approx 80\%$ success, confirming that data scarcity -- not algorithmic limitations -- has been the binding constraint. AutoMoMa thus bridges high-performance planning and reliable IL-based control, providing the infrastructure previously missing for coordinated mobile manipulation research. By making large-scale, kinematically valid training data practical, AutoMoMa showcases generalizable whole-body robot policies capable of operating in the diverse, unstructured settings of the real world.

</details>


### [423] [Whole-Body Mobile Manipulation using Offline Reinforcement Learning on Sub-optimal Controllers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12509)
*Snehal Jauhri,Vignesh Prasad,Georgia Chalvatzaki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: WHOLE-MoMa：一种两阶段移动操作框架，通过随机化轻量级全身控制器生成多样化演示，然后应用离线强化学习改进行为，无需遥操作或真实世界训练数据


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动操作铰接物体需要机器人底座和手臂的全身协调。传统全身控制器需要大量手工调优且脆弱，而学习方法依赖昂贵的遥操作数据或复杂的奖励工程。作者发现即使次优的全身控制器也是强大的结构先验，可用于收集任务相关数据

Method: 提出WHOLE-MoMa两阶段流程：1）通过随机化轻量级全身控制器生成多样化演示；2）应用离线强化学习通过奖励信号识别和拼接改进行为。扩展离线隐式Q学习，引入Q-chunking进行块级评价器评估和优势加权策略提取，支持表达性动作块扩散策略

Result: 在TIAGo++移动机械臂的三个难度递增任务中，WHOLE-MoMa显著优于全身控制器、行为克隆和多个离线强化学习基线。策略无需微调即可直接转移到真实机器人，在双手抽屉操作中达到80%成功率，在同时打开橱柜和放置物体中达到68%成功率

Conclusion: WHOLE-MoMa展示了将次优控制器作为结构先验的有效性，通过离线强化学习改进其行为，实现了无需遥操作或真实世界训练数据的移动操作策略学习，为复杂协调任务提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Mobile Manipulation (MoMa) of articulated objects, such as opening doors, drawers, and cupboards, demands simultaneous, whole-body coordination between a robot's base and arms. Classical whole-body controllers (WBCs) can solve such problems via hierarchical optimization, but require extensive hand-tuned optimization and remain brittle. Learning-based methods, on the other hand, show strong generalization capabilities but typically rely on expensive whole-body teleoperation data or heavy reward engineering. We observe that even a sub-optimal WBC is a powerful structural prior: it can be used to collect data in a constrained, task-relevant region of the state-action space, and its behavior can still be improved upon using offline reinforcement learning. Building on this, we propose WHOLE-MoMa, a two-stage pipeline that first generates diverse demonstrations by randomizing a lightweight WBC, and then applies offline RL to identify and stitch together improved behaviors via a reward signal. To support the expressive action-chunked diffusion policies needed for complex coordination tasks, we extend offline implicit Q-learning with Q-chunking for chunk-level critic evaluation and advantage-weighted policy extraction. On three tasks of increasing difficulty using a TIAGo++ mobile manipulator in simulation, WHOLE-MoMa significantly outperforms WBC, behavior cloning, and several offline RL baselines. Policies transfer directly to the real robot without finetuning, achieving 80% success in bimanual drawer manipulation and 68% in simultaneous cupboard opening and object placement, all without any teleoperated or real-world training data.

</details>


### [424] [DeCoNav: Dialog enhanced Long-Horizon Collaborative Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12486)
*Sunyao Zhou,Yunzi Wu,Tianhang Wang,Xinhai Li,Guang Chen,Lizheng Liu,Chenjia Bai,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DeCoNav提出了一种去中心化的对话增强长视野协作视觉语言导航框架，通过事件触发对话实现动态任务分配和重规划，显著提升了多机器人协作性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协作VLN基准和评估方法存在两个主要问题：1) 缺乏严格同步的双机器人共享世界时间线执行；2) 依赖静态协调策略，无法在出现新的跨智能体证据时进行自适应调整。这限制了多机器人系统在复杂长视野任务中的协作能力。

Method: DeCoNav采用去中心化框架，将事件触发对话与动态任务分配和重规划相结合。机器人通过对话交换紧凑的语义状态，无需中央控制器。当出现新证据、不确定性或冲突等信息性事件时，触发对话以动态重新分配子目标并在同步执行下重新规划。

Result: 在DeCoNavBench上实现，包含176个HM3D场景中的1,213个任务。DeCoNav将双成功率(BSR)提高了69.2%，证明了对话驱动、动态重新分配规划在多机器人协作中的有效性。

Conclusion: DeCoNav通过事件触发对话机制实现了实时自适应协调，解决了现有协作VLN基准的局限性，为长视野多机器人协作提供了有效的去中心化解决方案。

Abstract: Long-horizon collaborative vision-language navigation (VLN) is critical for multi-robot systems to accomplish complex tasks beyond the capability of a single agent. CoNavBench takes a first step by introducing the first collaborative long-horizon VLN benchmark with relay-style multi-robot tasks, a collaboration taxonomy, along with graph-grounded generation and evaluation to model handoffs and rendezvous in shared environments. However, existing benchmarks and evaluations often do not enforce strictly synchronized dual-robot rollout on a shared world timeline, and they typically rely on static coordination policies that cannot adapt when new cross-agent evidence emerges. We present Dialog enhanced Long-Horizon Collaborative Vision-Language Navigation (DeCoNav), a decentralized framework that couples event-triggered dialogue with dynamic task allocation and replanning for real-time, adaptive coordination. In DeCoNav, robots exchange compact semantic states via dialogue without a central controller. When informative events such as new evidence, uncertainty, or conflicts arise, dialogue is triggered to dynamically reassign subgoals and replan under synchronized execution. Implemented in DeCoNavBench with 1,213 tasks across 176 HM3D scenes, DeCoNav improves the both-success rate (BSR) by 69.2%, demonstrating the effectiveness of dialogue-driven, dynamically reallocated planning for multi-robot collaboration.

</details>


### [425] [Social Learning Strategies for Evolved Virtual Soft Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12482)
*K. Ege de Bruin,Kyrre Glette,Kai Olav Ellefsen,Giorgia Nadizar,Eric Medvet*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种机器人形态与控制联合优化的社会学习方法，让机器人可以从同伴的经验中学习，加速脑部优化过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人形态与控制的联合优化是一个耦合挑战，传统方法中每个机器人的控制参数独立学习，但一个机器人学习到的参数可能对其他机器人有价值。因此需要探索如何让机器人利用同伴的优化参数来加速自身优化。

Method: 引入社会学习框架，机器人可以从同伴（教师）那里学习优化参数。系统研究了教师选择策略（选择哪些机器人、学习多少机器人）对性能的影响，在四个任务和环境中对虚拟软体机器人进行实验，特别关注从形态相似机器人继承经验的效果。

Result: 社会学习方法在同等计算预算下明显优于从零开始学习。虽然最优教师选择策略仍有待探索，但研究发现从多个教师那里获取知识可以产生更一致和稳健的改进。

Conclusion: 社会学习在机器人形态与控制联合优化中有效，能够加速优化过程。从多个教师学习比单一教师更稳健，但最佳教师选择策略需要进一步研究。

Abstract: Optimizing the body and brain of a robot is a coupled challenge: the morphology determines what control strategies are effective, while the control parameters influence how well the morphology performs. This joint optimization can be done through nested loops of evolutionary and learning processes, where the control parameters of each robot are learned independently. However, the control parameters learned by one robot may contain valuable information for others. Thus, we introduce a social learning approach in which robots can exploit optimized parameters from their peers to accelerate their own brain optimization. Within this framework, we systematically investigate how the selection of teachers, deciding which and how many robots to learn from, affects performance, experimenting with virtual soft robots in four tasks and environments. In particular, we study the effect of inheriting experience from morphologically similar robots due to the tightly coupled body and brain in robot optimization. Our results confirm the effectiveness of building on others' experience, as social learning clearly outperforms learning from scratch under equivalent computational budgets. In addition, while the optimal teacher selection strategy remains open, our findings suggest that incorporating knowledge from multiple teachers can yield more consistent and robust improvements.

</details>


### [426] [From Kinematics to Dynamics: Learning to Refine Hybrid Plans for Physically Feasible Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12474)
*Lidor Erez,Shahaf S. Shperberg,Ayal Taitler*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 使用强化学习在连续空间中优化混合离散-连续机器人任务中的轨迹，将一阶规划器生成的轨迹转化为满足二阶动力学约束的可行轨迹


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人任务中需要穿越空间区域序列，这类问题是混合离散-连续的，现有混合时间规划器通常使用一阶动力学模型，无法保证生成的计划满足机器人真实物理约束，即使高层动作序列固定，生成动力学可行轨迹仍是一个双层优化问题

Method: 通过连续空间中的强化学习，定义明确包含解析二阶约束的马尔可夫决策过程，用于精炼混合规划器生成的一阶计划

Result: 该方法能够可靠地恢复物理可行性，有效弥合规划器初始一阶轨迹与实际执行所需动力学之间的差距

Conclusion: 强化学习结合二阶约束的方法为解决混合离散-连续机器人任务中的动力学可行性问题提供了有效解决方案，能够将一阶规划结果转化为实际可执行的轨迹

Abstract: In many robotic tasks, agents must traverse a sequence of spatial regions to complete a mission. Such problems are inherently mixed discrete-continuous: a high-level action sequence and a physically feasible continuous trajectory. The resulting trajectory and action sequence must also satisfy problem constraints such as deadlines, time windows, and velocity or acceleration limits. While hybrid temporal planners attempt to address this challenge, they typically model motion using linear (first-order) dynamics, which cannot guarantee that the resulting plan respects the robot's true physical constraints. Consequently, even when the high-level action sequence is fixed, producing a dynamically feasible trajectory becomes a bi-level optimization problem. We address this problem via reinforcement learning in continuous space. We define a Markov Decision Process that explicitly incorporates analytical second-order constraints and use it to refine first-order plans generated by a hybrid planner. Our results show that this approach can reliably recover physical feasibility and effectively bridge the gap between a planner's initial first-order trajectory and the dynamics required for real execution.

</details>


### [427] [Designing for Error Recovery in Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12473)
*Christopher D. Wallbridge,Erwin Jose Lopez Pulgarin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该立场论文探讨了当前机器人AI系统编程方法的局限性，主张构建能够检测和从自身错误中恢复的系统，并以核手套箱机器人为例说明


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前许多AI系统专注于将单个系统的性能提升到超越人类基准，但这些系统通常处理一次性、单向决策，而现实世界是连续和交互的。人类能够从错误中恢复和学习，从而实现更高的成功率。作者认为需要构建能够检测和从自身错误中恢复的机器人系统。

Method: 采用立场论文的分析方法，通过核手套箱机器人作为具体用例来阐述问题。论文探讨了构建能够检测和恢复错误的系统所面临的挑战，并提出了简单的初始设计思路。

Result: 论文识别了当前AI系统设计中的关键局限性：缺乏错误恢复能力。通过核手套箱用例展示了现实世界中连续交互环境对错误恢复的需求，为未来系统设计提供了方向性思考。

Conclusion: 需要转变AI系统设计范式，从追求一次性决策的超越人类基准，转向构建能够在连续交互环境中检测和从错误中恢复的系统。核手套箱机器人用例凸显了这种需求，简单的初始设计为这一方向提供了起点。

Abstract: This position paper looks briefly at the way we attempt to program robotic AI systems. Many AI systems are based on the idea of trying to improve the performance of one individual system to beyond so-called human baselines. However, these systems often look at one shot and one-way decisions, whereas the real world is more continuous and interactive. Humans, however, are often able to recover from and learn from errors - enabling a much higher rate of success. We look at the challenges of building a system that can detect/recover from its own errors, using the example of robotic nuclear gloveboxes as a use case to help illustrate examples. We then go on to talk about simple starting designs.

</details>


### [428] [HazardArena: Evaluating Semantic Safety in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12447)
*Zixing Chen,Yifeng Gao,Li Wang,Yunhan Zhao,Yi Liu,Jiayu Li,Xiang Zheng,Zuxuan Wu,Cong Wang,Xingjun Ma,Yu-Gang Jiang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HazardArena是一个评估VLA模型语义安全性的基准，通过安全/不安全孪生场景揭示VLA在语义风险下的系统脆弱性，并提出无需训练的Safety Option Layer来减少不安全行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型评估主要关注动作执行成功率，但忽略了动作策略与视觉-语言语义的紧密耦合。这种解耦暴露了系统脆弱性：正确的动作执行可能在语义风险下导致不安全结果。需要重新思考VLA在真实世界部署中的语义安全评估与实施。

Method: 1. 构建HazardArena基准：包含安全/不安全孪生场景，共享相同的物体、布局和动作要求，仅语义上下文不同；包含2000+资产和40个风险敏感任务，涵盖7个基于机器人安全标准的真实世界风险类别。2. 提出无需训练的Safety Option Layer：使用语义属性或视觉-语言判断器约束动作执行。

Result: 仅在安全场景训练的VLA模型在对应不安全场景中经常无法安全行为。Safety Option Layer能显著减少不安全行为，同时对任务性能影响最小。

Conclusion: HazardArena揭示了VLA模型的语义安全脆弱性，强调了在VLA向真实世界部署扩展时，需要重新思考语义安全的评估与实施方式。提出的Safety Option Layer为缓解这一脆弱性提供了有效方法。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models inherit rich world knowledge from vision-language backbones and acquire executable skills via action demonstrations. However, existing evaluations largely focus on action execution success, leaving action policies loosely coupled with visual-linguistic semantics. This decoupling exposes a systematic vulnerability whereby correct action execution may induce unsafe outcomes under semantic risk. To expose this vulnerability, we introduce HazardArena, a benchmark designed to evaluate semantic safety in VLAs under controlled yet risk-bearing contexts. HazardArena is constructed from safe/unsafe twin scenarios that share matched objects, layouts, and action requirements, differing only in the semantic context that determines whether an action is unsafe. We find that VLA models trained exclusively on safe scenarios often fail to behave safely when evaluated in their corresponding unsafe counterparts. HazardArena includes over 2,000 assets and 40 risk-sensitive tasks spanning 7 real-world risk categories grounded in established robotic safety standards. To mitigate this vulnerability, we propose a training-free Safety Option Layer that constrains action execution using semantic attributes or a vision-language judge, substantially reducing unsafe behaviors with minimal impact on task performance. We hope that HazardArena highlights the need to rethink how semantic safety is evaluated and enforced in VLAs as they scale toward real-world deployment.

</details>


### [429] [D-BDM: A Direct and Efficient Boundary-Based Occupancy Grid Mapping Framework for LiDARs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12436)
*Benxu Tang,Yixi Cai,Fanze Kong,Longji Yin,Fu Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: D-BDM框架通过截断射线投射和直接边界更新机制，显著提升了3D占据地图的更新效率和内存使用效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统3D占据地图表示存在两个根本性限制：1）显式存储所有体素导致内存消耗过高；2）详尽射线投射导致更新延迟高。现有边界表示方法虽缓解了内存问题，但仍依赖完整射线投射更新。

Method: 提出D-BDM框架：1）截断射线投射策略，将体素遍历限制在边界外部，大幅减少更新体素数量；2）直接边界更新机制，无需辅助局部3D占据网格，减少内存使用并简化地图更新流程。

Result: 在公开数据集上的广泛评估表明，与基线方法和现有边界方法相比，D-BDM实现了显著更低的更新时间和减少的内存消耗。

Conclusion: D-BDM框架通过高效的更新方案推进了边界表示框架，为自主机器人在未知环境中的应用提供了高效且可扩展的3D占据地图解决方案。

Abstract: Efficient and scalable 3D occupancy mapping is essential for autonomous robot applications in unknown environments. However, traditional occupancy grid representations suffer from two fundamental limitations. First, explicitly storing all voxels in three-dimensional space leads to prohibitive memory consumption. Second, exhaustive ray casting incurs high update latency. A recent representation alleviate memory demands by maintaining only the voxels on the two-dimensional boundary, yet they still rely on full ray casting updates. This work advances the boundary-based framework with a highly efficient update scheme. We introduce a truncated ray casting strategy that restricts voxel traversal to the exterior of the boundary, which dramatically reduces the number of updated voxels. In addition, we propose a direct boundary update mechanism that removes the need for an auxiliary local 3D occupancy grid, further reducing memory usage and simplifying the map update pipeline. We name our framework as D-BDM. Extensive evaluations on public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves significantly lower update time and reduced memory consumption compared with the baseline methods, as well as the prior boundary-based approach.

</details>


### [430] [Defining and Evaluation Method for External Human-Machine Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12293)
*Jose Gonzalez-Belmonte,Jaerock Kwon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出包含223个问题的通用评估方法，用于客观评估和比较自动驾驶车辆外部人机界面（eHMI）方案，并通过测试四种现有方案得出最佳通信方式是车辆运动学与分布式文本显示的组合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自动驾驶车辆事故增加，需要建立车辆与道路其他参与者之间的通用通信方法。过去十年提出了多种外部人机界面方案，但缺乏统一的评估标准来确定最佳方案。

Method: 提出包含223个问题的通用评估问卷，分为7个类别：标准化便利性、成本效益、可访问性、易理解性、通信多面性、定位和可读性。使用该方法评估四种现有eHMI方案和一个仅使用运动学的基线方案。

Result: 测试结果表明，理想的机器-人通信方式是经过专门设计的车辆运动学与分布式、位置合理的文本显示的组合。同时揭示了eHMI可读性以及不同观察者学习速度方面的知识空白。

Conclusion: 提出的评估方法可用于客观比较不同eHMI方案，为未来研究提供基准。最佳通信方案是车辆运动学与文本显示的结合，但需要进一步研究可读性和学习速度问题。

Abstract: As the number of fatalities involving Autonomous Vehicles increase, the need for a universal method of communicating between vehicles and other agents on the road has also increased. Over the past decade, numerous proposals of external Human-Machine Interfaces (eHMIs) have been brought forward with the purpose of bridging this communication gap, with none yet to be determined as the ideal one. This work proposes a universal evaluation method conformed of 223 questions to objectively evaluate and compare different proposals and arrive at a conclusion. The questionnaire is divided into 7 categories that evaluate different aspects of any given proposal that uses eHMIs: ease of standardization, cost effectiveness, accessibility, ease of understanding, multifacetedness in communication, positioning, and readability. In order to test the method it was used on four existing proposals, plus a baseline using only kinematic motions, in order to both exemplify the application of the evaluation method and offer a baseline score for future comparison. The result of this testing suggests that the ideal method of machine-human communication is a combination of intentionally-designed vehicle kinematics and distributed well-placed text-based displays, but it also reveals knowledge gaps in the readability of eHMIs and the speed at which different observers may learn their meaning. This paper proposes future work related to these uncertainties, along with future testing with the proposed method.

</details>


### [431] [Asymptotically Stable Gait Generation and Instantaneous Walkability Determination for Planar Almost Linear Biped with Knees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12274)
*Fumihiko Asano,Ning Lei,Taiki Sedoguchi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种针对具有特殊机械特性的平面双足机器人的线性化建模方法，通过泰勒展开重力项获得线性模型，实现了无需数值积分的瞬时状态预测和行走能力判定，并将其扩展到带膝关节的6自由度模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对一类所有连杆围绕髋关节平衡的特殊平面双足机器人，其运动方程具有惯性矩阵恒定、无非线性速度项的特点。传统方法需要数值积分计算未来状态，而通过线性化重力项可以避免这一计算负担，实现瞬时计算。

Method: 1. 推导6自由度平面双足机器人的运动方程、约束条件和非弹性碰撞模型；2. 设计控制系统并在水平面上数值生成稳定步态；3. 将模型简化为3自由度，围绕大腿框架角度展开点对重力项进行线性近似；4. 通过状态空间实现和离散化，实现迭代计算的瞬时行走能力判定。

Result: 数值仿真表明，未来状态计算和行走能力判定可在可忽略时间内完成。详细步态分析揭示了膝关节屈曲角度和展开点对线性近似精度的影响，以及下小台阶时出现的问题。

Conclusion: 该方法成功将线性化建模扩展到带膝关节的双足机器人，实现了瞬时计算能力。膝关节角度和展开点选择对近似精度有重要影响，下台阶场景需要进一步研究。

Abstract: A class of planar bipedal robots with unique mechanical properties has been proposed, where all links are balanced around the hip joint, preventing natural swinging motion due to gravity. A common property of their equations of motion is that the inertia matrix is a constant matrix, there are no nonlinear velocity terms, and the gravity term contains simple nonlinear terms. By performing a Taylor expansion of the gravity term and making a linear approximation, it is easy to derive a linearized model, and calculations for future states or walkability determination can be performed instantaneously without the need for numerical integration. This paper extends the method to a planar biped robot model with knees. First, we derive the equations of motion, constraint conditions, and inelastic collisions for a planar 6-DOF biped robot, design its control system, and numerically generate a stable bipedal gait on a horizontal plane. Next, we reduce the equations of motion to a 3-DOF model, and derive a linearized model by approximating the gravity term as linear around the expansion point for the thigh frame angle. Through numerical simulations, we demonstrate that calculations for future states and walkability determination can be completed in negligible time. By applying control inputs to the obtained model, performing state-space realization, and then discretizing it, instantaneous walkability determination through iterative calculation becomes possible. Through detailed gait analysis, we discuss how the knee joint flexion angle and the expansion point affect the accuracy of the linear approximation, and the issues that arise when descending a small step.

</details>


### [432] [Robotic Nanoparticle Synthesis via Solution-based Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12169)
*Dasharadhan Mahalingam,Michael Gallagher,Nilanjan Chakraborty,Stanislaus S. Wong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于螺旋几何的机器人操作规划框架，用于溶液合成自动化，通过单次演示提取运动约束，实现长时程、多步骤的纳米粒子合成实验自主执行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决溶液合成自动化中的关键挑战：长时程、多步骤实验需要多种操作技能（如拾放、倾倒、旋钮操作），且某些技能对末端执行器运动施加了几何和运动学约束。需要让领域专家（化学家）能够轻松适应和重新编程系统，而无需机器人学专业知识。

Method: 采用螺旋几何表示和编程示教范式：1) 从单次演示中提取恒定螺旋序列，紧凑编码运动约束并保持坐标不变性；2) 基于螺旋参数化的技能表示，支持抓取位置变化的鲁棒泛化；3) 根据合成协议组合这些螺旋参数化基元，自主生成执行完整实验的运动规划。

Result: 成功应用于金和磁铁矿纳米粒子的制备，展示了框架能够：1) 从单次演示中学习技能并参数化重用；2) 在抓取位置变化时保持鲁棒性；3) 自主执行重复运行的完整实验；4) 为领域专家提供易于适应新实验协议和实验室设置的解决方案。

Conclusion: 螺旋理论规划与编程示教的结合为长时程实验室自动化提供了严谨且可泛化的基础，使基础运动学能够在开发可扩展的溶液合成协议中产生转化影响，降低机器人技术在化学合成中的应用门槛。

Abstract: We present a screw geometry-based manipulation planning framework for the robotic automation of solution-based synthesis, exemplified through the preparation of gold and magnetite nanoparticles. The synthesis protocols are inherently long-horizon, multi-step tasks, requiring skills such as pick-and-place, pouring, turning a knob, and periodic visual inspection to detect reaction completion. A central challenge is that some skills, notably pouring, transferring containers with solutions, and turning a knob, impose geometric and kinematic constraints on the end-effector motion. To address this, we use a programming by demonstration paradigm where the constraints can be extracted from a single demonstration. This combination of screw-based motion representation and demonstration-driven specification enables domain experts, such as chemists, to readily adapt and reprogram the system for new experimental protocols and laboratory setups without requiring expertise in robotics or motion planning. We extract sequences of constant screws from demonstrations, which compactly encode the motion constraints while remaining coordinate-invariant. This representation enables robust generalization across variations in grasp placement and allows parameterized reuse of a skill learned from a single example. By composing these screw-parameterized primitives according to the synthesis protocol, the robot autonomously generates motion plans that execute the complete experiment over repeated runs. Our results highlight that screw-theoretic planning, combined with programming by demonstration, provides a rigorous and generalizable foundation for long-horizon laboratory automation, thereby enabling fundamental kinematics to have a translational impact on the use of robots in developing scalable solution-based synthesis protocols.

</details>


### [433] [Uncertainty Guided Exploratory Trajectory Optimization for Sampling-Based Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12149)
*O. Goktug Poyrazoglu,Yukang Cao,Rahul Moorthy,Volkan Isler*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: UGE-TO是一种轨迹优化算法，通过不确定性引导的探索性采样提高配置空间覆盖率，避免局部最优解。UGE-MPC将其集成到基于采样的模型预测控制器中，在复杂环境中实现更快的收敛和更高的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 轨迹优化严重依赖初始化，基于采样的方法对初始解高度敏感，在复杂环境中有限的探索经常导致收敛到局部最小值。需要一种能够实现配置空间更好覆盖的轨迹优化方法。

Method: 提出UGE-TO算法，将轨迹表示为由不确定性椭球诱导的概率分布。该方法不仅探索动作空间，还捕捉系统动力学和动作选择的影响。通过Hellinger距离强制分布分离，增强轨迹多样性，实现配置空间的系统化探索。进一步提出UGE-MPC，将UGE-TO集成到基于采样的模型预测控制器中。

Result: 实验表明，在相同采样预算下，UGE-MPC相比基线方法实现了更高的探索性和更快的收敛速度：在无障碍环境中收敛速度快72.1%，在杂乱环境中收敛速度快66%且成功率提高6.7%。在需要显著偏离标称轨迹以避免失败的复杂环境中表现尤为突出。

Conclusion: UGE-TO通过不确定性引导的探索性采样有效提高了轨迹优化的配置空间覆盖率，UGE-MPC在复杂环境中展现出更高的成功率和更快的收敛速度，为解决轨迹优化中的局部最小值问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Trajectory optimization depends heavily on initialization. In particular, sampling-based approaches are highly sensitive to initial solutions, and limited exploration frequently leads them to converge to local minima in complex environments. We present Uncertainty Guided Exploratory Trajectory Optimization (UGE-TO), a trajectory optimization algorithm that generates well-separated samples to achieve a better coverage of the configuration space. UGE-TO represents trajectories as probability distributions induced by uncertainty ellipsoids. Unlike sampling-based approaches that explore only in the action space, this representation captures the effects of both system dynamics and action selection. By incorporating the impact of dynamics, in addition to the action space, into our distributions, our method enhances trajectory diversity by enforcing distributional separation via the Hellinger distance between them. It enables a systematic exploration of the configuration space and improves robustness against local minima. Further, we present UGE-MPC, which integrates UGE-TO into sampling-based model predictive controller methods. Experiments demonstrate that UGE-MPC achieves higher exploration and faster convergence in trajectory optimization compared to baselines under the same sampling budget, achieving 72.1% faster convergence in obstacle-free environments and 66% faster convergence with a 6.7% higher success rate in the cluttered environment compared to the best-performing baseline. Additionally, we validate the approach through a range of simulation scenarios and real-world experiments. Our results indicate that UGE-MPC has higher success rates and faster convergence, especially in environments that demand significant deviations from nominal trajectories to avoid failures. The project and code are available at https://ogpoyrazoglu.github.io/cuniform_sampling/.

</details>


### [434] [Dynamic Modeling and Robust Gait Optimization of a Compliant Worm Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12031)
*Xinyu Zhou,Yu Mei,Faith Thomson,Christian Luedtke,Xinda Qi,Xiaobo Tan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出用于柔性蠕虫机器人在波纹管内运动的实验建模与优化框架，包含混合动力学模型、松弛感知驱动模型和能量模型，通过引入运动鲁棒性边界实现稳健步态优化，平衡速度与能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 柔性蠕虫机器人虽能在受限环境中有效运动，但其可变形锚定结构与环境的相互作用使得预测建模和可部署步态优化具有挑战性，需要开发能够处理这些复杂交互的建模与优化框架。

Method: 1) 推导混合动力学运动模型：将机器人运动表示为波纹槽内的连续动力学和相邻槽间锚定位置的离散切换；2) 引入松弛感知驱动模型：将指令步态输入映射到实际体长变化；3) 开发基于物理原理并通过经验功率测量校准的能量模型；4) 建立多目标步态优化问题：最大化平均速度同时最小化平均功率；5) 引入运动鲁棒性边界到锚定转换条件，形成基于边界的稳健步态优化框架。

Result: 实验结果表明，所提框架能够捕捉机器人在测试条件下的主要运动和能耗行为，并实现稳健的步态优化以达到速度-功率权衡。

Conclusion: 该研究为柔性蠕虫机器人开发了一个综合的建模与优化框架，通过混合动力学建模、松弛感知驱动和能量建模，结合运动鲁棒性边界，成功解决了柔性机器人环境交互的预测建模挑战，实现了在波纹管环境中的高效稳健运动。

Abstract: Worm-inspired robots provide an effective locomotion strategy for constrained environments by combining cyclic body deformation with alternating anchoring. For compliant robots, however, the interaction between deformable anchoring structures and the environment makes predictive modeling and deployable gait optimization challenging. This paper presents an experimentally grounded modeling and optimization framework for a compliant worm robot capable of traversing corrugated pipes. First, a hybrid dynamic locomotion model is derived, in which the robot motion is represented by continuous dynamics within a corrugation groove and discrete switching of anchoring positions between adjacent grooves. A slack-aware actuation model is further introduced to map the commanded gait input to the realized body-length change, and an energy model is developed based on physics and calibrated with empirical power measurement. Based on these models, a multi-objective gait optimization problem is formulated to maximize average speed while minimizing average power. To reduce the fragility of nominal boundary-seeking solutions, a kinematic robustness margin is introduced into the anchoring-transition conditions, leading to a margin-based robust gait optimization framework. Experimental results show that the proposed framework captures the dominant locomotion and energy-consumption behavior of the robot over the tested conditions, and enables robust gait optimization for achieving speed-power trade-off.

</details>


### [435] [3DRO: Lidar-level SE(3) Direct Radar Odometry Using a 2D Imaging Radar and a Gyroscope](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12027)
*Cedric Le Gentil,Daniil Lisus,Timothy D. Barfoot*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 将2D雷达里程计DRO扩展为3DRO，通过融合2D雷达速度估计与3D陀螺仪测量，实现SE(3)状态估计，达到激光雷达级精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于2D成像雷达的方法通常只进行SE(2)状态估计，假设数据局限于雷达旋转轴正交平面，但实际需要完整的SE(3)运动估计能力

Method: 扩展SE(2)直接雷达里程计(DRO)框架为3DRO，在保持DRO的2D速度估计（假设数据平面性）基础上，集成SO(3)上的3D陀螺仪测量来估计SE(3)自运动

Result: 在Boreas-RT数据集的643公里数据上验证，该方法虽然简单但能达到激光雷达级里程计精度

Conclusion: 通过融合2D雷达速度估计与3D陀螺仪测量，成功将SE(2)雷达里程计扩展为SE(3)状态估计，为雷达感知提供了有效的3D运动估计方案

Abstract: Recently, the robotics community has regained interest in radar-based perception and state estimation. A 2D imaging radar provides dense 360deg information about the environment. Despite the radar antenna's cone of emission and reception, the collected data is generally assumed to be limited to the plane orthogonal to the radar's spinning axis. Accordingly, most methods based on 2D imaging radars only perform SE(2) state estimation. This paper presents 3DRO, an extension of the SE(2) Direct Radar Odometry (DRO) framework to perform state estimation in SE(3). While still assuming planarity of the data through DRO's 2D velocity estimates, it integrates 3D gyroscope measurements over SO(3) to estimate SE(3) ego motion. While simple, this approach provides lidar-level odometry accuracy as demonstrated using 643km of data from the Boreas-RT dataset.

</details>


### [436] [A Foot Resistive Force Model for Legged Locomotion on Muddy Terrains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12006)
*Xunjie Chen,Liuyin Wang,Xinyan Huang,Jerry Shan,Yantao Shen,Jingang Yi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于足部-泥浆相互作用的新型阻力模型，该模型能捕捉泥浆的流变特性，并基于此设计了可变形的机器人足部以提高在泥泞地形上的移动性和能效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 腿式机器人在可变形和高屈服性地形（如泥泞）上的移动和导航面临重大挑战，需要准确描述足部-泥浆相互作用的物理模型来指导机器人足部设计和控制策略。

Method: 提出了一个统一的阻力模型来描述足部-泥浆相互作用，该模型捕捉了泥浆悬浮液的粘弹性、触变性和收缩吸力等流变行为。基于此模型设计了一种新型变形机器人足部，并通过大量实验验证了模型和足部设计的有效性。

Result: 实验结果表明，该阻力模型能提供准确的阻力预测，而变形足部不仅提高了在泥泞地形上的移动能力，还显著提升了行走的能效。

Conclusion: 该新型阻力模型为腿式机器人在泥泞地形上的数据驱动仿真和运动控制提供了理论基础，变形足部设计为解决此类挑战性地形上的机器人移动问题提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Legged robots face significant challenges in moving and navigating on deformable and highly yielding terrain such as mud. We present a resistive force model for legged foot-mud interactions. The model captures rheological behaviors such as visco-elasticity, thixotropy of the mud suspension and retractive suction. One attractive property of this new model lies in its effective, uniform formulation to provide underlying physical interpretation and accurate resistive force predictions. We further take advantage of the resistive force model to design a new morphing robotic foot for effective and efficient legged locomotion. We conduct extensive experiments to validate the force model, and the results demonstrate that the morphing foot enhances not only the locomotion mobility but also energy-efficiency of walking in mud. The new resistive force model can be further used to develop data-driven simulation and locomotion control of legged robots on muddy terrains.

</details>


### [437] [ReefMapGS: Enabling Large-Scale Underwater Reconstruction by Closing the Loop Between Multimodal SLAM and Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11992)
*Daniel Yang,Jungseok Hong,John J. Leonard,Yogesh Girdhar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ReefMapGS：基于3D高斯泼溅的增量式水下场景重建框架，无需COLMAP，通过多模态传感器SLAM获取相机位姿，实现从高置信区域逐步扩展的完整场景重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯泼溅技术依赖传统结构光运动等计算密集型方法获取相机位姿，不适用于野外机器人应用。水下环境中多模态传感器数据适合基于位姿图优化的SLAM方法，但需要将3DGS与SLAM有效结合以实现实时增量重建。

Method: 提出ReefMapGS框架：1）从高置信区域建立初始模型；2）逐步扩展至整个场景；3）交替进行新图像观测的局部跟踪与底层3DGS场景优化；4）将优化后的位姿整合到位姿图中进行全局轨迹优化。

Result: 在两个具有复杂几何结构的水下珊瑚礁站点实现了无需COLMAP的3D重建，并在长达700米的调查轨迹上获得了更准确的AUV全局位姿估计。

Conclusion: ReefMapGS成功将3D高斯泼溅与多模态传感器SLAM结合，实现了水下环境的增量式高质量重建，为野外机器人应用提供了有效的3D场景表示方案。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting is a powerful visual representation, providing high-quality and efficient 3D scene reconstruction, but it is crucially dependent on accurate camera poses typically obtained from computationally intensive processes like structure-from-motion that are unsuitable for field robot applications. However, in these domains, multimodal sensor data from acoustic, inertial, pressure, and visual sensors are available and suitable for pose-graph optimization-based SLAM methods that can estimate the vehicle's trajectory and thus our needed camera poses while providing uncertainty. We propose a 3DGS-based incremental reconstruction framework, ReefMapGS, that builds an initial model from a high certainty region and progressively expands to incorporate the whole scene. We reconstruct the scene incrementally by interleaving local tracking of new image observations with optimization of the underlying 3DGS scene. These refined poses are integrated back into the pose-graph to globally optimize the whole trajectory. We show COLMAP-free 3D reconstruction of two underwater reef sites with complex geometry as well as more accurate global pose estimation of our AUV over survey trajectories spanning up to 700 m.

</details>


### [438] [Complementarity by Construction: A Lie-Group Approach to Solving Quadratic Programs with Linear Complementarity Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11991)
*Arun L. Bishop,Micah I. Reich,Zachary Manchester*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Marble求解器，通过流形优化方法解决线性互补二次规划问题，特别适用于机器人混合连续-离散系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人学中许多问题需要同时处理连续动力学和离散事件（如接触建立与断开），LCQP能很好建模这类问题但缺乏高效求解器

Method: 发现互补约束在无穷小松弛下形成李群结构，利用流形优化方法，设计数值稳定的回缩映射，通过参数化保证约束自动满足

Result: 开发开源求解器Marble，在基准测试中表现优异，能解决现有方法无法收敛的多个机器人学问题

Conclusion: 基于流形优化的LCQP求解方法有效避免了传统互补约束的数值问题，为机器人混合系统规划提供了实用工具

Abstract: Many problems in robotics require reasoning over a mix of continuous dynamics and discrete events, such as making and breaking contact in manipulation and locomotion. These problems are locally well modeled by linear complementarity quadratic programs (LCQPs), an extension to QPs that introduce complementarity constraints. While very expressive, LCQPs are non-convex, and few solvers exist for computing good local solutions for use in planning pipelines. In this work, we observe that complementarity constraints form a Lie group under infinitesimal relaxation, and leverage this structure to perform on-manifold optimization. We introduce a retraction map that is numerically well behaved, and use it to parameterize the constraints so that they are satisfied by construction. The resulting solver avoids many of the classical issues with complementarity constraints. We provide an open-source solver, Marble, that is implemented in C++ with Julia and Python bindings. We demonstrate that Marble is competitive on a suite of benchmark problems, and solves a number of robotics problems where existing approaches fail to converge.

</details>


### [439] [Bipedal-Walking-Dynamics Model on Granular Terrains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11981)
*Xunjie Chen,Xinyan Huang,Peter Shan,Jingang Yi,Tao Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种新的动力学建模方法，用于预测双足机器人在颗粒介质（如沙子）上的行走运动，通过集成动态足-地形交互模型计算地面反作用力，并分析双足动力学、运输成本和足部滚动/侵入效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 颗粒介质（如沙子）的屈服特性会导致双足机器人足部下陷和滑动，带来行走运动的不确定性和不稳定性，需要新的动力学模型来准确预测和优化双足机器人在此类非结构化环境中的行走性能。

Method: 提出一种新的动力学建模方法，集成动态足-地形交互模型计算地面反作用力。该颗粒动力学模型增加了三个自由度来估计足部下陷和滑动，这些参数对捕获机器人行走运动学和动力学（如运输成本）至关重要。使用该模型分析双足动力学、运输成本以及足部滚动和侵入效应，并在沙地上进行双足机器人行走实验验证。

Result: 通过双足机器人行走实验验证了所提出的动力学模型，包括机器人步态轮廓、介质侵入预测和地面反作用力估计。实验结果表明该模型能够准确预测双足机器人在颗粒介质上的行走行为。

Conclusion: 这种新的动力学模型可以作为双足机器人在颗粒地形上高效行走的运动控制和优化的有效工具，为解决颗粒介质带来的不确定性和不稳定性问题提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Bipeds have demonstrated high agility and mobility in unstructured environments such as sand. The yielding of such granular media brings significant sinkage and slip of the bipedal feet, leading to uncertainty and instability of walking locomotion. We present a new dynamics-modeling approach to capture and predict bipedal-walking locomotion on granular media. A dynamic foot-terrain interaction model is integrated to compute the ground reaction force (GRF). The proposed granular dynamic model has three additional degree-of-freedom (DoF) to estimate foot sinkage and slip that are critical to capturing robot-walking kinematics and kinetics such as cost of transport (CoT). Using the new model, we analyze bipedal kinetics, CoT, and foot-terrain rolling and intrusion affects. Experiments are conducted using a biped robotic walker on sand to validate the proposed dynamic model with robot-gait profiles, media-intrusion prediction, and GRF estimations. This new dynamics model can further serve as an enabling tool for locomotion control and optimization of bipedal robots to efficiently walk on granular terrains.

</details>


### [440] [M2HRI: An LLM-Driven Multimodal Multi-Agent Framework for Personalized Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11975)
*Shaid Hasan,Breenice Lee,Sujan Sarker,Tariq Iqbal*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: M2HRI是一个基于大语言模型的多模态多智能体框架，为每个机器人配备独特个性和长期记忆，并通过协调机制处理个体差异，以提升多机器人人机交互的社会适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多机器人系统将机器人视为功能相同的实体，忽视了机器人个体身份对用户感知的影响，以及当存在个体差异时协调机制如何塑造多机器人行为。这限制了多机器人系统在家庭、医院等社交环境中的应用潜力。

Method: 提出M2HRI框架：1) 基于大语言模型为每个机器人配备可区分的个性特征；2) 为每个机器人建立长期记忆以实现个性化交互；3) 设计基于个体差异的集中式协调机制来管理多机器人行为。

Result: 用户研究(n=105)显示：1) LLM驱动的个性特征显著可区分且提升交互质量；2) 长期记忆改善个性化和偏好感知；3) 集中式协调显著减少行为重叠并提升整体交互质量。

Conclusion: 机器人个体性和结构化协调对于实现连贯且社会适宜的多智能体人机交互至关重要。M2HRI框架通过结合个性、记忆和协调机制，为社交环境中的多机器人系统提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-robot systems hold significant promise for social environments such as homes and hospitals, yet existing multi-robot works treat robots as functionally identical, overlooking how robots individual identity shape user perception and how coordination shapes multi-robot behavior when such individuality is present. To address this, we introduce M2HRI, a multimodal multi-agent framework built on large language models that equips each robot with distinct personality and long-term memory, alongside a coordination mechanism conditioned on these differences. In a controlled user study (n = 105) in a multi-agent human-robot interaction (HRI) scenario, we find that LLM-driven personality traits are significantly distinguishable and enhance interaction quality, long-term memory improves personalization and preference awareness, and centralized coordination significantly reduces overlap while improving overall interaction quality. Together, these results demonstrate that both agent individuality and structured coordination are essential for coherent and socially appropriate multi-agent HRI. Project website and code are available at https://project-m2hri.github.io/.

</details>


### [441] [Disentangled Point Diffusion for Precise Object Placement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11793)
*Lyuxing He,Eric Cai,Shobhit Aggarwal,Jianjun Wang,David Held*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TAX-DPD：一种分层解耦点扩散框架，通过全局场景级密集高斯混合模型和局部对象级解耦点云扩散，实现高精度物体放置，在放置精度、多模态覆盖和几何泛化方面达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 端到端策略在泛化新物体几何形状和实现高精度方面存在困难，而基于目标预测的物体中心方法提供了模块化分解。需要一种既能保持表达灵活性又能实现高精度放置的框架。

Method: 提出分层解耦点扩散框架：1) 全局场景级：使用新颖的前馈密集高斯混合模型生成空间密集的全局放置先验；2) 局部对象级：通过解耦点云扩散模块分别扩散物体几何和放置框架，实现精确的局部几何推理。

Result: 在仿真和真实世界高精度工业插入任务中验证，显示在放置精度、多模态覆盖和泛化物体几何及场景配置变化方面达到SOTA。点云扩散比SE(3)-扩散方法精度更高，框架还可扩展到非刚性物体（如布料悬挂）。

Conclusion: TAX-DPD框架通过分层解耦方法有效解决了物体放置任务中的精度和泛化问题，证明了点云扩散在刚性物体放置中的优越性，并展示了扩展到非刚性物体的潜力。

Abstract: Recent advances in robotic manipulation have highlighted the effectiveness of learning from demonstration. However, while end-to-end policies excel in expressivity and flexibility, they struggle both in generalizing to novel object geometries and in attaining a high degree of precision. An alternative, object-centric approach frames the task as predicting the placement pose of the target object, providing a modular decomposition of the problem. Building on this goal-prediction paradigm, we propose TAX-DPD, a hierarchical, disentangled point diffusion framework that achieves state-of-the-art performance in placement precision, multi-modal coverage, and generalization to variations in object geometries and scene configurations. We model global scene-level placements through a novel feed-forward Dense Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) that yields a spatially dense prior over global placements; we then model the local object-level configuration through a novel disentangled point cloud diffusion module that separately diffuses the object geometry and the placement frame, enabling precise local geometric reasoning. Interestingly, we demonstrate that our point cloud diffusion achieves substantially higher accuracy than a prior approach based on SE(3)-diffusion, even in the context of rigid object placement. We validate our approach across a suite of challenging tasks in simulation and in the real-world on high-precision industrial insertion tasks. Furthermore, we present results on a cloth-hanging task in simulation, indicating that our framework can further relax assumptions on object rigidity.

</details>


### [442] [Identifying Inductive Biases for Robot Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11768)
*Apoorv Vaish,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种利用归纳偏置进行机器人形态与控制协同设计的高效算法，通过分析协同设计空间中的模式特征，实现了比基准算法36%的性能提升和两个数量级的样本效率改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人形态与控制的协同设计能够确保二者之间的协同交互（类似于生物有机体），但这是一个高维搜索问题。为了使搜索变得可行，需要一种系统性的方法来识别适合其结构的归纳偏置。

Method: 分析了软体机器人在运动和操作任务中的协同设计空间，发现了三个跨区域一致的模式：1）在协同设计空间区域内，质量变化沿着低维流形；2）高质量区域的变化分布在更多维度上；3）形态与控制紧密耦合。基于这些洞察，设计了一种高效的协同设计算法，该算法在搜索过程中推断任务特定结构并自适应调整。

Result: 提出的算法比基准算法实现了36%的性能提升，并且样本效率提高了两个数量级以上，证明了利用归纳偏置进行协同设计的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过识别和利用协同设计空间中的结构模式，可以显著提高机器人形态与控制协同设计的效率和性能，为复杂机器人系统的设计提供了有效的方法论。

Abstract: Co-designing a robot's morphology and control can ensure synergistic interactions between them, prevalent in biological organisms. However, co-design is a high-dimensional search problem. To make this search tractable, we need a systematic method for identifying inductive biases tailored to its structure. In this paper, we analyze co-design landscapes for soft locomotion and manipulation tasks and identify three patterns that are consistent across regions of their co-design spaces. We observe that within regions of co-design space, quality varies along a low-dimensional manifold. Higher-quality regions exhibit variations spread across more dimensions, while tightly coupling morphology and control. We leverage these insights to devise an efficient co-design algorithm. Since the precise instantiation of this structure varies across tasks and is not known a priori, our algorithm infers it from information gathered during search and adapts to each task's specific structure. This yields $36\%$ more improvement than benchmark algorithms. Moreover, our algorithm achieved more than two orders of magnitude in sample efficiency compared to these benchmark algorithms, demonstrating the effectiveness of leveraging inductive biases to co-design.

</details>


### [443] [StarVLA-$α$: Reducing Complexity in Vision-Language-Action Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11757)
*Jinhui Ye,Ning Gao,Senqiao Yang,Jinliang Zheng,Zixuan Wang,Yuxin Chen,Pengguang Chen,Yilun Chen,Shu Liu,Jiaya Jia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: StarVLA-α是一个简单但强大的Vision-Language-Action模型基线，旨在通过最小化架构复杂性来系统研究VLA设计选择，在多个基准测试中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型领域高度碎片化且复杂，不同方法在架构、训练数据、具身配置和基准工程方面差异巨大，缺乏系统性的设计选择研究。

Method: 设计了一个简单的VLA基线模型，最小化架构和流程复杂性以减少实验混杂因素。系统评估了动作建模策略、机器人特定预训练和接口工程等关键设计轴，在LIBERO、SimplerEnv、RoboTwin和RoboCasa等多个基准上进行统一训练。

Result: 简单的基线模型在多个基准测试中保持高度竞争力，表明强大的VLM骨干结合最小化设计足以实现强大性能，无需额外架构复杂性或工程技巧。单一通用模型在真实世界RoboChallenge基准上比π₀.₅高出20%。

Conclusion: StarVLA-α为VLA领域研究提供了坚实的起点，证明简单设计结合强大骨干已足够，未来研究应关注更根本的改进而非增加复杂性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for building general-purpose robotic agents. However, the VLA landscape remains highly fragmented and complex: as existing approaches vary substantially in architectures, training data, embodiment configurations, and benchmark-specific engineering. In this work, we introduce StarVLA-$α$, a simple yet strong baseline designed to study VLA design choices under controlled conditions. StarVLA-$α$ deliberately minimizes architectural and pipeline complexity to reduce experimental confounders and enable systematic analysis. Specifically, we re-evaluate several key design axes, including action modeling strategies, robot-specific pretraining, and interface engineering. Across unified multi-benchmark training on LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, and RoboCasa, the same simple baseline remains highly competitive, indicating that a strong VLM backbone combined with minimal design is already sufficient to achieve strong performance without relying on additional architectural complexity or engineering tricks. Notably, our single generalist model outperforms $π_{0.5}$ by 20\% on the public real-world RoboChallenge benchmark. We expect StarVLA-$α$ to serve as a solid starting point for future research in the VLA regime. Code will be released at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

</details>


### [444] [Grounded World Model for Semantically Generalizable Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11751)
*Quanyi Li,Lan Feng,Haonan Zhang,Wuyang Li,Letian Wang,Alexandre Alahi,Harold Soh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出GWM-MPC方法，在视觉-语言对齐的潜在空间中学习基础世界模型，将视觉运动模型预测控制转化为视觉语言智能体，实现基于任务指令而非目标图像的评分


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统视觉运动MPC需要预先获取目标图像，但在新环境中难以获得；同时图像目标相比自然语言交互性有限。需要一种能够直接基于任务指令进行预测控制的方法

Method: 学习基础世界模型(GWM)在视觉-语言对齐的潜在空间中，使每个动作提案的评分基于其未来结果与任务指令的接近程度，通过嵌入相似性度量实现

Result: 在WISER基准测试中，GWM-MPC在包含288个任务的测试集上达到87%成功率，这些任务具有未见过的视觉信号和指代表达式；传统VLA平均成功率仅22%，尽管在训练集上过拟合达到90%

Conclusion: GWM-MPC将视觉运动MPC转化为超越基于VLM的VLA的视觉语言智能体，在语义泛化方面表现优异，能够处理未见过的视觉信号和语言指令

Abstract: In Model Predictive Control (MPC), world models predict the future outcomes of various action proposals, which are then scored to guide the selection of the optimal action. For visuomotor MPC, the score function is a distance metric between a predicted image and a goal image, measured in the latent space of a pretrained vision encoder like DINO and JEPA. However, it is challenging to obtain the goal image in advance of the task execution, particularly in new environments. Additionally, conveying the goal through an image offers limited interactivity compared with natural language. In this work, we propose to learn a Grounded World Model (GWM) in a vision-language-aligned latent space. As a result, each proposed action is scored based on how close its future outcome is to the task instruction, reflected by the similarity of embeddings. This approach transforms the visuomotor MPC to a VLA that surpasses VLM-based VLAs in semantic generalization. On the proposed WISER benchmark, GWM-MPC achieves a 87% success rate on the test set comprising 288 tasks that feature unseen visual signals and referring expressions, yet remain solvable with motions demonstrated during training. In contrast, traditional VLAs achieve an average success rate of 22%, even though they overfit the training set with a 90% success rate.

</details>


### [445] [ACT: Automated CPS Testing for Open-Source Robotic Platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11708)
*Aditya A. Krishnan,Donghoon Kim,Hokeun Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出ACT框架，用于对开源CPS软件与机器人平台进行自动化持续测试，集成GitHub等开源基础设施


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开源CPS软件常缺乏涉及机器人平台的鲁棒测试，导致关键错误未被发现；当CPS软件多个模块由不同开源贡献者开发时，这一问题尤为突出

Method: 提出自动化CPS测试（ACT）框架，执行开源软件与机器人平台的自动化持续测试，并与GitHub等开源基础设施集成；实现ACT原型并在教育机器人平台的开源CPS上进行案例研究

Result: 通过案例研究展示了ACT框架的能力，验证了其在开源CPS测试中的有效性

Conclusion: ACT框架能够有效解决开源CPS软件缺乏机器人平台测试的问题，通过自动化持续测试集成开源基础设施，提高软件质量和可靠性

Abstract: Open-source software for cyber-physical systems (CPS) often lacks robust testing involving robotic platforms, resulting in critical errors that remain undetected. This is especially challenging when multiple modules of CPS software are developed by various open-source contributors. To address this gap, we propose Automated CPS Testing (ACT) that performs automated, continuous testing of open-source software with its robotic platforms, integrated with the open-source infrastructure such as GitHub. We implement an ACT prototype and conduct a case study on an open-source CPS with an educational robotic platform to demonstrate its capabilities.

</details>


### [446] [Dual-Control Frequency-Aware Diffusion Model for Depth-Dependent Optical Microrobot Microscopy Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11680)
*Lan Wei,Zongcai Tan,Kangyi Lu,Jian-Qing Zheng,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Du-FreqNet——一种双控制、频率感知的扩散模型，用于物理一致的显微镜图像合成，解决微机器人3D感知中数据稀缺和现有生成方法难以捕捉光学特性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光学微机器人的自主操作需要准确的3D感知，但大规模高质量显微镜数据集稀缺，主要由于复杂的制造过程和劳动密集的标注。现有GAN方法难以再现关键光学特性，特别是深度相关的衍射和散焦效应。

Method: 提出Du-FreqNet：双控制、频率感知的扩散模型，包含两个独立的ControlNet分支分别编码微机器人3D点云和深度特定网格层；引入自适应频域损失，基于到焦平面的距离动态重新加权高频和低频分量；利用基于可微分FFT的监督来捕捉物理有意义的频率分布。

Result: 在有限数据集（如每个姿态80张图像）上训练，模型实现了可控的深度相关图像合成，SSIM比基线提高20.7%；实验表明Du-FreqNet能有效泛化到未见过的姿态，并显著增强下游任务，包括3D姿态和深度估计。

Conclusion: Du-FreqNet通过物理一致的显微镜图像合成解决了微机器人3D感知中的数据稀缺问题，其频率感知方法能更好地捕捉光学特性，为微机器人系统的鲁棒闭环控制提供了支持。

Abstract: Optical microrobots actuated by optical tweezers (OT) are important for cell manipulation and microscale assembly, but their autonomous operation depends on accurate 3D perception. Developing such perception systems is challenging because large-scale, high-quality microscopy datasets are scarce, owing to complex fabrication processes and labor-intensive annotation. Although generative AI offers a promising route for data augmentation, existing generative adversarial network (GAN)-based methods struggle to reproduce key optical characteristics, particularly depth-dependent diffraction and defocus effects. To address this limitation, we propose Du-FreqNet, a dual-control, frequency-aware diffusion model for physically consistent microscopy image synthesis. The framework features two independent ControlNet branches to encode microrobot 3D point clouds and depth-specific mesh layers, respectively. We introduce an adaptive frequency-domain loss that dynamically reweights high- and low-frequency components based on the distance to the focal plane. By leveraging differentiable FFT-based supervision, Du-FreqNet captures physically meaningful frequency distributions often missed by pixel-space methods. Trained on a limited dataset (e.g., 80 images per pose), our model achieves controllable, depth-dependent image synthesis, improving SSIM by 20.7% over baselines.
