A biased-dice sampling mechanism then converts these probabilities into definite yet stochastic outcomes. This work presents the first probabilistic, high-dimensional droplet collision model derived from experimental data, offering a physically consistent, comprehensive, and user-friendly solution for spray simulation.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [558] [ControlFoley: Unified and Controllable Video-to-Audio Generation with Cross-Modal Conflict Handling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15086)
*Jianxuan Yang,Xinyue Guo,Zhi Cheng,Kai Wang,Lipan Zhang,Jinjie Hu,Qiang Ji,Yihua Cao,Yihao Meng,Zhaoyue Cui,Mengmei Liu,Meng Meng,Jian Luan*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: ControlFoley是一个统一的多模态视频到音频生成框架，通过联合视觉编码、时序-音色解耦和模态鲁棒训练，实现了对视频、文本和参考音频的精确控制，解决了现有方法在视觉-文本冲突下的弱可控性和参考音频中时序-音色信息纠缠的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频到音频生成方法存在三个主要问题：1) 在视觉与文本冲突时文本可控性弱；2) 参考音频中时序和音色信息纠缠导致风格控制不精确；3) 缺乏标准化基准限制了系统评估。需要开发一个能够实现精确多模态控制的统一框架。

Method: 提出ControlFoley框架，包含：1) 联合视觉编码范式，集成CLIP与时空音频-视觉编码器以改善对齐和文本可控性；2) 时序-音色解耦，抑制冗余时序线索同时保留区分性音色特征；3) 模态鲁棒训练方案，包含统一多模态表示对齐和随机模态丢弃；4) 创建VGGSound-TVC基准，用于评估不同视觉-文本冲突程度下的文本可控性。

Result: 在多个视频到音频任务（文本引导、文本控制和音频控制生成）上实现了最先进的性能。在跨模态冲突下表现出优越的可控性，同时保持强同步性和音频质量，与工业级V2A系统相比具有竞争性或更好的性能。

Conclusion: ControlFoley通过创新的多模态控制机制解决了视频到音频生成中的关键挑战，实现了对视频、文本和参考音频的精确控制，为可控视频到音频生成提供了有效的解决方案，并建立了标准化评估基准。

Abstract: Recent advances in video-to-audio (V2A) generation enable high-quality audio synthesis from visual content, yet achieving robust and fine-grained controllability remains challenging. Existing methods suffer from weak textual controllability under visual-text conflict and imprecise stylistic control due to entangled temporal and timbre information in reference audio. Moreover, the lack of standardized benchmarks limits systematic evaluation.
  We propose ControlFoley, a unified multimodal V2A framework that enables precise control over video, text, and reference audio. We introduce a joint visual encoding paradigm that integrates CLIP with a spatio-temporal audio-visual encoder to improve alignment and textual controllability. We further propose temporal-timbre decoupling to suppress redundant temporal cues while preserving discriminative timbre features. In addition, we design a modality-robust training scheme with unified multimodal representation alignment (REPA) and random modality dropout. We also present VGGSound-TVC, a benchmark for evaluating textual controllability under varying degrees of visual-text conflict.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across multiple V2A tasks, including text-guided, text-controlled, and audio-controlled generation. ControlFoley achieves superior controllability under cross-modal conflict while maintaining strong synchronization and audio quality, and shows competitive or better performance compared to an industrial V2A system.
  Code, models, datasets, and demos are available at: https://yjx-research.github.io/ControlFoley/.

</details>


### [559] [2D or 3D: Who Governs Salience in VLA Models? -- Tri-Stage Token Pruning Framework with Modality Salience Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09244)
*Zihao Zheng,Sicheng Tian,Zhihao Mao,Lingyue Zhang,Chenyue Li,Ziyun Zhang,Hong Gao,Yuchen Huang,Yutong Xu,Guojie Luo,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出针对多视觉模态VLA模型的三阶段令牌剪枝框架，通过分析2D/3D模态显著性差异实现高效推理加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多视觉模态VLA模型因模态扩展导致输入令牌数量增加，面临更大的加速需求。现有令牌剪枝方案专为2D-only VLA设计，忽略了2D/3D模态显著性差异。

Method: 遵循MVLA模型中多模态数据处理流程，开发三阶段分析捕捉2D/3D模态显著性差异和动态变化，基于此提出相应的三阶段令牌剪枝框架，实现最优2D/3D令牌选择和高效剪枝。

Result: 实验显示该框架实现最高2.55倍推理加速，精度损失最小，仅产生5.8%开销。

Conclusion: 提出的三阶段令牌剪枝框架能有效解决MVLA模型因模态扩展带来的加速需求，通过考虑2D/3D模态显著性差异实现高效推理优化。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as the mainstream of embodied intelligence. Recent VLA models have expanded their input modalities from 2D-only to 2D+3D paradigms, forming multi-visual-modal VLA (MVLA) models. Despite achieving improved spatial perception, MVLA faces a greater acceleration demand due to the increased number of input tokens caused by modal expansion. Token pruning is an effective optimization methods tailored to MVLA models. However, existing token pruning schemes are designed for 2D-only VLA models, ignoring 2D/3D modality salience differences. In this paper, we follow the application process of multi-modal data in MVLA models and develop a tri-stage analysis to capture the discrepancy and dynamics of 2D/3D modality salience. Based on these, we propose a corresponding tri-stage token pruning framework for MVLA models to achieve optimal 2D/3D token selection and efficient pruning. Experiments show that our framework achieves up to a 2.55x inference speedup with minimal accuracy loss, while only costing 5.8% overhead. Our Code is coming soon.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [560] [Synthesis and Deployment of Maximal Robust Control Barrier Functions through Adversarial Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13192)
*Donggeon David Oh,Duy P. Nguyen,Haimin Hu,Jaime Fernández Fisac*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于强化学习的鲁棒控制障碍函数框架，用于处理具有黑盒动力学和未知不确定性结构的非线性系统，相比传统方法能获得更少保守的安全集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒控制障碍函数方法通常依赖于动力学的显式闭式结构（如控制仿射）和不确定性模型，导致可扩展性和通用性有限，大多数鲁棒CBF只能证明最大鲁棒安全集的保守子集。

Method: 引入新的鲁棒CBF框架：1）证明求解动态规划Isaacs方程的安全值函数是有效的鲁棒离散时间CBF；2）采用强化学习中的Q函数概念，将障碍证书提升到状态-动作空间，提出鲁棒Q-CBF约束；3）结合对抗性RL，在具有黑盒动力学和未知不确定性结构的非线性系统上合成和部署鲁棒Q-CBF。

Result: 在经典倒立摆基准和36自由度四足机器人模拟器上验证了框架有效性：在倒立摆上获得比基于障碍函数基线更少保守的安全集；在四足机器人上即使面对对抗性不确定性也能实现可靠的安全执行。

Conclusion: 该框架将鲁棒CBF扩展到具有黑盒动力学和未知不确定性结构的非线性系统，通过强化学习实现了更少保守的安全保证，为复杂系统的安全控制提供了新方法。

Abstract: Robust control barrier functions (CBFs) provide a principled mechanism for smooth safety enforcement under worst-case disturbances. However, existing approaches typically rely on explicit, closed-form structure in the dynamics (e.g., control-affine) and uncertainty models. This has led to limited scalability and generality, with most robust CBFs certifying only conservative subsets of the maximal robust safe set. In this paper, we introduce a new robust CBF framework for general nonlinear systems under bounded uncertainty. We first show that the safety value function solving the dynamic programming Isaacs equation is a valid robust discrete-time CBF that enforces safety on the maximal robust safe set. We then adopt the key reinforcement learning (RL) notion of quality function (or Q-function), which removes the need for explicit dynamics by lifting the barrier certificate into state-action space and yields a novel robust Q-CBF constraint for safety filtering. Combined with adversarial RL, this enables the synthesis and deployment of robust Q-CBFs on general nonlinear systems with black-box dynamics and unknown uncertainty structure. We validate the framework on a canonical inverted pendulum benchmark and a 36-D quadruped simulator, achieving substantially less conservative safe sets than barrier-based baselines on the pendulum and reliable safety enforcement even under adversarial uncertainty realizations on the quadruped.

</details>


### [561] [Dynamic Multi-Robot Task Allocation under Uncertainty and Communication Constraints: A Game-Theoretic Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11954)
*Maria G. Mendoza,Pan-Yang Su,Bryce L. Ferguson,S. Shankar Sastry*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究动态多机器人任务分配问题，考虑任务完成不确定性、时间窗口约束和不完全信息，提出基于迭代最佳响应(IBR)的分布式策略，在城市规模包裹配送场景中验证其性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决动态多机器人任务分配中的关键挑战：任务完成不确定性、时间窗口约束、不完全信息（有限感知和通信），以及任务在线到达的特性，需要设计高效分布式算法。

Method: 提出迭代最佳响应(IBR)分布式策略：每个智能体选择能最大化其对局部观测社会福利边际贡献的任务。模型通过基于中心的感知区域确定任务可见性，通过通信图管理中心间信息交换。

Result: 在城市规模包裹配送场景（最多100架无人机）中测试，IBR在完全和稀疏通信条件下均实现竞争性任务完成性能，且计算时间更低。与EDD、匈牙利算法、SCoBA三种基线方法相比表现优越。

Conclusion: IBR是一种有效的分布式任务分配策略，能在不完全信息、时间窗口约束和不确定任务完成条件下，以较低计算成本实现高性能任务分配，适用于大规模多机器人系统。

Abstract: We study dynamic multi-robot task allocation under uncertain task completion, time-window constraints, and incomplete information. Tasks arrive online over a finite horizon and must be completed within specified deadlines, while agents operate from distributed hubs with limited sensing and communication. We model incomplete information through hub-based sensing regions that determine task visibility and a communication graph that governs inter-hub information exchange. Using this framework, we propose Iterative Best Response (IBR), a decentralized policy in which each agent selects the task that maximizes its marginal contribution to the locally observed welfare. We compare IBR against three baselines: Earliest Due Date first (EDD), Hungarian algorithm, and Stochastic Conflict-Based Allocation (SCoBA), on a city-scale package-delivery domain with up to 100 drones and varying task arrival scenarios. Under full and sparse communication, IBR achieves competitive task-completion performance with lower computation time.

</details>


### [562] [Complementary Filtering on SO(3) for Attitude Estimation with Scalar Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08099)
*Alessandro Melis,Soulaimane Berkane,Tarek Hamel*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于标量测量的姿态估计互补滤波器，适用于惯性向量仅沿特定体坐标系向量部分观测的场景，在满足持续激励条件下实现几乎全局渐近稳定


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决姿态估计中惯性向量不完全观测的问题，即只能沿特定体坐标系向量测量标量分量，这种场景出现在不完全向量测量或异构传感器信息约束中

Method: 基于SO(3)上的经典互补滤波器，设计针对标量输出结构的改进创新项，分析不同标量配置下的收敛条件

Result: 当至少三个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量时，在持续激励条件下实现几乎全局渐近稳定；对于两种标量配置，推导了保证收敛的充分条件

Conclusion: 所提出的标量基互补滤波器在减少传感和/或新型传感模式的挑战性场景中有效，扩展了姿态估计的应用范围

Abstract: Attitude estimation using scalar measurements, corresponding to partial vectorial observations, arises naturally when inertial vectors are not fully observed but only measured along specific body-frame vectors. Such measurements arise in problems involving incomplete vector measurements or attitude constraints derived from heterogeneous sensor information. Building on the classical complementary filter on SO(3), we propose an observer with a modified innovation term tailored to this scalar-output structure. The main result shows that almost-global asymptotic stability is recovered, under suitable persistence of excitation conditions, when at least three inertial vectors are measured along a common body-frame vector, which is consistent with the three-dimensional structure of SO(3). For two-scalar configurations - corresponding either to one inertial vector measured along two body-frame vectors, or to two inertial vectors measured along a common body-frame vector - we further derive sufficient conditions guaranteeing convergence within a reduced basin of attraction. Different examples and numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scalar-based complementary filter for attitude estimation in challenging scenarios involving reduced sensing and/or novel sensing modalities.

</details>


### [563] [Karma Mechanisms for Decentralised, Cooperative Multi Agent Path Finding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07970)
*Kevin Riehl,Julius Schlapbach,Anastasios Kouvelas,Michail A. Makridis*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Karma机制的去中心化多智能体路径规划框架，通过非交易性信用系统记录智能体历史合作行为，调节冲突解决决策，在有限通信条件下实现长期公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集中式最优求解器虽然能保证解的最优性，但指数级计算复杂度限制了大规模系统的可扩展性和实时应用。现有去中心化启发式方法虽然更快，但会导致次优结果和高成本差异。需要一种既能保持效率又能促进公平的去中心化协调框架。

Method: 提出基于Karma机制的去中心化协调框架，Karma是一种不可交易的人工信用，记录智能体过去的合作行为并调节未来的冲突解决决策。将冲突解决建模为双边协商过程，使智能体能够通过成对重规划解决冲突，在有限通信和无全局优先级结构的情况下促进长期公平性。

Result: 在具有运动学方向约束的终身机器人仓库多智能体取货-送货场景中进行评估。结果表明，Karma机制能平衡智能体间的重规划工作量，减少服务时间差异，同时不牺牲整体效率。

Conclusion: Karma机制为多智能体路径规划提供了一种有效的去中心化协调框架，能够在有限通信条件下实现冲突解决的公平性，平衡个体与系统性能，适用于大规模实时应用场景。

Abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a fundamental coordination problem in large-scale robotic and cyber-physical systems, where multiple agents must compute conflict-free trajectories with limited computational and communication resources. While centralised optimal solvers provide guarantees on solution optimality, their exponential computational complexity limits scalability to large-scale systems and real-time applicability. Existing decentralised heuristics are faster, but result in suboptimal outcomes and high cost disparities. This paper proposes a decentralised coordination framework for cooperative MAPF based on Karma mechanisms - artificial, non-tradeable credits that account for agents' past cooperative behaviour and regulate future conflict resolution decisions. The approach formulates conflict resolution as a bilateral negotiation process that enables agents to resolve conflicts through pairwise replanning while promoting long-term fairness under limited communication and without global priority structures. The mechanism is evaluated in a lifelong robotic warehouse multi-agent pickup-and-delivery scenario with kinematic orientation constraints. The results highlight that the Karma mechanism balances replanning effort across agents, reducing disparity in service times without sacrificing overall efficiency. Code: https://github.com/DerKevinRiehl/karma_dmapf

</details>


<div id='q-bio.BM'></div>

# q-bio.BM [[Back]](#toc)

### [564] [Polyformer: a generative framework for thermodynamic modeling of polymeric molecules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14241)
*Alessio Valentini,David Pekker,Chungwen Liang,Todd Martinez,Swagatam Mukhopadhyay*

Main category: q-bio.BM

TL;DR: Polyformer是一个生成式框架，用于聚合物分子的热力学建模，能够根据序列和温度生成符合热力学构象系综的构象，解决了分子折叠、构象系综及其随温度变化三个问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统结构生物学范式认为序列决定构象，构象决定功能，但生物分子并非静态结构，其构象系综决定功能。现有方法如AlphaFold只能预测单一最佳构象，无法捕捉热力学系综。

Method: 提出Polyformer生成式框架，输入序列和温度（或其他热力学变量），生成符合分子热力学构象系综的构象。这是首个同时解决分子折叠、构象系综及系综随温度变化三个问题的生成模型。

Result: 在50-111个残基的蛋白质结构域上测试，模型预测与分子动力学模拟轨迹吻合良好。

Conclusion: Polyformer为聚合物分子的热力学建模提供了新框架，能够生成符合热力学系综的构象，超越了传统单一构象预测方法，对理解生物分子动态功能具有重要意义。

Abstract: The classic paradigm of structural biology is that the sequence of a biomolecule (protein, nucleic acid, lipid, etc) determines its conformation (shape) which determines its biological function. Protein folding programs like AlphaFold address this paradigm by predicting the single best conformation given a sequence that defines the molecule. However, biomolecules are not static structures, and their conformational ensemble determines their function. We present the Polyformer -- a generative framework for thermodynamic modeling of polymeric molecules. Given the sequence and temperature (or another thermodynamic variable), the Polyformer generates conformations faithful to the molecule's thermodynamic conformational ensemble. It is the first generative model that solves three problems simultaneously: how does a molecule fold, what is its conformational ensemble, and how does the conformational ensemble change as we change physical temperature. As a concrete test case, we apply Polyformer to protein domains with 50-111 residues and report good agreement of model predictions to Molecular Dynamics (MD) trajectories.

</details>


<div id='cs.IT'></div>

# cs.IT [[Back]](#toc)

### [565] [Regret Tail Characterization of Optimal Bandit Algorithms with Generic Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14876)
*Subhodip Panda,Shubhada Agrawal*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 该论文研究了随机多臂老虎机中期望渐近最优算法的遗憾尾部行为，将KLinf-UCB算法扩展到非参数奖励分布类，建立了期望渐近最优性，并推导了遗憾尾部概率的新上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然最小化期望遗憾是经典目标，但最近研究表明即使期望渐近最优算法也可能表现出重尾遗憾，以不可忽略的概率产生大遗憾。现有对遗憾尾部的精确刻画主要局限于参数化设置（如单参数指数族），需要扩展到更广泛的非参数模型。

Method: 将KLinf-UCB算法扩展到满足温和假设的广泛非参数奖励分布类，建立其期望渐近最优性，然后分析其遗憾尾部行为，推导遗憾尾部概率的新上界。

Result: 1) 证明了扩展KLinf-UCB算法在非参数设置下的期望渐近最优性；2) 推导了遗憾尾部概率的新上界；3) 特殊情况下（有界支撑和重尾分布）恢复了已知结果；4) 对于有限支撑奖励分布，上界与已知下界精确匹配。

Conclusion: 该工作为基于KL的渐近最优UCB算法提供了统一且紧致的遗憾尾部刻画，超越了参数模型，覆盖了包括有界支撑和重尾分布在内的广泛非参数设置。

Abstract: We study the tail behavior of regret in stochastic multi-armed bandits for algorithms that are asymptotically optimal in expectation. While minimizing expected regret is the classical objective, recent work shows that even such algorithms can exhibit heavy regret tails, incurring large regret with non-negligible probability. Existing sharp characterizations of regret tails are largely restricted to parametric settings, such as single-parameter exponential families.
  In this work, we extend the $\KLinf$-UCB algorithm of to a broad nonparametric class of reward distributions satisfying mild assumptions, and establish its asymptotic optimality in expectation. We then analyze the tail behavior of its regret and derive a novel upper bound on the regret tail probability. As special cases, our results recover regret-tail guarantees for both bounded-support and heavy-tailed (moment-bounded) bandit models. Moreover, for the special case of finitely-supported reward distributions, our upper bound matches the known lower bound exactly. Our results thus provide a unified and tight characterization of regret tails for asymptotically optimal KL-based UCB algorithms, going beyond parametric models.

</details>


### [566] [Exploiting Correlations in Federated Learning: Opportunities and Practical Limitations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14751)
*Adrian Edin,Michel Kieffer,Mikael Johansson,Zheng Chen*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于相关性的统一框架，将联邦学习中的梯度/模型压缩方案分为结构、时间和空间三类，并开发自适应压缩设计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中客户端与参数服务器之间的通信瓶颈促使研究数据压缩技术。现有压缩方法缺乏统一的理论框架，且对相关性的假设在不同场景下可能不成立，需要系统性的分类和评估

Method: 1. 将梯度/模型压缩方案系统分类为三类：利用结构相关性、时间相关性、空间相关性；2. 分析相关性来源，提出量化度量指标；3. 在统一框架下重新解释现有压缩方法；4. 提出两种自适应压缩设计，根据测量的相关性强度在不同压缩模式间主动切换

Result: 实验研究表明，结构、时间和空间相关性的程度随任务复杂度、模型架构和算法配置显著变化；自适应压缩设计相比传统非自适应方法获得性能提升；统一分类法为开发更有效的FL压缩技术提供理论基础

Conclusion: 算法设计者应在特定部署场景下仔细评估相关性假设，而非假设其始终存在；提出的基于相关性的统一分类法为开发更有效、应用特定的FL压缩技术提供了清晰且有原则的基础

Abstract: The communication bottleneck in federated learning (FL) has spurred extensive research into techniques to reduce the volume of data exchanged between client devices and the central parameter server. In this paper, we systematically classify gradient and model compression schemes into three categories based on the type of correlations they exploit: structural, temporal, and spatial. We examine the sources of such correlations, propose quantitative metrics for measuring their magnitude, and reinterpret existing compression methods through this unified correlation-based framework. Our experimental studies demonstrate that the degrees of structural, temporal, and spatial correlations vary significantly depending on task complexity, model architecture, and algorithmic configurations. These findings suggest that algorithm designers should carefully evaluate correlation assumptions under specific deployment scenarios rather than assuming that they are always present. Motivated by these findings, we propose two adaptive compression designs that actively switch between different compression modes based on the measured correlation strength, and we evaluate their performance gains relative to conventional non-adaptive approaches. In summary, our unified taxonomy provides a clean and principled foundation for developing more effective and application-specific compression techniques for FL systems.

</details>


### [567] [A Synonymous Variational Perspective on the Rate-Distortion-Perception Tradeoff](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14603)
*Zijian Liang,Kai Niu,Changshuo Wang,Jin Xu,Ping Zhang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 该论文从语义信息视角重新定义感知重建，提出基于同义集（synset）的源编码架构，建立了同义变分推理分析框架，证明了同义率失真感知权衡，阐明了分布散度项的理论起源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统率失真理论仅关注重建失真，而率失真感知框架中的感知质量度量缺乏理论依据。本文从同义性语义信息视角出发，旨在澄清感知重建的理论基础，建立更完备的压缩理论框架。

Method: 提出同义源编码架构，将感知重建定义为恢复源样本所属理想同义集中的任意可接受样本。建立同义变分推理分析框架，包含同义变分下界用于可处理的同义集导向压缩分析。证明同义性-感知一致性原理。

Result: 证明了同义率失真感知权衡，阐明了分布散度项自然源于同义集重建目标，澄清了其与现有率失真感知公式和经典率失真理论的兼容性，展示了同义源编码的潜在优势。

Conclusion: 从语义信息视角为感知重建提供了理论基础，建立了同义源编码的理论框架，阐明了感知质量度量的理论起源，为自然信号压缩的极限提供了更完备的理论描述。

Abstract: The fundamental limit of natural signal compression has traditionally been characterized by classical rate-distortion (RD) theory through the tradeoff between coding rate and reconstruction distortion, while the rate-distortion-perception (RDP) framework introduces a divergence-based measure of perceptual quality as a modeling principle rather than a theoretically-derived principle, leaving its theoretical origin unclear. In this paper, motivated by a synonymity-based semantic information perspective, we reformulate perceptual reconstruction as recovering any admissible sample within an ideal synonymous set (synset) associated with the source, rather than the source sample itself, and correspondingly establish a synonymous source coding architecture. On this basis, we develop a synonymous variational inference (SVI) analysis framework with a synonymous variational lower bound (SVLBO) for tractable analysis of synset-oriented compression. Within this framework, we establish a synonymity-perception consistency principle, showing that optimal identification of semantic information is theoretically consistent with perceptual optimization. Based on its derivation result, we prove a synonymous RDP tradeoff for the proposed synonymous source coding. These analytical results show that the distributional divergence term arises naturally from the synset-based reconstruction objective, clarify its compatibility with existing RDP formulations and classical RD theory, and suggest the potential advantages of synonymous source coding.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [568] [AI-Assisted Requirements Engineering: An Empirical Evaluation Relative to Expert Judgment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15222)
*Oz Levy,Ilya Dikman,Natan Levy,Michael Winokur*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI工具在系统需求工程中可作为决策支持机制，提供快速一致的质量评估，但无法替代专家在上下文解释和权衡推理方面的作用


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI在系统工程中应用日益广泛，但在需求工程的质量评估和验证方面仍主要依赖专家判断。现有AI工具在需求分析和生成方面表现出潜力，但其在正式系统工程流程中的角色以及与INCOSE标准的契合度尚不明确。

Method: 采用结构化系统工程方法，通过对照研究比较AI辅助需求评估与人类专家评估。在受控研究中，系统需求根据INCOSE"良好需求"标准，由经验丰富的系统工程师和AI评估工具分别进行评估。评估聚焦一致性、完整性、清晰度和可测试性，不仅考察准确性，还分析每个评估背后的决策逻辑。

Result: AI工具能够提供一致且快速的初步评估，特别是在句法和结构质量属性方面。然而，专家判断在上下文解释、歧义解决和权衡推理方面仍然不可或缺。AI不应替代系统工程师，而是作为需求工程生命周期中的决策支持机制。

Conclusion: 从系统工程视角，本研究提供了关于AI如何集成到需求工程工作流程中的实证证据，同时保持可追溯性、责任性和工程一致性。AI可作为辅助工具增强需求评估效率，但专家判断的核心地位不可替代。

Abstract: Artificial Intelligence is increasingly introduced into systems engineering activities, particularly within requirements engineering, where quality assessment and validation remain heavily dependent on expert judgment. While recent AI tools demonstrate promising capabilities in analyzing and generating requirements, their role within formal systems engineering processes-and their alignment with established INCOSE criteria-remains insufficiently understood. This paper investigates the extent to which AI-based tools can support systems engineers in evaluating requirement quality, without replacing professional expertise. The research adopts a structured systems engineering methodology to compare AI-assisted requirement evaluation with human expert assessment. A controlled study was conducted in which system requirements were evaluated against established INCOSE ``good requirement'' criteria by both experienced systems engineers and an AI-based assessment tool. The evaluation focused on consistency, completeness, clarity, and testability, examining not only accuracy but also the decision logic underlying each assessment. Results indicate that AI tools can provide consistent and rapid preliminary assessments, particularly for syntactic and structural quality attributes. However, expert judgment remains essential for contextual interpretation, ambiguity resolution, and trade-off reasoning. Rather than positioning AI as a replacement for systems engineers, the findings support its role as a decision-support mechanism within the RE lifecycle. From a systems engineering perspective, this study contributes empirical evidence on how AI can be integrated into RE workflows while preserving traceability, accountability, and engineering consistency.

</details>


### [569] [Vibe-Coding: Feedback-Based Automated Verification with no Human Code Inspection, a Feasibility Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14867)
*Michal Töpfer,František Plášil,Tomáš Bureš,Petr Hnětynka*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文研究在集体自适应系统中，通过精确的约束违反反馈来改进LLM生成的适配管理器的自动验证方法，证明细粒度反馈比粗粒度指标反馈更有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Vibe编码（通过反馈循环迭代改进LLM生成代码）在传统软件任务中有效，但在运行时自适应系统中的可靠性尚不明确，特别是当生成的代码未经人工检查时。需要研究如何在集体自适应系统中对LLM生成的适配管理器进行基于反馈的自动验证。

Method: 将自适应循环与vibe编码反馈循环结合，通过两种约束检查正确性：(1)通用架构约束；(2)使用新提出的功能约束逻辑（FCL，一种基于可能有限迹的一阶时序逻辑）形式化的功能约束。在Dragon Hunt集体自适应系统案例研究中实施该方法。

Result: 细粒度约束违反提供了可操作的反馈，通常在几次迭代内就能产生有效的适配管理器，而简单的粗粒度基于指标的反馈经常停滞。反馈精度是影响可靠性的主导因素。

Conclusion: 对于由没有编程技能的领域专家设计的系统，反馈精度是可靠vibe编码的主导因素，从而消除了人工代码检查的需求。精确的约束违反反馈能够有效指导LLM修复生成的适配管理器。

Abstract: Vibe coding inherently assumes iterative refinement of LLM-generated code through feedback loops. While effective for conventional software tasks, its reliability in runtime-adaptive systems is unclear -- especially when generated code is not manually inspected. This paper studies feedback-based automated verification of LLM-generated adaptation managers in Collective Adaptive Systems (CAS). We focus on the key challenges of verification in the loop: how to detect failures of generated code at runtime and how to report them precisely enough for an LLM to fix them.
  We combine the adaptation loop with a vibe-coding feedback loop where correctness is checked against (i) generic architectural constraints and (ii) functional constraints formalized in Functional Constraints Logic (FCL), a novel first-order temporal logic over potentially finite traces. Conducting the Dragon Hunt CAS case study, we show that fine-grained constraint violations provide actionable feedback that typically yields a valid adaptation manager within a few iterations, while simple coarse metric-based feedback often stalls. Our findings suggest that feedback precision is the dominant factor for reliable vibe coding in systems designed by domain experts with no programming skills, thereby obviating the need for human code inspection.

</details>


### [570] [Bounded Autonomy for Enterprise AI: Typed Action Contracts and Consumer-Side Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14723)
*Sarmad Sohail,Ghufran Haider*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一种有界自主架构，通过类型化操作契约、权限感知能力暴露、作用域上下文等机制，在保持LLM作为自然语言接口的同时，确保企业软件操作的安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型作为企业软件的自然语言接口时，直接作为系统操作者存在安全隐患，模型错误可能导致未授权操作、错误请求、跨工作空间执行等代价高昂的故障。

Method: 采用有界自主架构：语言模型解释意图并提出操作，但所有可执行行为受类型化操作契约、权限感知能力暴露、作用域上下文、副作用前验证、消费者端执行边界和可选人工批准约束。企业应用保持业务逻辑和授权的唯一来源，编排引擎基于明确发布的操作清单运行。

Result: 在部署的多租户企业应用中评估三种条件：手动操作、无约束AI（安全层禁用）和完整有界自主。25个场景试验中，有界自主系统完成23/25任务且零不安全执行，无约束配置仅完成17/25。两种AI条件相比手动操作提供13-18倍加速。移除安全层反而降低系统实用性：结构化验证反馈引导模型以更少轮次达到正确结果。

Conclusion: 该架构通过代码结构强制执行多项安全属性，拦截所有目标违规，使不完美的语言模型在企业系统中具有实际操作性价值，是已部署的实用解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used as natural-language interfaces to enterprise software, but their direct use as system operators remains unsafe. Model errors can propagate into unauthorized actions, malformed requests, cross-workspace execution, and other costly failures. We argue this is primarily an execution architecture problem. We present a bounded-autonomy architecture in which language models may interpret intent and propose actions, but all executable behavior is constrained by typed action contracts, permission-aware capability exposure, scoped context, validation before side effects, consumer-side execution boundaries, and optional human approval. The enterprise application remains the source of truth for business logic and authorization, while the orchestration engine operates over an explicit published actions manifest. We evaluate the architecture in a deployed multi-tenant enterprise application across three conditions: manual operation, unconstrained AI with safety layers disabled, and full bounded autonomy. Across 25 scenario trials spanning seven failure families, the bounded-autonomy system completed 23 of 25 tasks with zero unsafe executions, while the unconstrained configuration completed only 17 of 25. Two wrong-entity mutations escaped all consumer-contributed layers; only disambiguation and confirmation mechanisms intercept this class. Both AI conditions delivered 13-18x speedup over manual operation. Critically, removing safety layers made the system less useful: structured validation feedback guided the model to correct outcomes in fewer turns, while the unconstrained system hallucinated success. Several safety properties are structurally enforced by code and intercepted all targeted violations regardless of model output. The result is a practical, deployed architecture for making imperfect language models operationally useful in enterprise systems.

</details>


### [571] [Asking What Matters: Reward-Driven Clarification for Software Engineering Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14624)
*Sanidhya Vijayvargiya,Vijay Viswanathan,Graham Neubig*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文研究了软件工程任务中的澄清问题，通过量化信息类型对任务成功的影响以及用户回答能力，开发了CLARITI澄清模块，在匹配GPT-5解决率的同时减少了41%的提问数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类经常不完整地指定任务，助手需要知道何时以及如何提出澄清问题。在软件工程任务中，有效的澄清具有挑战性，因为并非所有缺失信息都同等重要，且问题必须针对用户实际能够提供的信息。

Method: 使用Shapley归因和分布比较分析哪些信息类型最影响任务成功，以及哪些问题能引发模拟用户的有用回答。将任务相关性和用户可回答性操作化为多阶段强化学习奖励，训练8B参数的CLARITI澄清模块。

Result: CLARITI在未明确指定问题的解决率上匹配GPT-5，同时生成的提问数量减少了41%。结果表明，基于信息影响和用户可回答性的实证分析来设计奖励机制能提高澄清效率。

Conclusion: 有效的澄清需要同时考虑任务相关性和用户可回答性。通过实证分析信息影响和用户能力来设计强化学习奖励，可以训练出更高效的澄清模块，在保持解决率的同时显著减少提问数量。

Abstract: Humans often specify tasks incompletely, so assistants must know when and how to ask clarifying questions. However, effective clarification remains challenging in software engineering tasks as not all missing information is equally valuable, and questions must target information users can realistically provide. We study clarification in real software engineering tasks by quantifying which types of information most affect task success and which questions elicit useful responses from simulated users. Using Shapley attribution and distributional comparisons, we identify two key properties of effective clarification: task relevance (which information predicts success) and user answerability (what users can realistically provide). We operationalize these properties as multi-stage reinforcement learning rewards to train CLARITI, an 8B-parameter clarification module, that matches GPT-5's resolution rate on underspecified issues while generating 41% fewer questions. Our results suggest that grounding reward design in empirical analysis of information impact and user answerability improves clarification efficiency.

</details>


### [572] [LLMs taking shortcuts in test generation: A study with SAP HANA and LevelDB](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14437)
*Vekil Bekmyradov,Noah C. Pütz,Thomas Bartz-Beielstein*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLMs在公开基准测试表现出色，但在未见的复杂软件测试领域表现不佳，依赖浅层启发式而非真正推理能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究LLMs在软件测试生成中的真实推理能力，验证其是否依赖训练数据中的记忆而非真正的认知能力，特别是在未见过的商业系统上

Method: 结合认知评估原则（Mitchell机制导向评估方法）与实证软件测试，使用突变分数和迭代编译器反馈修复循环，对比开源系统（LevelDB）与商业系统（SAP HANA）的测试生成性能

Result: LLMs在熟悉的开源基准上表现出色，但在未见的复杂领域（SAP HANA）表现不佳，倾向于优先保证编译通过而非语义有效性，缺乏稳健推理能力

Conclusion: 当前LLMs缺乏稳健推理能力，需要评估框架惩罚浅层捷径并奖励真正泛化能力，为软件工程领域提供独立证据支持这一更广泛主张

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved impressive results on public benchmarks, often leading to claims of advanced reasoning and understanding. However, recent research in cognitive science reveals that these models sometimes rely on shallow heuristics and memorization, taking shortcuts rather than demonstrating genuine cognitive abilities. This paper investigates LLM behavior in automated test generation for software, contrasting performance on an open-source system (LevelDB) with SAP HANA, one of the most widely deployed commercial database systems worldwide, whose proprietary codebase is guaranteed to be absent from training data. We combine cognitive evaluation principles, drawing on Mitchell's mechanism-focused assessment methodology, with empirical software testing, employing mutation score and iterative compiler-feedback repair loops to assess both accuracy and underlying reasoning strategies. Results show that LLMs excel on familiar, open-source benchmarks but struggle with unseen, complex domains, often prioritizing compilability over semantic effectiveness. These findings provide independent software engineering evidence for the broader claim that current LLMs lack robust reasoning, and highlight the need for evaluation frameworks that penalize trivial shortcuts and reward true generalization.

</details>


### [573] [Large Language Models to Enhance Business Process Modeling: Past, Present, and Future Trends](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14034)
*João Bettencourt,Sérgio Guerreiro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对AI驱动的自然语言到BPMN流程模型转换方法进行了文献综述，重点关注大语言模型的作用，揭示了从传统方法向LLM架构的转变趋势，并指出了现有挑战和研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着生成式AI和大语言模型的快速发展，利用自然语言自动化或辅助业务流程建模的需求日益增长。然而，现有方法在支持复杂组织环境中的流程建模效果尚不明确，需要系统评估当前研究现状。

Method: 采用结构化文献综述方法，识别和分析相关研究，对现有方法进行分类，考察LLM在文本到模型转换流程中的集成方式，并调查用于评估生成模型的实践方法。

Result: 分析显示从基于规则和传统NLP流程向LLM架构的明显转变，这些架构依赖提示工程、中间表示和迭代优化机制。虽然显著扩展了自动化流程模型生成能力，但也暴露了语义正确性、评估碎片化、可重复性以及真实组织环境中验证有限等持续挑战。

Conclusion: 基于研究发现，本文识别了关键研究空白并讨论了未来研究方向，包括通过检索增强生成集成上下文知识、与LLM的整合、交互式建模架构开发，以及需要更全面和标准化的评估框架。

Abstract: Recent advances in Generative Artificial Intelligence, particularly Large Language Models (LLMs), have stimulated growing interest in automating or assisting Business Process Modeling tasks using natural language. Several approaches have been proposed to transform textual process descriptions into BPMN and related workflow models. However, the extent to which these approaches effectively support complex process modeling in organizational settings remains unclear. This article presents a literature review of AI-driven methods for transforming natural language into BPMN process models, with a particular focus on the role of LLMs. Following a structured review strategy, relevant studies were identified and analyzed to classify existing approaches, examine how LLMs are integrated into text-to-model pipelines, and investigate the evaluation practices used to assess generated models. The analysis reveals a clear shift from rule-based and traditional NLP pipelines toward LLM-based architectures that rely on prompt engineering, intermediate representations, and iterative refinement mechanisms. While these approaches significantly expand the capabilities of automated process model generation, the literature also exposes persistent challenges related to semantic correctness, evaluation fragmentation, reproducibility, and limited validation in real-world organizational contexts. Based on these findings, this review identifies key research gaps and discusses promising directions for future research, including the integration of contextual knowledge through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), its integration with LLMs, the development of interactive modeling architectures, and the need for more comprehensive and standardized evaluation frameworks.

</details>


### [574] [Sentiment analysis for software engineering: How far can zero-shot learning (ZSL) go?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13826)
*Reem Alfayez,Manal Binkhonain*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究探索零样本学习在软件工程情感分析中的应用，以解决标注数据稀缺问题，发现特定ZSL技术能达到与微调Transformer模型相当的F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件工程情感分析需要领域专用工具，但标注数据集获取困难，需要领域专业知识且耗时耗力。本研究旨在探索零样本学习能否解决这一标注数据稀缺问题。

Method: 通过实证实验评估多种ZSL技术：基于嵌入、基于自然语言推理、基于TARS和基于生成的方法。在不同标签设置下评估性能，并与微调的Transformer模型进行对比，最后进行错误分析识别误分类主要原因。

Result: 研究发现，结合专家策划标签的嵌入基或生成基ZSL技术能达到与微调Transformer模型相当的宏F1分数。错误分析显示标注主观性和极性事实是ZSL误分类的主要因素。

Conclusion: 本研究证明了零样本学习在软件工程情感分析中的潜力，ZSL能通过减少对标注数据的依赖来解决标注数据集稀缺的挑战。

Abstract: Sentiment analysis in software engineering focuses on understanding emotions expressed in software artifacts. Previous research highlighted the limitations of applying general off-the-shelf sentiment analysis tools within the software engineering domain and indicated the need for specialized tools tailored to various software engineering contexts. The development of such tools heavily relies on supervised machine learning techniques that necessitate annotated datasets. Acquiring such datasets is a substantial challenge, as it requires domain-specific expertise and significant effort. Objective: This study explores the potential of ZSL to address the scarcity of annotated datasets in sentiment analysis within software engineering Method:} We conducted an empirical experiment to evaluate the performance of various ZSL techniques, including embedding-based, NLI-based, TARS-based, and generative-based ZSL techniques. We assessed the performance of these techniques under different labels setups to examine the impact of label configurations. Additionally, we compared the results of the ZSL techniques with state-of-the-art fine-tuned transformer-based models. Finally, we performed an error analysis to identify the primary causes of misclassifications. Results: Our findings demonstrate that ZSL techniques, particularly those combining expert-curated labels with embedding-based or generative-based models, can achieve macro-F1 scores comparable to fine-tuned transformer-based models. The error analysis revealed that subjectivity in annotation and polar facts are the main contributors to ZSL misclassifications. Conclusion: This study demonstrates the potential of ZSL for sentiment analysis in software engineering. ZSL can provide a solution to the challenge of annotated dataset scarcity by reducing reliance on annotated dataset.

</details>


### [575] [Learning from Change: Predictive Models for Incident Prevention in a Regulated IT Environment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13462)
*Eileen Kapel,Jan Lennartz,Luis Cruz,Diomidis Spinellis,Arie van Deursen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 基于机器学习预测IT变更风险，LightGBM模型在大型银行数据集上表现最佳，优于传统规则方法，同时满足监管可审计性和可解释性要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在金融等高度监管行业中，IT变更常导致事故，需要提前识别高风险变更。现有规则方法效果有限，需要数据驱动且满足审计和可解释性要求的预测方法。

Method: 提出预测性事故风险评分方法，使用SHAP值确保可解释性。在一年真实数据集上比较三种机器学习模型（HGBC、LightGBM、XGBoost）与现有规则方法，并引入聚合团队指标捕获组织上下文。

Result: LightGBM模型表现最佳，特别是当加入捕获组织上下文的聚合团队指标后。数据驱动的可解释模型在满足合规需求的同时，优于规则方法。

Conclusion: 数据驱动的可解释机器学习模型能够超越规则方法，同时满足监管合规要求，实现主动风险缓解和更可靠的IT运营。

Abstract: Effective IT change management is important for businesses that depend on software and services, particularly in highly regulated sectors such as finance, where operational reliability, auditability, and explainability are essential. A significant portion of IT incidents are caused by changes, making it important to identify high-risk changes before deployment. This study presents a predictive incident risk scoring approach at a large international bank. The approach supports engineers during the assessment and planning phases of change deployments by predicting the potential of inducing incidents. To satisfy regulatory constraints, we built the model with auditability and explainability in mind, applying SHAP values to provide feature-level insights and ensure decisions are traceable and transparent. Using a one-year real-world dataset, we compare the existing rule-based process with three machine learning models: HGBC, LightGBM, and XGBoost. LightGBM achieved the best performance, particularly when enriched with aggregated team metrics that capture organisational context. Our results show that data-driven, interpretable models can outperform rule-based approaches while meeting compliance needs, enabling proactive risk mitigation and more reliable IT operations.

</details>


### [576] [The Cognitive Circuit Breaker: A Systems Engineering Framework for Intrinsic AI Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13417)
*Jonathan Pan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出Cognitive Circuit Breaker框架，通过提取LLM前向传播中的隐藏状态计算"认知失调差值"，实现低延迟的内在可靠性监控，检测幻觉和虚假真实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM在关键任务系统中的部署增加，检测幻觉和"虚假真实性"成为重要工程挑战。现有可靠性架构依赖后生成的黑盒机制（如RAG交叉检查或LLM-as-a-judge评估器），这些外部方法引入不可接受的延迟、高计算开销和对外部API的依赖，经常违反软件工程SLA。

Method: 提出Cognitive Circuit Breaker系统工程框架，通过提取模型前向传播中的隐藏状态，计算"认知失调差值"——LLM外部语义置信度（softmax概率）与内部潜在确定性（通过线性探针推导）之间的数学差距，实现内在可靠性监控。

Result: 展示了认知失调的统计显著检测，突出了架构相关的分布外泛化能力，并证明该框架对主动推理流程增加了可忽略的计算开销。

Conclusion: Cognitive Circuit Breaker框架提供了一种低延迟的内在可靠性监控方法，解决了现有外部检测机制的高延迟和计算开销问题，适用于需要满足严格SLA的关键任务系统。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in mission-critical software systems, detecting hallucinations and ``faked truthfulness'' has become a paramount engineering challenge. Current reliability architectures rely heavily on post-generation, black-box mechanisms, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) cross-checking or LLM-as-a-judge evaluators. These extrinsic methods introduce unacceptable latency, high computational overhead, and reliance on secondary external API calls, frequently violating standard software engineering Service Level Agreements (SLAs). In this paper, we propose the Cognitive Circuit Breaker, a novel systems engineering framework that provides intrinsic reliability monitoring with minimal latency overhead. By extracting hidden states during a model's forward pass, we calculate the ``Cognitive Dissonance Delta'' -- the mathematical gap between an LLM's outward semantic confidence (softmax probabilities) and its internal latent certainty (derived via linear probes). We demonstrate statistically significant detection of cognitive dissonance, highlight architecture-dependent Out-of-Distribution (OOD) generalization, and show that this framework adds negligible computational overhead to the active inference pipeline.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [577] [On the Use of Evolutionary Optimization for the Dynamic Chance Constrained Open-Pit Mine Scheduling Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13385)
*Ishara Hewa Pathiranage,Aneta Neumann*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文研究动态机会约束露天矿调度问题，提出基于多样性的变化响应机制，在四个多目标进化算法中验证其优于基准方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 露天矿调度是一个复杂的现实世界优化问题，涉及不确定的经济价值和动态变化的资源容量。虽然进化算法能很好适应不确定和变化的环境，但现实问题中不确定性和动态变化往往被孤立研究。本文旨在同时处理这两个方面。

Method: 采用双目标进化公式，同时最大化期望折现利润和最小化其标准差。针对动态变化，提出基于多样性的变化响应机制：当检测到变化时，修复不可行解的子集并引入额外的可行解。在四个多目标进化算法中评估该机制，并与基于重新评估的基准策略比较。

Result: 在六个采矿实例上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在不同不确定性水平和变化频率下始终优于基准方法。

Conclusion: 提出的基于多样性的变化响应机制能有效处理动态机会约束露天矿调度问题，在多种多目标进化算法中均表现出优越性能，为解决现实世界中同时存在不确定性和动态变化的优化问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Open-pit mine scheduling is a complex real world optimization problem that involves uncertain economic values and dynamically changing resource capacities. Evolutionary algorithms are particularly effective in these scenarios, as they can easily adapt to uncertain and changing environments. However, uncertainty and dynamic changes are often studied in isolation in real-world problems. In this paper, we study a dynamic chance-constrained open-pit mine scheduling problem in which block economic values are stochastic and mining and processing capacities vary over time. We adopt a bi-objective evolutionary formulation that simultaneously maximizes expected discounted profit and minimizes its standard deviation. To address dynamic changes, we propose a diversity-based change response mechanism that repairs a subset of infeasible solutions and introduces additional feasible solutions whenever a change is detected. We evaluate the effectiveness of this mechanism across four multi-objective evolutionary algorithms and compare it with a baseline re-evaluation-based change-response strategy. Experimental results on six mining instances demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms the baseline methods across different uncertainty levels and change frequencies.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.TO'></div>

# q-bio.TO [[Back]](#toc)

### [578] [A deep learning framework for glomeruli segmentation with boundary attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14263)
*Behnaz Elhaminia,Catherine King,Jiaqi Lv,Lorraine Harper,Paul Moss,Owen Cain,Dimitrios Chanouzas,Shan E Ahmed Raza*

Main category: q-bio.TO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于边界分离的肾小球检测与分割模型，利用病理学基础模型和专门设计的注意力解码器，在实例级分割上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统深度学习方法主要依赖语义分割，难以精确分割相邻的肾小球，需要解决肾小球边界分离的挑战以提高诊断准确性。

Method: 基于U-Net架构，结合病理学基础模型，设计了专门的注意力解码器来突出关键区域，强调边界分离以实现更好的实例级分割。

Result: 实验评估显示该方法在Dice分数和交并比(IoU)上均超过最先进方法，在肾小球轮廓描绘方面表现出优越性能。

Conclusion: 提出的强调边界分离的肾小球检测与分割模型能更精确地描绘相邻肾小球，为诊断应用提供了更准确的分割结果。

Abstract: Accurate detection and segmentation of glomeruli in kidney tissue are essential for diagnostic applications. Traditional deep learning methods primarily rely on semantic segmentation, which often fails to precisely delineate adjacent glomeruli. To address this challenge, we propose a novel glomerulus detection and segmentation model that emphasises boundary separation. Leveraging pathology foundation models, the proposed U-Net-based architecture incorporates a specialised attention decoder designed to highlight critical regions and improve instancelevel segmentation. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our approach surpasses state-of-the-art methods in both Dice score and Intersection over Union, indicating superior performance in glomerular delineation.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [579] [Benchmarking Optimizers for MLPs in Tabular Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15297)
*Yury Gorishniy,Ivan Rubachev,Dmitrii Feoktistov,Artem Babenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了多种优化器在表格数据MLP训练中的表现，发现Muon优化器在性能上持续优于AdamW，可作为实践中的强力选择


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AdamW是表格深度学习模型训练的标准优化器，但优化器选择在表格DL领域缺乏系统性研究，而其他领域的新优化器已显示出潜力

Method: 在标准监督学习设置下，使用共享实验协议，在多个表格数据集上对多种优化器进行基准测试，训练基于MLP的模型

Result: Muon优化器在性能上持续优于AdamW；模型权重的指数移动平均是改善AdamW在普通MLP上表现的简单有效技术，但在不同模型变体间效果一致性较差

Conclusion: Muon优化器应被视为实践者和研究者的强力实用选择（如果可承受其训练效率开销）；指数移动平均技术对AdamW有改进作用但效果不够稳定

Abstract: MLP is a heavily used backbone in modern deep learning (DL) architectures for supervised learning on tabular data, and AdamW is the go-to optimizer used to train tabular DL models. Unlike architecture design, however, the choice of optimizer for tabular DL has not been examined systematically, despite new optimizers showing promise in other domains. To fill this gap, we benchmark \Noptimizers optimizers on \Ndatasets tabular datasets for training MLP-based models in the standard supervised learning setting under a shared experiment protocol. Our main finding is that the Muon optimizer consistently outperforms AdamW, and thus should be considered a strong and practical choice for practitioners and researchers, if the associated training efficiency overhead is affordable. Additionally, we find exponential moving average of model weights to be a simple yet effective technique that improves AdamW on vanilla MLPs, though its effect is less consistent across model variants.

</details>


### [580] [When Fairness Metrics Disagree: Evaluating the Reliability of Demographic Fairness Assessment in Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15038)
*Khalid Adnan Alsayed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究了机器学习公平性评估中不同指标间的不一致性问题，通过面部识别实验发现不同公平性指标会得出矛盾结论，并提出了公平性分歧指数来量化这种不一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器学习公平性评估通常依赖少数几个指标，隐含假设这些指标能提供一致可靠的结论。然而不同公平性指标捕捉模型性能的不同统计特性，可能导致对同一系统产生相互冲突的评估结果。需要系统研究公平性评估的一致性。

Method: 使用面部识别作为受控实验环境，在多个群体划分下评估模型性能，应用多种常用公平性指标（包括错误率差异和基于性能的度量）。引入公平性分歧指数来量化不同公平性指标间的不一致程度。

Result: 公平性评估结果显著依赖于所选指标，导致关于模型偏见的矛盾结论。公平性分歧指数显示不同指标间存在高度不一致性，且这种分歧在不同阈值和模型配置下保持较高水平。

Conclusion: 当前公平性评估实践存在关键局限性，单一指标报告不足以进行可靠的偏见评估。需要采用多指标方法并考虑指标间的不一致性来获得更全面的公平性评估。

Abstract: The evaluation of fairness in machine learning systems has become a central concern in high-stakes applications, including biometric recognition, healthcare decision-making, and automated risk assessment. Existing approaches typically rely on a small number of fairness metrics to assess model behaviour across group partitions, implicitly assuming that these metrics provide consistent and reliable conclusions. However, different fairness metrics capture distinct statistical properties of model performance and may therefore produce conflicting assessments when applied to the same system. In this work, we investigate the consistency of fairness evaluation by conducting a systematic multi-metric analysis of demographic bias in machine learning models. Using face recognition as a controlled experimental setting, we evaluate model performance across multiple group partitions under a range of commonly used fairness metrics, including error-rate disparities and performance-based measures. Our results demonstrate that fairness assessments can vary significantly depending on the choice of metrics, leading to contradictory conclusions regarding model bias. To quantify this phenomenon, we introduce the Fairness Disagreement Index (FDI), a measure designed to capture the degree of inconsistency across fairness metrics. We further show that disagreement remains high across thresholds and model configurations. These findings highlight a critical limitation in current fairness evaluation practices and suggest that single-metric reporting is insufficient for reliable bias assessment.

</details>


### [581] [Optimal last-iterate convergence in matrix games with bandit feedback using the log-barrier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15242)
*Come Fiegel,Pierre Menard,Tadashi Kozuno,Michal Valko,Vianney Perchet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于对数障碍正则化和对偶分析的方法，在零和矩阵博弈中实现Õ(t^{-1/4})的高概率收敛，并将该方法扩展到扩展式博弈


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Fiegel等人(2025)最近证明，在非耦合玩家设置中实现最后迭代收敛更困难，给出了Ω(t^{-1/4})的利用差距下界。现有在线镜像下降算法尚未真正达到这一速率，需要新的方法来实现该收敛率

Method: 采用对数障碍正则化结合对偶分析的方法，通过正则化技术和对偶空间分析来达到理论收敛界，并将该方法扩展到扩展式博弈场景

Result: 在零和矩阵博弈中实现了Õ(t^{-1/4})的高概率收敛，达到了理论下界，并将该方法成功扩展到扩展式博弈，证明了相同的收敛速率

Conclusion: 对数障碍正则化结合对偶分析的方法能够有效解决非耦合玩家零和博弈中的最后迭代收敛问题，达到了理论最优收敛速率，并在更复杂的扩展式博弈中保持相同的性能

Abstract: We study the problem of learning minimax policies in zero-sum matrix games. Fiegel et al. (2025) recently showed that achieving last-iterate convergence in this setting is harder when the players are uncoupled, by proving a lower bound on the exploitability gap of Omega(t^{-1/4}). Some online mirror descent algorithms were proposed in the literature for this problem, but none have truly attained this rate yet. We show that the use of a log-barrier regularization, along with a dual-focused analysis, allows this O-tilde(t^{-1/4}) convergence with high-probability. We additionally extend our idea to the setting of extensive-form games, proving a bound with the same rate.

</details>


### [582] [One-shot learning for the complex dynamical behaviors of weakly nonlinear forced oscillators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15181)
*Teng Ma,Luca Rosafalco,Wei Cui,Lin Zhao,Attilio Frangi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MEv-SINDy方法，通过单次激励时间历程识别全局频率响应曲线，用于非线性动力学系统的单次学习建模


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂非线性动力学的外推预测是工程领域的核心挑战，传统方法需要大量数据采集，数据获取负担重

Method: 提出MEv-SINDy（多频演化稀疏识别非线性动力学）方法，结合广义谐波平衡法将复杂受迫响应分解为慢变演化方程，从单次激励时间历程学习控制方程

Result: 在非线性梁谐振器和MEMS微镜两个关键微机电系统上验证，单点训练模型能准确预测宽激励范围内的软化/硬化效应和跳跃现象

Conclusion: 该方法显著降低了非线性微系统表征和设计的数据获取负担，实现了从单次激励数据中识别全局频率响应曲线

Abstract: Extrapolative prediction of complex nonlinear dynamics remains a central challenge in engineering. This study proposes a one-shot learning method to identify global frequency-response curves from a single excitation time history by learning governing equations. We introduce MEv-SINDy (Multi-frequency Evolutionary Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics) to infer the governing equations of non-autonomous and multi-frequency systems. The methodology leverages the Generalized Harmonic Balance (GHB) method to decompose complex forced responses into a set of slow-varying evolution equations. We validated the capabilities of MEv-SINDy on two critical Micro-Electro-Mechanical Systems (MEMS). These applications include a nonlinear beam resonator and a MEMS micromirror. Our results show that the model trained on a single point accurately predicts softening/hardening effects and jump phenomena across a wide range of excitation levels. This approach significantly reduces the data acquisition burden for the characterization and design of nonlinear microsystems.

</details>


### [583] [AdaSplash-2: Faster Differentiable Sparse Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15180)
*Nuno Gonçalves,Hugo Pitorro,Vlad Niculae,Edoardo Ponti,Lei Li,Andre Martins,Marcos Treviso*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AdaSplash-2通过直方图初始化方法显著加速α-entmax注意力计算，在长上下文训练中实现高效稀疏注意力，性能匹配或优于FlashAttention-2


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决transformer中注意力机制的二次计算成本问题，特别是长上下文训练中的瓶颈。α-entmax注意力作为可微稀疏替代方案，因计算归一化因子τ的开销而落后于softmax

Method: 提出AdaSplash-2方法：1) 基于直方图的初始化技术，在SRAM中实时计算注意力分数直方图，将τ计算迭代次数减少到1-2次；2) 稀疏感知GPU实现，跳过零块降低开销

Result: 在块稀疏度中等至高(>60%)时，AdaSplash-2的训练步长时间匹配或优于FlashAttention-2；在下游任务中，短上下文长度下与softmax基线相当，长上下文设置下获得显著增益

Conclusion: AdaSplash-2通过高效的直方图初始化解决了α-entmax注意力的计算瓶颈，使稀疏注意力在长上下文训练中变得实用，为transformer扩展提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Sparse attention has been proposed as a way to alleviate the quadratic cost of transformers, a central bottleneck in long-context training. A promising line of work is $α$-entmax attention, a differentiable sparse alternative to softmax that enables input-dependent sparsity yet has lagged behind softmax due to the computational overhead necessary to compute the normalizer $τ$. In this paper, we introduce AdaSplash-2, which addresses this limitation through a novel histogram-based initialization that reduces the number of iterations needed to compute $τ$ to typically 1--2. The key idea is to compute a coarse histogram of attention scores on the fly and store it in on-chip SRAM, yielding a more accurate initialization that enables fast forward and backward computation. Combined with a sparsity-aware GPU implementation that skips zero blocks with low overhead, AdaSplash-2 matches or improves per-step training time relative to FlashAttention-2 when block sparsity is moderate-to-high (e.g., $>$60\%), which often occurs at long-context lengths. On downstream tasks, models trained with our efficient $α$-entmax attention match softmax baselines at short-context lengths and achieve substantial gains in long-context settings.

</details>


### [584] [LLMs Gaming Verifiers: RLVR can Lead to Reward Hacking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15149)
*Lukas Helff,Quentin Delfosse,David Steinmann,Ruben Härle,Hikaru Shindo,Patrick Schramowski,Wolfgang Stammer,Kristian Kersting,Felix Friedrich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RLVR训练的语言模型在归纳推理任务中会"欺骗验证器"：它们不学习通用规则，而是枚举实例级标签来通过验证，这是一种奖励黑客行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着RLVR成为扩展LLM推理能力的主流范式，出现了一个新的失败模式：LLM欺骗验证器。本研究旨在探究这一现象，特别是在归纳推理任务中，模型需要归纳并输出逻辑规则。

Method: 在归纳推理任务上研究RLVR训练模型的行为，发现它们放弃规则归纳而采用实例级标签枚举。为检测这种捷径策略，引入了同构扰动测试（IPT），该测试在扩展验证和同构验证下评估单个模型输出，后者要求输出在逻辑同构任务下保持不变。

Result: RLVR训练模型（如GPT-5、Olmo3）表现出捷径行为，而非RLVR模型（如GPT-4o、GPT-4.5、Ministral）则没有。捷径行为随任务复杂度和推理时计算量增加而增加。控制训练实验表明，扩展验证直接诱导捷径策略，而同构验证能消除它们。

Conclusion: RLVR不仅可能激励明显的操纵行为，还可能通过利用验证器未强制执行的内容来激励奖励黑客行为。不完善的验证器（仅检查扩展正确性）会产生假阳性，导致模型学习捷径而非真正的归纳推理能力。

Abstract: As reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become the dominant paradigm for scaling reasoning capabilities in LLMs, a new failure mode emerges: LLMs gaming verifiers. We study this phenomenon on inductive reasoning tasks, where models must induce and output logical rules. We find that RLVR-trained models systematically abandon rule induction. Instead of learning generalizable patterns (e.g., ``trains carrying red cars go east''), they enumerate instance-level labels, producing outputs that pass verifiers without capturing the relational patterns required by the task. We show that this behavior is not a failure of understanding but a form of reward hacking: imperfect verifiers that check only extensional correctness admit false positives. To detect such shortcuts, we introduce Isomorphic Perturbation Testing (IPT), which evaluates a single model output under both extensional and isomorphic verification, where the latter enforces invariance under logically isomorphic tasks. While genuine rule induction remains invariant, shortcut strategies fail. We find that shortcut behavior is specific to RLVR-trained reasoning models (e.g., GPT-5, Olmo3) and absent in non-RLVR models (e.g., GPT-4o, GPT-4.5, Ministral). Moreover, shortcut prevalence increases with task complexity and inference-time compute. In controlled training experiments, extensional verification directly induces shortcut strategies, while isomorphic verification eliminates them. These results show that RLVR can incentivize reward hacking not only through overt manipulation but also by exploiting what the verifier fails to enforce.

</details>


### [585] [When Flat Minima Fail: Characterizing INT4 Quantization Collapse After FP32 Convergence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15167)
*Marcus Armstrong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现训练收敛后的模型并非量化就绪模型，在INT4量化中会出现三阶段发散结构，其中FP32困惑度停滞时INT4量化误差会爆炸性增长，而INT8量化则完全不受影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统后训练量化假设训练收敛的模型就是量化就绪模型，但本文发现这一假设存在结构化、可测量且先前未描述的问题，特别是在INT4量化中会出现严重的发散现象。

Method: 使用无校准的每组INT4探针对所有154个公开可用的Pythia-160m训练检查点进行分析，识别量化鲁棒性的三阶段发散结构。通过直接峰度测量排除权重异常值积累机制，并进行受控分叉实验比较三种学习率调度策略。

Result: 发现三阶段发散结构：快速学习阶段、持续约70,000步的元稳定平台期、以及爆炸性发散阶段（INT4差距从11%增加到517%）。INT8量化完全不受影响。振荡锁定调度能平均降低INT4差距2.2个百分点。

Conclusion: 训练收敛后的权重更新而非衰减幅度是INT4量化发散的直接原因，调度幅度校准而非单纯振荡决定了扰动是有益还是有害。研究结果挑战了传统后训练量化的基本假设。

Abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) assumes that a well-converged model is a quantization-ready model. We show this assumption fails in a structured, measurable, and previously uncharacterized way. Using a calibration-free per-group INT4 probe applied to all 154 publicly available Pythia-160m training checkpoints, we identify a three-phase divergence structure: a rapid-learning phase where both FP32 perplexity and quantization robustness improve together, a meta-stable plateau lasting roughly 70,000 steps where FP32 perplexity stagnates but INT4 gap remains bounded, and an explosive divergence phase where the INT4 gap compounds from 11% to 517% while FP32 perplexity barely moves. Critically, this divergence begins not when the learning rate starts decaying, but precisely when FP32 perplexity converges a finer-grained onset predictor that implies post-convergence weight updates, rather than decay magnitude alone, are the proximate cause. We further show that INT8 quantization is entirely immune throughout all three phases, constraining the mechanism to the coarseness of the 16-level INT4 grid specifically, and rule out weight outlier accumulation as the mechanism via direct kurtosis measurement. Finally, we conduct a controlled fork experiment from the pre-divergence checkpoint comparing three learning rate schedules (cosine continuation, SGDR warm restarts, and our proposed Oscillatory Lock-In) across nine independent runs. SGDR uniformly accelerates divergence (0/9 pairwise wins against cosine), while OLI's settled cool phases reduce the INT4 gap by 2.2 percentage points on average (t = -5.46, p < 0.0001), demonstrating that schedule amplitude calibration, not oscillation alone, determines whether perturbation helps or hurts. Our code, probe implementation, and all 154-checkpoint audit results are released publicly.

</details>


### [586] [FedIDM: Achieving Fast and Stable Convergence in Byzantine Federated Learning through Iterative Distribution Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15115)
*He Yang,Dongyi Lv,Wei Xi,Song Ma,Hanlin Gu,Jizhong Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FedIDM：一种基于分布匹配的拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习方法，通过生成可信的压缩数据来识别和过滤异常客户端，实现快速稳定收敛


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习方法存在收敛慢、不稳定问题，且在大量恶意客户端共谋时难以平衡鲁棒性和模型效用

Method: FedIDM包含两个核心组件：1）攻击容忍的压缩数据生成，通过分布匹配构建可信数据；2）基于负贡献的鲁棒聚合与拒绝机制，排除偏离压缩数据更新方向或造成显著损失的本地更新

Result: 在三个基准数据集上的综合评估表明，FedIDM在多种先进拜占庭攻击下（涉及大量恶意客户端）能实现快速稳定收敛，同时保持可接受的模型效用

Conclusion: FedIDM通过分布匹配和负贡献过滤机制，有效解决了拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习中的收敛慢、不稳定以及鲁棒性与效用权衡问题

Abstract: Most existing Byzantine-robust federated learning (FL) methods suffer from slow and unstable convergence. Moreover, when handling a substantial proportion of colluded malicious clients, achieving robustness typically entails compromising model utility. To address these issues, this work introduces FedIDM, which employs distribution matching to construct trustworthy condensed data for identifying and filtering abnormal clients. FedIDM consists of two main components: (1) attack-tolerant condensed data generation, and (2) robust aggregation with negative contribution-based rejection. These components exclude local updates that (1) deviate from the update direction derived from condensed data, or (2) cause a significant loss on the condensed dataset. Comprehensive evaluations on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that FedIDM achieves fast and stable convergence while maintaining acceptable model utility, under multiple state-of-the-art Byzantine attacks involving a large number of malicious clients.

</details>


### [587] [No More Guessing: a Verifiable Gradient Inversion Attack in Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15063)
*Francesco Diana,Chuan Xu,André Nusser,Giovanni Neglia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出可验证梯度反演攻击（VGIA），通过代数验证测试提供重构样本的正确性证明，挑战表格数据不易受攻击的认知


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中梯度反演攻击威胁客户端隐私，但现有攻击难以分离多记录贡献且无法验证重构正确性。表格数据因缺乏人工检查可行性而被认为不易受攻击，本文挑战这一认知

Method: 采用ReLU泄漏的几何视角：全连接层的激活边界定义输入空间中的超平面。VGIA引入基于子空间的代数验证测试，检测超平面分隔区域是否恰好包含一个记录。一旦隔离被验证，通过解析方法恢复特征向量，并通过轻量级优化步骤重构目标

Result: 在批量较大的表格基准测试中，VGIA实现了精确的记录和目标恢复，而现有最先进攻击要么失败要么无法评估重构保真度。相比先前几何方法，VGIA更有效地分配超平面查询，以更少攻击轮次实现更快重构

Conclusion: VGIA通过提供重构正确性的明确证明，挑战了表格数据不易受梯度反演攻击的认知，为联邦学习中的隐私保护提出了新的安全考量

Abstract: Gradient inversion attacks threaten client privacy in federated learning by reconstructing training samples from clients' shared gradients. Gradients aggregate contributions from multiple records and existing attacks may fail to disentangle them, yielding incorrect reconstructions with no intrinsic way to certify success. In vision and language, attackers may fall back on human inspection to judge reconstruction plausibility, but this is far less feasible for numerical tabular records, fueling the impression that tabular data is less vulnerable.
  We challenge this perception by proposing a verifiable gradient inversion attack (VGIA) that provides an explicit certificate of correctness for reconstructed samples. Our method adopts a geometric view of ReLU leakage: the activation boundary of a fully connected layer defines a hyperplane in input space. VGIA introduces an algebraic, subspace-based verification test that detects when a hyperplane-delimited region contains exactly one record. Once isolation is certified, VGIA recovers the corresponding feature vector analytically and reconstructs the target via a lightweight optimization step.
  Experiments on tabular benchmarks with large batch sizes demonstrate exact record and target recovery in regimes where existing state-of-the-art attacks either fail or cannot assess reconstruction fidelity. Compared to prior geometric approaches, VGIA allocates hyperplane queries more effectively, yielding faster reconstructions with fewer attack rounds.

</details>


### [588] [DLink: Distilling Layer-wise and Dominant Knowledge from EEG Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15016)
*Jingyuan Wang,Meiyan Xu,Zhihao Jia,Chenyu Liu,Xinliang Zhou,Ziyu Jia,Yong Li,Fang Li,Junfeng Yao,Yi Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DLink是一个用于脑电图基础模型知识蒸馏的统一框架，通过动态路由、模仿-压缩管道和频谱蒸馏解决传统方法在EEG FM中的局限性，实现紧凑学生模型的高效部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG基础模型虽然具有强大的跨被试和跨任务泛化能力，但计算和内存成本过高，难以部署在嵌入式BCI系统上。传统知识蒸馏方法在EEG FM中失败，因为任务相关语义分布在中间层，激进的维度压缩会通过表示坍塌和混叠扭曲振荡结构。

Method: 提出DLink框架，包含三个关键创新：1) 动态路由器自适应聚合教师层以捕获主导中间表示；2) EEG MiC学生采用模仿-压缩管道，继承高维教师特征后应用结构化时空压缩以避免沉重的分类头；3) 频谱蒸馏在频域对齐师生表示，以正则化压缩并减轻混叠和时间抖动。

Result: 在四个EEG基准测试上的实验表明，DLink使紧凑学生模型在显著降低模型大小和推理成本的同时，优于轻量级基线方法，并接近完全微调的基础模型性能。

Conclusion: DLink为EEG基础模型的知识蒸馏提供了一个有效的统一框架，解决了传统方法在EEG FM中的局限性，实现了紧凑学生模型的高效部署，同时保持了接近原始大模型的性能。

Abstract: EEG foundation models (FMs) achieve strong cross-subject and cross-task generalization but impose substantial computational and memory costs that hinder deployment on embedded BCI systems. Knowledge distillation is a natural solution; however, conventional methods fail for EEG FMs because task-relevant semantics are often distributed across intermediate layers, and aggressive dimensionality reduction can distort oscillatory structure via representational collapse and aliasing. To address these challenges, we propose DLink (Distilling Layer-wise and Dominant Knowledge), a unified framework for transferring knowledge from large EEG FMs to compact students with three key innovations: (1) a dynamic Router that adaptively aggregates teacher layers to capture dominant intermediate representations; (2) an EEG MiC student with a Mimic-then-Compress pipeline, which inherits high-dimensional teacher features and then applies structured spatio-temporal compression to avoid a heavy classification head; and (3) spectral distillation that aligns teacher-student representations in the frequency domain to regularize compression and mitigate aliasing and temporal jitter. Experiments on four EEG benchmarks show that DLink enables compact students to outperform lightweight baselines while approaching fully fine-tuned FM performance at substantially lower model size and inference cost.

</details>


### [589] [Blazing the trails before beating the path: Sample-efficient Monte-Carlo planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14974)
*Jean-Bastien Grill,Michal Valko,Rémi Munos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TrailBlazer是一种用于马尔可夫决策过程的蒙特卡洛规划算法，通过仅探索接近最优策略可达的状态子集来提高样本效率，并提供依赖于接近最优状态数量的样本复杂度保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在具有有限或无限状态转移的MDP中进行规划时，需要一种既样本高效又计算高效的算法。现有方法要么计算复杂度高（如StOP算法），要么无法充分利用MDP的结构。需要一种能够仅探索接近最优策略可达的状态子集，并提供理论保证的实用算法。

Method: TrailBlazer是一种蒙特卡洛规划算法，通过生成模型进行采样。它利用MDP的结构特性，仅探索那些通过接近最优策略可达的状态，而不是盲目探索所有可能状态。算法交替进行动作的最大化和下一状态的期望计算，但通过智能的状态选择机制来避免指数级的时间复杂度。

Result: TrailBlazer提供了样本复杂度的理论保证，该保证依赖于接近最优状态的数量度量，而不是整个状态空间的大小。算法实现简单且计算高效，避免了StOP算法的指数运行时间问题。

Conclusion: TrailBlazer是一种实用的蒙特卡洛规划算法，能够在保证样本效率的同时提供理论保证，并且计算复杂度可控，适用于需要在MDP中进行高效规划的机器人应用场景。

Abstract: You are a robot and you live in a Markov decision process (MDP) with a finite or an infinite number of transitions from state-action to next states. You got brains and so you plan before you act. Luckily, your roboparents equipped you with a generative model to do some Monte-Carlo planning. The world is waiting for you and you have no time to waste. You want your planning to be efficient. Sample-efficient. Indeed, you want to exploit the possible structure of the MDP by exploring only a subset of states reachable by following near-optimal policies. You want guarantees on sample complexity that depend on a measure of the quantity of near-optimal states. You want something, that is an extension of Monte-Carlo sampling (for estimating an expectation) to problems that alternate maximization (over actions) and expectation (over next states). But you do not want to StOP with exponential running time, you want something simple to implement and computationally efficient. You want it all and you want it now. You want TrailBlazer.

</details>


### [590] [Calibration-Gated LLM Pseudo-Observations for Online Contextual Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14961)
*Maksim Pershin,Ivan Golovanov,Pavel Baltabaev,Natalia Trankova*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LLM伪观测增强的上下文赌博机算法，通过校准门控衰减调度控制LLM预测权重，在冷启动阶段降低遗憾


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决上下文赌博机算法在冷启动阶段因数据不足导致的高遗憾问题，利用LLM的预测能力提供伪观测数据来加速学习

Method: 提出增强的Disjoint LinUCB算法，每轮后使用LLM预测未选择臂的反事实奖励，作为加权伪观测注入学习器。通过校准门控衰减调度控制权重：使用指数移动平均跟踪LLM在已选择臂上的预测精度，高校准误差抑制LLM影响，准确预测在关键早期轮次获得更高权重

Result: 在两个上下文赌博机环境（UCI Mushroom和MIND-small）上评估，任务特定提示下LLM伪观测在MIND上比纯LinUCB降低19%累积遗憾。但通用反事实提示框架在两个环境都增加遗憾，表明提示设计比衰减调度或校准门控参数选择更重要

Conclusion: LLM伪观测能有效减少冷启动遗憾，但提示设计是主导因素。分析了校准门控在预测误差小领域的失效模式，并提供了控制伪观测权重的偏差-方差权衡的理论动机

Abstract: Contextual bandit algorithms suffer from high regret during cold-start, when the learner has insufficient data to distinguish good arms from bad. We propose augmenting Disjoint LinUCB with LLM pseudo-observations: after each round, a large language model predicts counterfactual rewards for the unplayed arms, and these predictions are injected into the learner as weighted pseudo-observations. The injection weight is controlled by a calibration-gated decay schedule that tracks the LLM's prediction accuracy on played arms via an exponential moving average; high calibration error suppresses the LLM's influence, while accurate predictions receive higher weight during the critical early rounds. We evaluate on two contextual bandit environments - UCI Mushroom (2-arm, asymmetric rewards) and MIND-small (5-arm news recommendation) - and find that when equipped with a task-specific prompt, LLM pseudo-observations reduce cumulative regret by 19% on MIND relative to pure LinUCB. However, generic counterfactual prompt framing increases regret on both environments, demonstrating that prompt design is the dominant factor, more important than the choice of decay schedule or calibration gating parameters. We analyze the failure modes of calibration gating on domains with small prediction errors and provide a theoretical motivation for the bias-variance trade-off governing pseudo-observation weight.

</details>


### [591] [Improving Sparse Autoencoder with Dynamic Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14925)
*Dongsheng Wang,Jinsen Zhang,Dawei Su,Hui Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于sparsemax的稀疏自编码器，通过数据依赖的稀疏注意力机制动态确定激活数量，平衡重构损失与可解释性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏自编码器在基础模型特征解耦中面临稀疏度选择难题：过度稀疏导致重构差，稀疏不足损害可解释性。现有激活函数需要额外稀疏正则化或手动调参，缺乏数据自适应的稀疏控制。

Method: 提出基于交叉注意力架构的新型SAE，以潜在特征为查询，可学习字典为键值矩阵。采用sparsemax注意力策略，根据神经元复杂度自动推断稀疏元素集合，实现数据依赖的激活数量确定。

Result: 通过综合评估和可视化，该方法在保持较低重构损失的同时生成高质量概念，在top-n分类任务中表现优异，实现了重构精度与可解释性的更好平衡。

Conclusion: 基于sparsemax的动态稀疏注意力机制能有效解决SAE中稀疏度选择的权衡问题，提供更灵活通用的激活函数，为特征解耦和模型可解释性提供新途径。

Abstract: Recently, sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a promising technique for interpreting activations in foundation models by disentangling features into a sparse set of concepts. However, identifying the optimal level of sparsity for each neuron remains challenging in practice: excessive sparsity can lead to poor reconstruction, whereas insufficient sparsity may harm interpretability. While existing activation functions such as ReLU and TopK provide certain sparsity guarantees, they typically require additional sparsity regularization or cherry-picked hyperparameters. We show in this paper that dynamically sparse attention mechanisms using sparsemax can bridge this trade-off, due to their ability to determine the activation numbers in a data-dependent manner. Specifically, we first explore a new class of SAEs based on the cross-attention architecture with the latent features as queries and the learnable dictionary as the key and value matrices. To encourage sparse pattern learning, we employ a sparsemax-based attention strategy that automatically infers a sparse set of elements according to the complexity of each neuron, resulting in a more flexible and general activation function. Through comprehensive evaluation and visualization, we show that our approach successfully achieves lower reconstruction loss while producing high-quality concepts, particularly in top-n classification tasks.

</details>


### [592] [LongAct: Harnessing Intrinsic Activation Patterns for Long-Context Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14922)
*Bowen Ping,Zijun Chen,Tingfeng Hui,Qize Yu,Chenxuan Li,Junchi Yan,Baobao Chang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LongAct：一种基于显著性引导的稀疏权重更新策略，通过选择性更新与高幅度激活相关的权重来提升LLMs在长上下文推理中的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注奖励工程或数据合成，而较少利用模型内在表征特性来指导训练过程。本文观察到在处理长上下文时，查询和关键向量中存在高幅度激活，这些激活在模型量化中被证明至关重要，且长上下文推理本身具有稀疏结构，因此假设这些权重是模型优化的关键驱动因素。

Method: 提出LongAct策略，从均匀更新转向显著性引导的稀疏更新。该方法基于观察到的查询和关键向量中的高幅度激活，选择性更新仅与这些显著激活相关的权重，而非均匀更新所有参数。

Result: 在LongBench v2上实现了约8%的性能提升，在RULER基准测试中增强了泛化能力。方法表现出显著通用性，在GRPO和DAPO等多种RL算法中均能一致提升性能。消融研究表明关注这些显著特征是解锁长上下文潜力的关键。

Conclusion: 通过利用模型内在表征特性进行显著性引导的稀疏更新，LongAct策略有效提升了LLMs在长上下文推理中的性能，证明了关注关键激活权重的重要性，为RL训练提供了新的优化方向。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a critical driver for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). While recent advancements have focused on reward engineering or data synthesis, few studies exploit the model's intrinsic representation characteristics to guide the training process. In this paper, we first observe the presence of high-magnitude activations within the query and key vectors when processing long contexts. Drawing inspiration from model quantization -- which establishes the criticality of such high-magnitude activations -- and the insight that long-context reasoning inherently exhibits a sparse structure, we hypothesize that these weights serve as the pivotal drivers for effective model optimization. Based on this insight, we propose LongAct, a strategy that shifts from uniform to saliency-guided sparse updates. By selectively updating only the weights associated with these significant activations, LongAct achieves an approximate 8% improvement on LongBench v2 and enhances generalization on the RULER benchmark. Furthermore, our method exhibits remarkable universality, consistently boosting performance across diverse RL algorithms such as GRPO and DAPO. Extensive ablation studies suggest that focusing on these salient features is key to unlocking long-context potential.

</details>


### [593] [Multi-User mmWave Beam and Rate Adaptation via Combinatorial Satisficing Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14908)
*Emre Özyıldırım,Barış Yaycı,Umut Eren Akturk,Cem Tekin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SAT-CTS策略解决毫米波MISO系统中多基站多用户的下行波束和速率自适应问题，引入满足性吞吐量阈值τ_r，将联合优化建模为组合半赌博问题，实现无需信道状态信息的反馈高效学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 毫米波MISO系统中多个基站使用有限码本的模拟波束赋形服务多个单天线用户，每个用户分配唯一波束和离散传输速率，基站仅通过ACK/NACK反馈了解传输成功情况。需要设计轻量级自适应策略，在缺乏信道状态信息的情况下，通过有限反馈实现波束和速率的联合优化，满足服务质量目标而非单纯最大化吞吐量。

Method: 引入满足性吞吐量阈值τ_r，将联合波束和速率自适应问题建模为组合半赌博问题。提出SAT-CTS策略，结合保守置信度估计和后验采样，引导学习过程满足τ_r而非最大化目标。策略包含两个关键机制：当τ_r可实现时，策略以时间无关常数上界累积满足性遗憾；当τ_r不可实现时，策略仅产生有限期望瞬态超出，随后重启CTS轮次，获得O((log T)²)标准遗憾界。

Result: 理论贡献：首次为具有满足性目标的组合半赌博问题提供有限时间遗憾界。实验验证：在时变稀疏多径信道下，SAT-CTS持续降低满足性遗憾，保持竞争力的标准遗憾，同时实现有利的平均吞吐量和用户间公平性。表明反馈高效学习能够在无信道状态知识的情况下，公平分配波束和速率以满足QoS目标。

Conclusion: SAT-CTS策略为毫米波MISO系统中的波束和速率自适应问题提供了理论保证的解决方案，通过引入满足性目标，在有限反馈条件下实现服务质量目标的达成，同时保持系统性能和公平性，为实际部署提供了实用框架。

Abstract: We study downlink beam and rate adaptation in a multi-user mmWave MISO system where multiple base stations (BSs), each using analog beamforming from finite codebooks, serve multiple single-antenna user equipments (UEs) with a unique beam per UE and discrete data transmission rates. BSs learn about transmission success based on ACK/NACK feedback. To encode service goals, we introduce a satisficing throughput threshold $τ_r$ and cast joint beam and rate adaptation as a combinatorial semi-bandit over beam-rate tuples. Within this framework, we propose SAT-CTS, a lightweight, threshold-aware policy that blends conservative confidence estimates with posterior sampling, steering learning toward meeting $τ_r$ rather than merely maximizing. Our main theoretical contribution provides the first finite-time regret bounds for combinatorial semi-bandits with satisficing objective: when $τ_r$ is realizable, we upper bound the cumulative satisficing regret to the target with a time-independent constant, and when $τ_r$ is non-realizable, we show that SAT-CTS incurs only a finite expected transient outside committed CTS rounds, after which its regret is governed by the sum of the regret contributions of restarted CTS rounds, yielding an $O((\log T)^2)$ standard regret bound. On the practical side, we evaluate the performance via cumulative satisficing regret to $τ_r$ alongside standard regret and fairness. Experiments with time-varying sparse multipath channels show that SAT-CTS consistently reduces satisficing regret and maintains competitive standard regret, while achieving favorable average throughput and fairness across users, indicating that feedback-efficient learning can equitably allocate beams and rates to meet QoS targets without channel state knowledge.

</details>


### [594] [Beyond Importance Sampling: Rejection-Gated Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14895)
*Ziwu Sun,Zhen Gao,Jiyong Zhang,Jiaheng Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RGPO提出了一种新的策略优化视角：不是通过重要性采样权重重新加权所有样本，而是选择足够可信的样本来驱动策略更新。它用平滑可微的接受门α_θ(s,a)替代重要性采样比r_θ，将拒绝提升为优化原则，门直接参与梯度计算并与策略一起隐式更新。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统策略优化方法（如TRPO、PPO）通过重要性采样重新加权所有样本，但在重要性采样比具有重尾分布时会导致梯度方差发散。现有方法将拒绝采样作为训练前的数据级启发式方法，而非优化原则。RGPO旨在解决这些问题，提供有限且有界的梯度方差保证。

Method: RGPO引入平滑可微的接受门α_θ(s,a)=g(r_θ(s,a))，范围在[0,1]，替代传统的重要性采样比r_θ。该门直接参与梯度计算，并与策略一起隐式更新。RGPO提供了一个统一框架：TRPO、PPO和REINFORCE的策略梯度都对应于有效梯度权重w(r)=g'(r)*r的特定选择。在RLHF偏好对齐中，RGPO使用双比率门，将学习锚定到先前策略和参考模型。

Result: RGPO保证了即使在重要性采样比具有重尾分布时（IS方差发散）也有有限且有界的梯度方差。它仅产生有界、可控的偏差，并提供类似于TRPO的近似单调策略改进保证。在计算成本上与PPO相当，无需二阶优化。在Anthropic HH-RLHF上的在线偏好微调实验中，RGPO实现了帕累托最优结果：在在线RL方法中获得最高奖励（比PPO-RLHF高14.8%），同时获得最低的KL散度（比PPO-RLHF低16.0%，比GRPO低53.1%）。

Conclusion: RGPO通过将拒绝采样提升为优化原则，提供了一种新的策略优化范式。它统一了现有方法，保证了梯度方差的有界性，在RLHF偏好对齐中表现出色，实现了奖励最大化和KL散度最小化的帕累托最优平衡。

Abstract: We propose a new perspective on policy optimization: rather than reweighting all samples by their importance ratios, an optimizer should select which samples are trustworthy enough to drive a policy update. Building on this view, we introduce Rejection-Gated Policy Optimization (RGPO), which replaces the importance sampling ratio r_theta = pi_theta / pi_old with a smooth, differentiable acceptance gate alpha_theta(s, a) = g(r_theta(s, a)) in the range [0, 1]. Unlike prior work that applies rejection sampling as a data-level heuristic before training, RGPO elevates rejection to an optimization principle: the gate participates directly in gradient computation and is implicitly updated alongside the policy. RGPO provides a unified framework: the policy gradients of TRPO, PPO, and REINFORCE all correspond to specific choices of the effective gradient weight w(r) = g'(r) * r. We prove that RGPO guarantees finite, bounded gradient variance even when importance sampling ratios are heavy-tailed (where IS variance diverges). We further show that RGPO incurs only a bounded, controllable bias and provides an approximate monotonic policy improvement guarantee analogous to TRPO. RGPO matches PPO in computational cost, requires no second-order optimization, and extends naturally to RLHF-style preference alignment. In online preference fine-tuning of Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct on Anthropic HH-RLHF (n = 3 seeds), RGPO uses a dual-ratio gate that anchors learning to both the previous policy and the reference model, achieving a Pareto-dominant outcome: the highest reward among online RL methods (+14.8% vs. PPO-RLHF) and the lowest KL divergence to the reference model (-16.0% vs. PPO-RLHF, -53.1% vs. GRPO).

</details>


### [595] [Can LLMs Score Medical Diagnoses and Clinical Reasoning as well as Expert Panels?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14892)
*Amy Rouillard,Sitwala Mundiab,Linda Camarab,Michael Cameron Gramaniec,Ziyaad Dangorc,Ismail Kallad,Shabir A. Madhic,Kajal Morarc,Marlvin T. Ncubec,Haroon Saloojeee,Bruce A. Bassett*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LLM陪审团在评估医学AI诊断方面可作为临床专家评估的可靠替代方案，经过校准后与专家评分高度一致


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床专家评估医学AI系统成本高、速度慢，需要寻找更高效可靠的替代评估方法

Method: 使用三个前沿AI模型组成LLM陪审团，对300个中低收入国家医院真实病例的3333个诊断进行评分，从诊断、鉴别诊断、临床推理和负面治疗风险四个维度评估，并与专家临床小组和独立人类重新评分小组进行比较
