Result: LLM陪审团评分系统性低于临床专家，但保持了顺序一致性；与主要专家小组的一致性优于人类重新评分小组；严重错误概率更低；与专家排名高度一致；无自我偏好偏差；等渗回归校准可改善与人类专家评估的对齐

Conclusion: 经过校准的多模型LLM陪审团可作为医学AI基准测试中专家临床评估的可靠替代方案，能有效识别高风险错误诊断，提高专家评审效率

Abstract: Evaluating medical AI systems using expert clinician panels is costly and slow, motivating the use of large language models (LLMs) as alternative adjudicators. Here, we evaluate an LLM jury composed of three frontier AI models scoring 3333 diagnoses on 300 real-world middle-income country (MIC) hospital cases. Model performance was benchmarked against expert clinician panel and independent human re-scoring panel evaluations. Both LLM and clinician-generated diagnoses are scored across four dimensions: diagnosis, differential diagnosis, clinical reasoning and negative treatment risk. For each of these, we assess scoring difference, inter-rater agreement, scoring stability, severe safety errors and the effect of post-hoc calibration. We find that: (i) the uncalibrated LLM jury scores are systematically lower than clinician panels scores; (ii) the LLM Jury preserves ordinal agreement and exhibits better concordance with the primary expert panels than the human expert re-score panels do; (iii) the probability of severe errors is lower in \lj models compared to the human expert re-score panels; (iv) the LLM Jury shows excellent agreement with primary expert panels' rankings. We find that the LLM jury combined with AI model diagnoses can be used to identify ward diagnoses at high risk of error, enabling targeted expert review and improved panel efficiency; (v) LLM jury models show no self-preference bias. They did not score diagnoses generated by their own underlying model or models from the same vendor more (or less) favourably than those generated by other models. Finally, we demonstrate that LLM jury calibration using isotonic regression improves alignment with human expert panel evaluations. Together, these results provide compelling evidence that a calibrated, multi-model LLM jury can serve as a trustworthy and reliable proxy for expert clinician evaluation in medical AI benchmarking.

</details>


### [596] [xFODE: An Explainable Fuzzy Additive ODE Framework for System Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14883)
*Ertugrul Kececi,Tufan Kumbasar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出可解释模糊常微分方程框架，在保持深度学习精度的同时增强系统辨识的可解释性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经/模糊常微分方程模型在非线性动态建模中精度高，但系统状态缺乏明确物理意义，输入对状态导数的贡献难以解释

Method: 提出可解释模糊常微分方程框架：1) 采用增量形式定义状态以赋予物理意义；2) 使用模糊加性模型逼近状态导数；3) 开发分区策略，训练时只激活两个连续规则；4) 构建支持端到端优化的深度学习框架

Result: 在基准系统辨识数据集上，xFODE与NODE、FODE和NLARX模型精度相当，同时提供可解释性洞察

Conclusion: xFODE框架成功解决了深度学习系统辨识中可解释性不足的问题，在保持高精度的同时提供了物理意义明确的状态定义和输入贡献解释

Abstract: Recent advances in Deep Learning (DL) have strengthened data-driven System Identification (SysID), with Neural and Fuzzy Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE/FODE) models achieving high accuracy in nonlinear dynamic modeling. Yet, system states in these frameworks are often reconstructed without clear physical meaning, and input contributions to the state derivatives remain difficult to interpret. To address these limitations, we propose Explainable FODE (xFODE), an interpretable SysID framework with integrated DL-based training. In xFODE, we define states in an incremental form to provide them with physical meanings. We employ fuzzy additive models to approximate the state derivative, thereby enhancing interpretability per input. To provide further interpretability, Partitioning Strategies (PSs) are developed, enabling the training of fuzzy additive models with explainability. By structuring the antecedent space during training so that only two consecutive rules are activated for any given input, PSs not only yield lower complexity for local inference but also enhance the interpretability of the antecedent space. To train xFODE, we present a DL framework with parameterized membership function learning that supports end-to-end optimization. Across benchmark SysID datasets, xFODE matches the accuracy of NODE, FODE, and NLARX models while providing interpretable insights.

</details>


### [597] [Chain of Uncertain Rewards with Large Language Models for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13504)
*Shentong Mo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CoUR框架利用大语言模型优化强化学习中的奖励函数设计，通过代码不确定性量化和相似性选择机制减少冗余评估，在多个基准测试中实现更好性能并显著降低评估成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统强化学习奖励函数设计存在挑战：依赖大量人工设计和评估步骤，效率低下且不一致，容易产生冗余并忽略中间决策点的局部不确定性

Method: 提出Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR)框架，集成大语言模型，引入代码不确定性量化与相似性选择机制，结合文本和语义分析识别重用最相关的奖励函数组件，通过贝叶斯优化解耦奖励项实现高效搜索

Result: 在IsaacGym的9个原始环境和Bidexterous Manipulation基准的20个任务上进行全面评估，CoUR不仅实现更好性能，还显著降低奖励评估成本

Conclusion: CoUR框架通过集成大语言模型和不确定性量化机制，有效解决了强化学习中奖励函数设计的效率和鲁棒性问题，为自动化奖励设计提供了新方法

Abstract: Designing effective reward functions is a cornerstone of reinforcement learning (RL), yet it remains a challenging and labor-intensive process due to the inefficiencies and inconsistencies inherent in traditional methods. Existing methods often rely on extensive manual design and evaluation steps, which are prone to redundancy and overlook local uncertainties at intermediate decision points. To address these challenges, we propose the Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR), a novel framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) to streamline reward function design and evaluation in RL environments. Specifically, our CoUR introduces code uncertainty quantification with a similarity selection mechanism that combines textual and semantic analyses to identify and reuse the most relevant reward function components. By reducing redundant evaluations and leveraging Bayesian optimization on decoupled reward terms, CoUR enables a more efficient and robust search for optimal reward feedback. We comprehensively evaluate CoUR across nine original environments from IsaacGym and all 20 tasks from the Bidexterous Manipulation benchmark. The experimental results demonstrate that CoUR not only achieves better performance but also significantly lowers the cost of reward evaluations.

</details>


### [598] [xFODE+: Explainable Type-2 Fuzzy Additive ODEs for Uncertainty Quantification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14880)
*Ertugrul Kececi,Tufan Kumbasar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: xFODE+是一种可解释的Type-2模糊加性ODE模型，用于系统辨识中的不确定性量化，在保持预测精度的同时提供预测区间和物理可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习推动了数据驱动的系统辨识，但实际应用需要不确定性量化和可解释性。现有方法如模糊ODE能提供预测区间但可解释性有限。

Method: 提出xFODE+模型，使用区间Type-2模糊逻辑系统实现模糊加性模型，约束隶属函数仅激活两个相邻规则以减少重叠，保持局部透明性。通过类型约简集构建状态更新和预测区间，采用复合损失函数联合优化预测精度和区间质量。

Result: 在基准系统辨识数据集上，xFODE+在预测区间质量上与FODE相当，预测精度可比，同时提供了可解释性。

Conclusion: xFODE+成功结合了不确定性量化、预测精度和可解释性，为系统辨识提供了一种透明且可靠的数据驱动建模方法。

Abstract: Recent advances in Deep Learning (DL) have boosted data-driven System Identification (SysID), but reliable use requires Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) alongside accurate predictions. Although UQ-capable models such as Fuzzy ODE (FODE) can produce Prediction Intervals (PIs), they offer limited interpretability. We introduce Explainable Type-2 Fuzzy Additive ODEs for UQ (xFODE+), an interpretable SysID model which produces PIs alongside point predictions while retaining physically meaningful incremental states. xFODE+ implements each fuzzy additive model with Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Logic Systems (IT2-FLSs) and constraints membership functions to the activation of two neighboring rules, limiting overlap and keeping inference locally transparent. The type-reduced sets produced by the IT2-FLSs are aggregated to construct the state update together with the PIs. The model is trained in a DL framework via a composite loss that jointly optimizes prediction accuracy and PI quality. Results on benchmark SysID datasets show that xFODE+ matches FODE in PI quality and achieves comparable accuracy, while providing interpretability.

</details>


### [599] [Does RL Expand the Capability Boundary of LLM Agents? A PASS@(k,T) Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14877)
*Zhiyuan Zhai,Wenjing Yan,Xiaodan Shao,Xin Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RL在工具使用任务中确实扩展了LLM能力边界，而不仅仅是提高可靠性，这与静态推理任务的结果相反


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究强化学习对LLM智能体能力的真正影响：是扩展能力边界还是仅提高可靠性？特别是在需要多轮交互的工具使用任务中，这与静态推理任务可能有本质区别

Method: 引入PASS@(k,T)二维度量，同时考虑采样预算k和交互深度T；在工具使用任务上对比基础模型和RL模型；分析监督微调的影响；通过机制分析探究RL如何改变策略分布

Result: 在组合性、顺序信息收集任务中，RL确实扩展了能力边界：RL智能体的通过率曲线高于基础模型，且差距随k增大而扩大而非收敛；监督微调在相同任务上反而使边界回归；RL重新加权策略分布，偏向那些下游推理更可能产生正确答案的子集

Conclusion: RL对LLM的影响取决于任务类型：在静态推理任务中仅提高可靠性，但在组合性工具使用任务中真正扩展能力边界；自我导向的探索是能力扩展的关键因素

Abstract: Does reinforcement learning genuinely expand what LLM agents can do, or merely make them more reliable? For static reasoning, recent work answers the second: base and RL pass@k curves converge at large k. We ask whether this holds for agentic tool use, where T rounds of interaction enable compositional strategies that re-sampling cannot recover. We introduce PASS@(k,T), a two-dimensional metric that jointly varies sampling budget k and interaction depth T, separating capability expansion from efficiency improvement. Our main finding is that, contrary to the static-reasoning result, tool-use RL genuinely enlarges the capability boundary: the RL agent's pass-curve pulls above the base model's and the gap widens at large k rather than converging. The expansion is specific to compositional, sequential information gathering; on simpler tasks RL behaves as prior work predicts. Under matched training data, supervised fine-tuning regresses the boundary on the same compositional tasks, isolating self-directed exploration as the causal factor. Mechanism analysis shows RL reweights the base strategy distribution toward the subset whose downstream reasoning more often yields a correct answer, with the improvement concentrated on how the agent integrates retrieved information. These results reconcile optimistic and pessimistic readings of RL for LLMs: both are correct, on different task types.

</details>


### [600] [Diffusion Sequence Models for Generative In-Context Meta-Learning of Robot Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13366)
*Angelo Moroncelli,Matteo Rufolo,Gunes Cagin Aydin,Asad Ali Shahid,Loris Roveda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究将系统辨识建模为上下文元学习问题，比较确定性模型和生成式序列模型在机器人动力学预测中的表现，发现扩散模型在分布偏移下具有更好的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人动力学的精确建模对于基于模型的控制至关重要，但在分布偏移和实时约束下仍然具有挑战性。需要开发能够在不同工况下保持鲁棒性的系统辨识方法。

Method: 将系统辨识构建为上下文元学习问题，比较Transformer元模型（确定性基线）与两种扩散模型方法：1）修复扩散模型学习联合输入-观测分布；2）条件扩散模型基于控制输入生成未来观测。通过大规模随机仿真分析性能和计算权衡。

Result: 扩散模型在分布偏移下显著提高了鲁棒性，其中修复扩散模型在实验中表现最佳。预热采样使扩散模型能够在实时约束下运行，适用于控制应用。

Conclusion: 生成式元模型是机器人领域鲁棒系统辨识的有前景方向，扩散模型通过改善分布偏移下的性能并满足实时约束，为基于模型的控制提供了可行解决方案。

Abstract: Accurate modeling of robot dynamics is essential for model-based control, yet remains challenging under distributional shifts and real-time constraints. In this work, we formulate system identification as an in-context meta-learning problem and compare deterministic and generative sequence models for forward dynamics prediction. We take a Transformer-based meta-model, as a strong deterministic baseline, and introduce to this setting two complementary diffusion-based approaches: (i) inpainting diffusion (Diffuser), which learns the joint input-observation distribution, and (ii) conditioned diffusion models (CNN and Transformer), which generate future observations conditioned on control inputs. Through large-scale randomized simulations, we analyze performance across in-distribution and out-of-distribution regimes, as well as computational trade-offs relevant for control. We show that diffusion models significantly improve robustness under distribution shift, with inpainting diffusion achieving the best performance in our experiments. Finally, we demonstrate that warm-started sampling enables diffusion models to operate within real-time constraints, making them viable for control applications. These results highlight generative meta-models as a promising direction for robust system identification in robotics.

</details>


### [601] [Constraint-based Pre-training: From Structured Constraints to Scalable Model Initialization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14769)
*Fu Feng,Yucheng Xie,Ruixiao Shi,Jing Wang,Xin Geng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出约束式预训练范式WeiT，通过Kronecker约束将尺寸无关知识解耦到可重用权重模板中，将变尺寸模型初始化重构为多任务适应问题，实现跨不同深度和宽度的高效模型构建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统预训练产生固定尺度模型，而实际部署需要不同尺寸模型，当目标模型尺度与预训练尺度不同时存在局限性。需要解决变尺寸模型初始化问题。

Method: 提出约束式预训练范式，通过结构化约束在预训练中将尺寸无关知识解耦到可重用权重模板中，尺寸特定适应分配给轻量级权重缩放器。具体实现WeiT采用Kronecker约束正则化预训练过程，模型参数通过连接和加权聚合表示为权重模板的组合，由轻量级权重缩放器控制自适应连接。

Result: 在图像分类、图像生成和具身控制等感知和具身学习任务中，WeiT在初始化不同深度和宽度模型时达到最先进性能。对Transformer和卷积架构均有效，即使在完全训练下也能实现更快收敛和更好性能。

Conclusion: 约束式预训练范式WeiT成功解决了变尺寸模型初始化问题，通过解耦尺寸无关知识和尺寸特定适应，实现了灵活高效的跨尺度模型构建，具有广泛适用性。

Abstract: The pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm has become the dominant approach for model adaptation. However, conventional pre-training typically yields models at a fixed scale, whereas practical deployment often requires models of varying sizes, exposing its limitations when target model scales differ from those used during pre-training. To address this, we propose an innovative constraint-based pre-training paradigm that imposes structured constraints during pre-training to disentangle size-agnostic knowledge into reusable weight templates, while assigning size-specific adaptation to lightweight weight scalers, thereby reformulating variable-sized model initialization as a multi-task adaptation problem. Within this paradigm, we further introduce WeiT, which employs Kronecker-based constraints to regularize the pre-training process. Specifically, model parameters are represented as compositions of weight templates via concatenation and weighted aggregation, with adaptive connections governed by lightweight weight scalers whose parameters are learned from limited data. This design enables flexible and efficient construction of model weights across diverse downstream scales. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of WeiT, achieving state-of-the-art performance in initializing models with varying depths and widths across a broad range of perception and embodied learning tasks, including Image Classification, Image Generation, and Embodied Control. Moreover, its effectiveness generalizes to both Transformer-based and Convolution-based architectures, consistently enabling faster convergence and improved performance even under full training.

</details>


### [602] [CI-CBM: Class-Incremental Concept Bottleneck Model for Interpretable Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14519)
*Amirhosein Javadi,Tuomas Oikarinen,Tara Javidi,Tsui-Wei Weng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CI-CBM是一种用于类增量学习的可解释概念瓶颈模型，通过概念正则化和伪概念生成技术，在保持模型可解释性的同时缓解灾难性遗忘问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题严重，现有方法往往需要在模型可解释性和准确性之间做出妥协，需要一种既能保持可解释性又不牺牲性能的解决方案。

Method: 提出类增量概念瓶颈模型（CI-CBM），采用概念正则化和伪概念生成技术，在增量学习阶段保持可解释的决策过程，支持预训练和非预训练两种场景。

Result: 在7个数据集上的评估显示，CI-CBM性能与黑盒模型相当，比先前可解释方法平均提升36%准确率，同时提供个体输入的可解释决策和全局可理解决策规则。

Conclusion: CI-CBM证明在增量学习过程中可以保持人类可理解的概念而不损害模型性能，为可解释的类增量学习提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Catastrophic forgetting remains a fundamental challenge in continual learning, in which models often forget previous knowledge when fine-tuned on a new task. This issue is especially pronounced in class incremental learning (CIL), which is the most challenging setting in continual learning. Existing methods to address catastrophic forgetting often sacrifice either model interpretability or accuracy. To address this challenge, we introduce ClassIncremental Concept Bottleneck Model (CI-CBM), which leverage effective techniques, including concept regularization and pseudo-concept generation to maintain interpretable decision processes throughout incremental learning phases. Through extensive evaluation on seven datasets, CI-CBM achieves comparable performance to black-box models and outperforms previous interpretable approaches in CIL, with an average 36% accuracy gain. CICBM provides interpretable decisions on individual inputs and understandable global decision rules, as shown in our experiments, thereby demonstrating that human understandable concepts can be maintained during incremental learning without compromising model performance. Our approach is effective in both pretrained and non-pretrained scenarios; in the latter, the backbone is trained from scratch during the first learning phase. Code is publicly available at github.com/importAmir/CI-CBM.

</details>


### [603] [A Mechanistic Account of Attention Sinks in GPT-2: One Circuit, Broader Implications for Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14722)
*Yuval Ran-Milo,Hila Ofek,Shahar Mendel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现Transformer中的注意力下沉现象（对首个位置过度关注）源于学习查询偏置、位置编码的MLP变换和键投影结构三者交互作用，且每个组件都可单独移除而不影响下沉现象出现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Transformer模型中普遍存在的注意力下沉现象（对第一个位置过度关注）的成因机制，以理解这一行为的结构基础并为缓解该现象提供依据。

Method: 采用结构分析与因果干预相结合的方法，在GPT-2风格模型上研究学习查询偏置和绝对位置嵌入的影响，并在自然语言、数学和代码输入上进行验证。

Result: 发现注意力下沉源于三个组件的交互作用：学习查询偏置、第一层MLP对位置编码的变换、以及键投影的结构特征。关键发现是每个组件都可单独移除而模型仍会出现注意力下沉现象。

Conclusion: 注意力下沉可能通过不同架构中的不同电路机制产生，这一发现为缓解下沉现象提供了信息，并激励对下沉现象出现原因的更广泛研究。

Abstract: Transformers commonly exhibit an attention sink: disproportionately high attention to the first position. We study this behavior in GPT-2-style models with learned query biases and absolute positional embeddings. Combining structural analysis with causal interventions, validated across natural-language, mathematical, and code inputs, we find that the sink arises from the interaction among (i) a learned query bias, (ii) the first-layer MLP transformation of the positional encoding, and (iii) structure in the key projection. Crucially, each component we identify is individually dispensable: architectures omitting each of them robustly exhibit sinks. This indicates that attention sinks may arise through distinct circuits across architectures. These findings inform mitigation of sinks, and motivate broader investigation into why sinks emerge.

</details>


### [604] [Step-level Denoising-time Diffusion Alignment with Multiple Objectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14379)
*Qi Zhang,Dawei Wang,Shaofeng Zou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MSDDA框架，无需重新训练即可在去噪时对齐扩散模型与多个目标，获得闭式解的最优反向去噪分布，证明其与步级RL微调完全等价且无近似误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类偏好本质上是多元的，对齐模型需要平衡多个下游目标（如美学质量和图文一致性）。现有多目标方法要么依赖昂贵的多目标RL微调，要么在去噪时融合单独对齐的模型，通常需要奖励值（或其梯度）访问权限，并引入近似误差。

Method: 重新审视扩散模型的RL微调问题，引入步级RL公式解决最优策略识别难题。在此基础上提出MSDDA框架，无需重新训练即可在去噪时对齐扩散模型与多个目标，获得闭式解的最优反向去噪分布，其均值和方差直接用单目标基础模型表示。

Result: 证明该去噪时目标与步级RL微调完全等价，不引入近似误差。数值结果表明该方法优于现有的去噪时方法。

Conclusion: MSDDA提供了一个无需重新训练、无近似误差的多目标扩散模型对齐框架，通过闭式解的最优反向去噪分布有效平衡多个下游目标。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful tool for aligning diffusion models with human preferences, typically by optimizing a single reward function under a KL regularization constraint. In practice, however, human preferences are inherently pluralistic, and aligned models must balance multiple downstream objectives, such as aesthetic quality and text-image consistency. Existing multi-objective approaches either rely on costly multi-objective RL fine-tuning or on fusing separately aligned models at denoising time, but they generally require access to reward values (or their gradients) and/or introduce approximation error in the resulting denoising objectives. In this paper, we revisit the problem of RL fine-tuning for diffusion models and address the intractability of identifying the optimal policy by introducing a step-level RL formulation. Building on this, we further propose Multi-objective Step-level Denoising-time Diffusion Alignment (MSDDA), a retraining-free framework for aligning diffusion models with multiple objectives, obtaining the optimal reverse denoising distribution in closed form, with mean and variance expressed directly in terms of single-objective base models. We prove that this denoising-time objective is exactly equivalent to the step-level RL fine-tuning, introducing no approximation error. Moreover, we provide numerical results, which indicate our method outperforms existing denoising-time approaches.

</details>


### [605] [Gating Enables Curvature: A Geometric Expressivity Gap in Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14702)
*Satwik Bathula,Anand A. Joshi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文通过统计流形几何分析，揭示了门控注意力机制相比非门控注意力的几何表达能力差距：门控机制能产生非平坦（包括正曲率）的统计流形，而非门控注意力仅限于平坦流形。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管门控注意力在大型语言模型中已成功应用并改善了性能和训练稳定性，但其数学含义仍未被充分理解。研究者希望通过几何视角分析注意力表示，理解门控机制带来的根本性差异。

Method: 将注意力输出建模为高斯分布的均值参数，分析其诱导的Fisher-Rao几何。通过统计流形几何框架，比较门控与非门控注意力机制在几何表达能力上的差异。

Result: 非门控注意力由于其仿射结构，仅限于内在平坦的统计流形；而乘法门控能够实现非平坦几何，包括正曲率流形，这是非门控设置无法达到的。实验表明，门控模型在需要非线性决策边界任务上表现出更高的表示曲率和更好的性能，但在线性决策边界任务上没有一致优势。此外，发现了一个结构化机制，其中曲率在组合下累积，产生系统性的深度放大效应。

Conclusion: 门控注意力机制在几何表达能力上显著优于非门控注意力，能够产生更丰富的统计流形几何结构，这解释了其在复杂任务上的性能优势，并为深度模型设计提供了几何理论基础。

Abstract: Multiplicative gating is widely used in neural architectures and has recently been applied to attention layers to improve performance and training stability in large language models. Despite the success of gated attention, the mathematical implications of gated attention mechanisms remain poorly understood. We study attention through the geometry of its representations by modeling outputs as mean parameters of Gaussian distributions and analyzing the induced Fisher--Rao geometry. We show that ungated attention operator is restricted to intrinsically flat statistical manifolds due to its affine structure, while multiplicative gating enables non-flat geometries, including positively curved manifolds that are unattainable in the ungated setting. These results establish a geometric expressivity gap between ungated and gated attention. Empirically, we show that gated models exhibit higher representation curvature and improved performance on tasks requiring nonlinear decision boundaries whereas they provide no consistent advantage on tasks with linear decision boundaries. Furthermore, we identify a structured regime in which curvature accumulates under composition, yielding a systematic depth amplification effect.

</details>


### [606] [Mean Flow Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14698)
*Xiaoyi Dong,Xi Sheryl Zhang,Jian Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MeanFlow模型作为策略表示，替代扩散模型以提高强化学习训练和推理效率，在保持性能的同时显著减少计算开销


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型作为策略表示在在线强化学习中表现出色，但其迭代生成过程带来显著的训练和推理开销，需要更高效的替代方案

Method: 使用MeanFlow模型（少步流式生成模型）表示策略，在最大熵强化学习框架下通过软策略迭代优化，解决动作似然评估和软策略改进两个关键挑战

Result: 在MuJoCo和DeepMind Control Suite基准测试中，MFPO方法达到或超越当前扩散基线的性能，同时显著减少训练和推理时间

Conclusion: MeanFlow模型是扩散模型的有效替代方案，在强化学习中提供相似的表达能力但更高的计算效率，为实际应用提供了更可行的解决方案

Abstract: Diffusion models have recently emerged as expressive policy representations for online reinforcement learning (RL). However, their iterative generative processes introduce substantial training and inference overhead. To overcome this limitation, we propose to represent policies using MeanFlow models, a class of few-step flow-based generative models, to improve training and inference efficiency over diffusion-based RL approaches. To promote exploration, we optimize MeanFlow policies under the maximum entropy RL framework via soft policy iteration, and address two key challenges specific to MeanFlow policies: action likelihood evaluation and soft policy improvement. Experiments on MuJoCo and DeepMind Control Suite benchmarks demonstrate that our method, Mean Flow Policy Optimization (MFPO), achieves performance comparable to or exceeding current diffusion-based baselines while considerably reducing training and inference time. Our code is available at https://github.com/MFPolicy/MFPO.

</details>


### [607] [ELMoE-3D: Leveraging Intrinsic Elasticity of MoE for Hybrid-Bonding-Enabled Self-Speculative Decoding in On-Premises Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14626)
*Yuseon Choi,Jingu Lee,Jungjun Oh,Sunjoo Whang,Byeongcheol Kim,Minsung Kim,Hoi-Jun Yoo,Sangjin Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ELMoE-3D是一个基于混合键合技术的软硬件协同设计框架，通过统一缓存加速和推测解码技术，为MoE模型提供跨批次大小的整体加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前MoE模型在本地部署中存在内存瓶颈问题：批处理将稀疏的逐令牌计算转化为密集的内存激活；内存中心架构虽然提高了带宽，但在高批次下MoE的低算术强度导致计算利用率不足；推测解码技术虽然用空闲计算换取更少的目标调用，但验证阶段仍需加载专家模型，限制了其在MoE中的效益。

Method: 提出ELMoE-3D框架，包含：1）弹性自推测解码（Elastic-SD），利用MoE的两个固有弹性轴（专家和比特）构建既作为专家缓存又作为强对齐自草稿模型的系统；2）LSB增强的比特切片架构，利用比特切片表示中的固有冗余原生支持比特嵌套执行；3）基于3D堆叠硬件的实现。

Result: 在3D堆叠硬件上，ELMoE-3D在批次大小1-16范围内相比xPU上的朴素MoE服务实现了平均6.6倍加速和4.4倍能效提升；相比最佳性能的先前加速器基线实现了2.2倍加速和1.4倍能效提升。

Conclusion: ELMoE-3D通过软硬件协同设计，有效解决了MoE模型在本地部署中的内存瓶颈和计算利用率问题，为跨批次大小的MoE服务提供了显著的性能和能效提升。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have become the dominant architecture for large-scale language models, yet on-premises serving remains fundamentally memory-bound as batching turns sparse per-token compute into dense memory activation. Memory-centric architectures (PIM, NMP) improve bandwidth but leave compute underutilized under MoE's low arithmetic intensity at high batch sizes. Speculative decoding (SD) trades idle compute for fewer target invocations, yet verification must load experts even for rejected tokens, severely limiting its benefit in MoE especially at low batch sizes. We propose ELMoE-3D, a hybrid-bonding (HB)-based HW-SW co-designed framework that unifies cache-based acceleration and speculative decoding to offer overall speedup across batch sizes. We identify two intrinsic elasticity axes of MoE-expert and bit-and jointly scale them to construct Elastic Self-Speculative Decoding (Elastic-SD), which serves as both an expert cache and a strongly aligned self-draft model accelerated by high HB bandwidth. Our LSB-augmented bit-sliced architecture exploits inherent redundancy in bit-slice representations to natively support bit-nested execution. On our 3D-stacked hardware, ELMoE-3D achieves an average $6.6\times$ speedup and $4.4\times$ energy efficiency gain over naive MoE serving on xPU across batch sizes 1-16, and delivers $2.2\times$ speedup and $1.4\times$ energy efficiency gain over the best-performing prior accelerator baseline.

</details>


### [608] [ConfLayers: Adaptive Confidence-based Layer Skipping for Self-Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14612)
*Walaa Amer,Uday das,Fadi Kurdahi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ConfLayers提出了一种基于置信度的动态层跳过方法，用于自推测解码中的草稿模型构建，通过自适应阈值选择跳过层，实现1.4倍加速而不损失输出质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自推测解码方法中，动态学习跳过层的草稿模型构建方式复杂且训练开销大，而基于启发式的方法虽然简单但效果有限。需要一种既简单有效又能保持自适应性的动态草稿模型构建方法。

Method: 提出ConfLayers框架：迭代计算所有层的置信度分数，基于自适应阈值选择跳过层，评估性能并更新最佳选择，直到没有改进或达到最大迭代次数。这是一种无需训练层跳过策略的即插即用方法。

Result: 在不同模型和数据集上的性能评估显示，ConfLayers相比原始LLM生成实现了最高1.4倍的加速，同时保持了输出质量，提供了更一致的速度-质量权衡。

Conclusion: ConfLayers通过置信度驱动的动态层跳过，为自推测解码提供了一种简单有效的草稿模型构建方案，避免了训练开销，保持了模型对不同任务和数据集的自适应性，实现了显著的推理加速。

Abstract: Self-speculative decoding is an inference technique for large language models designed to speed up generation without sacrificing output quality. It combines fast, approximate decoding using a compact version of the model as a draft model with selective re-evaluation by the full target model. Some existing methods form the draft model by dynamically learning which layers to skip during inference, effectively creating a smaller subnetwork to speed up computation. However, using heuristic-based approaches to select layers to skip can often be simpler and more effective. In this paper, we propose ConfLayers, a dynamic plug-and-play approach to forming the draft model in self-speculative decoding via confidence-based intermediate layer skipping. The process iteratively computes confidence scores for all layers, selects layers to skip based on an adaptive threshold, evaluates the performance of the resulting set, and updates the best selection until no further improvement is achieved or a maximum number of iterations is reached. This framework avoids the overhead and complexity of training a layer skipping policy and can provide more consistent speed-quality trade-offs while preserving the adaptivity of the draft model to diverse tasks and datasets. The performance evaluation of ConfLayers across different models and datasets shows that our novel approach offers up to 1.4x speedup over vanilla LLM generation.

</details>


### [609] [CLion: Efficient Cautious Lion Optimizer with Enhanced Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14587)
*Feihu Huang,Guanyi Zhang,Songcan Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了Lion优化器的泛化性能，通过数学归纳法证明了其泛化误差为O(1/(Nτ^T))，并提出了一种新的CLion优化器，具有更低的泛化误差O(1/N)和O(√d/T^{1/4})的收敛速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Lion优化器在深度学习训练中表现出色，但其泛化分析尚未被研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，分析Lion的泛化性能，并设计具有更好泛化能力的改进优化器。

Method: 使用基于数学归纳法的算法稳定性理论分析Lion优化器的泛化误差。提出CLion优化器，通过谨慎使用符号函数来改进泛化性能。分析CLion的收敛性质，并在非凸随机优化框架下证明其收敛速率。

Result: 证明了Lion优化器的泛化误差为O(1/(Nτ^T))，其中τ是梯度估计器中非零元素的最小绝对值。发现SignSGD具有与Lion相同的泛化误差。提出的CLion优化器具有更低的泛化误差O(1/N)和O(√d/T^{1/4})的收敛速率。

Conclusion: 本文首次分析了Lion优化器的泛化性能，提出了具有更好泛化能力的CLion优化器。理论分析和实验结果表明CLion在泛化误差和收敛速率方面均优于原始Lion优化器。

Abstract: Lion optimizer is a popular learning-based optimization algorithm in machine learning, which shows impressive performance in training many deep learning models. Although convergence property of the Lion optimizer has been studied, its generalization analysis is still missing. To fill this gap, we study generalization property of the Lion via algorithmic stability based on the mathematical induction. Specifically, we prove that the Lion has a generalization error of $O(\frac{1}{Nτ^T})$, where $N$ is training sample size, and $τ>0$ denotes the smallest absolute value of non-zero element in gradient estimator, and $T$ is the total iteration number. In addition, we obtain an interesting byproduct that the SignSGD algorithm has the same generalization error as the Lion. To enhance generalization of the Lion, we design a novel efficient Cautious Lion (i.e., CLion) optimizer by cautiously using sign function. Moreover, we prove that our CLion has a lower generalization error of $O(\frac{1}{N})$ than $O(\frac{1}{Nτ^T})$ of the Lion, since the parameter $τ$ generally is very small. Meanwhile, we study convergence property of our CLion optimizer, and prove that our CLion has a fast convergence rate of $O(\frac{\sqrt{d}}{T^{1/4}})$ under $\ell_1$-norm of gradient for nonconvex stochastic optimization, where $d$ denotes the model dimension.
  Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate effectiveness of our CLion optimizer.

</details>


### [610] [Predicting Post-Traumatic Epilepsy from Clinical Records using Large Language Model Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14547)
*Wenhui Cui,Nicholas Swingle,Anand A. Joshi,Dileep Nair,Richard M. Leahy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 使用预训练大语言模型编码临床记录，结合梯度提升树分类器，实现创伤后癫痫的早期预测，AUC-ROC达0.892。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 创伤后癫痫（PTE）是创伤性脑损伤后的严重并发症，早期预测面临临床数据异质性、阳性病例有限、依赖资源密集型神经影像数据等挑战。研究探索是否仅使用常规收集的急性临床记录就能支持早期PTE预测。

Method: 使用TRACK-TBI队列的精选子集，开发自动化PTE预测框架：1）使用预训练大语言模型（LLMs）作为固定特征提取器编码临床记录；2）评估表格特征、LLM生成的嵌入特征和混合特征表示；3）在分层交叉验证下使用梯度提升树分类器进行预测。

Result: LLM嵌入通过捕捉上下文临床信息，相比仅使用表格特征实现了性能提升。最佳性能通过结合表格特征和LLM嵌入的模态感知特征融合策略实现：AUC-ROC为0.892，AUPRC为0.798。急性创伤后癫痫发作、损伤严重程度、神经外科干预和ICU住院是关键预测因素。

Conclusion: 常规急性临床记录包含适合早期PTE风险预测的信息，使用LLM嵌入结合梯度提升树分类器的方法有效，可作为影像学预测的有前景补充。

Abstract: Objective: Post-traumatic epilepsy (PTE) is a debilitating neurological disorder that develops after traumatic brain injury (TBI). Early prediction of PTE remains challenging due to heterogeneous clinical data, limited positive cases, and reliance on resource-intensive neuroimaging data. We investigate whether routinely collected acute clinical records alone can support early PTE prediction using language model-based approaches. Methods: Using a curated subset of the TRACK-TBI cohort, we developed an automated PTE prediction framework that implements pretrained large language models (LLMs) as fixed feature extractors to encode clinical records. Tabular features, LLM-generated embeddings, and hybrid feature representations were evaluated using gradient-boosted tree classifiers under stratified cross-validation. Results: LLM embeddings achieved performance improvements by capturing contextual clinical information compared to using tabular features alone. The best performance was achieved by a modality-aware feature fusion strategy combining tabular features and LLM embeddings, achieving an AUC-ROC of 0.892 and AUPRC of 0.798. Acute post-traumatic seizures, injury severity, neurosurgical intervention, and ICU stay are key contributors to the predictive performance. Significance: These findings demonstrate that routine acute clinical records contain information suitable for early PTE risk prediction using LLM embeddings in conjunction with gradient-boosted tree classifiers. This approach represents a promising complement to imaging-based prediction.

</details>


### [611] [An unsupervised decision-support framework for multivariate biomarker analysis in athlete monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14534)
*Fernando Barcelos Rosito,Sebastião De Jesus Menezes,Simone Ferreira Sturza,Adriana Seixas,Muriel Figueredo Franco*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出无监督多变量框架，从运动员生物标志物数据中识别潜在生理状态，无需损伤标签，区分机械损伤与代谢应激，发现传统单变量监测遗漏的沉默风险表型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 运动员监测面临小样本、生物标志物尺度异质、重复采样可行性有限、缺乏可靠损伤真实标签等限制，这些限制降低了传统单变量和二元风险模型的可解释性和实用性。

Method: 提出模块化计算框架，在联合生物标志物空间中操作，整合预处理、临床安全筛查、无监督聚类和基于质心的生理解释。仅使用业余足球运动员在竞争微周期中的数据学习特征。通过合成数据增强评估鲁棒性和可扩展性。使用Ward层次聚类支持监测和病因学区分，高斯混合模型支持高维设置下的结构稳定性分析。

Result: 框架识别出能区分机械损伤与代谢应激的连贯特征，同时保持稳态状态。合成数据增强证明了可行性，并检测到通常被单变量监测遗漏的潜在沉默风险表型。结构分析表明在增强和高维设置下具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该框架能够从多变量生物标志物数据中无需损伤标签即可解释性地识别潜在生理状态。通过区分机制并揭示传统监测未捕获的沉默风险模式，为个体化运动员监测和决策制定提供可操作的见解。

Abstract: Purpose. Athlete monitoring is constrained by small cohorts, heterogeneous biomarker scales, limited feasibility of repeated sampling, and the lack of reliable injury ground truth. These limitations reduce the interpretability and utility of traditional univariate and binary risk models. This study addresses these challenges by proposing an unsupervised multivariate framework to identify latent physiological states in athletes using real data. Methods. We propose a modular computational framework that operates in the joint biomarker space, integrating preprocessing, clinical safety screening, unsupervised clustering, and centroid-based physiological interpretation. Profiles are learned exclusively from amateur soccer players during a competitive microcycle. Synthetic data augmentation evaluates robustness and scalability. Ward hierarchical clustering supports monitoring and etiological differentiation, while Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM) enable structural stability analysis in high-dimensional settings. Results. The framework identifies coherent profiles that distinguish mechanical damage from metabolic stress while preserving homeostatic states. Synthetic data augmentation demonstrates feasibility and detection of latent silent risk phenotypes typically missed by univariate monitoring. Structural analyses indicate robustness under augmentation and higher-dimensional settings. Conclusion. The framework enables interpretable identification of latent physiological states from multivariate biomarker data without injury labels. By distinguishing mechanisms and revealing silent risk patterns not captured by conventional monitoring, it provides actionable insights for individualized athlete monitoring and decision making.

</details>


### [612] [CSRA: Controlled Spectral Residual Augmentation for Robust Sepsis Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14532)
*Honglin Guo,Rihao Chang,He Jiao,Weizhi Nie,Zhongheng Zhang,Yuehao Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CSRA：一种用于ICU短窗口多系统时间序列的受控谱残差增强框架，通过谱域输入自适应残差扰动生成结构化临床合理轨迹变化，提升脓毒症短期预测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脓毒症未来风险和疾病进展的准确预测对ICU早期预警和及时干预至关重要。短窗口预测面临挑战：较短观察窗口提供有限历史证据，而较长预测时域减少具有有效未来监督的患者轨迹数量。

Method: CSRA框架首先按临床系统分组变量，提取系统级和全局表示；然后在谱域执行输入自适应残差扰动，生成结构化且临床合理的轨迹变化；通过锚点一致性损失和控制器正则化，与下游预测器端到端训练，实现增强稳定性和可控性。

Result: 在MIMIC-IV脓毒症队列实验中，CSRA相比无增强基线在回归任务上减少MSE误差10.2%、MAE误差3.7%，分类任务也获得一致提升。在更短观察窗口、更长预测时域和更小训练数据规模下保持更优性能，在外部临床数据集(ZiGongICUinfection)上同样有效。

Conclusion: CSRA框架通过受控谱残差增强有效解决了ICU短窗口时间序列预测的数据稀缺问题，在临床约束环境下展现出更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为脓毒症早期预警提供了有效的技术方案。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of future risk and disease progression in sepsis is clinically important for early warning and timely intervention in intensive care. However, short-window sepsis prediction remains challenging, because shorter observation windows provide limited historical evidence, whereas longer prediction horizons reduce the number of patient trajectories with valid future supervision. To address this problem, we propose CSRA, a Controlled Spectral Residual Augmentation framework for short-window multi-system ICU time series. CSRA first groups variables by clinical systems and extracts system-level and global representations. It then performs input-adaptive residual perturbation in the spectral domain to generate structured and clinically plausible trajectory variations. To improve augmentation stability and controllability, CSRA is trained end-to-end with the downstream predictor under a unified objective, together with anchor consistency loss and controller regularization. Experiments on a MIMIC-IV sepsis cohort across multiple downstream models show that CSRA is consistently competitive and often superior, reducing regression error by 10.2\% in MSE and 3.7\% in MAE over the non-augmentation baseline, while also yielding consistent gains on classification. CSRA further maintains more favorable performance under shorter observation windows, longer prediction horizons, and smaller training data scales, while also remaining effective on an external clinical dataset~(ZiGongICUinfection), indicating stronger robustness and generalizability in clinically constrained settings.

</details>


### [613] [Scouting By Reward: VLM-TO-IRL-Driven Player Selection For Esports](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14474)
*Qing Yan,Wenyu Yang,Yufei Wang,Wenhao Ma,Linchong Hu,Yifei Jin,Anton Dahbura*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 将电竞选手选拔重构为逆强化学习问题，通过模仿学习捕捉职业选手的独特风格特征，实现基于奖励函数的风格化选手评估


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统电竞选手选拔依赖人工视频分析和聚合性能指标，难以捕捉决定选手是否符合特定战术原型的细微决策模式，需要更精准的风格化评估方法

Method: 提出新颖的选手选择框架，采用多模态双分支架构：一支编码从高分辨率游戏遥测数据提取的结构化状态-动作轨迹，另一支编码从广播画面通过视觉语言模型生成的时序对齐战术伪解说；通过生成对抗模仿学习目标融合这些表示，判别器学习捕捉精英职业选手独特的机械和战术特征

Result: 该框架实现了从通用技能评估到"基于奖励"的选拔转变，提供了可扩展的工作流感知数字孪生系统，支持数据驱动的阵容构建和大规模候选池的定向人才发现

Conclusion: 通过将风格化选手评估重构为逆强化学习问题，该框架能够学习职业选手特定的奖励函数，使组织能够根据候选人与目标明星选手的风格匹配度进行排名，解决了传统选拔方法的局限性

Abstract: Traditional esports scouting workflows rely heavily on manual video review and aggregate performance metrics, which often fail to capture the nuanced decision-making patterns necessary to determine if a prospect fits a specific tactical archetype. To address this, we reframe style-based player evaluation in esports as an Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) problem. In this paper, we introduce a novel player selection framework that learns professional-specific reward functions from logged gameplay demonstrations, allowing organizations to rank candidates by their stylistic alignment with a target star player. Our proposed architecture utilizes a multimodal, two-branch intake: one branch encodes structured state-action trajectories derived from high-resolution in-game telemetry, while the second encodes temporally aligned tactical pseudo-commentary generated by Vision-Language Models (VLMs) from broadcast footage. These representations are fused and evaluated via a Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) objective, where a discriminator learns to capture the unique mechanical and tactical signatures of elite professionals. By transitioning from generic skill estimation to scouting "by reward," this framework provides a scalable, workflow-aware digital twin system that enables data-driven roster construction and targeted talent discovery across massive candidate pools.

</details>


### [614] [Auxiliary Finite-Difference Residual-Gradient Regularization for PINNs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14472)
*Stavros Kassinos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种混合PINN设计，其中PDE残差保持自动微分(AD)基础，而有限差分(FD)仅出现在惩罚采样残差场梯度的弱辅助项中，用于正则化残差场而不替换PDE残差本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINN通常使用单一标量损失函数，即使关注的具体物理量更为特定。研究旨在探索一种混合设计，通过有限差分正则化残差场梯度来改善PINN性能，特别是在关注特定物理量（如边界通量）时。

Method: 采用两阶段实验设计：第一阶段在受控泊松基准测试中比较基线PINN、FD残差梯度正则器和匹配的AD残差梯度基线；第二阶段将相同逻辑应用于三维环形热传导基准测试(PINN3D)，在波浪形外壁附近实现体拟合壳层辅助网格。

Result: 在Stage 1中，FD正则器再现了残差梯度控制的主要效果，同时揭示了场精度与残差清洁度之间的权衡。在Stage 2中，壳层正则器改善了应用面向的物理量，特别是外壁通量和边界条件行为。在种子0-5和100k轮次下，最可靠的配置是固定壳层权重5e-4配合Kourkoutas-beta优化器，相比无壳层项的运行，将平均外壁BC RMSE从1.22e-2降低到9.29e-4，平均壁通量RMSE从9.21e-3降低到9.63e-4。

Conclusion: 研究支持混合PINN的针对性观点：当辅助FD正则器与关注的物理量（如外壁通量）对齐时最为有效。该方法通过有限差分正则化残差场梯度，在不替换PDE残差本身的情况下改善了特定物理量的预测精度。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are often selected by a single scalar loss even when the quantity of interest is more specific. We study a hybrid design in which the governing PDE residual remains automatic-differentiation (AD) based, while finite differences (FD) appear only in a weak auxiliary term that penalizes gradients of the sampled residual field. The FD term regularizes the residual field without replacing the PDE residual itself.
  We examine this idea in two stages. Stage 1 is a controlled Poisson benchmark comparing a baseline PINN, the FD residual-gradient regularizer, and a matched AD residual-gradient baseline. Stage 2 transfers the same logic to a three-dimensional annular heat-conduction benchmark (PINN3D), where baseline errors concentrate near a wavy outer wall and the auxiliary grid is implemented as a body-fitted shell adjacent to the wall.
  In Stage 1, the FD regularizer reproduces the main effect of residual-gradient control while exposing a trade-off between field accuracy and residual cleanliness. In Stage 2, the shell regularizer improves the application-facing quantities, namely outer-wall flux and boundary-condition behavior. Across seeds 0-5 and 100k epochs, the most reliable tested configuration is a fixed shell weight of 5e-4 under the Kourkoutas-beta optimizer regime: relative to a matched run without the shell term, it reduces the mean outer-wall BC RMSE from 1.22e-2 to 9.29e-4 and the mean wall-flux RMSE from 9.21e-3 to 9.63e-4. Adam with beta2=0.999 becomes usable when the initial learning rate is reduced to 1e-3, although its shell benefit is less robust than under Kourkoutas-beta. Overall, the results support a targeted view of hybrid PINNs: an auxiliary-only FD regularizer is most valuable when it is aligned with the physical quantity of interest, here the outer-wall flux.

</details>


### [615] [ASTER: Latent Pseudo-Anomaly Generation for Unsupervised Time-Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13924)
*Romain Hermary,Samet Hicsonmez,Dan Pineau,Abd El Rahman Shabayek,Djamila Aouada*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ASTER框架通过潜在空间生成伪异常数据，结合预训练LLM增强时序表示，在无监督时间序列异常检测中实现SOTA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列异常检测面临异常罕见、异质性强且标注数据稀缺的挑战。现有无监督方法依赖重构或预测，难以处理复杂数据；基于嵌入的方法需要领域特定的异常合成和固定距离度量。

Method: 提出ASTER框架：1) 在潜在空间直接生成伪异常，避免手工异常注入和领域专业知识需求；2) 使用潜在空间解码器生成定制化伪异常训练Transformer异常分类器；3) 利用预训练LLM增强潜在空间的时序和上下文表示。

Result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，ASTER实现了最先进的性能，为基于LLM的时间序列异常检测设立了新标准。

Conclusion: ASTER通过潜在空间伪异常生成和LLM增强表示，有效解决了时间序列异常检测中数据稀缺和复杂模式识别的挑战，为无监督异常检测提供了新方向。

Abstract: Time-series anomaly detection (TSAD) is critical in domains such as industrial monitoring, healthcare, and cybersecurity, but it remains challenging due to rare and heterogeneous anomalies and the scarcity of labelled data. This scarcity makes unsupervised approaches predominant, yet existing methods often rely on reconstruction or forecasting, which struggle with complex data, or on embedding-based approaches that require domain-specific anomaly synthesis and fixed distance metrics. We propose ASTER, a framework that generates pseudo-anomalies directly in the latent space, avoiding handcrafted anomaly injections and the need for domain expertise. A latent-space decoder produces tailored pseudo-anomalies to train a Transformer-based anomaly classifier, while a pre-trained LLM enriches the temporal and contextual representations of this space. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that ASTER achieves state-of-the-art performance and sets a new standard for LLM-based TSAD.

</details>


### [616] [Solving Physics Olympiad via Reinforcement Learning on Physics Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11805)
*Mihir Prabhudesai,Aryan Satpathy,Yangmin Li,Zheyang Qin,Nikash Bhardwaj,Amir Zadeh,Chuan Li,Katerina Fragkiadaki,Deepak Pathak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 使用物理模拟器生成合成数据训练LLM进行物理推理，实现零样本模拟到真实迁移


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM推理能力的进步主要依赖互联网问答对数据，但这些数据规模有限且主要集中在数学等领域，物理等科学领域缺乏大规模问答数据集来有效训练具备推理能力的模型

Method: 在物理引擎中生成随机场景，从模拟交互中创建合成问答对，使用强化学习在合成数据上训练LLM

Result: 模型展现出零样本模拟到真实迁移能力：仅使用合成模拟数据训练，在IPhO（国际物理奥林匹克）问题上性能提升5-10个百分点，不同模型规模均有效

Conclusion: 物理模拟器可以作为可扩展的数据生成器，使LLM能够获得超越互联网规模问答数据限制的深度物理推理技能

Abstract: We have witnessed remarkable advances in LLM reasoning capabilities with the advent of DeepSeek-R1. However, much of this progress has been fueled by the abundance of internet question-answer (QA) pairs, a major bottleneck going forward, since such data is limited in scale and concentrated mainly in domains like mathematics. In contrast, other sciences such as physics lack large-scale QA datasets to effectively train reasoning-capable models. In this work, we show that physics simulators can serve as a powerful alternative source of supervision for training LLMs for physical reasoning. We generate random scenes in physics engines, create synthetic question-answer pairs from simulated interactions, and train LLMs using reinforcement learning on this synthetic data. Our models exhibit zero-shot sim-to-real transfer to real-world physics benchmarks: for example, training solely on synthetic simulated data improves performance on IPhO (International Physics Olympiad) problems by 5-10 percentage points across model sizes. These results demonstrate that physics simulators can act as scalable data generators, enabling LLMs to acquire deep physical reasoning skills beyond the limitations of internet-scale QA data. Code available at: https://sim2reason.github.io/.

</details>


### [617] [Tight Sample Complexity Bounds for Best-Arm Identification Under Bounded Systematic Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14345)
*Tianhao Qian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种在存在系统性评估偏差的情况下，为自主推理和具身规划中的节点扩展提供形式化安全保证的方法，通过将节点扩展过程建模为局部最佳臂识别问题，并建立了基于偏差界限的安全节点消除条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自主推理和具身规划中搜索深度的增加，候选动作空间呈指数级扩展，严重消耗计算资源。虽然启发式剪枝是常见的对策，但当替代模型（如LLMs）存在系统性评估偏差时，这种方法缺乏形式化的安全保证。需要一种能够提供安全保证的节点扩展方法。

Method: 将节点扩展过程建模为局部最佳臂识别（BAI）问题，考虑动态边界和系统性偏差界限L。通过反演Lambert W函数，建立了加法样本复杂度O((Δ-4L)^{-2})，表明只有当经验奖励差距超过4L时才能安全地消除节点。同时提供了信息论下界Ω((Δ-2L)^{-2})来确认偏差搜索的结构限制。

Result: 在合成树和复杂推理任务上的评估表明，遵守这种局部安全边界能够成功保留最优轨迹，同时最大化样本分配效率。该方法在存在系统性偏差的情况下提供了形式化的安全保证。

Conclusion: 该研究为存在系统性评估偏差的搜索过程提供了形式化的安全保证框架，通过将节点扩展建模为局部BAI问题并建立偏差界限条件，实现了安全节点消除和高效样本分配，对自主推理和具身规划领域具有重要意义。

Abstract: As search depth increases in autonomous reasoning and embodied planning, the candidate action space expands exponentially, heavily taxing computational budgets. While heuristic pruning is a common countermeasure, it operates without formal safety guarantees when surrogate models (like LLMs) exhibit systematic evaluation biases. This paper frames the node expansion process as a localized Best-Arm Identification (BAI) problem over dynamic frontiers, subject to a bounded systematic bias $L$. By inverting the Lambert W function, we establish an additive sample complexity of $\mathcal{O}((Δ-4L)^{-2})$, which indicates that safe node elimination is only feasible when the empirical reward gap exceeds $4L$. We complement this with an information-theoretic lower bound of $Ω((Δ-2L)^{-2})$ to confirm the structural limits of biased search. Subsequent evaluations on both synthetic trees and complex reasoning tasks demonstrate that adhering to this local safety boundary successfully preserves optimal trajectories while maximizing sample allocation efficiency.

</details>


### [618] [Path-Sampled Integrated Gradients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14338)
*Firuz Kamalov,Fadi Thabtah,R. Sivaraj,Neda Abdelhamid*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出路径采样积分梯度（PS-IG）框架，通过沿线性插值路径采样基线计算期望值来泛化特征归因，证明其与路径加权积分梯度数学等价，将误差收敛率从O(m^{-1/2})提升到O(m^{-1})，并作为梯度噪声的方差减少滤波器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有特征归因方法存在计算效率和噪声敏感性问题，需要一种既能保持理论性质又能提高数值稳定性和收敛速度的归因框架。

Method: 提出路径采样积分梯度（PS-IG）框架：1）沿线性插值路径采样基线计算期望值；2）证明当权重函数匹配采样密度的累积分布函数时，PS-IG与路径加权积分梯度数学等价；3）通过确定性黎曼和计算随机期望，将蒙特卡洛采样转化为确定性积分。

Result: 1）误差收敛率从O(m^{-1/2})提升到O(m^{-1})；2）在均匀采样下严格降低归因方差1/3；3）保持线性、实现不变性等关键公理性质；4）作为梯度噪声的方差减少滤波器。

Conclusion: PS-IG框架通过路径采样方法统一了随机和确定性归因计算，显著提高了数值精度和稳定性，同时保持了理论完备性，为特征归因提供了更高效可靠的数学基础。

Abstract: We introduce path-sampled integrated gradients (PS-IG), a framework that generalizes feature attribution by computing the expected value over baselines sampled along the linear interpolation path. We prove that PS-IG is mathematically equivalent to path-weighted integrated gradients, provided the weighting function matches the cumulative distribution function of the sampling density. This equivalence allows the stochastic expectation to be evaluated via a deterministic Riemann sum, improving the error convergence rate from $O(m^{-1/2})$ to $O(m^{-1})$ for smooth models. Furthermore, we demonstrate analytically that PS-IG functions as a variance-reducing filter against gradient noise - strictly lowering attribution variance by a factor of 1/3 under uniform sampling - while preserving key axiomatic properties such as linearity and implementation invariance.

</details>


### [619] [When Missing Becomes Structure: Intent-Preserving Policy Completion from Financial KOL Discourse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14333)
*Yuncong Liu,Yuan Wan,Zhou Jiang,Yao Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出KICL框架，将社交媒体KOL言论视为部分交易策略，使用离线强化学习补全缺失的执行决策，在YouTube和X平台实现最佳收益和夏普比率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交媒体KOL言论被广泛用作投资指导，但将其转化为可执行的交易策略而不对未指定的执行决策注入假设仍是一个开放问题。KOL陈述中的空白并非随机缺陷，而是结构化分离：KOL表达方向意图（买/卖什么及原因），而将执行决策（何时、多少、多久）系统性地留白。

Method: 提出意图保持策略补全框架，将KOL言论视为部分交易策略，使用离线强化学习围绕KOL表达的意图补全缺失的执行决策。在YouTube和X平台的多模态KOL言论数据集（2022-2025）上进行实验。

Result: KICL在两个平台上均实现最佳收益和夏普比率，同时保持零无支持入场和零方向反转。消融实验确认完整框架相比KOL对齐基线带来18.9%的收益提升。

Conclusion: 该研究证明KOL言论中的结构化空白可以通过强化学习方法有效补全，将KOL意图转化为完整交易策略，为社交媒体投资指导的实际应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Key Opinion Leader (KOL) discourse on social media is widely consumed as investment guidance, yet turning it into executable trading strategies without injecting assumptions about unspecified execution decisions remains an open problem. We observe that the gaps in KOL statements are not random deficiencies but a structured separation: KOLs express directional intent (what to buy or sell and why) while leaving execution decisions (when, how much, how long) systematically unspecified. Building on this observation, we propose an intent-preserving policy completion framework that treats KOL discourse as a partial trading policy and uses offline reinforcement learning to complete the missing execution decisions around the KOL-expressed intent. Experiments on multimodal KOL discourse from YouTube and X (2022-2025) show that KICL achieves the best return and Sharpe ratio on both platforms while maintaining zero unsupported entries and zero directional reversals, and ablations confirm that the full framework yields an 18.9% return improvement over the KOL-aligned baseline.

</details>


### [620] [Heat and Matérn Kernels on Matchings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14331)
*Dmitry Eremeev,Salem Said,Viacheslav Borovitskiy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个几何核框架用于匹配空间，引入平稳核概念，聚焦热核和Matérn核，开发高效算法，并探索向系统发育树空间的扩展


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于匹配具有离散、非欧几里得的特性，将核方法应用于匹配具有挑战性。需要构建尊重匹配空间自然几何结构的几何核框架。

Method: 1. 完全刻画平稳核（尊重空间固有对称性的核）；2. 聚焦热核和Matérn核家族，为平稳性添加平滑性归纳偏置；3. 开发基于zonal多项式的新型次指数算法进行高效核评估；4. 探索框架向系统发育树空间的扩展。

Result: 成功将广泛使用的欧几里得核扩展到匹配空间，但朴素评估具有超指数计算成本。提出的zonal多项式算法实现了次指数复杂度。在向树空间扩展方面建立了新的负面结果，并识别出重要的开放问题。

Conclusion: 提出了一个尊重匹配空间几何结构的几何核框架，解决了核评估的计算挑战，并探索了向系统发育树空间的扩展，为这一重要生物学数据模态的分析开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Applying kernel methods to matchings is challenging due to their discrete, non-Euclidean nature. In this paper, we develop a principled framework for constructing geometric kernels that respect the natural geometry of the space of matchings. To this end, we first provide a complete characterization of stationary kernels, i.e. kernels that respect the inherent symmetries of this space. Because the class of stationary kernels is too broad, we specifically focus on the heat and Matérn kernel families, adding an appropriate inductive bias of smoothness to stationarity. While these families successfully extend widely popular Euclidean kernels to matchings, evaluating them naively incurs a prohibitive super-exponential computational cost. To overcome this difficulty, we introduce and analyze a novel, sub-exponential algorithm leveraging zonal polynomials for efficient kernel evaluation. Finally, motivated by the known bijective correspondence between matchings and phylogenetic trees-a crucial data modality in biology-we explore whether our framework can be seamlessly transferred to the space of trees, establishing novel negative results and identifying a significant open problem.

</details>


### [621] [From $P(y|x)$ to $P(y)$: Investigating Reinforcement Learning in Pre-train Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14142)
*Yuqiao Tan,Minzheng Wang,Bo Liu,Zichen Liu,Tian Liang,Shizhu He,Jun Zhao,Kang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PreRL方法，在预训练空间直接优化边际分布P(y)，通过负样本强化(NSR)机制有效驱动推理能力，并发展出双空间强化学习(DSRL)策略，实现推理能力的显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RLVR方法受限于基础模型的输出分布，仅优化条件分布P(y|x)存在瓶颈。预训练空间优化边际分布P(y)能编码推理能力并保持广泛探索能力，但传统预训练依赖静态语料库导致分布偏移，阻碍目标推理增强。

Method: 提出PreRL方法，在预训练空间直接应用奖励驱动的在线更新优化P(y)。理论证明log P(y)与log P(y|x)的梯度对齐，建立PreRL作为标准RL的可行替代。发现NSR机制在PreRL中作为推理的有效驱动力，通过负样本强化快速修剪错误推理空间并激发内生反思行为。最终提出DSRL策略，先用NSR-PreRL初始化模型扩展推理视野，再转向标准RL进行细粒度优化。

Result: NSR-PreRL显著增加转换思维和反思思维（分别14.89倍和6.54倍）。DSRL在广泛实验中一致优于强基线，证明预训练空间修剪能有效引导策略进入精炼的正确推理子空间。

Conclusion: 预训练空间强化学习通过优化边际分布P(y)突破了传统RLVR的瓶颈，NSR机制作为有效推理驱动力，DSRL策略实现了推理能力的显著提升，为LLM推理优化提供了新范式。

Abstract: While reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) significantly enhances LLM reasoning by optimizing the conditional distribution P(y|x), its potential is fundamentally bounded by the base model's existing output distribution. Optimizing the marginal distribution P(y) in the Pre-train Space addresses this bottleneck by encoding reasoning ability and preserving broad exploration capacity. Yet, conventional pre-training relies on static corpora for passive learning, leading to a distribution shift that hinders targeted reasoning enhancement. In this paper, we introduce PreRL (Pre-train Space RL), which applies reward-driven online updates directly to P(y). We theoretically and empirically validate the strong gradient alignment between log P(y) and log P(y|x), establishing PreRL as a viable surrogate for standard RL. Furthermore, we uncover a critical mechanism: Negative Sample Reinforcement (NSR) within PreRL serves as an exceptionally effective driver for reasoning. NSR-PreRL rapidly prunes incorrect reasoning spaces while stimulating endogenous reflective behaviors, increasing transition and reflection thoughts by 14.89x and 6.54x, respectively. Leveraging these insights, we propose Dual Space RL (DSRL), a Policy Reincarnation strategy that initializes models with NSR-PreRL to expand the reasoning horizon before transitioning to standard RL for fine-grained optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DSRL consistently outperforms strong baselines, proving that pre-train space pruning effectively steers the policy toward a refined correct reasoning subspace.

</details>


### [622] [LongCoT: Benchmarking Long-Horizon Chain-of-Thought Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14140)
*Sumeet Ramesh Motwani,Daniel Nichols,Charles London,Peggy Li,Fabio Pizzati,Acer Blake,Hasan Hammoud,Tavish McDonald,Akshat Naik,Alesia Ivanova,Vignesh Baskaran,Ivan Laptev,Ruben Glatt,Tal Ben-Nun,Philip Torr,Natasha Jaques,Ameya Prabhu,Brian Bartoldson,Bhavya Kailkhura,Christian Schroeder de Witt*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LongCoT是一个包含2500个专家设计问题的可扩展基准测试，用于直接测量前沿模型的长链思维推理能力，覆盖化学、数学、计算机科学、国际象棋和逻辑等领域，当前最佳模型准确率低于10%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着语言模型被部署用于复杂自主任务，其在长时域上的准确推理能力变得至关重要。当前需要直接测量模型在长链思维推理方面的能力，而现有基准测试未能充分评估这种长时域推理能力。

Method: 引入LongCoT基准测试，包含2,500个专家设计的问题，这些问题需要导航由相互依赖步骤组成的图结构，每个步骤单独对前沿模型来说是可处理的，但整体需要数十万推理令牌的长时域推理。问题涵盖化学、数学、计算机科学、国际象棋和逻辑等多个领域。

Result: 在发布时，最佳模型在LongCoT上的准确率低于10%（GPT 5.2：9.8%；Gemini 3 Pro：6.1%），显示出当前模型在长时域推理能力方面存在显著差距。

Conclusion: LongCoT提供了一个严格的长时域推理能力测量工具，能够追踪前沿模型在扩展时间范围内进行可靠推理的能力，揭示了当前模型在这方面的局限性。

Abstract: As language models are increasingly deployed for complex autonomous tasks, their ability to reason accurately over longer horizons becomes critical. An essential component of this ability is planning and managing a long, complex chain-of-thought (CoT). We introduce LongCoT, a scalable benchmark of 2,500 expert-designed problems spanning chemistry, mathematics, computer science, chess, and logic to isolate and directly measure the long-horizon CoT reasoning capabilities of frontier models. Problems consist of a short input with a verifiable answer; solving them requires navigating a graph of interdependent steps that span tens to hundreds of thousands of reasoning tokens. Each local step is individually tractable for frontier models, so failures reflect long-horizon reasoning limitations. At release, the best models achieve <10% accuracy (GPT 5.2: 9.8%; Gemini 3 Pro: 6.1%) on LongCoT, revealing a substantial gap in current capabilities. Overall, LongCoT provides a rigorous measure of long-horizon reasoning, tracking the ability of frontier models to reason reliably over extended periods.

</details>


### [623] [Complex Interpolation of Matrices with an application to Multi-Manifold Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14118)
*Adi Arbel,Stefan Steinerberger,Ronen Talmon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究两个对称正定矩阵A和B的插值A^{1-x}B^x的谱性质，探讨矩阵间"共同结构"的存在性及其在多流形学习中的应用


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究对称正定矩阵插值的谱性质，旨在通过数学分析揭示矩阵间共同特征结构的存在性，为多视图数据中的共同和不同潜在结构识别提供理论基础

Method: 分析插值矩阵A^{1-x}B^x的谱性质，建立算子范数对数线性与共享特征向量存在的等价关系，推导稳定性边界，并将理论应用于多流形学习框架

Result: 发现算子范数精确对数线性等价于原始矩阵存在共享特征向量；近似对数线性迫使主奇异向量与两个矩阵的主特征向量对齐；这些结果为多流形学习提供了理论依据

Conclusion: 矩阵插值分析为识别多视图数据中的共同和不同潜在结构提供了严格的数学框架和理论支撑，建立了谱性质与结构相似性之间的深刻联系

Abstract: Given two symmetric positive-definite matrices $A, B \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times n}$, we study the spectral properties of the interpolation $A^{1-x} B^x$ for $0 \leq x \leq 1$. The presence of `common structures' in $A$ and $B$, eigenvectors pointing in a similar direction, can be investigated using this interpolation perspective. Generically, exact log-linearity of the operator norm $\|A^{1-x} B^x\|$ is equivalent to the existence of a shared eigenvector in the original matrices; stability bounds show that approximate log-linearity forces principal singular vectors to align with leading eigenvectors of both matrices. These results give rise to and provide theoretical justification for a multi-manifold learning framework that identifies common and distinct latent structures in multiview data.

</details>


### [624] [Momentum Further Constrains Sharpness at the Edge of Stochastic Stability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14108)
*Arseniy Andreyev,Advikar Ananthkumar,Marc Walden,Tomaso Poggio,Pierfrancesco Beneventano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SGD with momentum exhibits batch-size-dependent stability regimes: small batches favor flatter regions due to momentum amplifying noise, while large batches favor sharper regions with classical momentum stabilization.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动量SGD和mini-batch梯度是否在可比较的不稳定性机制中运行，理解动量如何影响优化过程和找到的解。

Method: 分析SGD with momentum在随机稳定性边界（EoSS-like）的行为，研究batch size对batch sharpness（期望方向性mini-batch曲率）的影响，推导稳定性阈值公式。

Result: 发现batch sharpness在两个不同机制中稳定：小batch时收敛到较低平台2(1-β)/η，动量放大随机波动，偏好平坦区域；大batch时收敛到较高平台2(1+β)/η，动量恢复经典稳定效应，偏好尖锐区域。

Conclusion: 动量SGD表现出batch-size依赖的稳定性机制，这解释了动量在小batch和大batch下的不同行为，对超参数调优和耦合有重要启示。

Abstract: Recent work suggests that (stochastic) gradient descent self-organizes near an instability boundary, shaping both optimization and the solutions found. Momentum and mini-batch gradients are widely used in practical deep learning optimization, but it remains unclear whether they operate in a comparable regime of instability. We demonstrate that SGD with momentum exhibits an Edge of Stochastic Stability (EoSS)-like regime with batch-size-dependent behavior that cannot be explained by a single momentum-adjusted stability threshold. Batch Sharpness (the expected directional mini-batch curvature) stabilizes in two distinct regimes: at small batch sizes it converges to a lower plateau $2(1-β)/η$, reflecting amplification of stochastic fluctuations by momentum and favoring flatter regions than vanilla SGD; at large batch sizes it converges to a higher plateau $2(1+β)/η$, where momentum recovers its classical stabilizing effect and favors sharper regions consistent with full-batch dynamics. We further show that this aligns with linear stability thresholds and discuss the implications for hyperparameter tuning and coupling.

</details>


### [625] [Reinforcement Learning via Value Gradient Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14265)
*Haoran Xu,Kaiwen Hu,Somayeh Sojoudi,Amy Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Value Gradient Flow (VGF)，一种用于行为正则化强化学习的新范式，通过最优传输问题将参考分布映射到价值诱导的最优策略分布，解决了现有方法的可扩展性和保守性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 行为正则化强化学习中，现有方法存在局限性：基于重参数化策略梯度的方法难以扩展到大型生成模型，而拒绝采样方法在试图超越行为支持时可能过于保守。需要一种既能有效防止价值过优化，又具有良好可扩展性的新方法。

Method: 将行为正则化强化学习建模为最优传输问题，将参考分布映射到价值诱导的最优策略分布。通过离散梯度流求解该传输问题，其中价值梯度引导从参考分布初始化的粒子。VGF通过控制传输预算隐式施加正则化，无需显式策略参数化。

Result: 在离线RL基准测试（D4RL, OGBench）和LLM RL任务上，VGF显著优于现有方法，取得了最先进的结果。方法支持通过调整传输预算实现自适应测试时缩放。

Conclusion: VGF为行为正则化强化学习提供了一个可扩展、表达力强且灵活的新范式，通过最优传输框架有效解决了价值过优化问题，在多个任务上表现出优越性能。

Abstract: We study behavior-regularized reinforcement learning (RL), where regularization toward a reference distribution (the dataset in offline RL or the base model in LLM RL finetuning) is essential to prevent value over-optimization caused by erroneous out-of-distribution extrapolation. Existing methods either rely on reparameterized policy gradient, which are difficult to scale to large generative models, or on reject sampling, which can be overly conservative when attempting to move beyond the behavior support. In this paper, we propose Value Gradient Flow (VGF), a scalable new paradigm for behavior-regularized RL. VGF casts behavior-regularized RL as an optimal transport problem that maps the reference distribution to the value-induced optimal policy distribution. We solve this transport problem via discrete gradient flow, where value gradients guide particles initialized from the reference distribution. Our analysis shows that VGF imposes regularization implicitly by controlling the transport budget. VGF eliminates explicit policy parameterization while remaining expressive and flexible, this enables adaptive test-time scaling by adjusting the transport budget. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VGF significantly outperforms prior methods, achieving state-of-the-art results on offline RL benchmarks (D4RL, OGBench) and LLM RL tasks. Code and runs can be found at https://ryanxhr.github.io/vgf.

</details>


### [626] [Neural architectures for resolving references in program code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14073)
*Gergő Szalay,Gergely Zsolt Kovács,Sándor Teleki,Balázs Pintér,Tibor Gregorics*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文针对程序语言中的引用重写问题，提出了新的序列到序列架构，在直接和间接索引排列任务上显著优于基线模型，并将模型应用于反编译switch语句的实际任务中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受实际反编译任务的启发，将引用重写问题抽象为直接和间接索引排列问题，现有序列到序列机器学习架构在这些任务上表现不佳。

Method: 为直接和间接索引排列问题创建合成基准测试，并引入新的序列到序列架构来解决这些问题。

Result: 新架构在鲁棒性和可扩展性上均优于基线：能处理比最佳基线长十倍的示例；在反编译switch语句的实际任务中，扩展模型将错误率降低了42%。

Conclusion: 提出的新序列到序列架构在索引排列任务上表现出色，所有组件都经过消融研究验证为必要，在真实世界反编译任务中显著提升了性能。

Abstract: Resolving and rewriting references is fundamental in programming languages. Motivated by a real-world decompilation task, we abstract reference rewriting into the problems of direct and indirect indexing by permutation. We create synthetic benchmarks for these tasks and show that well-known sequence-to-sequence machine learning architectures are struggling on these benchmarks. We introduce new sequence-to-sequence architectures for both problems. Our measurements show that our architectures outperform the baselines in both robustness and scalability: our models can handle examples that are ten times longer compared to the best baseline. We measure the impact of our architecture in the real-world task of decompiling switch statements, which has an indexing subtask. According to our measurements, the extended model decreases the error rate by 42%. Multiple ablation studies show that all components of our architectures are essential.

</details>


### [627] [GUI-Perturbed: Domain Randomization Reveals Systematic Brittleness in GUI Grounding Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14262)
*Yangyue Wang,Harshvardhan Sikka,Yash Mathur,Tony Zhou,Jinu Nyachhyon,Pranav Guruprasad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GUI-Perturbed框架通过独立扰动视觉场景和指令来评估GUI grounding模型的鲁棒性，发现现有模型在空间推理任务上表现显著下降，而当前基准测试无法检测这一问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GUI grounding模型在标准基准测试中报告超过85%的准确率，但当指令需要空间推理而非直接元素命名时，性能下降27-56个百分点。当前基准测试无法检测这一问题，因为它们每个截图只使用单一固定指令进行评估。

Method: 引入GUI-Perturbed框架，这是一个受控扰动框架，独立变化视觉场景和指令来测量grounding鲁棒性。评估了来自同一架构谱系的三个7B模型，通过独立扰动轴来隔离哪些具体能力轴受到影响。

Result: 关系性指令导致所有模型的系统性准确率崩溃；70%浏览器缩放产生统计显著性能下降；使用增强数据的rank-8 LoRA微调反而降低了性能而非改善。通过独立扰动轴，GUI-Perturbed能够隔离空间推理、视觉鲁棒性、推理校准等具体能力轴的影响。

Conclusion: GUI-Perturbed提供了聚合基准测试无法提供的诊断信号，揭示了现有GUI grounding模型在空间推理和视觉鲁棒性方面的系统性弱点。作者发布了数据集、增强流水线和一个微调模型。

Abstract: GUI grounding models report over 85% accuracy on standard benchmarks, yet drop 27-56 percentage points when instructions require spatial reasoning rather than direct element naming. Current benchmarks miss this because they evaluate each screenshot once with a single fixed instruction. We introduce GUI-Perturbed, a controlled perturbation framework that independently varies visual scenes and instructions to measure grounding robustness. Evaluating three 7B models from the same architecture lineage, we find that relational instructions cause systematic accuracy collapse across all models, a 70% browser zoom produces statistically significant degradation, and rank-8 LoRA fine-tuning with augmented data degrades performance rather than improving it. By perturbing along independent axes, GUI-Perturbed isolates which specific capability axes are affected-spatial reasoning, visual robustness, reasoning calibration-providing diagnostic signal that aggregate benchmarks cannot. We release the dataset, augmentation pipeline, and a fine-tuned model.

</details>


### [628] [MAny: Merge Anything for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14016)
*Zijian Gao,Wangwang Jia,Xingxing Zhang,Pengfei Qian,Tao Sun,Bo Ding,Yong Dou,Huaimin Wang,Kele Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MAny框架通过跨模态投影合并(CPM)和低秩参数合并(LPM)解决多模态持续指令调优中的双重遗忘问题，无需额外训练即可实现任务知识融合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态持续指令调优(MCIT)在多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)的顺序任务适应中至关重要，但受到灾难性遗忘的严重限制。现有研究主要关注推理语言主干，而本文揭示了跨模态投影空间中的感知漂移和低秩参数空间中的推理崩溃这一被忽视的双重遗忘现象。

Method: 提出MAny框架，包含两个核心组件：1) CPM通过视觉原型指导自适应合并跨模态视觉表示，恢复感知对齐；2) LPM通过递归合并低秩权重矩阵消除任务特定低秩模块间的相互干扰，利用递归最小二乘法提供保证最优融合轨迹的闭式解。该框架作为免训练范式，仅通过CPU代数运算实现知识融合。

Result: 在UCIT基准测试中，MAny在两个不同MLLMs上分别比最先进方法在最终平均准确率上领先高达8.57%和2.85%。广泛的评估证实了MAny在多个MLLMs和基准测试上的优越性能和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: MAny框架有效解决了多模态持续指令调优中的双重遗忘问题，通过跨模态投影合并和低秩参数合并实现了感知对齐恢复和推理稳定性，且作为免训练范式具有高效性和实用性。

Abstract: Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) is essential for sequential task adaptation of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) but is severely restricted by catastrophic forgetting. While existing literature focuses on the reasoning language backbone, in this work, we expose a critical yet neglected dual-forgetting phenomenon across both perception drift in Cross-modal Projection Space and reasoning collapse in Low-rank Parameter Space. To resolve this, we present \textbf{MAny} (\textbf{M}erge \textbf{Any}thing), a framework that merges task-specific knowledge through \textbf{C}ross-modal \textbf{P}rojection \textbf{M}erging (\textbf{CPM}) and \textbf{L}ow-rank \textbf{P}arameter \textbf{M}erging (\textbf{LPM}). Specifically, CPM recovers perceptual alignment by adaptively merging cross-modal visual representations via visual-prototype guidance, ensuring accurate feature recovery during inference. Simultaneously, LPM eliminates mutual interference among task-specific low-rank modules by recursively merging low-rank weight matrices. By leveraging recursive least squares, LPM provides a closed-form solution that mathematically guarantees an optimal fusion trajectory for reasoning stability. Notably, MAny operates as a training-free paradigm that achieves knowledge merging via efficient CPU-based algebraic operations, eliminating additional gradient-based optimization beyond initial tuning. Our extensive evaluations confirm the superior performance and robustness of MAny across multiple MLLMs and benchmarks. Specifically, on the UCIT benchmark, MAny achieves significant leads of up to 8.57\% and 2.85\% in final average accuracy over state-of-the-art methods across two different MLLMs, respectively.

</details>


### [629] [Parameter Importance is Not Static: Evolving Parameter Isolation for Supervised Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14010)
*Zekai Lin,Chao Xue,Di Liang,Xingsheng Han,Peiyang Liu,Xianjie Wu,Lei Jiang,Yu Lu,Haibo Shi,Shuang Liang,Minlong Peng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EPI是一种动态参数隔离方法，通过周期性更新隔离掩码来适应训练过程中参数重要性的变化，相比静态隔离能更有效地减少任务干扰和灾难性遗忘。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有静态参数隔离方法假设参数重要性固定不变，但实际训练中参数重要性会随时间漂移，需要动态适应机制来解决任务干扰和灾难性遗忘问题。

Method: 提出演化参数隔离（EPI）框架，基于梯度信号在线估计参数重要性，周期性更新隔离掩码，保护新出现的任务关键参数同时释放过时参数以恢复可塑性。

Result: 在多样化多任务基准测试中，EPI相比静态隔离和标准微调能持续减少干扰和遗忘，同时提升整体泛化能力。

Conclusion: 参数重要性在训练过程中会动态演化，隔离机制需要与学习动态同步更新，EPI通过动态参数隔离有效解决了多任务微调中的干扰和遗忘问题。

Abstract: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) of large language models often suffers from task interference and catastrophic forgetting. Recent approaches alleviate this issue by isolating task-critical parameters during training. However, these methods represent a static solution to a dynamic problem, assuming that parameter importance remains fixed once identified. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that parameter importance exhibits temporal drift over the course of training. To address this, we propose Evolving Parameter Isolation (EPI), a fine-tuning framework that adapts isolation decisions based on online estimates of parameter importance. Instead of freezing a fixed subset of parameters, EPI periodically updates isolation masks using gradient-based signals, enabling the model to protect emerging task-critical parameters while releasing outdated ones to recover plasticity. Experiments on diverse multi-task benchmarks demonstrate that EPI consistently reduces interference and forgetting compared to static isolation and standard fine-tuning, while improving overall generalization. Our analysis highlights the necessity of synchronizing isolation mechanisms with the evolving dynamics of learning diverse abilities.

</details>


### [630] [Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Methane Sorption: Cross-Gas Transfer Learning, Ensemble Collapse Under Physics Constraints, and Monte Carlo Dropout Uncertainty Quantification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13992)
*Mohammad Nooraiepour,Zezhang Song,Wei Li,Sarah Perez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出物理信息迁移学习框架，通过氢吸附PINN迁移到甲烷吸附预测，结合弹性权重巩固和课程学习，在993个煤样数据上实现R²=0.932，比传统方法提升227%，蒙特卡洛Dropout是最佳不确定性量化方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有甲烷吸附预测模型缺乏热力学一致性、跨地质系统知识迁移能力和校准的不确定性估计的综合能力，需要开发能同时解决这些问题的统一框架。

Method: 提出物理信息迁移学习框架：1) 通过弹性权重巩固将氢吸附PINN迁移到甲烷吸附预测；2) 煤样特征工程；3) 三阶段课程学习平衡迁移保持与热力学微调；4) 评估五种贝叶斯不确定性量化方法。

Result: 在114个独立煤样实验的993个平衡测量数据上，框架达到R²=0.932，比仅压力经典等温线提升227%；氢预训练比随机初始化降低18.9% RMSE，加速19.4%收敛；蒙特卡洛Dropout实现校准良好的不确定性估计。

Conclusion: 蒙特卡洛Dropout是该物理约束迁移学习框架中性能最佳的不确定性量化方法，跨气体迁移学习是地质材料建模的数据高效策略，学习表示保持物理可解释性。

Abstract: Accurate methane sorption prediction across heterogeneous coal ranks requires models that combine thermodynamic consistency, efficient knowledge transfer across data-scarce geological systems, and calibrated uncertainty estimates, capabilities that are rarely addressed together in existing frameworks. We present a physics-informed transfer learning framework that adapts a hydrogen sorption PINN to methane sorption prediction via Elastic Weight Consolidation, coal-specific feature engineering, and a three-phase curriculum that progressively balances transfer preservation with thermodynamic fine-tuning. Trained on 993 equilibrium measurements from 114 independent coal experiments spanning lignite to anthracite, the framework achieves R2 = 0.932 on held-out coal samples, a 227% improvement over pressure-only classical isotherms, while hydrogen pre-training delivers 18.9% lower RMSE and 19.4% faster convergence than random initialization. Five Bayesian uncertainty quantification approaches reveal a systematic divergence in performance across physics-constrained architectures. Monte Carlo Dropout achieves well-calibrated uncertainty at minimal overhead, while deep ensembles, regardless of architectural diversity or initialization strategy, exhibit performance degradation because shared physics constraints narrow the admissible solution manifold. SHAP and ALE analyses confirm that learned representations remain physically interpretable and aligned with established coal sorption mechanisms: moisture-volatile interactions are most influential, pressure-temperature coupling captures thermodynamic co-dependence, and features exhibit non-monotonic effects. These results identify Monte Carlo Dropout as the best-performing UQ method in this physics-constrained transfer learning framework, and demonstrate cross-gas transfer learning as a data-efficient strategy for geological material modeling.

</details>


### [631] [PRiMeFlow: Capturing Complex Expression Heterogeneity in Perturbation Response Modelling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13986)
*Zichao Yan,Yan Wu,Mica Xu Ji,Chaitra Agrahar,Esther Wershof,Marcel Nassar,Mehrshad Sadria,Ridvan Eksi,Vladimir Trifonov,Ignacio Ibarra,Telmo Felgueira,Błażej Osiński,Rory Stark*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRiMeFlow是一种基于流匹配的端到端方法，直接在基因表达空间中建模遗传和小分子扰动效应，能准确近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布，在PerturBench基准测试中表现优异，并赢得了首届ARC虚拟细胞挑战赛的通用奖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单细胞基因表达固有的异质性和复杂的潜在基因依赖性给体外扰动效应预测带来了建模挑战，限制了大规模细胞行为驱动因素识别和药物发现加速。

Method: PRiMeFlow采用基于流匹配的端到端方法，直接在基因表达空间中建模遗传和小分子扰动效应，使用U-Net架构参数化速度场，通过分布拟合方法近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布。

Result: 在PerturBench中进行广泛基准测试，证明PRiMeFlow能准确近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布；消融研究验证了在基因表达空间操作和使用U-Net架构等关键设计选择的有效性；基于PRiMeFlow架构的模型赢得了首届ARC虚拟细胞挑战赛的通用奖。

Conclusion: PRiMeFlow通过流匹配方法有效解决了单细胞基因表达建模的挑战，为大规模扰动效应预测和药物发现提供了有力工具，其成功在虚拟细胞挑战赛中得到验证。

Abstract: Predicting the effects of perturbations in-silico on cell state can identify drivers of cell behavior at scale and accelerate drug discovery. However, modeling challenges remain due to the inherent heterogeneity of single cell gene expression and the complex, latent gene dependencies. Here, we present PRiMeFlow, an end-to-end flow matching based approach to directly model the effects of genetic and small molecule perturbations in the gene expression space. The distribution-fitting approach taken by PRiMeFlow enables it to accurately approximate the empirical distribution of single-cell gene expression, which we demonstrate through extensive benchmarking inside PerturBench. Through ablation studies, we also validate important model design choices such as operating in gene expression space and parameterizing the velocity field with a U-Net architecture. The PRiMeFlow architecture was used as the basis for the model that won the Generalist Prize in the first ARC Virtual Cell Challenge.

</details>


### [632] [HINTBench: Horizon-agent Intrinsic Non-attack Trajectory Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13954)
*Jiacheng Wang,Jinchang Hou,Fabian Wang,Ping Jian,Chenfu Bao,Zhonghou Lv*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出内在风险审计概念，开发HINTBench基准评估智能体在非攻击条件下的内在风险，发现现有模型在风险步骤定位和失败诊断方面存在显著能力差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体安全评估主要关注外部诱导风险，但智能体在良性条件下仍可能进入不安全轨迹。论文研究这种被忽视的内在风险设置，其中内在故障保持潜伏状态，在长期执行中传播，最终导致严重后果。

Method: 引入非攻击内在风险审计方法，提出HINTBench基准，包含629个智能体轨迹（523个有风险，106个安全），支持三个任务：风险检测、风险步骤定位和内在故障类型识别。标注基于统一的五约束分类法。

Result: 实验显示显著能力差距：强LLM在轨迹级风险检测上表现良好，但在风险步骤定位上严格F1分数低于35%，细粒度故障诊断更难。现有防护模型在此设置下迁移效果差。

Conclusion: 内在风险审计是智能体安全领域的一个开放挑战，需要开发新方法来检测和缓解智能体在非攻击条件下的内在风险传播。

Abstract: Existing agent-safety evaluation has focused mainly on externally induced risks. Yet agents may still enter unsafe trajectories under benign conditions. We study this complementary but underexplored setting through the lens of \emph{intrinsic} risk, where intrinsic failures remain latent, propagate across long-horizon execution, and eventually lead to high-consequence outcomes. To evaluate this setting, we introduce \emph{non-attack intrinsic risk auditing} and present \textbf{HINTBench}, a benchmark of 629 agent trajectories (523 risky, 106 safe; 33 steps on average) supporting three tasks: risk detection, risk-step localization, and intrinsic failure-type identification. Its annotations are organized under a unified five-constraint taxonomy. Experiments reveal a substantial capability gap: strong LLMs perform well on trajectory-level risk detection, but their performance drops to below 35 Strict-F1 on risk-step localization, while fine-grained failure diagnosis proves even harder. Existing guard models transfer poorly to this setting. These findings establish intrinsic risk auditing as an open challenge for agent safety.

</details>


### [633] [Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Process-Complex Industrial Time Series: A Real-World Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13928)
*Sergej Krasnikov,Lukas Meitz,Samineh Bagheri,Michael Heider,Thorsten Schöler,Jörg Hähner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究评估了不同异常检测模型在真实工业时序数据上的表现，发现自编码器优于孤立森林，其中时间卷积自编码器性能最稳健。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实工业环境中的时序数据比常用基准数据集复杂得多，具有异构、多阶段操作过程的特点。在简化条件下验证的异常检测方法往往无法推广到工业环境，因此需要评估哪些模型能够捕捉这种复杂性。

Method: 使用从完全运行的工业机械收集的独特数据集进行实证研究。评估了多种模型类别：从经典的孤立森林基线开始，扩展到多种自编码器架构，包括时间卷积自编码器、循环自编码器和变分自编码器。

Result: 孤立森林不足以建模数据中的非周期性、多尺度动态特征。自编码器整体表现更好，其中时间卷积自编码器实现最稳健的性能，而循环和变分自编码器需要更仔细的调参。

Conclusion: 对于复杂的工业时序数据，自编码器比传统孤立森林更适合异常检测任务。时间卷积自编码器因其稳健性而成为首选，但循环和变分变体需要更精细的超参数调整。

Abstract: Industrial time-series data from real production environments exhibits substantially higher complexity than commonly used benchmark datasets, primarily due to heterogeneous, multi-stage operational processes. As a result, anomaly detection methods validated under simplified conditions often fail to generalize to industrial settings. This work presents an empirical study on a unique dataset collected from fully operational industrial machinery, explicitly capturing pronounced process-induced variability.
  We evaluate which model classes are capable of capturing this complexity, starting with a classical Isolation Forest baseline and extending to multiple autoencoder architectures.
