TL;DR: 提出Orthogonal Backfill (OBF)方法，通过正交残差注入缓解KV缓存硬驱逐的信息损失，在保持性能的同时大幅降低LLM多智能体系统通信成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM多智能体系统中，LatentMAS等方法通过完整KV缓存交换实现更丰富的上下文通信，但存在高内存和通信成本问题，需要高效的KV压缩方案

Method: 采用驱逐式KV压缩，并引入Orthogonal Backfill (OBF)技术，将丢弃KV状态的低秩正交残差注入保留的KV状态中，减少硬驱逐造成的信息损失

Result: 在9个标准基准测试（数学推理、编码、知识密集型QA）上，相比完整KV中继，通信成本降低79.8%-89.4%，性能相当甚至更好，在7个基准上取得最佳结果

Conclusion: 更多信息不一定带来更好的通信效果，保留最有用的信息更为关键；OBF方法在显著降低通信成本的同时保持或提升性能，为LLM多智能体高效通信提供了有效方案

Abstract: Communication in Large Language Model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems is moving beyond discrete tokens to preserve richer context. Recent work such as LatentMAS enables agents to exchange latent messages through full key-value (KV) caches. However, full KV relay incurs high memory and communication cost. We adapt eviction-style KV compression to this setting and introduce Orthogonal Backfill (OBF) to mitigate information loss from hard eviction. OBF injects a low-rank orthogonal residual from discarded KV states into the retained KV states. We evaluate proposed method against full KV relay on nine standard benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, coding, and knowledge-intensive QA. It achieves performance comparable to full KV relay while reducing communication cost by 79.8%--89.4%. OBF further improves the performance and achieves the best results on 7 of the 9 benchmarks. This suggests that more information does not necessarily lead to better communication; preserving the most useful information matters more. Our codebase is publicly available on https://github.com/markli404/When-Less-Latent-Leads-to-Better-Relay.

</details>


### [673] [Selecting Feature Interactions for Generalized Additive Models by Distilling Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13332)
*Jingyun Jia,Chandan Singh,Rich Caruana,Ben Lengerich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabDistill利用表格基础模型和事后蒸馏方法，通过提取基础模型中隐含的特征交互来改进广义可加模型的预测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统广义可加模型(GAMs)在建模表格数据时依赖启发式方法选择特征交互，可能遗漏高阶或上下文相关的效应，需要更有效的数据驱动交互发现方法

Method: TabDistill方法：1) 在数据集上拟合表格基础模型；2) 应用事后交互归因方法从基础模型中提取显著特征交互；3) 将这些交互作为GAM的项进行评估

Result: TabDistill识别的交互在下游GAMs中带来一致的预测性能提升，表明表格基础模型可作为有效的、数据驱动的交互发现指南

Conclusion: 表格基础模型能够桥接高容量模型和可解释的加性框架，为特征交互发现提供有效的数据驱动指导

Abstract: Identifying meaningful feature interactions is a central challenge in building accurate and interpretable models for tabular data. Generalized additive models (GAMs) have shown great success at modeling tabular data, but often rely on heuristic procedures to select interactions, potentially missing higher-order or context-dependent effects. To meet this challenge, we propose TabDistill, a method that leverages tabular foundation models and post-hoc distillation methods. Our key intuition is that tabular foundation models implicitly learn rich, adaptive feature dependencies through large-scale representation learning. Given a dataset, TabDistill first fits a tabular foundation model to the dataset, and then applies a post-hoc interaction attribution method to extract salient feature interactions from it. We evaluate these interactions by then using them as terms in a GAM. Across tasks, we find that interactions identified by TabDistill lead to consistent improvements in downstream GAMs' predictive performance. Our results suggest that tabular foundation models can serve as effective, data-driven guides for interaction discovery, bridging high-capacity models and interpretable additive frameworks.

</details>


### [674] [Multi-Task LLM with LoRA Fine-Tuning for Automated Cancer Staging and Biomarker Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13328)
*Jiahao Shao,Anam Nawaz Khan,Christopher Brett,Tom Berg,Xueping Li,Bing Yao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种参数高效的多任务框架，用于从病理报告中自动提取TNM分期、组织学分级和生物标志物信息，通过LoRA微调Llama-3-8B-Instruct模型，在10,677份专家验证的报告上取得了0.976的Macro F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 病理报告作为乳腺癌分期的权威记录，其非结构化格式阻碍了大规模数据整理。虽然大型语言模型(LLMs)提供语义推理能力，但其部署常受限于高计算成本和幻觉风险。

Method: 使用Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)在10,677份专家验证的病理报告上微调Llama-3-8B-Instruct编码器，采用并行分类头架构而非生成式方法，以强制保持模式一致性。

Result: 模型达到0.976的Macro F1分数，成功解决了传统提取方法（包括基于规则的NLP管道、零样本LLMs和单任务LLM基线）难以处理的复杂上下文歧义和异构报告格式问题。

Conclusion: 提出的适配器高效多任务架构能够实现可靠、可扩展的病理衍生癌症分期和生物标志物分析，有潜力增强临床决策支持和加速数据驱动的肿瘤学研究。

Abstract: Pathology reports serve as the definitive record for breast cancer staging, yet their unstructured format impedes large-scale data curation. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer semantic reasoning, their deployment is often limited by high computational costs and hallucination risks. This study introduces a parameter-efficient, multi-task framework for automating the extraction of Tumor-Node-Metastasis (TNM) staging, histologic grade, and biomarkers. We fine-tune a Llama-3-8B-Instruct encoder using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on a curated, expert-verified dataset of 10,677 reports. Unlike generative approaches, our architecture utilizes parallel classification heads to enforce consistent schema adherence. Experimental results demonstrate that the model achieves a Macro F1 score of 0.976, successfully resolving complex contextual ambiguities and heterogeneous reporting formats that challenge traditional extraction methods including rule-based natural language processing (NLP) pipelines, zero-shot LLMs, and single-task LLM baselines. The proposed adapter-efficient, multi-task architecture enables reliable, scalable pathology-derived cancer staging and biomarker profiling, with the potential to enhance clinical decision support and accelerate data-driven oncology research.

</details>


### [675] [Beyond Uniform Sampling: Synergistic Active Learning and Input Denoising for Robust Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13316)
*Samrendra Roy,Souvik Chakraborty,Syed Bahauddin Alam*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出结合主动学习和输入去噪的协同防御方法，显著提升神经算子对抗扰动的鲁棒性，在Burgers方程基准上实现87%的错误率降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经算子作为物理仿真的快速替代模型，在安全关键的数字孪生部署中面临对抗扰动的严重脆弱性，需要有效的防御机制。

Method: 提出协同防御方法：1) 主动学习组件使用差分进化攻击自适应探测模型弱点，在发现的脆弱位置生成针对性训练数据，同时使用自适应平滑比保护机制保持基准精度；2) 输入去噪组件在算子架构中增加可学习的瓶颈层，过滤对抗噪声同时保留物理相关特征。

Result: 在粘性Burgers方程基准上，组合方法达到2.04%的组合错误率（1.21%基准+0.83%鲁棒性），相比标准训练（15.42%）降低87%，优于单独使用主动学习（3.42%）或输入去噪（5.22%）。

Conclusion: 神经算子的最优训练数据是架构依赖的，因为不同架构在不同输入子空间中集中敏感性，均匀采样无法充分覆盖所有模型的脆弱性景观。这些发现对神经算子在核反应堆监测等安全关键能源系统中的部署具有潜在意义。

Abstract: Neural operators have emerged as fast surrogate models for physics simulations, yet they remain acutely vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, a critical liability for safety-critical digital twin deployments. We present a synergistic defense that combines active learning-based data generation with an input denoising architecture. The active learning component adaptively probes model weaknesses using differential evolution attacks, then generates targeted training data at discovered vulnerability locations while an adaptive smooth-ratio safeguard preserves baseline accuracy. The input denoising component augments the operator architecture with a learnable bottleneck that filters adversarial noise while retaining physics-relevant features. On the viscous Burgers' equation benchmark, the combined approach achieves a 2.04% combined error (1.21% baseline + 0.83% robustness), representing an 87% reduction relative to standard training (15.42% combined) and outperforming both active learning alone (3.42%) and input denoising alone (5.22%). More broadly, our results, combined with cross-architecture vulnerability analysis from prior work, suggest that optimal training data for neural operators is architecture-dependent: because different architectures concentrate sensitivity in distinct input subspaces, uniform sampling cannot adequately cover the vulnerability landscape of all models. These findings have potential implications for the deployment of neural operators in safety-critical energy systems including nuclear reactor monitoring.

</details>


### [676] [Concrete Jungle: Towards Concreteness Paved Contrastive Negative Mining for Compositional Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13313)
*Eun Woo Im,Dhruv Madhwal,Vivek Gupta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Slipform框架通过基于词汇具体性的负样本生成和梯度平衡损失函数，显著提升了视觉语言模型在组合推理任务上的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在组合推理方面存在局限，特别是在词序和属性绑定方面表现脆弱。这种限制源于对比预训练中缺乏能够区分细微语义变化的样本。虽然硬负样本挖掘提供了有希望的解决方案，但现有方法缺乏明确的机制来控制哪些语言元素被修改。

Method: 1. 提出词汇具体性作为负样本有效性的基本决定因素，修改高度具体的术语会产生更显著的结构和视觉差异；2. 提出ConcretePlant方法，系统性地隔离和操作感知基础概念；3. 分析InfoNCE损失发现严重的梯度不平衡问题，提出Cement损失函数，使用基于边界的方法，通过将心理语言学分数与样本难度相关联，动态校准对单个训练对的惩罚。

Result: Slipform集成框架在多样化的组合评估基准、通用跨模态检索、单标签和多标签线性探测任务中实现了最先进的准确率。

Conclusion: 词汇具体性是负样本有效性的关键因素，通过系统性地操纵具体概念并解决梯度不平衡问题，可以显著提升视觉语言模型在组合推理任务上的性能。Slipform框架为这一领域提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models demonstrate remarkable capabilities but often struggle with compositional reasoning, exhibiting vulnerabilities regarding word order and attribute binding. This limitation arises from a scarcity of informative samples needed to differentiate subtle semantic variations during contrastive pretraining. Although hard negative mining offers a promising remedy, existing methods lack explicit mechanisms to dictate which linguistic elements undergo modification. Instead of engineering generative architectures, this study establishes lexical concreteness as a fundamental determinant of negative sample efficacy. Modifying highly concrete terms generates more pronounced structural and visual discrepancies, providing a substantially stronger learning signal. Leveraging this principle, ConcretePlant is proposed to systematically isolate and manipulate perceptually grounded concepts. Analyses of the InfoNCE further reveals a severe gradient imbalance, where easily distinguishable pairs disproportionately overwhelm the optimization process and restrict the bandwidth available for nuanced learning. To resolve this degradation, the Cement loss is formulated utilizing a margin-based approach. By correlating psycholinguistic scores with sample difficulty, this objective dynamically calibrates the penalization applied to individual training pairs. Comprehensive evaluations substantiate these theoretical claims. The integrated framework, designated as Slipform, achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across diverse compositional evaluation benchmarks, general cross-modal retrieval, single and multi label linear probing.

</details>


### [677] [Some Theoretical Limitations of t-SNE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13295)
*Rupert Li,Elchanan Mossel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文分析了t-SNE降维技术可能导致数据重要特征丢失的问题，建立了数学框架来理解这种信息损失


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: t-SNE作为流行的降维和可视化技术，虽然广泛应用，但所有降维技术都可能丢失数据的重要特征。目前缺乏对t-SNE如何丢失数据重要特征的系统性数学理解，需要建立理论框架来分析这一问题。

Method: 建立数学框架，在不同场景下证明一系列结果，展示t-SNE如何丢失数据的重要特征。通过理论分析而非实验方法，系统性地探讨t-SNE的信息损失机制。

Result: 在不同场景下证明了多个结果，具体展示了t-SNE如何丢失数据的重要特征。这些结果为理解t-SNE的信息损失提供了数学基础和理论依据。

Conclusion: t-SNE作为降维技术确实会丢失数据的重要特征，论文建立的数学框架为理解和量化这种信息损失提供了理论基础，有助于更谨慎地使用t-SNE并理解其局限性。

Abstract: t-SNE has gained popularity as a dimension reduction technique, especially for visualizing data. It is well-known that all dimension reduction techniques may lose important features of the data. We provide a mathematical framework for understanding this loss for t-SNE by establishing a number of results in different scenarios showing how important features of data are lost by using t-SNE.

</details>


### [678] [Enhancing Confidence Estimation in Telco LLMs via Twin-Pass CoT-Ensembling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13271)
*Anton Saenko,Pranshav Gajjar,Abiodun Ganiyu,Vijay K. Shah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了电信领域大语言模型的置信度校准问题，针对Gemma-3模型家族在电信任务中置信度估计不可靠的问题，提出了双通道思维链集成方法，显著降低了预期校准误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在电信领域应用日益广泛，但其生成的置信度分数存在系统性偏差和不可靠性，经常表现出过度自信。这种缺乏可信度的自我评估使得难以验证模型输出并在实践中安全依赖它们。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的双通道思维链集成方法，通过利用多个独立的推理评估并将它们的评估聚合为校准后的置信度分数，改进了置信度估计。该方法在TeleQnA、ORANBench和srsRANBench基准上评估了Gemma-3模型家族（4B、12B和27B参数）。

Result: 标准单通道、语言化置信度估计无法反映真实正确性，经常为错误预测分配高置信度。而提出的方法将预期校准误差降低了高达88%，显著提高了模型自我评估的可靠性。

Conclusion: 研究结果突显了当前置信度估计实践的局限性，并展示了一条实现电信领域大语言模型输出更可信评估的实用路径。双通道思维链集成方法为改进模型自我评估提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to complex telecommunications tasks, including 3GPP specification analysis and O-RAN network troubleshooting. However, a critical limitation remains: LLM-generated confidence scores are often biased and unreliable, frequently exhibiting systematic overconfidence. This lack of trustworthy self-assessment makes it difficult to verify model outputs and safely rely on them in practice. In this paper, we study confidence calibration in telecom-domain LLMs using the representative Gemma-3 model family (4B, 12B, and 27B parameters), evaluated on TeleQnA, ORANBench, and srsRANBench. We show that standard single-pass, verbalized confidence estimates fail to reflect true correctness, often assigning high confidence to incorrect predictions. To address this, we propose a novel Twin-Pass Chain of Thought (CoT)-Ensembling methodology for improving confidence estimation by leveraging multiple independent reasoning evaluations and aggregating their assessments into a calibrated confidence score. Our approach reduces Expected Calibration Error (ECE) by up to 88% across benchmarks, significantly improving the reliability of model self-assessment. These results highlight the limitations of current confidence estimation practices and demonstrate a practical path toward more trustworthy evaluation of LLM outputs in telecommunications.

</details>


### [679] [Binomial Gradient-Based Meta-Learning for Enhanced Meta-Gradient Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13263)
*Yilang Zhang,Abraham Jaeger Mountain,Bingcong Li,Georgios B. Giannakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于二项式展开的梯度元学习方法BinomGBML，通过并行计算提高元梯度估计精度，应用于MAML框架形成BinomMAML，理论证明误差界优于现有方法且可超指数衰减。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统梯度元学习方法计算开销大，现有近似方法误差较大。需要一种既能保持计算效率又能提高元梯度估计精度的新方法。

Method: 提出二项式梯度元学习(BinomGBML)，利用截断二项式展开进行元梯度估计，通过并行计算在估计中融入更多信息。将方法应用于模型无关元学习(MAML)框架，形成BinomMAML。

Result: 理论证明BinomMAML的误差界优于现有方法，在温和条件下可超指数衰减。数值实验验证了理论分析，显示性能提升而计算开销仅轻微增加。

Conclusion: BinomGBML通过二项式展开提供了一种高效且精确的元梯度估计方法，显著提升了梯度元学习的性能与效率平衡。

Abstract: Meta-learning offers a principled framework leveraging \emph{task-invariant} priors from related tasks, with which \emph{task-specific} models can be fine-tuned on downstream tasks, even with limited data records. Gradient-based meta-learning (GBML) relies on gradient descent (GD) to adapt the prior to a new task. Albeit effective, these methods incur high computational overhead that scales linearly with the number of GD steps. To enhance efficiency and scalability, existing methods approximate the gradient of prior parameters (meta-gradient) via truncated backpropagation, yet suffer large approximation errors. Targeting accurate approximation, this work puts forth binomial GBML (BinomGBML), which relies on a truncated binomial expansion for meta-gradient estimation. This novel expansion endows more information in the meta-gradient estimation via efficient parallel computation. As a running paradigm applied to model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML), the resultant BinomMAML provably enjoys error bounds that not only improve upon existing approaches, but also decay super-exponentially under mild conditions. Numerical tests corroborate the theoretical analysis and showcase boosted performance with slightly increased computational overhead.

</details>


### [680] [Counterfactual Peptide Editing for Causal TCR--pMHC Binding Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13256)
*Sanjar Khudoyberdiev,Arman Bekov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CIP框架通过生成生物约束的反事实肽编辑，强制模型对非锚定位置编辑保持预测不变性，同时增强对锚定残基扰动的敏感性，从而减少TCR-pMHC结合预测中的捷径学习问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经模型预测TCR-pMHC结合时容易陷入捷径学习，利用训练数据中的虚假相关性（如肽段长度偏差或V基因共现），而非真实的物理结合界面，导致在家族保留和距离感知评估中预测脆弱。

Method: 提出反事实不变性预测（CIP）训练框架：1）生成生物约束的反事实肽编辑；2）通过不变性损失惩罚非锚定位置保守替换导致的预测变化；3）通过对比性损失鼓励锚定位置扰动产生大的预测变化；4）在VDJdb-IEDB基准上评估家族保留、距离感知和随机分割。

Result: 在挑战性的家族保留协议下，CIP达到AUROC 0.831和反事实一致性（CFC）0.724，相比无约束基线减少39.7%的捷径指数。消融实验确认锚定感知编辑生成是OOD增益的主要驱动力。

Conclusion: CIP通过反事实不变性约束有效减少捷径学习，提供了一种因果基础的TCR特异性建模实用方法，锚定感知编辑生成是实现分布外泛化改进的关键机制。

Abstract: Neural models for TCR-pMHC binding prediction are susceptible to shortcut learning: they exploit spurious correlations in training data -- such as peptide length bias or V-gene co-occurrence -- rather than the physical binding interface. This renders predictions brittle under family-held-out and distance-aware evaluation, where such shortcuts do not transfer. We introduce \emph{Counterfactual Invariant Prediction} (CIP), a training framework that generates biologically constrained counterfactual peptide edits and enforces invariance to edits at non-anchor positions while amplifying sensitivity at MHC anchor residues. CIP augments the base classifier with two auxiliary objectives: (1) an invariance loss penalizing prediction changes under conservative non-anchor substitutions, and (2) a contrastive loss encouraging large prediction changes under anchor-position disruptions. Evaluated on a curated VDJdb-IEDB benchmark under family-held-out, distance-aware, and random splits, CIP achieves AUROC 0.831 and counterfactual consistency (CFC) 0.724 under the challenging family-held-out protocol -- a 39.7\% reduction in shortcut index relative to the unconstrained baseline. Ablations confirm that anchor-aware edit generation is the dominant driver of OOD gains, providing a practical recipe for causally-grounded TCR specificity modeling.

</details>


### [681] [Bias-Corrected Adaptive Conformal Inference for Multi-Horizon Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13253)
*Ankit Lade,Sai Krishna J.,Indar Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BC-ACI通过在线偏差估计和校正机制改进标准ACI，在保持覆盖保证的同时显著减少区间宽度，特别适用于存在系统性预测偏差的分布漂移场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准自适应共形推断(ACI)仅调整分位数阈值，无法校正区间中心。当基础预测器在分布漂移后产生持续偏差时，ACI只能通过对称地扩大区间来补偿，导致不必要的保守区间。需要一种能同时校正偏差和调整阈值的方法。

Method: 提出偏差校正ACI(BC-ACI)，在标准ACI基础上增加在线指数加权移动平均(EWM)预测偏差估计。该方法在分位数计算前校正非共形分数，并重新中心化预测区间。采用自适应死区阈值抑制噪声级别的偏差校正，确保在校准良好的数据上性能不退化。

Result: 在688次实验运行中，涵盖两种基础模型、四种合成机制和三个真实数据集，BC-ACI在均值和复合分布漂移下将Winkler区间分数降低13-17%(Wilcoxon p<0.001)，在平稳数据上保持等效性能(比率1.002x)。有限样本分析显示覆盖保证随偏差估计误差优雅退化。

Conclusion: BC-ACI通过在线偏差估计和校正机制有效解决了ACI在系统性预测偏差下的局限性，在保持分布自由覆盖保证的同时显著提高区间效率，为存在分布漂移的时间序列预测提供了更实用的不确定性量化方法。

Abstract: Adaptive Conformal Inference (ACI) provides distribution-free prediction intervals with asymptotic coverage guarantees for time series under distribution shift. However, ACI only adapts the quantile threshold -- it cannot shift the interval center. When a base forecaster develops persistent bias after a regime change, ACI compensates by widening intervals symmetrically, producing unnecessarily conservative bands. We propose Bias-Corrected ACI (BC-ACI), which augments standard ACI with an online exponentially weighted moving average (EWM) estimate of forecast bias. BC-ACI corrects nonconformity scores before quantile computation and re-centers prediction intervals, addressing the root cause of miscalibration rather than its symptom. An adaptive dead-zone threshold suppresses corrections when estimated bias is indistinguishable from noise, ensuring no degradation on well-calibrated data. In controlled experiments across 688 runs spanning two base models, four synthetic regimes, and three real datasets, BC-ACI reduces Winkler interval scores by 13--17% under mean and compound distribution shifts (Wilcoxon p < 0.001) while maintaining equivalent performance on stationary data (ratio 1.002x). We provide finite-sample analysis showing that coverage guarantees degrade gracefully with bias estimation error.

</details>


### [682] [Out of Context: Reliability in Multimodal Anomaly Detection Requires Contextual Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13252)
*Kevin Wilkinghoff,Neelu Madan,Juan Miguel Valverde,Kamal Nasrollahi,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Rafal Wisniewski,Thomas B. Moeslund,Wenwu Wang,Zheng-Hua Tan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文主张将多模态异常检测重构为跨模态上下文推理问题，区分上下文模态与观测模态，以条件化而非全局参考的方式定义异常。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统异常检测方法假设正常行为可由单一无条件参考分布捕获，但在动态异构环境中，异常具有上下文依赖性。现有多模态方法平等对待所有数据流，未区分上下文信息与异常相关信号，导致结构模糊性和不可靠的异常评估。

Method: 提出将多模态异常检测重构为跨模态上下文推理问题，其中模态扮演非对称角色：分离上下文与观测，以条件化方式定义异常。这需要对模型设计、评估协议和基准构建进行重新思考。

Result: 论文提出了一个理论框架，强调在多模态异常检测中明确区分上下文模态和观测模态的重要性，以实现条件化异常检测而非基于单一全局参考。

Conclusion: 多模态异常检测应被视为跨模态上下文推理问题，模态应扮演非对称角色以分离上下文与观测。这一视角对模型设计、评估和基准构建具有重要影响，并为构建鲁棒、上下文感知的多模态异常检测系统指明了开放研究挑战。

Abstract: Anomaly detection aims to identify observations that deviate from expected behavior. Because anomalous events are inherently sparse, most frameworks are trained exclusively on normal data to learn a single reference model of normality. This implicitly assumes that normal behavior can be captured by a single, unconditional reference distribution. In practice, however, anomalies are often context-dependent: A specific observation may be normal under one operating condition, yet anomalous under another. As machine learning systems are deployed in dynamic and heterogeneous environments, these fixed-context assumptions introduce structural ambiguity, i.e., the inability to distinguish contextual variation from genuine abnormality under marginal modeling, leading to unstable performance and unreliable anomaly assessments. While modern sensing systems frequently collect multimodal data capturing complementary aspects of both system behavior and operating conditions, existing methods treat all data streams equally, without distinguishing contextual information from anomaly-relevant signals. As a result, abnormality is often evaluated without explicitly conditioning on operating conditions. We argue that multimodal anomaly detection should be reframed as a cross-modal contextual inference problem, in which modalities play asymmetric roles, separating context from observation, to define abnormality conditionally rather than relative to a single global reference. This perspective has implications for model design, evaluation protocols, and benchmark construction, and outline open research challenges toward robust, context-aware multimodal anomaly detection.

</details>


### [683] [Analog Optical Inference on Million-Record Mortgage Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13251)
*Sofia Berloff,Pavel Koptev,Konstantin Malkov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究首次将模拟光学计算机应用于大规模现实世界金融分类任务（抵押贷款审批），在584万条HMDA记录上评估了AOC性能，识别出准确率损失的三个来源：编码限制、架构限制和硬件保真度限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模拟光学计算机在机器学习推理方面具有巨大效率优势，但现有研究仅局限于小规模图像基准测试。本研究旨在评估AOC在现实世界大规模金融分类任务中的性能，识别准确率损失的具体来源，为后续改进提供方向。

Method: 使用AOC数字孪生模型在584万条美国HMDA抵押贷款记录上进行分类任务评估，原始19个特征。比较了AOC与XGBoost的性能，分析了三个准确率损失来源：1）编码限制（127位二进制编码），2）架构限制（光学核心宽度从16通道扩展到48通道），3）硬件非理想性（7种校准后的硬件非理想性）。

Result: 1）原始特征上，AOC达到94.6%平衡准确率（5,126参数，其中1,024个光学参数），XGBoost为97.9%，存在3.3个百分点差距；2）光学核心宽度从16通道增加到48通道仅缩小0.5pp差距，表明主要是架构限制而非硬件规模限制；3）使用127位二进制编码后，所有模型准确率降至89.4-89.6%，编码成本对数字模型为8pp，对AOC为5pp；4）7种校准后的硬件非理想性未造成可测量的性能损失。

Conclusion: 研究识别了模拟光学计算机准确率损失的三个层次：编码限制、架构限制和硬件保真度限制。硬件非理想性在当前校准水平下不是主要问题，而架构限制是性能差距的主要原因。这为未来改进指明了方向：需要优化AOC架构设计，同时编码方案对性能有显著影响。

Abstract: Analog optical computers promise large efficiency gains for machine learning inference, yet no demonstration has moved beyond small-scale image benchmarks. We benchmark the analog optical computer (AOC) digital twin on mortgage approval classification from 5.84 million U.S. HMDA records and separate three sources of accuracy loss. On the original 19 features, the AOC reaches 94.6% balanced accuracy with 5,126 parameters (1,024 optical), compared with 97.9% for XGBoost; the 3.3 percentage-point gap narrows by only 0.5pp when the optical core is widened from 16 to 48 channels, suggesting an architectural rather than hardware limitation. Restricting all models to a shared 127-bit binary encoding drops every model to 89.4--89.6%, with an encoding cost of 8pp for digital models and 5pp for the AOC. Seven calibrated hardware non-idealities impose no measurable penalty. The three resulting layers of limitation (encoding, architecture, hardware fidelity) locate where accuracy is lost and what to improve next.

</details>


### [684] [Shapley Value-Guided Adaptive Ensemble Learning for Explainable Financial Fraud Detection with U.S. Regulatory Compliance Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14231)
*Mohammad Nasir Uddin,Md Munna Aziz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出SHAP引导自适应集成方法(SGAE)用于金融欺诈检测，通过动态调整集成权重提升模型性能，并评估了多种模型在解释质量和稳定性方面的表现，满足监管合规要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金融犯罪每年给美国机构造成超过320亿美元损失。虽然AI欺诈检测工具日益先进，但在实际应用中面临主要障碍：许多模型作为黑箱运行，无法提供OCC Bulletin 2011-12和Federal Reserve SR 11-7等法规要求的透明、可审计的解释。

Method: 1) 全面评估解释质量，包括忠实性(充分性和全面性，k=5,10,15)和稳定性(30个bootstrap样本的Kendall's W)；2) 提出SHAP引导自适应集成(SGAE)，基于SHAP归因一致性动态调整每笔交易的集成权重；3) 在完整的590,540笔交易IEEE-CIS数据集上评估LSTM、Transformer和GNN-GraphSAGE三种架构。

Result: XGBoost配合TreeExplainer达到近乎完美的稳定性(W=0.9912)，而LSTM配合DeepExplainer表现较弱(W=0.4962)。SGAE在所有测试模型中达到最高的AUC-ROC(0.8837保持集；0.9245交叉验证)。GNN-GraphSAGE在完整数据集上达到AUC-ROC 0.9248和F1=0.6013。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了满足监管合规要求的欺诈检测解决方案，通过SHAP引导自适应集成方法显著提升模型性能，同时确保解释的透明性和可审计性，为金融机构部署AI欺诈检测系统提供了实用框架。

Abstract: Financial crime costs U.S. institutions over $32 billion each year. Although AI tools for fraud detection have become more advanced, their use in real-world systems still faces a major obstacle: many of these models operate as black boxes that cannot provide the transparent, auditable explanations required by regulations such as OCC Bulletin 2011-12 and Federal Reserve SR 11-7. This study makes three main contributions. First, it offers a thorough evaluation of explanation quality across faithfulness (sufficiency and comprehensiveness at k=5, 10, and 15) and stability (Kendall's W across 30 bootstrap samples). XGBoost paired with TreeExplainer achieves near-perfect stability (W=0.9912), while LSTM with DeepExplainer shows weak results (W=0.4962). Second, the paper introduces the SHAP-Guided Adaptive Ensemble (SGAE), which dynamically adjusts per-transaction ensemble weights based on SHAP attribution agreement, achieving the highest AUC-ROC among all tested models (0.8837 held-out; 0.9245 cross-validation). Third, a complete three-architecture evaluation of LSTM, Transformer, and GNN-GraphSAGE on the full 590,540-transaction IEEE-CIS dataset is provided, with GNN-GraphSAGE achieving AUC-ROC 0.9248 and F1=0.6013. All results are mapped directly to OCC, SR 11-7, and BSA-AML regulatory compliance requirements.

</details>


### [685] [Does Dimensionality Reduction via Random Projections Preserve Landscape Features?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13230)
*Iván Olarte Rodríguez,Anja Jankovic,Thomas Bäck,Elena Raponi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究探索性景观分析(ELA)特征在随机高斯嵌入降维下的鲁棒性，发现大多数特征对投影敏感，降维后特征值不再代表原始问题特性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高维优化问题中，ELA面临稀疏性、高方差和计算成本问题，降维被提出作为解决方案，但尚不清楚降维后特征是否仍反映原始景观的内在特性

Method: 通过随机高斯嵌入(RGEs)进行降维，从相同的采样点和目标值出发，在投影空间中计算ELA特征，并与原始搜索空间中的特征进行比较，考察多个样本预算和嵌入维度

Result: 线性随机投影通常会改变与ELA相关的几何和拓扑结构，导致特征值不再代表原始问题；只有少量特征相对稳定，大多数对嵌入高度敏感；鲁棒性并不一定意味着信息性，看似鲁棒的特征可能反映的是投影引入的伪影而非内在景观特性

Conclusion: 在高维优化问题中直接应用降维后的ELA特征需谨慎，因为大多数特征对投影敏感且可能失去代表性，需要开发更鲁棒的降维方法或特征子集选择策略

Abstract: Exploratory Landscape Analysis (ELA) provides numerical features for characterizing black-box optimization problems. In high-dimensional settings, however, ELA suffers from sparsity effects, high estimator variance, and the prohibitive cost of computing several feature classes. Dimensionality reduction has therefore been proposed as a way to make ELA applicable in such settings, but it remains unclear whether features computed in reduced spaces still reflect intrinsic properties of the original landscape.
  In this work, we investigate the robustness of ELA features under dimensionality reduction via Random Gaussian Embeddings (RGEs). Starting from the same sampled points and objective values, we compute ELA features in projected spaces and compare them to those obtained in the original search space across multiple sample budgets and embedding dimensions.
  Our results show that linear random projections often alter the geometric and topological structure relevant to ELA, yielding feature values that are no longer representative of the original problem. While a small subset of features remains comparatively stable, most are highly sensitive to the embedding. Moreover, robustness under projection does not necessarily imply informativeness, as apparently robust features may still reflect projection-induced artifacts rather than intrinsic landscape characteristics.

</details>


### [686] [KV Packet: Recomputation-Free Context-Independent KV Caching for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13226)
*Chuangtao Chen,Grace Li Zhang,Xunzhao Yin,Cheng Zhuo,Bing Li,Ulf Schlichtmann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: KV Packet：一种无需重新计算的KV缓存重用框架，通过轻量级可训练软令牌适配器将缓存文档包装为不可变"数据包"，实现零FLOPs开销和更低的首次令牌延迟


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KV缓存重用方法（如CacheBlend、EPIC、SAM-KV）虽然通过选择性重新计算部分令牌来减少开销，但仍产生不可忽略的计算开销（FLOPs）和增加的首次令牌延迟（TTFT），需要更高效的解决方案

Method: 提出KV Packet框架，将缓存文档视为不可变的"数据包"，并用轻量级可训练的软令牌适配器包装。这些适配器通过自监督蒸馏训练，以桥接上下文不连续性，实现无需重新计算的缓存重用

Result: 在Llama-3.1和Qwen2.5上的实验表明，KV Packet方法实现了接近零的FLOPs开销，比基于重新计算的基线方法具有更低的TTFT，同时保持了与完全重新计算基线相当的F1分数

Conclusion: KV Packet通过创新的软令牌适配器设计，有效解决了KV缓存重用中的上下文依赖问题，在保持模型性能的同时显著降低了计算开销和延迟，为LLM推理优化提供了新的解决方案

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) rely heavily on Key-Value (KV) caching to minimize inference latency. However, standard KV caches are context-dependent: reusing a cached document in a new context requires recomputing KV states to account for shifts in attention distribution. Existing solutions such as CacheBlend, EPIC, and SAM-KV mitigate this issue by selectively recomputing a subset of tokens; however, they still incur non-negligible computational overhead (FLOPs) and increased Time-to-First-Token (TTFT) latency. In this paper, we propose KV Packet, a recomputation-free cache reuse framework that treats cached documents as immutable ``packets'' wrapped in light-weight trainable soft-token adapters, which are trained via self-supervised distillation to bridge context discontinuities. Experiments on Llama-3.1 and Qwen2.5 demonstrate that the proposed KV Packet method achieves near-zero FLOPs and lower TTFT than recomputation-based baselines, while retaining F1 scores comparable to those of the full recomputation baseline.

</details>


### [687] [Pareto-Optimal Offline Reinforcement Learning via Smooth Tchebysheff Scalarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13175)
*Aadyot Bhatnagar,Peter Mørch Groth,Ali Madani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STOMP：一种基于平滑切比雪夫标量化方法的多目标离线强化学习算法，用于对齐语言模型以同时优化多个冲突目标，在蛋白质工程任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用中常需同时优化多个冲突目标（如蛋白质工程的催化活性和特异性、聊天机器人的帮助性和无害性）。传统线性标量化方法无法恢复帕累托前沿的非凸区域，需要更优的多目标对齐方法。

Method: 提出STOMP算法：1）将多目标RL本身作为优化问题，采用平滑切比雪夫标量化方法克服线性标量化的缺陷；2）基于观察到的分布对个体奖励进行标准化；3）将直接偏好优化扩展到多目标设置。

Result: 在三个蛋白质语言模型和三个实验室蛋白质适应度数据集上的实验表明，STOMP在9个设置中的8个实现了最高的超体积（根据离线离策略和生成评估），优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: STOMP是一种强大、鲁棒的多目标对齐算法，能够显著改进后训练模型，适用于多属性蛋白质优化及其他多目标优化任务。

Abstract: Large language models can be aligned with human preferences through offline reinforcement learning (RL) on small labeled datasets. While single-objective alignment is well-studied, many real-world applications demand the simultaneous optimization of multiple conflicting rewards, e.g. optimizing both catalytic activity and specificity in protein engineering, or helpfulness and harmlessness for chatbots. Prior work has largely relied on linear reward scalarization, but this approach provably fails to recover non-convex regions of the Pareto front. In this paper, instead of scalarizing the rewards directly, we frame multi-objective RL itself as an optimization problem to be scalarized via smooth Tchebysheff scalarization, a recent technique that overcomes the shortcomings of linear scalarization. We use this formulation to derive Smooth Tchebysheff Optimization of Multi-Objective Preferences (STOMP), a novel offline RL algorithm that extends direct preference optimization to the multi-objective setting in a principled way by standardizing the individual rewards based on their observed distributions. We empirically validate STOMP on a range of protein engineering tasks by aligning three autoregressive protein language models on three laboratory datasets of protein fitness. Compared to state-of-the-art baselines, STOMP achieves the highest hypervolumes in eight of nine settings according to both offline off-policy and generative evaluations. We thus demonstrate that STOMP is a powerful, robust multi-objective alignment algorithm that can meaningfully improve post-trained models for multi-attribute protein optimization and beyond.

</details>


### [688] [CLAD: Efficient Log Anomaly Detection Directly on Compressed Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13024)
*Benzhao Tang,Shiyu Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CLAD：首个直接在压缩字节流上进行日志异常检测的深度学习框架，无需解压和解析，利用正常日志压缩后的规律性字节模式与异常导致的模式破坏进行检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统日志爆炸式增长使得流式压缩变得必要，但现有日志异常检测方法需要完全解压和解析，产生严重的预处理开销。需要一种能够直接在压缩数据上操作的方法来消除这些瓶颈。

Method: 提出CLAD框架，基于关键洞察：正常日志压缩后形成规律字节模式，而异常会系统性破坏这些模式。采用专门架构：扩张卷积字节编码器、混合Transformer-mLSTM模型和四路聚合池化。采用两阶段训练策略：掩码预训练和焦点对比微调来处理严重的类别不平衡问题。

Result: 在五个数据集上评估，CLAD实现了最先进的平均F1分数0.9909，比最佳基线高出2.72个百分点。在提供卓越准确性的同时，完全消除了解压和解析开销。

Conclusion: CLAD是首个直接在压缩字节流上进行日志异常检测的深度学习框架，通过利用压缩模式中的多尺度偏差，实现了高精度检测同时完全避免了传统方法的预处理瓶颈，为结构化流式压缩器提供了鲁棒的通用解决方案。

Abstract: The explosive growth of system logs makes streaming compression essential, yet existing log anomaly detection (LAD) methods incur severe pre-processing overhead by requiring full decompression and parsing. We introduce CLAD, the first deep learning framework to perform LAD directly on compressed byte streams. CLAD bypasses these bottlenecks by exploiting a key insight: normal logs compress into regular byte patterns, while anomalies systematically disrupt them. To extract these multi-scale deviations from opaque bytes, we propose a purpose-built architecture integrating a dilated convolutional byte encoder, a hybrid Transformer--mLSTM, and four-way aggregation pooling. This is coupled with a two-stage training strategy of masked pre-training and focal-contrastive fine-tuning to effectively handle severe class imbalance. Evaluated across five datasets, CLAD achieves a state-of-the-art average F1-score of 0.9909 and outperforms the best baseline by 2.72 percentage points. It delivers superior accuracy while completely eliminating decompression and parsing overheads, offering a robust solution that generalizes to structured streaming compressors.

</details>


### [689] [Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models: Phenomenology, Mechanism, and Recipe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13016)
*Yaxuan Li,Yuxin Zuo,Bingxiang He,Jinqian Zhang,Chaojun Xiao,Cheng Qian,Tianyu Yu,Huan-ang Gao,Wenkai Yang,Zhiyuan Liu,Ning Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了在线策略蒸馏（OPD）的训练动态和机制，揭示了OPD成功或失败的两个关键条件，并提出了恢复失败OPD的实用策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管在线策略蒸馏已成为大语言模型后训练的核心技术，但其训练动态机制仍缺乏深入理解。本文旨在系统研究OPD的动态过程和内在机制，为实际应用提供理论指导。

Method: 通过弱到强反向蒸馏实验验证OPD条件，分析token级机制，提出两种恢复失败OPD的策略：离策略冷启动和教师对齐提示选择。

Result: 发现OPD成功的两个关键条件：师生需有兼容的思维模式；教师需提供学生训练中未见的新能力。token级分析显示成功OPD表现为在学生访问状态的高概率token上渐进对齐，这些token仅占很小比例（97%-99%概率质量）。提出的恢复策略能有效改善失败OPD。

Conclusion: OPD的成功依赖于师生思维模式的兼容性和教师提供的新能力，其密集token级奖励虽看似免费午餐但存在代价，这引发了对OPD能否扩展到长视野蒸馏的疑问。研究为理解OPD机制和设计有效蒸馏策略提供了系统框架。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a core technique in the post-training of large language models, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. This paper provides a systematic investigation of OPD dynamics and mechanisms. We first identify that two conditions govern whether OPD succeeds or fails: (i) the student and teacher should share compatible thinking patterns; and (ii) even with consistent thinking patterns and higher scores, the teacher must offer genuinely new capabilities beyond what the student has seen during training. We validate these findings through weak-to-strong reverse distillation, showing that same-family 1.5B and 7B teachers are distributionally indistinguishable from the student's perspective. Probing into the token-level mechanism, we show that successful OPD is characterized by progressive alignment on high-probability tokens at student-visited states, a small shared token set that concentrates most of the probability mass (97%-99%). We further propose two practical strategies to recover failing OPD: off-policy cold start and teacher-aligned prompt selection. Finally, we show that OPD's apparent free lunch of dense token-level reward comes at a cost, raising the question of whether OPD can scale to long-horizon distillation.

</details>


### [690] [Lightning OPD: Efficient Post-Training for Large Reasoning Models with Offline On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13010)
*Yecheng Wu,Song Han,Hai Cai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出Lightning OPD框架，通过预计算教师模型在SFT轨迹上的对数概率来实现离线策略蒸馏，在保证教师一致性的前提下消除对实时教师推理服务器的需求，显著提升训练效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准在线策略蒸馏需要在整个训练过程中运行教师模型推理服务器，导致巨大的基础设施开销。离线策略蒸馏的自然实现方式（预计算教师对数概率）在实践中无法可靠匹配标准OPD的性能，需要深入理解这一差异的根本原因。

Method: 识别出教师一致性这一关键条件：要求监督微调和OPD使用相同的教师模型。提出Lightning OPD框架，通过预计算教师模型在SFT轨迹上的对数概率来强制实施教师一致性，完全消除对实时教师服务器的需求。分析表明在教师一致性条件下，Lightning OPD与标准OPD共享相同的最优点，具有有界的梯度差异和防止策略漂移的隐式正则化效应。

Result: 在数学推理和代码生成任务上的广泛实验表明，Lightning OPD实现了最先进的性能并显著提升效率。从SFT初始化的Qwen3-8B-Base模型开始，仅用30 GPU小时就在AIME 2024上达到69.9%的准确率，相比标准OPD实现4.0倍加速，大幅降低了LLM后训练研究的门槛。

Conclusion: Lightning OPD是一个高效且有效的离线策略蒸馏框架，通过强制教师一致性解决了离线OPD的性能问题，在保持与标准OPD相同最优点的同时，显著降低了计算开销和基础设施需求，为学术研究提供了更易访问的LLM后训练方法。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has emerged as an efficient post-training paradigm for large language models. However, standard OPD requires a live teacher inference server throughout training, resulting in substantial infrastructure overhead. In this work, we investigate whether on-policy distillation can be performed offline. A natural approach is to precompute teacher log-probabilities once over SFT rollouts and reuse them during training. In practice, however, this offline variant fails to reliably match the performance of standard OPD. To understand this discrepancy, we identify a previously overlooked condition that is critical for any OPD pipeline, which we term teacher consistency. This condition requires that the same teacher model be used for both supervised fine-tuning and OPD. We show that violating teacher consistency introduces an irreducible gradient bias, causing both offline and online OPD to converge to a suboptimal fixed point regardless of training duration. Building on this insight, we propose Lightning OPD, an offline on-policy distillation framework that enforces teacher consistency by precomputing teacher log-probabilities over SFT rollouts. This design eliminates the need for a live teacher server entirely. We further show that, under teacher consistency, Lightning OPD shares the same optimum as standard OPD, with bounded gradient discrepancy and an implicit regularization effect that helps prevent policy drift. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation demonstrate that Lightning OPD achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly improved efficiency. Starting from an SFT-initialized Qwen3-8B-Base model, Lightning OPD reaches 69.9% on AIME 2024 in just 30 GPU hours, achieving a 4.0x speedup over standard OPD and substantially lowering the barrier to entry for academic research on LLM post-training.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [691] [Agentic Microphysics: A Manifesto for Generative AI Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15236)
*Federico Pierucci,Matteo Prandi,Marcantonio Bracale Syrnikov,Marcello Galisai,Piercosma Bisconti*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于智能体AI安全研究的方法论框架，强调从孤立模型分析转向考虑智能体间结构化交互的群体层面风险


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统获得规划、记忆、工具使用、持久身份和持续交互能力，安全分析不能再局限于孤立模型层面。群体层面的风险源于智能体间的结构化交互，需要通过通信、观察和相互影响的过程来理解集体行为随时间的变化

Method: 引入两个核心概念：1) 智能体微观物理学 - 分析局部交互动态，即一个智能体的输出在特定协议条件下成为另一个智能体的输入；2) 生成性安全 - 从微观条件中生成现象和风险，以识别充分机制、检测阈值并设计有效干预措施

Result: 提出了一个连接局部交互结构与群体层面动态的因果明确框架，填补了现有方法在识别交互层面机制和控制这些机制的设计变量方面的空白

Conclusion: 需要一种新的方法论框架来理解智能体AI中的群体风险，该框架应能够解释局部交互如何产生集体行为，并提供干预设计的基础，从而在智能体系统日益复杂的情况下确保安全

Abstract: This paper advances a methodological proposal for safety research in agentic AI. As systems acquire planning, memory, tool use, persistent identity, and sustained interaction, safety can no longer be analysed primarily at the level of the isolated model. Population-level risks arise from structured interaction among agents, through processes of communication, observation, and mutual influence that shape collective behaviour over time. As the object of analysis shifts, a methodological gap emerges. Approaches focused either on single agents or on aggregate outcomes do not identify the interaction-level mechanisms that generate collective risks or the design variables that control them. A framework is required that links local interaction structure to population-level dynamics in a causally explicit way, allowing both explanation and intervention. We introduce two linked concepts. Agentic microphysics defines the level of analysis: local interaction dynamics where one agent's output becomes another's input under specific protocol conditions. Generative safety defines the methodology: growing phenomena and elicit risks from micro-level conditions to identify sufficient mechanisms, detect thresholds, and design effective interventions.

</details>


### [692] [Who Gets Flagged? The Pluralistic Evaluation Gap in AI Content Watermarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13776)
*Alexander Nemecek,Osama Zafar,Yuqiao Xu,Wenbiao Li,Erman Ayday*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该论文指出当前AI水印技术存在内容依赖性偏见，缺乏跨语言、文化和人口群体的公平性评估，呼吁在部署前建立多元化的水印基准测试标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水印技术正成为AI内容认证的默认机制，但现有水印技术的信号强度、可检测性和鲁棒性依赖于内容本身的统计特性，而这些特性在不同语言、文化视觉传统和人口群体中存在系统性差异。当前水印基准测试大多未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人口群体的性能表现，存在公平性风险。

Method: 通过审查跨模态（文本、图像、音频）的主要水印基准测试，分析内容依赖性如何导致特定模态的偏见路径。提出三个具体的多元水印基准测试评估维度：跨语言检测均等性、文化多样性内容覆盖、检测指标的人口统计分解。

Result: 发现除一个例外，所有主要水印基准测试均未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人口群体的性能表现。水印技术目前被要求达到的公平性标准低于其旨在监管的生成系统本身。

Conclusion: 评估必须先于部署，应用于AI模型的偏见审计要求应扩展到验证层。需要建立多元化的水印基准测试标准，确保水印技术在跨语言、文化和人口群体中的公平性和有效性。

Abstract: Watermarking is becoming the default mechanism for AI content authentication, with governance policies and frameworks referencing it as infrastructure for content provenance. Yet across text, image, and audio modalities, watermark signal strength, detectability, and robustness depend on statistical properties of the content itself, properties that vary systematically across languages, cultural visual traditions, and demographic groups. We examine how this content dependence creates modality-specific pathways to bias. Reviewing the major watermarking benchmarks across modalities, we find that, with one exception, none report performance across languages, cultural content types, or population groups. To address this, we propose three concrete evaluation dimensions for pluralistic watermark benchmarking: cross-lingual detection parity, culturally diverse content coverage, and demographic disaggregation of detection metrics. We connect these to the governance frameworks currently mandating watermarking deployment and show that watermarking is held to a lower fairness standard than the generative systems it is meant to govern. Our position is that evaluation must precede deployment, and that the same bias auditing requirements applied to AI models should extend to the verification layer.

</details>


<div id='math.PR'></div>

# math.PR [[Back]](#toc)

### [693] [node2vec or triangle-biased random walks: stationarity, regularity & recurrence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13681)
*Luca Avena,Gianmarco Bet,Lars Schroeder,Clara Stegehuis*

Main category: math.PR

TL;DR: 论文分析了node2vec随机游走的基本性质，通过将其提升到有向边和有向楔形空间得到两个马尔可夫表示，并建立了保证遍历性、可逆性、递归性和不变测度表征的充分条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: node2vec随机游走作为图嵌入和探索中广泛使用的非马尔可夫随机游走模型，虽然应用广泛，但其长期行为的基本数学性质尚未得到充分研究。本文旨在探索其在任意图上的基本性质。

Method: 将node2vec随机游走提升到有向边和有向楔形的状态空间，得到两个不同的马尔可夫表示。利用这些表示分析其渐近行为，建立有限或无限图上保证遍历性、可逆性、递归性和不变测度表征的充分条件。

Result: 发现node2vec随机游走与非回溯随机游走行为有显著差异：后者通过其自然的边马尔可夫表示在任意图上简化（得益于双随机性），而前者在正则图上通过其自然的楔形马尔可夫表示简化。该表示揭示了一个图是正则的当且仅当满足某个加权欧拉性条件。

Conclusion: 通过提升到有向边和有向楔形空间得到的马尔可夫表示是分析node2vec随机游走渐近行为的关键工具。这些表示揭示了node2vec随机游走与正则图结构之间的深刻联系，为其数学分析提供了理论基础。

Abstract: The node2vec random walk is a non-Markovian random walk on the vertex set of a graph, widely used for network embedding and exploration. This random walk model is defined in terms of three parameters which control the probability of, respectively, backtracking moves, moves within triangles, and moves to the remaining neighboring nodes. From a mathematical standpoint, the node2vec random walk is a nontrivial generalization of the non-backtracking random walk and thus belongs to the class of second-order Markov chains. Despite its widespread use in applications, little is known about its long-run behavior. The goal of this paper is to begin exploring its fundamental properties on arbitrary graphs. To this aim, we show how lifting the node2vec random walk to the state spaces of directed edges and directed wedges yields two distinct Markovian representations which are key for its asymptotic analysis. Using these representations, we find mild sufficient conditions on the underlying finite or infinite graph to guarantee ergodicity, reversibility, recurrence and characterization of the invariant measure. As we discuss, the behavior of the node2vec random walk is drastically different compared to the non-backtracking random walk. While the latter simplifies on arbitrary graphs when using its natural edge Markovian representation thanks to bistochasticity, the former simplifies on regular graphs when using its natural wedge Markovian representation. Remarkably, this representation reveals that a graph is regular if and only if a certain weighted Eulerianity condition holds.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [694] [A Unified Conditional Flow for Motion Generation, Editing, and Intra-Structural Retargeting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13427)
*Junlin Li,Xinhao Song,Siqi Wang,Haibin Huang,Yili Zhao*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出统一框架，将文本驱动运动编辑和同拓扑结构重定向视为条件传输的同一生成任务，基于流匹配技术实现


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法中，运动编辑和结构重定向采用碎片化流程，输入和表示不兼容。编辑依赖专门的生成引导，重定向则推迟到几何后处理。需要统一视角简化部署并提高结构一致性

Method: 基于流匹配的统一生成框架，将编辑和重定向视为同一任务，区别仅在于推理时调制的条件信号（语义或结构）。采用DiT风格Transformer架构，具有每关节标记化和显式关节自注意力来严格强制运动学依赖，多条件无分类器引导策略平衡文本遵循与骨骼一致性

Result: 在SnapMoGen和多角色Mixamo子集上的实验表明，单个训练模型支持文本到运动生成、零样本编辑和零样本同拓扑结构重定向。相比任务特定基线，统一方法简化了部署并提高了结构一致性

Conclusion: 通过将运动编辑和结构重定向统一为条件传输的生成任务，基于流匹配技术实现了简化部署和结构一致性的提升，为运动生成提供了统一框架

Abstract: Text-driven motion editing and intra-structural retargeting, where source and target share topology but may differ in bone lengths, are traditionally handled by fragmented pipelines with incompatible inputs and representations: editing relies on specialized generative steering, while retargeting is deferred to geometric post-processing. We present a unifying perspective where both tasks are cast as instances of conditional transport within a single generative framework. By leveraging recent advances in flow matching, we demonstrate that editing and retargeting are fundamentally the same generative task, distinguished only by which conditioning signal, semantic or structural, is modulated during inference. We implement this vision via a rectified-flow motion model jointly conditioned on text prompts and target skeletal structures. Our architecture extends a DiT-style transformer with per-joint tokenization and explicit joint self-attention to strictly enforce kinematic dependencies, while a multi-condition classifier-free guidance strategy balances text adherence with skeletal conformity. Experiments on SnapMoGen and a multi-character Mixamo subset show that a single trained model supports text-to-motion generation, zero-shot editing, and zero-shot intra-structural retargeting. This unified approach simplifies deployment and improves structural consistency compared to task-specific baselines.

</details>


### [695] [Fast Voxelization and Level of Detail for Microgeometry Rendering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13191)
*Javier Fabre,Carlos Castillo,Carlos Rodriguez-Pardo,Jorge Lopez-Moreno*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出了一种高效的并行体素化方法和基于层次SGGX聚类的表示方法，用于处理具有各向异性散射特性的稀疏微结构材料的渲染问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多材料由于微观结构的形状和局部排列而表现出各向异性光散射模式，如纤维表面或拉丝金属的脊线。这些稀疏结构需要高空间分辨率来准确表示为体积数据，但体素数据获取耗时耗内存，且大多数渲染方法需要额外的LOD数据结构来聚合不同距离下的视觉外观。

Method: 1. 提出高效的并行体素化方法，支持快速的多分辨率数据聚合；2. 提出基于层次SGGX聚类的新表示方法，比基线方法提供更好的精度；3. 基于CUDA实现体素化器，在三角形网格和显式纤维建模的体积织物上进行测试；4. 基于提出的LOD渲染模型实现路径追踪器。

Result: 验证了基于CUDA的体素化器实现，测试了三角形网格和体积织物模型。展示了基于提出的LOD渲染模型的路径追踪器生成的结果。

Conclusion: 提出的方法能够高效处理具有各向异性散射特性的稀疏微结构材料的体素化和渲染问题，通过并行体素化和层次SGGX聚类表示提高了效率和精度。

Abstract: Many materials show anisotropic light scattering patterns due to the shape and local alignment of their underlying micro structures: surfaces with small elements such as fibers, or the ridges of a brushed metal, are very sparse and require a high spatial resolution to be properly represented as a volume. The acquisition of voxel data from such objects is a time and memory-intensive task, and most rendering approaches require an additional Level-of-Detail (LoD) data structure to aggregate the visual appearance, as observed from multiple distances, in order to reduce the number of samples computed per pixel (E.g.: MIP mapping). In this work we introduce first, an efficient parallel voxelization method designed to facilitate fast data aggregation at multiple resolution levels, and second, a novel representation based on hierarchical SGGX clustering that provides better accuracy than baseline methods. We validate our approach with a CUDA-based implementation of the voxelizer, tested both on triangle meshes and volumetric fabrics modeled with explicit fibers. Finally, we show the results generated with a path tracer based on the proposed LoD rendering model.

</details>


<div id='astro-ph.SR'></div>

# astro-ph.SR [[Back]](#toc)

### [696] [Irregularly Sampled Time Series Interpolation for Binary Evolution Simulations Using Dynamic Time Warping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13604)
*Ugur Demir,Philipp M. Srivastava,Aggelos Katsaggelos,Vicky Kalogera,Santiago L. Tapia,Manuel Ballester,Shamal Lalvani,Patrick Koller,Jeff J. Andrews,Seth Gossage,Max M. Briel,Elizabeth Teng*

Main category: astro-ph.SR

TL;DR: 提出基于动态时间规整的联合对齐方法，解决双星演化轨迹插值中的时间错位问题，显著提高计算效率和精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双星演化模拟计算成本高昂，传统单星轨迹插值方法不适用于复杂的双星系统，需要开发专门的双星轨迹对齐和插值技术

Method: 采用动态时间规整技术进行轨迹对齐和迭代轨迹平均，计算所有物理参数的共享规整路径，将参数置于一致的时间网格上，保持参数间的因果关系

Result: 联合对齐策略能保持关键物理关系（如斯特藩-玻尔兹曼定律），在多种双星配置下优于现有方法，实现更准确的双星群体样本生成

Conclusion: 适当的时间对齐对双星轨迹插值至关重要，提出的方法能高效生成更准确的双星演化轨迹，为天体物理研究提供更好的计算工具

Abstract: Binary stellar evolution simulations are computationally expensive. Stellar population synthesis relies on these detailed evolution models at a fundamental level. Producing thousands of such models requires hundreds of CPU hours, but stellar track interpolation provides one approach to significantly reduce this computational cost. Although single-star track interpolation is straightforward, stellar interactions in binary systems introduce significant complexity to binary evolution, making traditional single-track interpolation methods inapplicable. Binary tracks present fundamentally different challenges compared to single stars, which possess relatively straightforward evolutionary phases identifiable through distinct physical properties. Binary systems are complicated by mutual interactions that can dramatically alter evolutionary trajectories and introduce discontinuities difficult to capture through standard interpolation. In this work, we introduce a novel approach for track alignment and iterative track averaging based on Dynamic Time Warping to address misalignments between neighboring tracks. Our method computes a single shared warping path across all physical parameters simultaneously, placing them on a consistent temporal grid that preserves the causal relationships between parameters. We demonstrate that this joint-alignment strategy maintains key physical relationships such as the Stefan-Boltzmann law in the interpolated tracks. Our comprehensive evaluation across multiple binary configurations demonstrates that proper temporal alignment is crucial for track interpolation methods. The proposed method consistently outperforms existing approaches and enables the efficient generation of more accurate binary population samples for astrophysical studies.

</details>


<div id='cs.LO'></div>

# cs.LO [[Back]](#toc)

### [697] [Formally Guaranteed Control Adaptation for ODD-Resilient Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07414)
*Gricel Vázquez,Calum Imrie,Sepeedeh Shahbeigi,Nawshin Mannan Proma,Tian Gan,Victoria J Hodge,John Molloy,Simos Gerasimou*

Main category: cs.LO

TL;DR: 提出一种自适应概率系统模型方法，用于处理超出操作设计域(ODD)的场景，同时提供定量保证，提高自动驾驶系统在意外情况下的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确保自动驾驶系统在超出操作设计域(ODD)的情况下仍能保持可靠性能是构建弹性自主系统的主要挑战。当前系统在面对未预见场景时缺乏适应能力和形式化保证。

Method: 引入自适应概率系统模型方法，动态扩展现有系统情境处理能力的覆盖范围，支持在未预见情境下对系统行为进行验证和适应调整。

Result: 初步结果表明，该方法能有效提高系统可靠性，即使在未预见的超出ODD情境下，也能通过行为适应提供形式化保证。

Conclusion: 提出的自适应概率模型方法为解决自动驾驶系统在超出操作设计域场景下的可靠性问题提供了有效途径，通过动态扩展覆盖范围和提供定量保证，增强了系统的弹性。

Abstract: Ensuring reliable performance in situations outside the Operational Design Domain (ODD) remains a primary challenge in devising resilient autonomous systems. We explore this challenge by introducing an approach for adapting probabilistic system models to handle out-of-ODD scenarios while, in parallel, providing quantitative guarantees. Our approach dynamically extends the coverage of existing system situation capabilities, supporting the verification and adaptation of the system's behaviour under unanticipated situations. Preliminary results demonstrate that our approach effectively increases system reliability by adapting its behaviour and providing formal guarantees even under unforeseen out-of-ODD situations.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [698] [CoopEval: Benchmarking Cooperation-Sustaining Mechanisms and LLM Agents in Social Dilemmas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15267)
*Emanuel Tewolde,Xiao Zhang,David Guzman Piedrahita,Vincent Conitzer,Zhijing Jin*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 研究发现LLM推理能力越强在混合动机博弈中越不合作，提出了四种博弈论机制来促进LLM智能体间的合作，发现契约和调解最有效


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM智能体需要与其他目标追求智能体有效安全地互动，但研究发现推理能力更强的LLM在囚徒困境等混合动机博弈中反而更不合作，存在安全隐患

Method: 在四个测试稳健合作不同组成部分的社会困境中，评估了四种博弈论机制：(1)多轮重复博弈，(2)声誉系统，(3)第三方调解，(4)结果条件支付的契约协议

Result: 契约和调解在促进能力强的LLM模型间合作方面最有效；当共同参与者变化时，重复博弈诱导的合作急剧恶化；在进化压力下这些合作机制变得更有效

Conclusion: 需要设计专门的机制来促进LLM智能体间的合作，契约和调解是有效的解决方案，特别是在进化压力下这些机制效果更好

Abstract: It is increasingly important that LLM agents interact effectively and safely with other goal-pursuing agents, yet, recent works report the opposite trend: LLMs with stronger reasoning capabilities behave _less_ cooperatively in mixed-motive games such as the prisoner's dilemma and public goods settings. Indeed, our experiments show that recent models -- with or without reasoning enabled -- consistently defect in single-shot social dilemmas.
  To tackle this safety concern, we present the first comparative study of game-theoretic mechanisms that are designed to enable cooperative outcomes between rational agents _in equilibrium_. Across four social dilemmas testing distinct components of robust cooperation, we evaluate the following mechanisms: (1) repeating the game for many rounds, (2) reputation systems, (3) third-party mediators to delegate decision making to, and (4) contract agreements for outcome-conditional payments between players. Among our findings, we establish that contracting and mediation are most effective in achieving cooperative outcomes between capable LLM models, and that repetition-induced cooperation deteriorates drastically when co-players vary. Moreover, we demonstrate that these cooperation mechanisms become _more effective_ under evolutionary pressures to maximize individual payoffs.

</details>


<div id='stat.ME'></div>

# stat.ME [[Back]](#toc)

### [699] [Combining Bayesian and Frequentist Inference for Laboratory-Specific Performance Guarantees in Copy Number Variation Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14305)
*Austin Talbot,Alex V. Kotlar,Yue Ke*

Main category: stat.ME

TL;DR: 提出一种混合框架，将贝叶斯后验函数与伽马分布建模相结合，为目标扩增子面板的CNV检测提供有效的频率学覆盖保证，解决了小扩增子计数下贝叶斯可信区间校准不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目标扩增子面板在肿瘤诊断中广泛应用，但由于扩增伪影、过程不匹配异质性和有限验证样本量，为拷贝数变异检测提供每基因性能保证仍然具有挑战性。贝叶斯CNV调用器虽然能自然量化每样本不确定性，但将其转换为临床验证所需的频率学群体水平保证（覆盖率、假阳性界限、最小可检测拷贝数变化）是一个根本不同的推断问题。

Method: 提出混合框架：在验证样本上评估贝叶斯后验函数，使用伽马分布对平方损失进行建模，产生具有有效频率学覆盖的容忍区间。包含三个实用组件：(1) 插值去除真实CNV阳性样本影响（无需已知真实值），(2) 正则化处理小样本变异性，(3) 基于对数模型证据的分层以适应过程不匹配产生的非可交换噪声分布。

Result: 在两个目标扩增子面板上使用留一交叉验证评估，该方法在过程匹配和不匹配条件下，所有基因的平均绝对覆盖误差均达到个位数，而贝叶斯比较器在ERBB2等临床相关基因上表现出超过60%的平均绝对误差。

Conclusion: 该方法为目标扩增子面板的CNV检测提供了有效的频率学性能保证，解决了小扩增子计数下贝叶斯方法的校准不足问题，在临床验证中具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Targeted amplicon panels are widely used in oncology diagnostics, but providing per-gene performance guarantees for copy number variant (CNV) detection remains challenging due to amplification artifacts, process-mismatch heterogeneity, and limited validation sample sizes. While Bayesian CNV callers naturally quantify per-sample uncertainty, translating this into the frequentist population-level guarantees required for clinical validation, coverage rates, false-positive bounds, and minimum detectable copy-number changes, is a fundamentally different inferential problem. We show empirically that even robust Bayesian credible intervals, including coarsened posteriors and sandwich-adjusted intervals, are severely miscalibrated on panels with small amplicon counts per gene. To address this, we propose a hybrid framework that evaluates Bayesian posterior functionals on validation samples and models the resulting squared losses with a Gamma distribution, yielding tolerance intervals with valid frequentist coverage. Three components make the method practical under real-world constraints: (1) imputation that removes the influence of true CNV-positive samples without requiring known ground truth, (2) regularization to address small sample variability, and (3) evidence-based stratification on the log model evidence to accommodate non-exchangeable noise profiles arising from process mismatch. Evaluated on two targeted amplicon panels using leave-one-out cross-validation, the proposed method achieves single-digit mean absolute coverage error across all genes under both process-matched and unmatched conditions, whereas Bayesian comparators exhibit mean absolute errors exceeding 60\% on clinically relevant genes such as ERBB2.

</details>


### [700] [Estimating Continuous Treatment Effects with Two-Stage Kernel Ridge Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13410)
*Seok-Jin Kim,Kaizheng Wang*

Main category: stat.ME

TL;DR: 提出两阶段核岭回归方法估计连续治疗的效果函数，通过伪结果校正分布偏移，并引入数据驱动的模型选择程序实现自适应


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 估计连续治疗的效果函数面临混杂偏倚的挑战，因为治疗分配通常依赖于协变量，导致直接回归不可靠

Method: 两阶段核岭回归：第一阶段学习响应作为治疗和协变量的函数；第二阶段使用该模型构建校正分布偏移的伪结果，然后拟合第二个模型估计治疗效果

Result: 方法能够适应效果函数的结构复杂性，引入的数据驱动模型选择程序可自适应未知的重叠程度和核的特征值衰减规律

Conclusion: 提出的两阶段核岭回归方法能有效解决连续治疗效果函数估计中的混杂偏倚问题，并通过自适应模型选择实现理论保证

Abstract: We study the problem of estimating the effect function for a continuous treatment, which maps each treatment value to a population-averaged outcome. A central challenge in this setting is confounding: treatment assignment often depends on covariates, creating selection bias that makes direct regression of the response on treatment unreliable. To address this issue, we propose a two-stage kernel ridge regression method. In the first stage, we learn a model for the response as a function of both treatment and covariates; in the second stage, we use this model to construct pseudo-outcomes that correct for distribution shift, and then fit a second model to estimate the treatment effect. Although the response varies with both treatment and covariates, the induced effect function obtained by averaging over covariates is typically much simpler, and our estimator adapts to this structure. Furthermore, we introduce a fully data-driven model selection procedure that achieves provable adaptivity to both the unknown degree of overlap and the regularity (eigenvalue decay) of the underlying kernel.

</details>


<div id='cs.PF'></div>

# cs.PF [[Back]](#toc)

### [701] [DEEP-GAP: Deep-learning Evaluation of Execution Parallelism in GPU Architectural Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14552)
*Kathiravan Palaniappan*

Main category: cs.PF

TL;DR: DEEP-GAP系统评估了NVIDIA T4和L4 GPU在推理任务上的性能差异，发现L4在吞吐量上比T4最高提升4.4倍，且在较小批次规模(16-32)达到峰值效率，适合延迟敏感应用；T4在大批次工作负载中仍保持竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代数据中心越来越多地采用低功耗、单槽推理加速器来平衡性能、能效和机架密度限制。NVIDIA T4 GPU因出色的性能功耗比和成熟的软件支持而广泛部署，其继任者L4 GPU在张量核心吞吐量、缓存容量、内存带宽和并行执行能力方面都有改进，但缺乏在受控可复现条件下量化两代GPU实际推理性能差距的实证证据。

Method: 本研究引入DEEP-GAP，扩展GDEV-AI方法学至GPU推理评估。在相同配置和工作负载下，使用PyTorch和TensorRT评估ResNet18、ResNet50和ResNet101在FP32、FP16和INT8精度模式下的性能。

Result: 降低精度显著提升性能，INT8相比CPU基线最高实现58倍吞吐量提升。L4比T4最高实现4.4倍吞吐量提升，且在较小批次规模(16-32)达到峰值效率，改善了延迟敏感工作负载的延迟-吞吐量权衡。T4在大批次工作负载中，当成本或能效是重要考量时仍保持竞争力。

Conclusion: DEEP-GAP为现代推理部署选择精度模式、批次规模和GPU架构提供了实用指导。L4在延迟敏感应用中表现更优，而T4在大批次工作负载中仍具成本效益。

Abstract: Modern datacenters increasingly rely on low-power, single-slot inference accelerators to balance performance, energy efficiency, and rack density constraints. The NVIDIA T4 GPU has become widely deployed due to strong performance per watt and mature software support. Its successor, the NVIDIA L4 GPU, introduces improvements in Tensor Core throughput, cache capacity, memory bandwidth, and parallel execution capability. However, limited empirical evidence quantifies the practical inference performance gap between these two generations under controlled and reproducible conditions.
  This work introduces DEEP-GAP, a systematic evaluation extending the GDEV-AI methodology to GPU inference. Using identical configurations and workloads, we evaluate ResNet18, ResNet50, and ResNet101 across FP32, FP16, and INT8 precision modes using PyTorch and TensorRT.
  Results show that reduced precision significantly improves performance, with INT8 achieving up to 58x throughput improvement over CPU baselines. L4 achieves up to 4.4x higher throughput than T4 while reaching peak efficiency at smaller batch sizes between 16 and 32, improving latency-throughput tradeoffs for latency-sensitive workloads. T4 remains competitive for large batch workloads where cost or power efficiency is important.
  DEEP-GAP provides practical guidance for selecting precision modes, batch sizes, and GPU architectures for modern inference deployments.

</details>


<div id='cs.CR'></div>

# cs.CR [[Back]](#toc)

### [702] [Robustness of Vision Foundation Models to Common Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14973)
*Hongbin Liu,Zhengyuan Jiang,Cheng Hong,Neil Zhenqiang Gong*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 首次系统研究视觉基础模型对常见图像编辑操作（如JPEG压缩、亮度对比度调整）的鲁棒性，提出三个鲁棒性指标及其数学性质，评估六个工业级基础模型，发现普遍不鲁棒，并提出微调方法提升鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉基础模型输出的图像嵌入向量会受到常见编辑操作的影响，这些扰动可能影响下游任务的性能，但目前缺乏对此类扰动的系统性鲁棒性研究

Method: 提出三个鲁棒性评估指标，并定义五个期望的数学性质；使用这些指标评估六个工业级基础模型（OpenAI、Meta等）在九种常见扰动类别下的表现；提出一种微调方法来提升鲁棒性而不牺牲实用性

Result: 发现基础模型普遍对常见扰动不鲁棒；常见扰动会降低下游应用性能（如分类准确率）；鲁棒性值可以预测性能影响；提出的微调方法能够有效提升鲁棒性

Conclusion: 这是首个系统研究视觉基础模型对常见图像编辑操作鲁棒性的工作，揭示了现有模型的脆弱性，提出了评估框架和改进方法，为构建更鲁棒的基础模型提供了重要见解

Abstract: A vision foundation model outputs an embedding vector for an image, which can be affected by common editing operations (e.g., JPEG compression, brightness, contrast adjustments). These common perturbations alter embedding vectors and may impact the performance of downstream tasks using these embeddings. In this work, we present the first systematic study on foundation models' robustness to such perturbations. We propose three robustness metrics and formulate five desired mathematical properties for these metrics, analyzing which properties they satisfy or violate. Using these metrics, we evaluate six industry-scale foundation models (OpenAI, Meta) across nine common perturbation categories, finding them generally non-robust. We also show that common perturbations degrade downstream application performance (e.g., classification accuracy) and that robustness values can predict performance impacts. Finally, we propose a fine-tuning approach to improve robustness without sacrificing utility.

</details>


### [703] [Challenges and Future Directions in Agentic Reverse Engineering Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14317)
*Salem Radey,Jack West,Kassem Fawaz*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该论文分析了基于大语言模型的智能体系统在二进制逆向工程任务中的表现，识别了现有系统的局限性，并提出了未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管基于大语言模型的智能体系统在复杂安全任务（特别是二进制逆向工程）中越来越受欢迎，但这些系统在现实场景中仍面临严重限制。现有系统在处理涉及混淆、时序和独特架构的复杂逆向工程场景时仍然失败，需要系统性地评估其性能并识别根本问题。

Method: 通过分析静态、动态和混合智能体在逆向工程任务中的表现，评估现有智能体工具的使用情况。研究识别了多个具体限制因素，包括令牌约束、混淆处理困难以及缺乏程序防护机制。

Result: 研究发现当前智能体系统在复杂逆向工程场景中存在显著局限性：令牌限制影响分析深度，混淆技术导致系统失效，缺乏防护机制增加安全风险。这些限制阻碍了系统在实际安全环境中的应用。

Conclusion: 论文从安全角度概述了当前挑战，并为系统设计者定位了未来发展方向。需要解决令牌约束、混淆抵抗和程序防护等问题，以提升智能体系统在复杂逆向工程任务中的实际应用能力。

Abstract: Agentic systems built on large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being used for complex security tasks, including binary reverse engineering (RE). Despite recent growth in popularity and capability, these systems continue to face limitations in realistic settings. Cutting-edge systems still fail in complex RE scenarios that involve obfuscation, timing, and unique architecture. In this work, we examine how agentic systems perform reverse engineering tasks with static, dynamic, and hybrid agents. Through an analysis of existing agentic tool usage, we identify several limitations, including token constraints, struggles with obfuscation, and a lack of program guardrails. From these findings, we outline current challenges and position future directions for system designers to overcome from a security perspective.

</details>


### [704] [MCPThreatHive: Automated Threat Intelligence for Model Context Protocol Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13849)
*Yi Ting Shen,Kentaroh Toyoda,Alex Leung*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: MCPThreatHive是一个开源平台，用于自动化MCP威胁情报的端到端生命周期管理，填补现有MCP安全工具在组合攻击建模、持续威胁情报和统一多框架分类方面的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于模型上下文协议（MCP）的智能体系统快速发展，引入了现有安全框架无法充分应对的新型安全威胁，需要专门的威胁情报平台来填补这一安全空白。

Method: 开发了MCPThreatHive平台，实现MCP威胁情报的端到端自动化管理：包括多源数据收集、AI驱动的威胁提取与分类、结构化知识图谱存储和交互式可视化。平台采用MCP-38威胁分类法，将38种MCP特定威胁模式映射到STRIDE、OWASP LLM应用十大风险和OWASP智能体应用十大风险框架，并提供复合风险评分模型进行量化优先级排序。

Result: 通过对比分析现有代表性MCP安全工具，识别出MCPThreatHive解决的三个关键覆盖空白：不完整的组合攻击建模、缺乏持续威胁情报、以及缺少统一的多框架分类方法。

Conclusion: MCPThreatHive平台为MCP智能体系统提供了一个全面的威胁情报解决方案，通过自动化端到端流程和统一分类框架，填补了现有安全工具的不足，为MCP生态系统的安全防护提供了重要工具。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of Model Context Protocol (MCP)-based agentic systems has introduced a new category of security threats that existing frameworks are inadequately equipped to address. We present MCPThreatHive, an open-source platform that automates the end-to-end lifecycle of MCP threat intelligence: from continuous, multi-source data collection through AI-driven threat extraction and classification, to structured knowledge graph storage and interactive visualization. The platform operationalizes the MCP-38 threat taxonomy, a curated set of 38 MCP-specific threat patterns mapped to STRIDE, OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications, and OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications. A composite risk scoring model provides quantitative prioritization. Through a comparative analysis of representative existing MCP security tools, we identify three critical coverage gaps that MCPThreatHive addresses: incomplete compositional attack modeling, absence of continuous threat intelligence, and lack of unified multi-framework classification.

</details>


### [705] [Secure and Privacy-Preserving Vertical Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13474)
*Shan Jin,Sai Rahul Rachuri,Yizhen Wang,Anderson C. A. Nascimento,Yiwei Cai*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出一个端到端的隐私保护联邦学习框架，针对特征垂直分割场景，通过多服务器MPC协议和差分隐私技术保护输入和输出隐私


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决垂直联邦学习中特征分割场景下的隐私保护问题，传统方法存在隐私泄露风险，需要同时保护输入数据和输出模型的隐私

Method: 将FL聚合器角色分配到多个服务器，运行安全多方计算协议进行模型和特征聚合，应用差分隐私到最终发布模型；提出优化方案支持纯全局和全局-局部模型更新，大幅减少MPC计算和通信开销

Result: 实验结果表明协议的有效性，相比朴素方案显著降低了计算和通信成本

Conclusion: 提出了一个高效、端到端的隐私保护联邦学习框架，适用于垂直分割场景，能同时保护输入和输出隐私，具有实际部署价值

Abstract: We propose a novel end-to-end privacy-preserving framework, instantiated by three efficient protocols for different deployment scenarios, covering both input and output privacy, for the vertically split scenario in federated learning (FL), where features are split across clients and labels are not shared by all parties. We do so by distributing the role of the aggregator in FL into multiple servers and having them run secure multiparty computation (MPC) protocols to perform model and feature aggregation and apply differential privacy (DP) to the final released model. While a naive solution would have the clients delegating the entirety of training to run in MPC between the servers, our optimized solution, which supports purely global and also global-local models updates with privacy-preserving, drastically reduces the amount of computation and communication performed using multiparty computation. The experimental results also show the effectiveness of our protocols.

</details>


### [706] [Anomaly Detection in IEC-61850 GOOSE Networks: Evaluating Unsupervised and Temporal Learning for Real-Time Intrusion Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14233)
*Joseph Moore*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该论文评估了无监督时序模型在IEC-61850 GOOSE协议实时入侵检测中的应用，比较了五种模型，发现GRU在满足4ms延迟约束的同时获得了最佳性能折衷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: IEC-61850 GOOSE协议缺乏原生安全机制，易受重放、伪装和数据注入攻击。由于严格的延迟约束（亚4ms）和标记攻击数据有限，传统入侵检测方法在此场景下面临挑战。

Method: 在ERENO IEC-61850数据集上比较了五种模型：监督式随机森林基线、前馈自编码器以及三种循环序列自编码器（RNN、LSTM和GRU）。无监督模型的异常阈值在验证集上选择以避免测试集泄漏。

Result: 监督式随机森林获得最高检测性能（F1=0.9516）但无法满足实时约束（21.8ms/预测）。所有四种无监督模型均满足4ms要求，其中GRU在延迟和准确率之间取得最佳折衷（F1=0.8737，1.118ms）。跨环境评估显示所有模型在分布偏移下性能下降，但循环模型比监督基线保持更高的相对性能。

Conclusion: 无监督时序模型是GOOSE实时入侵检测的实用选择，特别是在标记训练数据不可用或需要在多样化变电站大规模部署的环境中。时序序列建模比拟合标记攻击分布具有更好的泛化能力。

Abstract: The IEC-61850 GOOSE protocol underpins time-critical communication in modern digital substations but lacks native security mechanisms, leaving it vulnerable to replay, masquerade, and data injection attacks. Intrusion detection in this setting is challenging due to strict latency constraints (sub-4ms) and limited availability of labeled attack data. This paper evaluates whether unsupervised temporal modeling can provide effective and deployable anomaly detection for GOOSE networks. Five models are compared on the ERENO IEC-61850 dataset: a supervised Random Forest baseline, a feedforward Autoencoder, and three recurrent sequence autoencoders (RNN, LSTM, and GRU). The supervised Random Forest achieves the highest detection performance (F1=0.9516) but fails to meet real-time constraints at 21.8ms per prediction. All four unsupervised models satisfy the 4ms requirement, with the GRU achieving the best accuracy to latency tradeoff among them (F1=0.8737 at 1.118ms). A cross-environment evaluation on an independent dataset shows that all models degrade under distribution shift. However, recurrent models retain substantially higher relative performance than the supervised baseline, suggesting that temporal sequence modeling generalizes better than fitting labeled attack distributions. Anomaly thresholds for the unsupervised models are selected on a held out validation partition to avoid test set leakage. These results support unsupervised temporal models as a practical choice for real-time GOOSE intrusion detection, particularly in environments where labeled training data may be unavailable or where large-scale deployment across diverse substations is required.

</details>


<div id='eess.SP'></div>

# eess.SP [[Back]](#toc)

### [707] [Temporal Cross-Modal Knowledge-Distillation-Based Transfer-Learning for Gas Turbine Vibration Fault Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14766)
*Ali Bagheri Nejad,Mahdi Aliyari-Shoorehdeli,Abolfazl Hasanzadeh*

Main category: eess.SP

TL;DR: 提出TCMKDTL框架，通过时间跨模态知识蒸馏解决燃气轮机故障检测中模型复杂度与实时性矛盾，利用大时间窗口教师模型向紧凑学生模型蒸馏特征知识，实现高性能无监督异常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 燃气轮机等关键设备需要早期故障检测，但现有深度学习模型面临架构复杂度与实时性约束的矛盾，且受限于振动信号窗口缺乏时间上下文信息。

Method: 提出时间跨模态知识蒸馏迁移学习框架：1）训练"特权"教师模型，使用包含过去和未来信号上下文的大时间窗口；2）将潜在特征知识蒸馏到紧凑学生模型；3）利用基准数据集预训练后适应目标工业数据，解决数据稀缺和域偏移问题。

Result: 在实验和工业燃气轮机数据集上的评估表明，TCMKDTL相比传统预训练架构实现了更优的特征可分性和诊断精度，适合在资源受限的工业硬件上部署。

Conclusion: 该框架通过时间知识蒸馏解决了故障检测中模型复杂度与实时性的权衡，实现了高性能的无监督异常检测，适用于工业应用。

Abstract: Preventing machine failure is inherently superior to reactive remediation, particularly for critical assets like gas turbines, where early fault detection (FD) is a cornerstone of industrial sustainability. However, modern deep learning-based FD models often face a significant trade-off between architectural complexity and real-time operational constraints, often hindered by a lack of temporal context within restricted vibration signal windows. To address these challenges, this study proposes a Temporal Cross-Modal Knowledge-Distillation Transfer-Learning (TCMKDTL) framework. The framework employs a "privileged" teacher model trained on expansive temporal windows incorporating both past and future signal context to distill latent feature-based knowledge into a compact student model. To mitigate issues of data scarcity and domain shift, the framework leverages robust pre-training on benchmark datasets (such as CWRU) followed by adaptation to target industrial data. Extensive evaluation using experimental and industrial gas turbine (MGT-40) datasets demonstrates that TCMKDTL achieves superior feature separability and diagnostic accuracy compared to conventional pre-trained architectures. Ultimately, this approach enables high-performance, unsupervised anomaly detection suitable for deployment on resource-constrained industrial hardware.

</details>


### [708] [VLMaterial: Vision-Language Model-Based Camera-Radar Fusion for Physics-Grounded Material Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11671)
*Jiangyou Zhu,He Chen*

Main category: eess.SP

TL;DR: VLMaterial：一种免训练的视觉语言模型与雷达融合框架，通过物理接地方法实现材料识别，解决视觉欺骗问题，在真实世界实验中达到96.08%的识别准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视觉的材料识别方法在面对镜面反射、透明性和视觉欺骗时存在局限，而现有的相机-雷达融合方法仅限于封闭集类别且缺乏语义可解释性。需要一种能够融合多模态信息、具备物理基础且无需大量训练数据的材料识别框架。

Method: 提出三部分方法：1) 双流水线架构：光学流水线使用SAM和VLM生成材料候选建议，电磁特征流水线通过PRCA方法和加权向量合成从雷达信号提取介电常数；2) 上下文增强生成策略：为VLM注入雷达特定物理知识，使其能够解释电磁参数；3) 自适应融合机制：基于不确定性估计智能整合双传感器输出，解决跨模态冲突。

Result: 在超过120个真实世界实验中，涉及41种日常物品和4种典型视觉欺骗仿制品，VLMaterial实现了96.08%的识别准确率，性能与最先进的封闭集基准相当，同时无需大量任务特定数据收集和训练。

Conclusion: VLMaterial通过融合视觉语言模型的语义理解能力和雷达的物理传感能力，实现了免训练、物理接地且具有语义可解释性的材料识别，为解决视觉欺骗问题提供了有效解决方案，同时避免了传统方法对大量标注数据的依赖。

Abstract: Accurate material recognition is a fundamental capability for intelligent perception systems to interact safely and effectively with the physical world. For instance, distinguishing visually similar objects like glass and plastic cups is critical for safety but challenging for vision-based methods due to specular reflections, transparency, and visual deception. While millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar offers robust material sensing regardless of lighting, existing camera-radar fusion methods are limited to closed-set categories and lack semantic interpretability. In this paper, we introduce VLMaterial, a training-free framework that fuses vision-language models (VLMs) with domain-specific radar knowledge for physics-grounded material identification. First, we propose a dual-pipeline architecture: an optical pipeline uses the segment anything model and VLM for material candidate proposals, while an electromagnetic characterization pipeline extracts the intrinsic dielectric constant from radar signals via an effective peak reflection cell area (PRCA) method and weighted vector synthesis. Second, we employ a context-augmented generation (CAG) strategy to equip the VLM with radar-specific physical knowledge, enabling it to interpret electromagnetic parameters as stable references. Third, an adaptive fusion mechanism is introduced to intelligently integrate outputs from both sensors by resolving cross-modal conflicts based on uncertainty estimation. We evaluated VLMaterial in over 120 real-world experiments involving 41 diverse everyday objects and 4 typical visually deceptive counterfeits across varying environments. Experimental results demonstrate that VLMaterial achieves a recognition accuracy of 96.08%, delivering performance on par with state-of-the-art closed-set benchmarks while eliminating the need for extensive task-specific data collection and training.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [709] [Structural interpretability in SVMs with truncated orthogonal polynomial kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15285)
*Víctor Soto-Larrosa,Nuria Torrado,Edmundo J. Huertas*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出ORCA框架，通过正交核贡献指数分析SVM分类器的结构复杂性，无需重新训练或替代模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究截断正交多项式核SVM的训练后可解释性，传统预测精度无法揭示模型结构复杂性，需要量化分类器在RKHS中的贡献分布

Method: 基于有限维再生核希尔伯特空间的正交基，将决策函数展开为内在RKHS坐标，提出正交表示贡献分析框架和正交核贡献指数

Result: 在合成双螺旋问题和真实五维超声心动图数据集上验证，指数揭示了模型结构复杂性，这些信息无法仅通过预测精度获得

Conclusion: ORCA为SVM提供有效的训练后诊断框架，正交核贡献指数能量化分类器复杂性分布，增强模型可解释性

Abstract: We study post-training interpretability for Support Vector Machines (SVMs) built from truncated orthogonal polynomial kernels. Since the associated reproducing kernel Hilbert space is finite-dimensional and admits an explicit tensor-product orthonormal basis, the fitted decision function can be expanded exactly in intrinsic RKHS coordinates. This leads to Orthogonal Representation Contribution Analysis (ORCA), a diagnostic framework based on normalized Orthogonal Kernel Contribution (OKC) indices. These indices quantify how the squared RKHS norm of the classifier is distributed across interaction orders, total polynomial degrees, marginal coordinate effects, and pairwise contributions. The methodology is fully post-training and requires neither surrogate models nor retraining. We illustrate its diagnostic value on a synthetic double-spiral problem and on a real five-dimensional echocardiogram dataset. The results show that the proposed indices reveal structural aspects of model complexity that are not captured by predictive accuracy alone.

</details>


### [710] [Amortized Optimal Transport from Sliced Potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15114)
*Minh-Phuc Truong,Khai Nguyen*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出两种基于摊销优化的最优传输方法：回归摊销OT(RA-OT)和目标摊销OT(OA-OT)，利用切片OT的Kantorovich势能预测多对测度间的OT方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统最优传输方法在处理多对测度时需要重复计算，计算成本高。需要开发摊销优化方法，利用先前实例学习的信息快速近似新解，提高重复OT问题的求解效率。

Method: 提出两种摊销策略：1) RA-OT：建立函数回归模型，将原始OT问题的Kantorovich势能作为响应，切片OT获得的势能作为预测变量，通过最小二乘法估计；2) OA-OT：通过优化Kantorovich对偶目标估计函数模型参数。两种方法都从估计的势能中恢复预测的OT方案。

Result: 方法具有高效性，能重复利用先前学习信息快速近似新解；模型更简洁，不依赖测度的具体结构（如离散情况下的原子数量）；在MNIST数字传输、颜色迁移、球面数据供需运输、小批量OT条件流匹配等任务中表现出高精度。

Conclusion: 提出的RA-OT和OA-OT作为摊销OT方法，通过利用切片OT提供的结构，实现了对多对测度间OT方案的高效预测，在保持高精度的同时降低了计算复杂度。
