Abstract: We propose a novel amortized optimization method for predicting optimal transport (OT) plans across multiple pairs of measures by leveraging Kantorovich potentials derived from sliced OT. We introduce two amortization strategies: regression-based amortization (RA-OT) and objective-based amortization (OA-OT). In RA-OT, we formulate a functional regression model that treats Kantorovich potentials from the original OT problem as responses and those obtained from sliced OT as predictors, and estimate these models via least-squares methods. In OA-OT, we estimate the parameters of the functional model by optimizing the Kantorovich dual objective. In both approaches, the predicted OT plan is subsequently recovered from the estimated potentials. As amortized OT methods, both RA-OT and OA-OT enable efficient solutions to repeated OT problems across different measure pairs by reusing information learned from prior instances to rapidly approximate new solutions. Moreover, by exploiting the structure provided by sliced OT, the proposed models are more parsimonious, independent of specific structures of the measures, such as the number of atoms in the discrete case, while achieving high accuracy. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approaches on tasks including MNIST digit transport, color transfer, supply-demand transportation on spherical data, and mini-batch OT conditional flow matching.

</details>


### [711] [MinShap: A Modified Shapley Value Approach for Feature Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15107)
*Chenghui Zheng,Garvesh Raskutti*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: MinShap：一种基于Shapley值最小边际贡献的特征选择方法，通过考虑特征排列中的最小边际贡献而非平均值，改进了传统Shapley值在特征选择中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统特征选择方法在处理非线性关系和特征依赖时面临挑战，而Shapley值虽然广泛用于特征归因，但不适合特征选择，因为它同时捕捉直接效应和通过其他特征的间接效应。

Method: 提出MinShap方法，修改Shapley值框架：考虑特征排列中的最小边际贡献而非平均值。还提出一套相关算法，采用多重检验/p值视角以改进低样本量下的性能。

Result: MinShap在数值模拟和真实数据实验中，在准确性和稳定性方面优于LOCO、GCM和Lasso等最先进的特征选择算法。提供了基于DAG忠实性假设的理论基础，并保证了MinShap的I类错误控制。

Conclusion: MinShap成功将Shapley值适应于特征选择任务，通过最小边际贡献方法有效区分直接效应和间接效应，在非线性高依赖特征场景下表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Feature selection is a classical problem in statistics and machine learning, and it continues to remain an extremely challenging problem especially in the context of unknown non-linear relationships with dependent features. On the other hand, Shapley values are a classic solution concept from cooperative game theory that is widely used for feature attribution in general non-linear models with highly-dependent features. However, Shapley values are not naturally suited for feature selection since they tend to capture both direct effects from each feature to the response and indirect effects through other features. In this paper, we combine the advantages of Shapley values and adapt them to feature selection by proposing \emph{MinShap}, a modification of the Shapley value framework along with a suite of other related algorithms. In particular for MinShap, instead of taking the average marginal contributions over permutations of features, considers the minimum marginal contribution across permutations. We provide a theoretical foundation motivated by the faithfulness assumption in DAG (directed acyclic graphical models), a guarantee for the Type I error of MinShap, and show through numerical simulations and real data experiments that MinShap tends to outperform state-of-the-art feature selection algorithms such as LOCO, GCM and Lasso in terms of both accuracy and stability. We also introduce a suite of algorithms related to MinShap by using the multiple testing/p-value perspective that improves performance in lower-sample settings and provide supporting theoretical guarantees.

</details>


### [712] [Best of both worlds: Stochastic & adversarial best-arm identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14860)
*Yasin Abbasi-Yadkori,Peter L. Bartlett,Victor Gabillon,Alan Malek,Michal Valko*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究具有任意且可能对抗性奖励的多臂老虎机最优臂识别问题，提出了一种能在随机和对抗性场景下都表现良好的参数无关算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于设计一个既能处理对抗性奖励又能利用随机性奖励结构的学习器。简单均匀随机策略在对抗性场景下能达到最优错误率，但在随机场景下表现次优。因此需要探索能否设计一个无需知道奖励性质（随机或对抗）就能在两种场景下都达到最优性能的学习器。

Method: 首先通过理论分析证明在一般情况下设计这样的通用学习器是不可能的。然后给出当策略被约束为对抗性鲁棒时，在随机问题上能达到的最优错误率的下界。最后设计了一个简单的参数无关算法，该算法在随机问题上能达到对数因子内的最优错误率，同时对对抗性奖励也具有鲁棒性。

Result: 理论结果表明：1）设计一个同时在随机和对抗场景下都最优的通用学习器是不可能的；2）给出了对抗鲁棒策略在随机问题上能达到的最优错误率下界；3）提出的参数无关算法在随机问题上的错误概率匹配（对数因子内）该下界，同时对对抗性奖励也具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 本文系统研究了多臂老虎机最优臂识别在随机和对抗混合场景下的理论极限和算法设计。虽然完全通用的最优学习器不可能存在，但通过约束对抗鲁棒性，可以设计出在随机问题上达到接近最优性能的算法，为这一重要问题提供了理论框架和实用解决方案。

Abstract: We study bandit best-arm identification with arbitrary and potentially adversarial rewards. A simple random uniform learner obtains the optimal rate of error in the adversarial scenario. However, this type of strategy is suboptimal when the rewards are sampled stochastically. Therefore, we ask: Can we design a learner that performs optimally in both the stochastic and adversarial problems while not being aware of the nature of the rewards? First, we show that designing such a learner is impossible in general. In particular, to be robust to adversarial rewards, we can only guarantee optimal rates of error on a subset of the stochastic problems. We give a lower bound that characterizes the optimal rate in stochastic problems if the strategy is constrained to be robust to adversarial rewards. Finally, we design a simple parameter-free algorithm and show that its probability of error matches (up to log factors) the lower bound in stochastic problems, and it is also robust to adversarial ones.

</details>


### [713] [Expert-Guided Class-Conditional Goodness-of-Fit Scores for Interpretable Classification with Informative Missingness: An Application to Seismic Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14809)
*Shahar Cohen,David M. Steinberg,Yael Radzyner,Yochai Ben Horin*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出一个解决分类问题的框架，处理信息性缺失、整合专家先验知识、生成可解释决策规则，应用于地震监测领域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决分类问题中的三个关键挑战：普遍的信息性缺失、将部分专家先验知识整合到学习过程中、需要可解释的决策规则。特别是在地震监测等需要透明决策的领域，传统机器学习方法缺乏可解释性。

Method: 通过专家指导的类条件模型编码先验知识，构建一组可解释的拟合优度特征，量化观测数据与专家模型的一致性，分离数据和缺失分量的贡献。将这些特征与少量透明辅助摘要结合，构建简单的判别分类器。

Result: 该方法在地震监测中显示出作为透明筛选工具的潜力，能减少专家分析师的工作量。模拟实验表明，这种可解释的专家指导方法在小样本情况下甚至能超越标准机器学习分类器。

Conclusion: 提出的框架成功解决了信息性缺失、专家知识整合和可解释性需求三个挑战，为需要透明决策的领域（如条约合规监测）提供了有效的解决方案，在小样本情况下表现优异。

Abstract: We study a classification problem with three key challenges: pervasive informative missingness, the integration of partial prior expert knowledge into the learning process, and the need for interpretable decision rules. We propose a framework that encodes prior knowledge through an expert-guided class-conditional model for one or more classes, and use this model to construct a small set of interpretable goodness-of-fit features. The features quantify how well the observed data agree with the expert model, isolating the contributions of different aspects of the data, including both observed and missing components. These features are combined with a few transparent auxiliary summaries in a simple discriminative classifier, resulting in a decision rule that is easy to inspect and justify. We develop and apply the framework in the context of seismic monitoring used to assess compliance with the Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty. We show that the method has strong potential as a transparent screening tool, reducing workload for expert analysts. A simulation designed to isolate the contribution of the proposed framework shows that this interpretable expert-guided method can even outperform strong standard machine-learning classifiers, particularly when training samples are small.

</details>


### [714] [Differentially Private Conformal Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14621)
*Jiamei Wu,Ce Zhang,Zhipeng Cai,Jingsen Kong,Bei Jiang,Linglong Kong,Lingchen Kong*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种在差分隐私下进行保形预测的统计高效方法，包括非分裂的差分保形预测和完全私有的DPCP方法，相比现有私有分裂方法能产生更紧的预测集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统保形预测在差分隐私下通常采用数据分裂方法，这会导致统计效率损失。需要开发一种既能保护隐私又能保持统计效率的保形预测框架。

Method: 1. 提出差分保形预测：一种非分裂的保形程序，利用DP机制的稳定性特性建立与oracle保形预测的直接联系；2. 开发DPCP：完全私有程序，结合DP模型训练和私有分位数机制进行校准；3. 在经验风险最小化和一般回归模型下分析效率。

Result: 1. 建立了DPCP的端到端隐私保证；2. 在额外正则条件下研究了覆盖特性；3. 证明DPCP在相同隐私预算下能产生比现有私有分裂保形方法更紧的预测集；4. 在合成和真实数据集上的数值实验验证了方法的实际有效性。

Conclusion: 该工作提供了一种在差分隐私下进行保形预测的统计高效框架，通过避免数据分裂损失并利用DP稳定性，实现了比现有方法更优的预测集紧致性，为私有不确定性量化提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Conformal prediction (CP) has attracted broad attention as a simple and flexible framework for uncertainty quantification through prediction sets. In this work, we study how to deploy CP under differential privacy (DP) in a statistically efficient manner. We first introduce differential CP, a non-splitting conformal procedure that avoids the efficiency loss caused by data splitting and serves as a bridge between oracle CP and private conformal inference. By exploiting the stability properties of DP mechanisms, differential CP establishes a direct connection to oracle CP and inherits corresponding validity behavior. Building on this idea, we develop Differentially Private Conformal Prediction (DPCP), a fully private procedure that combines DP model training with a private quantile mechanism for calibration. We establish the end-to-end privacy guarantee of DPCP and investigate its coverage properties under additional regularity conditions. We further study the efficiency of both differential CP and DPCP under empirical risk minimization and general regression models, showing that DPCP can produce tighter prediction sets than existing private split conformal approaches under the same privacy budget. Numerical experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the practical effectiveness of the proposed methods.

</details>


### [715] [Doubly Outlier-Robust Online Infinite Hidden Markov Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14322)
*Horace Yiu,Leandro Sánchez-Betancourt,Álvaro Cartea,Gerardo Duran-Martin*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于处理包含异常值和模型误设的流数据的鲁棒在线无限隐马尔可夫模型更新规则，通过后验影响函数定义鲁棒性，在适应性和鲁棒性之间取得平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当流数据包含异常值且模型存在误设时，传统的在线无限隐马尔可夫模型缺乏鲁棒性，需要开发能够同时处理异常值和模型误设的鲁棒在线学习方法。

Method: 基于广义贝叶斯推断的最新进展，通过后验影响函数定义鲁棒性，提出批量鲁棒iHMM方法，引入两个可调参数在适应性和鲁棒性之间进行平衡。

Result: 在限价订单簿数据、小时电力需求和合成高维线性系统上，BR-iHMM相比竞争性在线贝叶斯方法将一步预测误差降低了高达67%，同时提供了有界PIF的理论保证。

Conclusion: BR-iHMM方法在实际应用中具有实用性，既可用于预测也可用于可解释的在线学习，通过理论保证和实证结果验证了其在处理异常值和模型误设方面的有效性。

Abstract: We derive a robust update rule for the online infinite hidden Markov model (iHMM) for when the streaming data contains outliers and the model is misspecified. Leveraging recent advances in generalised Bayesian inference, we define robustness via the posterior influence function (PIF), and provide conditions under which the online iHMM has bounded PIF. Imposing robustness inevitably induces an adaptation lag for regime switching. Our method, which is called Batched Robust iHMM (BR-iHMM), balances adaptivity and robustness with two additional tunable parameters. Across limit order book data, hourly electricity demand, and a synthetic high-dimensional linear system, BR-iHMM reduces one-step-ahead forecasting error by up to 67% relative to competing online Bayesian methods. Together with theoretical guarantees of bounded PIF, our results highlight the practicality of our approach for both forecasting and interpretable online learning.

</details>


### [716] [Covariance-adapting algorithm for semi-bandits with application to sparse rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13738)
*Pierre Perrault,Vianney Perchet,Michal Valko*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文研究了随机组合半赌博机问题，提出了基于协方差矩阵的新下界和算法，适用于更广泛的次指数分布族，并扩展到稀疏结果的应用场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统随机组合半赌博机问题通常假设特定的参数分布（如次高斯分布），这些参数在实际中难以估计。本文旨在缓解这一问题，考虑更广泛的次指数分布族，该族包含有界分布和高斯分布，从而降低对先验知识的依赖。

Method: 1. 定义新的次指数分布族，包含有界和高斯分布；2. 证明基于未知协方差矩阵的期望遗憾下界，该下界比次高斯矩阵更紧；3. 构建使用协方差估计的算法；4. 对遗憾进行严格的渐近分析；5. 将结果应用于稀疏结果族，适用于推荐系统等场景。

Result: 1. 证明了基于协方差矩阵的新下界，该下界比传统次高斯矩阵更紧；2. 设计了使用协方差估计的算法；3. 提供了紧的渐近遗憾分析；4. 将结果成功扩展到稀疏结果族，展示了在推荐系统等实际应用中的适用性。

Conclusion: 本文通过考虑更广泛的次指数分布族，降低了随机组合半赌博机问题对先验知识的依赖。提出的基于协方差矩阵的下界和算法在理论上更紧，实际中更易实现，特别适用于稀疏结果的推荐系统等应用场景。

Abstract: We investigate stochastic combinatorial semi-bandits, where the entire joint distribution of outcomes impacts the complexity of the problem instance (unlike in the standard bandits). Typical distributions considered depend on specific parameter values, whose prior knowledge is required in theory but quite difficult to estimate in practice; an example is the commonly assumed sub-Gaussian family. We alleviate this issue by instead considering a new general family of sub-exponential distributions, which contains bounded and Gaussian ones. We prove a new lower bound on the expected regret on this family, that is parameterized by the unknown covariance matrix of outcomes, a tighter quantity than the sub-Gaussian matrix. We then construct an algorithm that uses covariance estimates, and provide a tight asymptotic analysis of the regret. Finally, we apply and extend our results to the family of sparse outcomes, which has applications in many recommender systems.

</details>


### [717] [Robust Low-Rank Tensor Completion based on M-product with Weighted Correlated Total Variation and Sparse Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13525)
*Biswarup Karmakar,Ratikanta Behera*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出TWCTV正则化方法，通过加权Schatten-p范数和稀疏分量处理，解决张量补全中均匀正则化导致的结构信息损失问题，在图像补全、去噪和背景减除任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有张量补全方法依赖均匀正则化方案（如张量核范数和ℓ1范数），对所有奇异值和稀疏分量施加相同收缩，导致关键张量结构信息损失，无法有效处理现实应用中常见的缺失值、离群值和稀疏噪声。

Method: 提出张量加权相关全变分(TWCTV)正则化器，基于M-乘积框架结合梯度张量的加权Schatten-p范数（用于低秩性和平滑性）和加权稀疏分量（用于噪声抑制）。采用自适应权重方案降低阈值水平，保护主导奇异值和稀疏分量。开发增强的ADMM算法，具有计算效率和理论保证。

Result: 在图像补全、去噪和背景减除任务上的综合数值评估表明，该方法相对于现有基准方法具有优越性能，能更好地重建关键结构元素和细微细节。

Conclusion: TWCTV正则化方法通过自适应加权方案有效解决了均匀正则化的局限性，在保护关键张量结构的同时抑制噪声，为高维张量数据恢复提供了更有效的解决方案。

Abstract: The robust low-rank tensor completion problem addresses the challenge of recovering corrupted high-dimensional tensor data with missing entries, outliers, and sparse noise commonly found in real-world applications. Existing methodologies have encountered fundamental limitations due to their reliance on uniform regularization schemes, particularly the tensor nuclear norm and $\ell_1$ norm regularization approaches, which indiscriminately apply equal shrinkage to all singular values and sparse components, thereby compromising the preservation of critical tensor structures. The proposed tensor weighted correlated total variation (TWCTV) regularizer addresses these shortcomings through an $M$-product framework that combines a weighted Schatten-$p$ norm on gradient tensors for low-rankness with smoothness enforcement and weighted sparse components for noise suppression. The proposed weighting scheme adaptively reduces the thresholding level to preserve both dominant singular values and sparse components, thus improving the reconstruction of critical structural elements and nuanced details in the recovered signal. Through a systematic algorithmic approach, we introduce an enhanced alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) that offers both computational efficiency and theoretical substantiation, with convergence properties comprehensively analyzed within the $M$-product framework.Comprehensive numerical evaluations across image completion, denoising, and background subtraction tasks validate the superior performance of this approach relative to established benchmark methods.

</details>


### [718] [Identifiability of Potentially Degenerate Gaussian Mixture Models With Piecewise Affine Mixing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13218)
*Danru Xu,Sébastien Lachapelle,Sara Magliacane*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在潜在变量服从可能退化的高斯混合分布且通过分段仿射混合函数观测的情况下，因果表示学习的可识别性问题，提出了基于稀疏正则化的两阶段估计方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 因果表示学习旨在从高维观测中识别潜在变量，但现有方法在潜在变量相互依赖、服从退化高斯混合分布且通过分段仿射函数观测的挑战性场景中面临困难，特别是概率密度函数因退化而无法定义的情况。

Method: 提出了一种两阶段方法：首先利用稀疏正则化实现置换和尺度变换下的可识别性，然后在学习到的表示中强制稀疏性和高斯性来估计潜在变量。

Result: 在合成数据和图像数据上的实验表明，该方法能有效恢复真实潜在变量，验证了理论可识别性结果的实际可行性。

Conclusion: 该研究为具有退化高斯混合分布潜在变量和分段仿射混合函数的因果表示学习提供了渐进增强的可识别性理论，并提出了有效的两阶段估计方法，解决了概率密度函数无法定义的挑战性场景。

Abstract: Causal representation learning (CRL) aims to identify the underlying latent variables from high-dimensional observations, even when variables are dependent with each other. We study this problem for latent variables that follow a potentially degenerate Gaussian mixture distribution and that are only observed through the transformation via a piecewise affine mixing function. We provide a series of progressively stronger identifiability results for this challenging setting in which the probability density functions are ill-defined because of the potential degeneracy. For identifiability up to permutation and scaling, we leverage a sparsity regularization on the learned representation. Based on our theoretical results, we propose a two-stage method to estimate the latent variables by enforcing sparsity and Gaussianity in the learned representations. Experiments on synthetic and image data highlight our method's effectiveness in recovering the ground-truth latent variables.

</details>


### [719] [Rare Event Analysis via Stochastic Optimal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13213)
*Yuanqi Du,Jiajun He,Dinghuai Zhang,Eric Vanden-Eijnden,Carles Domingo-Enrich*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 将过渡路径理论中的承诺函数估计转化为随机最优控制问题，通过反馈控制主动引导轨迹采样反应路径，提高稀有事件的计算效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物分子构象变化、相变和化学反应等稀有事件在物理系统中至关重要，但传统无偏模拟很难捕捉这些事件。过渡路径理论提供了分析框架，但其核心承诺函数的准确估计仍具挑战性

Method: 将承诺函数估计转化为随机最优控制问题，承诺函数对数梯度定义反馈控制主动引导轨迹。开发两种互补目标函数：直接反向传播损失和离策略值匹配损失，并引入替代采样过程处理亚稳态问题

Result: 在基准系统上，该方法相比现有方法显著提高了承诺函数估计、反应速率和平衡常数的准确性

Conclusion: 随机最优控制框架为稀有事件采样提供了新范式，通过主动控制引导轨迹克服传统方法的采样效率瓶颈，在复杂系统动力学研究中具有广泛应用前景

Abstract: Rare events such as conformational changes in biomolecules, phase transitions, and chemical reactions are central to the behavior of many physical systems, yet they are extremely difficult to study computationally because unbiased simulations seldom produce them. Transition Path Theory (TPT) provides a rigorous statistical framework for analyzing such events: it characterizes the ensemble of reactive trajectories between two designated metastable states (reactant and product), and its central object--the committor function, which gives the probability that the system will next reach the product rather than the reactant--encodes all essential kinetic and thermodynamic information. We introduce a framework that casts committor estimation as a stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem. In this formulation the committor defines a feedback control--proportional to the gradient of its logarithm--that actively steers trajectories toward the reactive region, thereby enabling efficient sampling of reactive paths. To solve the resulting hitting-time control problem we develop two complementary objectives: a direct backpropagation loss and a principled off-policy Value Matching loss, for which we establish first-order optimality guarantees. We further address metastability, which can trap controlled trajectories in intermediate basins, by introducing an alternative sampling process that preserves the reactive current while lowering effective energy barriers. On benchmark systems, the framework yields markedly more accurate committor estimates, reaction rates, and equilibrium constants than existing methods.

</details>


### [720] [Causal Diffusion Models for Counterfactual Outcome Distributions in Longitudinal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12992)
*Farbod Alinezhad,Jianfei Cao,Gary J. Young,Brady Post*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: CDM是首个基于去噪扩散概率模型的方法，用于生成序列干预下的反事实结果全概率分布，无需显式去混杂调整，在复杂时序依赖和混杂场景中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纵向数据中预测反事实结果面临两大挑战：复杂的时序依赖混杂（sequential treatment decisions heavily depend on evolving patient states）和现有方法缺乏充分的不确定性量化。现有方法通常需要显式的去混杂调整（如逆概率加权或对抗平衡），限制了其灵活性和准确性。

Method: 提出因果扩散模型（CDM），采用新颖的残差去噪架构和关系自注意力机制，捕捉复杂的时序依赖和多模态结果轨迹。该方法无需显式去混杂调整（如逆概率加权或对抗平衡），直接生成反事实结果的完整概率分布。

Result: 在广泛采用的药代动力学-药效学肿瘤生长模拟器上，CDM在分布准确性（1-Wasserstein距离）上相对现有最优方法提升15-30%，同时在高混杂场景下保持竞争性或更优的点估计准确性（RMSE）。

Conclusion: CDM首次统一了不确定性量化和鲁棒反事实预测，无需定制化去混杂，为医学决策支持、政策评估等纵向领域提供了灵活高效的工具。

Abstract: Predicting counterfactual outcomes in longitudinal data, where sequential treatment decisions heavily depend on evolving patient states, is critical yet notoriously challenging due to complex time-dependent confounding and inadequate uncertainty quantification in existing methods. We introduce the Causal Diffusion Model (CDM), the first denoising diffusion probabilistic approach explicitly designed to generate full probabilistic distributions of counterfactual outcomes under sequential interventions. CDM employs a novel residual denoising architecture with relational self-attention, capturing intricate temporal dependencies and multimodal outcome trajectories without requiring explicit adjustments (e.g., inverse-probability weighting or adversarial balancing) for confounding. In rigorous evaluation on a pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic tumor-growth simulator widely adopted in prior work, CDM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art longitudinal causal inference methods, achieving a 15-30% relative improvement in distributional accuracy (1-Wasserstein distance) while maintaining competitive or superior point-estimate accuracy (RMSE) under high-confounding regimes. By unifying uncertainty quantification and robust counterfactual prediction in complex, sequentially confounded settings, without tailored deconfounding, CDM offers a flexible, high-impact tool for decision support in medicine, policy evaluation, and other longitudinal domains.

</details>


<div id='cs.DS'></div>

# cs.DS [[Back]](#toc)

### [721] [Tight Bounds for Learning Polyhedra with a Margin](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14614)
*Shyamal Patel,Santosh Vempala*

Main category: cs.DS

TL;DR: 提出了一种学习k个半空间交集的PAC算法，时间复杂度为poly(k, ε⁻¹, ρ⁻¹)·exp(O(√(n log(1/ρ) log k)))，相比之前工作显著改进，匹配已知密码学和统计查询下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前学习半空间交集的工作在k或ρ⁻¹上存在指数依赖，与已知下界存在差距。本文旨在开发更高效的算法，匹配理论下界，并扩展到更一般的分布设置。

Method: 设计了一种新的PAC学习算法，处理带ρ边距的k个半空间交集。算法利用几何结构分析，通过多项式时间预处理和亚指数时间搜索实现高效学习。

Result: 算法时间复杂度为poly(k, ε⁻¹, ρ⁻¹)·exp(O(√(n log(1/ρ) log k)))，消除了对k和ρ⁻¹的指数依赖，匹配已知密码学和统计查询下界，并可扩展到大多数点距离边界至少ρ的更一般设置。

Conclusion: 该算法显著改进了半空间交集学习的时间复杂度，匹配理论下界，为连续分布等更一般场景提供了有效解决方案，填补了先前工作与下界之间的差距。

Abstract: We give an algorithm for PAC learning intersections of $k$ halfspaces with a $ρ$ margin to within error $\varepsilon$ that runs in time $\textsf{poly}(k, \varepsilon^{-1}, ρ^{-1}) \cdot \exp \left(O(\sqrt{n \log(1/ρ) \log k})\right)$. Notably, this improves on prior work which had an exponential dependence on either $k$ or $ρ^{-1}$ and matches known cryptographic and Statistical Query lower bounds up to the logarithmic factors in $k$ and $ρ$ in the exponent. Our learning algorithm extends to the more general setting when we are only promised that most points have distance at least $ρ$ from the boundary of the polyhedron, making it applicable to continuous distributions as well.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [722] [VeriGraphi: A Multi-Agent Framework of Hierarchical RTL Generation for Large Hardware Designs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14550)
*Sazzadul Islam,Tasnim Tabassum,Hao Zheng*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: VeriGraphi框架通过构建规范锚定的知识图谱来解决LLM生成层次化Verilog时的结构一致性问题，显著提升了复杂硬件设计的RTL生成可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在生成层次化Verilog时面临严重挑战：难以维持跨模块上下文、容易产生接口幻觉、错误连接模块间连线，且随着设计复杂度增加和规范包含非正式文本、图表等难以直接操作化的内容，这些问题会加剧。

Method: 提出VeriGraphi框架，引入规范锚定的知识图谱作为RTL生成管道的架构基础。通过多智能体迭代分析规范构建HDA（层次化设计架构）知识图谱，显式编码模块层次、端口级接口、连线语义和模块间依赖关系。基于知识图谱的渐进式编码模块逐步生成伪代码和可综合RTL，在每个子模块阶段强制实施接口一致性和依赖正确性。

Result: 在NIST的三个代表性规范文档及其对应实现上进行评估，并以RV32I处理器作为详细案例研究展示完整流程。结果表明VeriGraphi能够以最少人工干预为RISC-V实现可靠的层次化RTL生成，在保持强功能正确性的同时，标志着LLM生成硬件设计的重大里程碑。

Conclusion: VeriGraphi通过知识图谱驱动的结构化方法有效解决了LLM在复杂硬件设计中的层次化Verilog生成问题，为自动化硬件设计提供了可靠的技术路径。

Abstract: Generating synthesizable Verilog for large, hierarchical hardware designs remains a significant challenge for large language models (LLMs), which struggle to replicate the structured reasoning that human experts employ when translating complex specifications into RTL. When tasked with producing hierarchical Verilog, LLMs frequently lose context across modules, hallucinate interfaces, fabricate inter-module wiring, and fail to maintain structural coherence - failures that intensify as design complexity grows and specifications involve informal prose, figures, and tables that resist direct operationalization. To address these challenges, we present VeriGraphi, a framework that introduces a spec-anchored Knowledge Graph as the architectural substrate driving the RTL generation pipeline. VeriGraphi constructs a HDA, a structured knowledge graph that explicitly encodes module hierarchy, port-level interfaces, wiring semantics, and inter-module dependencies as first-class graph entities and relations. Built through iterative multi-agent analysis of the specification, this Knowledge Graph provides a deterministic, machine-checkable structural scaffold before code generation. Guided by the KG, a progressive coding module incrementally generates pseudo-code and synthesizable RTL while enforcing interface consistency and dependency correctness at each submodule stage. We evaluate VeriGraphi on a benchmark of three representative specification documents from the National Institute of Standards and Technology and their corresponding implementations, and we present a RV32I processor as a detailed case study to illustrate the full pipeline. The results demonstrate that VeriGraphi enables reliable hierarchical RTL generation with minimal human intervention for RISC-V, marking a significant milestone for LLM-generated hardware design while maintaining strong functional correctness.

</details>


<div id='econ.GN'></div>

# econ.GN [[Back]](#toc)

### [723] [A Comparative Study of Dynamic Programming and Reinforcement Learning in Finite Horizon Dynamic Pricing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14059)
*Lev Razumovskiy,Nikolay Karenin*

Main category: econ.GN

TL;DR: 系统比较基于数据估计需求的拟合动态规划(DP)与强化学习(RL)在有限时域动态定价问题中的性能，涵盖从单一类型基准到多类型异质需求及跨期收入约束的复杂环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常将DP限制在低维环境中进行简化比较，缺乏在更丰富、多维环境（多产品类型和约束）中对DP和RL方法的系统性性能评估，需要深入理解基于显式期望的优化与基于轨迹学习之间的权衡。

Method: 在逐步增加结构复杂度的环境中进行系统比较：从单一类型基准到多类型异质需求设置，再到包含跨期收入约束的多维环境。评估维度包括收入性能、稳定性、约束满足行为和计算扩展性。

Result: 通过在多维环境中应用动态规划（而非仅限于低维设置），揭示了两种方法在收入性能、稳定性、约束满足和计算扩展性方面的具体表现，突出了基于期望的优化与基于轨迹学习之间的权衡关系。

Conclusion: 该研究为动态定价中DP和RL方法的系统比较提供了框架，强调了在复杂多维环境中评估方法性能的重要性，揭示了两种方法在不同维度上的优劣势，为方法选择提供了实证依据。

Abstract: This paper provides a systematic comparison between Fitted Dynamic Programming (DP), where demand is estimated from data, and Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods in finite-horizon dynamic pricing problems. We analyze their performance across environments of increasing structural complexity, ranging from a single typology benchmark to multi-typology settings with heterogeneous demand and inter-temporal revenue constraints. Unlike simplified comparisons that restrict DP to low-dimensional settings, we apply dynamic programming in richer, multi-dimensional environments with multiple product types and constraints. We evaluate revenue performance, stability, constraint satisfaction behavior, and computational scaling, highlighting the trade-offs between explicit expectation-based optimization and trajectory-based learning.

</details>


<div id='cs.SD'></div>

# cs.SD [[Back]](#toc)

### [724] [The Acoustic Camouflage Phenomenon: Re-evaluating Speech Features for Financial Risk Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14619)
*Dhruvin Dungrani,Disha Dungrani*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 该研究探索了在真实电话会议环境中，声学特征提取（音高、抖动、犹豫）在预测股市极端波动方面的局限性，发现声学特征反而会降低模型性能，提出了"声学伪装"概念。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索声学特征在预测企业财报电话会议中股市极端波动事件的有效性，特别是在高度训练的专业演讲者的真实电话会议环境中，验证声学处理在高风险金融预测中的应用边界。

Method: 采用双流晚期融合架构，对比声学特征流（提取音高、抖动、犹豫等特征）与自然语言处理（NLP）基线流。使用晚期融合策略整合两种模态的特征，评估声学特征对预测尾部风险下行事件的影响。

Result: 孤立NLP模型对尾部风险下行事件的召回率达到66.25%，但通过晚期融合整合声学特征后，性能显著下降，召回率降至47.08%。这表明声学特征反而降低了预测性能。

Conclusion: 研究提出了"声学伪装"概念，即媒体训练过的声音调节会引入矛盾噪声，干扰多模态元学习器。这为语音处理在高风险金融预测中的应用设定了边界条件，表明在某些专业环境中，声学特征可能不是有效的预测指标。

Abstract: In computational paralinguistics, detecting cognitive load and deception from speech signals is a heavily researched domain. Recent efforts have attempted to apply these acoustic frameworks to corporate earnings calls to predict catastrophic stock market volatility. In this study, we empirically investigate the limits of acoustic feature extraction (pitch, jitter, and hesitation) when applied to highly trained speakers in in-the-wild teleconference environments. Utilizing a two-stream late-fusion architecture, we contrast an acoustic-based stream with a baseline Natural Language Processing (NLP) stream. The isolated NLP model achieved a recall of 66.25% for tail-risk downside events. Surprisingly, integrating acoustic features via late fusion significantly degraded performance, reducing recall to 47.08%. We identify this degradation as Acoustic Camouflage, where media-trained vocal regulation introduces contradictory noise that disrupts multimodal meta-learners. We present these findings as a boundary condition for speech processing applications in high-stakes financial forecasting.

</details>


### [725] [VoxSafeBench: Not Just What Is Said, but Who, How, and Where](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14548)
*Yuxiang Wang,Hongyu Liu,Yijiang Xu,Qinke Ni,Li Wang,Wan Lin,Kunyu Feng,Dekun Chen,Xu Tan,Lei Wang,Jie Shi,Zhizheng Wu*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: VoxSafeBench是一个评估语音语言模型在安全、公平和隐私三个维度社会对齐性的基准测试，采用双层设计区分内容中心风险和音频条件风险，揭示了当前SLMs存在的普遍语音接地差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着语音语言模型从个人设备扩展到共享多用户环境，其响应需要考虑的远不止文字内容。说话者身份、声音特征和对话环境都可能将原本良性的请求转变为不安全、不公平或侵犯隐私的内容。现有基准主要关注基础音频理解能力，孤立研究个体风险，或将固有有害内容与因声学上下文才变得有问题的内容混为一谈。

Method: VoxSafeBench采用双层设计：Tier1使用匹配的文本和音频输入评估内容中心风险；Tier2针对音频条件风险，其中转录文本是良性的，但适当响应取决于说话者、副语言线索或周围环境。为验证Tier2，包含中间感知探针，确认前沿SLMs能成功检测这些声学线索但仍无法适当响应。涵盖22个任务，支持双语覆盖。

Result: 研究发现，在文本上看似稳健的安全措施在语音中往往退化：对说话者和场景条件风险的安全意识下降；当人口统计学差异通过声音传达时公平性受损；当上下文线索以声学方式到达时隐私保护失效。前沿SLMs能成功检测声学线索但仍无法适当响应，暴露了普遍的语音接地差距。

Conclusion: 当前语音语言模型经常能在文本中识别相关社会规范，但当决定性线索必须基于语音接地时却无法应用这些规范。VoxSafeBench揭示了这一普遍存在的语音接地差距，为评估和改进SLMs在多用户环境中的社会对齐性提供了重要基准。

Abstract: As speech language models (SLMs) transition from personal devices into shared, multi-user environments, their responses must account for far more than the words alone. Who is speaking, how they sound, and where the conversation takes place can each turn an otherwise benign request into one that is unsafe, unfair, or privacy-violating. Existing benchmarks, however, largely focus on basic audio comprehension, study individual risks in isolation, or conflate content that is inherently harmful with content that only becomes problematic due to its acoustic context. We introduce VoxSafeBench, among the first benchmarks to jointly evaluate social alignment in SLMs across three dimensions: safety, fairness, and privacy. VoxSafeBench adopts a Two-Tier design: Tier1 evaluates content-centric risks using matched text and audio inputs, while Tier2 targets audio-conditioned risks in which the transcript is benign but the appropriate response hinges on the speaker, paralinguistic cues, or the surrounding environment. To validate Tier2, we include intermediate perception probes and confirm that frontier SLMs can successfully detect these acoustic cues yet still fail to act on them appropriately. Across 22 tasks with bilingual coverage, we find that safeguards appearing robust on text often degrade in speech: safety awareness drops for speaker- and scene-conditioned risks, fairness erodes when demographic differences are conveyed vocally, and privacy protections falter when contextual cues arrive acoustically. Together, these results expose a pervasive speech grounding gap: current SLMs frequently recognize the relevant social norm in text but fail to apply it when the decisive cue must be grounded in speech. Code and data are publicly available at: https://amphionteam.github.io/VoxSafeBench_demopage/

</details>


### [726] [Towards Fine-grained Temporal Perception: Post-Training Large Audio-Language Models with Audio-Side Time Prompt](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13715)
*Yanfeng Shi,Pengfei Cai,Jun Liu,Qing Gu,Nan Jiang,Lirong Dai,Ian McLoughlin,Yan Song*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: TimePro-RL框架通过音频侧时间提示和强化学习提升大音频语言模型的细粒度时间感知能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大音频语言模型在时间感知方面存在局限，难以推断事件开始和结束时间，限制了在细粒度场景中的应用

Method: 提出音频侧时间提示，将时间戳编码为嵌入并与音频特征序列交错作为时间坐标；采用监督微调后接强化学习直接优化时间对齐性能

Result: TimePro-RL在音频定位、声音事件检测和密集音频描述等时间相关任务上取得显著性能提升

Conclusion: 该框架有效增强了大音频语言模型的细粒度时间感知能力，验证了时间提示和强化学习结合的可行性

Abstract: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) enable general audio understanding and demonstrate remarkable performance across various audio tasks. However, these models still face challenges in temporal perception (e.g., inferring event onset and offset), leading to limited utility in fine-grained scenarios. To address this issue, we propose Audio-Side Time Prompt and leverage Reinforcement Learning (RL) to develop the TimePro-RL framework for fine-grained temporal perception. Specifically, we encode timestamps as embeddings and interleave them within the audio feature sequence as temporal coordinates to prompt the model. Furthermore, we introduce RL following Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to directly optimize temporal alignment performance. Experiments demonstrate that TimePro-RL achieves significant performance gains across a range of audio temporal tasks, such as audio grounding, sound event detection, and dense audio captioning, validating its robust effectiveness.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [727] [Generative Modeling of Complex-Valued Brain MRI Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14800)
*Marco Schlimbach,Moritz Rempe,Jessica Mnischek,Lukas T. Rotkopf,Jens Weingarten,Jens Kleesiek,Kevin Kröninger*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出一个生成式框架，能够联合建模复杂值MRI扫描的幅度和相位信息，通过条件变分自编码器和流匹配生成模型，在合成数据质量评估中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准MRI重建流程丢弃了采集过程中的相位信息，尽管证据表明相位信息编码了与肿瘤诊断相关的组织特性。当前机器学习方法仅处理重建的幅度图像，继承了这一局限性。

Method: 提出的生成式框架结合了条件变分自编码器（压缩复杂值MRI扫描为紧凑的潜在表示，同时保持相位相干性）和基于流匹配的生成模型。通过真实-合成分类器和下游异常组织检测分类器评估合成样本质量。

Result: 自编码器保持相位相干性高于0.997。真实-合成分类在所有采集序列中产生低AUROC值（0.50-0.66），表明生成样本几乎无法与真实数据区分。在下游正常-异常分类中，完全在合成数据上训练的分类器达到AUROC 0.880，超过真实数据基线0.842（fastMRI数据集）。这一优势在来自不同机构的独立外部测试集上持续存在。

Conclusion: 该框架证明了联合建模正常和异常复杂值脑MRI数据的幅度和相位信息的可行性。除了合成数据生成，它为未来诊断应用中完整脑MRI信息的使用奠定了基础，并使得系统研究幅度和相位如何共同编码病理特异性特征成为可能。

Abstract: Objective. Standard Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) reconstruction pipelines discard phase information captured during acquisition, despite evidence that it encodes tissue properties relevant to tumor diagnosis. Current machine learning approaches inherit this limitation by operating exclusively on reconstructed magnitude images. The aim of this study is to build a generative framework which is capable of jointly modeling magnitude and phase information of complex-valued MRI scans. Approach. The proposed generative framework combines a conditional variational autoencoder, which compresses complex-valued MRI scans into compact latent representations while preserving phase coherence, with a flow-matching-based generative model. Synthetic sample quality is assessed via a real-versus-synthetic classifier and by training downstream classifiers on synthetic data for abnormal tissue detection. Main results. The autoencoder preserves phase coherence above 0.997. Real-versus-synthetic classification yields low AUROC values between 0.50 and 0.66 across all acquisition sequences, indicating generated samples are nearly indistinguishable from real data. In downstream normal-versus-abnormal classification, classifiers trained entirely on synthetic data achieve an AUROC of 0.880, surpassing the real-data baseline of 0.842 on a publicly available dataset (fastMRI). This advantage persists on an independent external test set from a different institution with biopsy-confirmed labels. Significance. The proposed framework demonstrates the feasibility of jointly modeling magnitude and phase information for normal and abnormal complex-valued brain MRI data. Beyond synthetic data generation, it establishes a foundation for the usage of complete brain MRI information in future diagnostic applications and enables systematic investigation of how magnitude and phase jointly encode pathology-specific features.

</details>


### [728] [Learning Class Difficulty in Imbalanced Histopathology Segmentation via Dynamic Focal Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13479)
*Lakmali Nadeesha Kumari,Sen-Ching Samson Cheung*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: DFA通过在学习注意力中引入可学习的类别偏置，直接在表示层面进行类别难度重加权，替代传统的基于频率的损失重加权方法，在组织病理学图像分割中取得更好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于频率的损失重加权方法假设稀有类别就是困难类别，但实际难度还来自形态学变异、边界模糊和上下文相似性等因素，这些是频率无法捕捉的。需要一种能直接学习类别真实难度的方法。

Method: 提出动态焦点注意力（DFA），在基于查询的掩码解码器的交叉注意力中引入可学习的每类别偏置到注意力logits。从对数频率先验初始化以防止梯度饥饿，通过端到端优化让模型自适应捕捉难度信号，在预测前进行表示层面的重加权。

Result: 在三个组织病理学基准测试（BDSA、BCSS、CRAG）上，DFA持续改进Dice和IoU指标，匹配或超过需要单独估计器或额外训练阶段的难度感知基线方法。

Conclusion: 在表示层面编码类别难度为不平衡分割提供了比传统损失重加权更原则性的替代方案，将基于频率和难度感知的方法统一在共同的注意力偏置框架下。

Abstract: Semantic segmentation of histopathology images under class imbalance is typically addressed through frequency-based loss reweighting, which implicitly assumes that rare classes are difficult. However, true difficulty also arises from morphological variability, boundary ambiguity, and contextual similarity-factors that frequency cannot capture. We propose Dynamic Focal Attention (DFA), a simple and efficient mechanism that learns class-specific difficulty directly within the cross-attention of query-based mask decoders. DFA introduces a learnable per-class bias to attention logits, enabling representation-level reweighting prior to prediction rather than gradient-level reweighting after prediction. Initialised from a log-frequency prior to prevent gradient starvation, the bias is optimised end-to-end, allowing the model to adaptively capture difficulty signals through training, effectively unifying frequency-based and difficulty-aware approaches under a common attention-bias framework. On three histopathology benchmarks (BDSA, BCSS, CRAG), DFA consistently improves Dice and IoU, matching or exceeding a difficulty-aware baseline without a separate estimator or additional training stage. These results demonstrate that encoding class difficulty at the representation level provides a principled alternative to conventional loss reweighting for imbalanced segmentation.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [729] [Multistage Conditional Compositional Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14075)
*Buse Şen,Yifan Hu,Daniel Kuhn*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出多阶段条件组合优化（MCCO）新范式，结合多阶段随机规划和条件随机优化，解决嵌套条件期望和非线性成本函数的最小化问题，应用广泛但传统方法面临维度灾难，新方法使用多层蒙特卡洛技术实现多项式复杂度增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多阶段随机规划中的场景树方法面临维度灾难问题，当嵌套层数增加时，场景复杂度呈指数增长。MCCO作为结合多阶段随机规划和条件随机优化的新范式，在最优停止、线性二次调节器、分布鲁棒上下文赌博机等应用中具有重要意义，但需要更高效的求解方法。

Method: 开发了多层蒙特卡洛（Multilevel Monte Carlo）技术用于MCCO问题。该方法通过分层采样策略，避免了传统嵌套采样方法的指数级复杂度增长，实现了场景复杂度随精度需求仅呈多项式增长。

Result: 新方法显著降低了MCCO问题的计算复杂度，从传统方法的指数级复杂度降低到多项式复杂度。这意味着对于具有多个嵌套层的复杂决策问题，可以在可接受的计算成本下获得所需精度的解。

Conclusion: MCCO为不确定性下的决策提供了新的理论框架，而多层蒙特卡洛技术为解决这类复杂优化问题提供了高效的计算工具，克服了传统方法的维度灾难问题，为实际应用中的复杂决策问题提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: We introduce Multistage Conditional Compositional Optimization (MCCO) as a new paradigm for decision-making under uncertainty that combines aspects of multistage stochastic programming and conditional stochastic optimization. MCCO minimizes a nest of conditional expectations and nonlinear cost functions. It has numerous applications and arises, for example, in optimal stopping, linear-quadratic regulator problems, distributionally robust contextual bandits, as well as in problems involving dynamic risk measures. The naïve nested sampling approach for MCCO suffers from the curse of dimensionality familiar from scenario tree-based multistage stochastic programming, that is, its scenario complexity grows exponentially with the number of nests. We develop new multilevel Monte Carlo techniques for MCCO whose scenario complexity grows only polynomially with the desired accuracy.

</details>


### [730] [Gradient Descent's Last Iterate is Often (slightly) Suboptimal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13870)
*Guy Kornowski,Ohad Shamir*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文证明了在不知道总迭代次数T的情况下，无法为梯度下降(GD)或随机梯度下降(SGD)的最后一次迭代保证最优的1/√T收敛率，必须接受额外的对数因子损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究凸Lipschitz函数优化中梯度下降(GD)和随机梯度下降(SGD)的最后一次迭代收敛问题。虽然Jain等人(2019)通过构造非标准步长序列达到了最优的1/√T收敛率，但该序列需要预先知道总迭代次数T。作者旨在证明：在没有T的先验知识时，任何步长序列都无法为最后迭代保证最优误差，这一猜想此前未被证明。

Method: 通过理论证明方法，分析GD和SGD的最后迭代收敛性。特别地，证明了即使在无噪声的GD情况下，当考虑任意时间(last iterate guarantee)保证时，也无法避免额外的多对数因子损失。证明进一步表明这种(轻微)次优的停止时间在本质上是不可避免的普遍现象。

Result: 证明了Jain等人的猜想：在没有总迭代次数T先验知识的情况下，任何步长序列都无法为SGD的最后一次迭代保证最优的1/√T收敛率。即使在无噪声的GD情况下，任意时间最后迭代保证也无法避免额外的多对数因子损失(如log T/√T)。

Conclusion: 该研究为凸优化中最后迭代收敛问题提供了重要的理论界限，表明在没有总迭代次数先验知识时，达到最优收敛率存在根本性限制。这一结果对实际算法设计和理论分析具有重要指导意义，揭示了最后迭代保证的内在困难。

Abstract: We consider the well-studied setting of minimizing a convex Lipschitz function using either gradient descent (GD) or its stochastic variant (SGD), and examine the last iterate convergence. By now, it is known that standard stepsize choices lead to a last iterate convergence rate of $\log T/\sqrt{T}$ after $T$ steps. A breakthrough result of Jain et al. [2019] recovered the optimal $1/\sqrt{T}$ rate by constructing a non-standard stepsize sequence. However, this sequence requires choosing $T$ in advance, as opposed to common stepsize schedules which apply for any time horizon. Moreover, Jain et al. conjectured that without prior knowledge of $T$, no stepsize sequence can ensure the optimal error for SGD's last iterate, a claim which so far remained unproven. We prove this conjecture, and in fact show that even in the noiseless case of GD, it is impossible to avoid an excess poly-log factor in $T$ when considering an anytime last iterate guarantee. Our proof further suggests that such (slightly) suboptimal stopping times are unavoidably common.

</details>


### [731] [Density-Driven Optimal Control: Convergence Guarantees for Stochastic LTI Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08495)
*Kooktae Lee*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)方法，解决多智能体系统的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖问题，通过最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本，确保时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于密度的方法通常依赖计算量大的欧拉PDE求解器或启发式规划，无法有效处理具有高空间优先级和资源约束的任务中的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖问题。

Method: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)，这是一个严格的拉格朗日框架，通过制定随机MPC类问题，最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本，将个体智能体动力学与集体分布匹配相连接。

Result: 通过可达性分析建立了形式收敛保证，即使在过程和测量噪声存在下也能提供有界跟踪误差。数值结果表明该方法在最优性和一致性方面优于先前的启发式方法。

Conclusion: 随机D²OC方法为多智能体系统的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖提供了稳健、理论保证的解决方案，填补了现有方法的空白。

Abstract: This paper addresses the decentralized non-uniform area coverage problem for multi-agent systems, a critical task in missions with high spatial priority and resource constraints. While existing density-based methods often rely on computationally heavy Eulerian PDE solvers or heuristic planning, we propose Stochastic Density-Driven Optimal Control (D$^2$OC). This is a rigorous Lagrangian framework that bridges the gap between individual agent dynamics and collective distribution matching. By formulating a stochastic MPC-like problem that minimizes the Wasserstein distance as a running cost, our approach ensures that the time-averaged empirical distribution converges to a non-parametric target density under stochastic LTI dynamics. A key contribution is the formal convergence guarantee established via reachability analysis, providing a bounded tracking error even in the presence of process and measurement noise. Numerical results verify that Stochastic D$^2$OC achieves robust, decentralized coverage while outperforming previous heuristic methods in optimality and consistency.

</details>


### [732] [A short proof of near-linear convergence of adaptive gradient descent under fourth-order growth and convexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13393)
*Damek Davis,Dmitriy Drusvyatskiy*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Lyapunov函数的更直接分析方法，用于证明梯度下降在自适应步长下对凸且具有唯一极小值的函数具有局部近线性收敛性，并改进了原算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Davis、Drusvyatskiy和Jiang的研究表明，对于远离极小值点至少四次增长的平滑函数，自适应步长的梯度下降具有局部近线性收敛性。但他们的证明复杂，依赖于监测算法相对于"沟壑"（缓慢增长流形）的性能。本文旨在为具有额外凸性和唯一极小值的目标函数提供更直接的Lyapunov分析方法。

Method: 采用基于Lyapunov函数的直接分析方法，绕过了原证明中对"沟壑"流形的复杂监测。该方法针对凸且具有唯一极小值的目标函数，通过构造合适的Lyapunov函数来分析梯度下降的自适应步长算法的收敛性。

Result: 成功证明了对于凸且具有唯一极小值的目标函数，梯度下降在自适应步长下具有局部近线性收敛性。作为分析方法的副产品，获得了比原算法更具适应性的变体，并在数值实验中表现出良好的性能。

Conclusion: 本文为凸且具有唯一极小值的目标函数提供了更简洁的Lyapunov分析方法，证明了自适应步长梯度下降的局部近线性收敛性，并提出了改进的算法变体，在数值实验中表现良好。

Abstract: Davis, Drusvyatskiy, and Jiang showed that gradient descent with an adaptive stepsize converges locally at a nearly-linear rate for smooth functions that grow at least quartically away from their minimizers. The argument is intricate, relying on monitoring the performance of the algorithm relative to a certain manifold of slow growth -- called the ravine. In this work, we provide a direct Lyapunov-based argument that bypasses these difficulties when the objective is in addition convex and a has a unique minimizer. As a byproduct of the argument, we obtain a more adaptive variant than the original algorithm with encouraging numerical performance.

</details>


<div id='cs.DC'></div>

# cs.DC [[Back]](#toc)

### [733] [Event Tensor: A Unified Abstraction for Compiling Dynamic Megakernel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13327)
*Hongyi Jin,Bohan Hou,Guanjie Wang,Ruihang Lai,Jinqi Chen,Zihao Ye,Yaxing Cai,Yixin Dong,Xinhao Cheng,Zhihao Zhang,Yilong Zhao,Yingyi Huang,Lijie Yang,Jinchen Jiang,Gabriele Oliaro,Jianan Ji,Xupeng Miao,Vinod Grover,Todd C. Mowry,Zhihao Jia,Tianqi Chen*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: Event Tensor提出统一的编译器抽象，用于动态megakernel，解决LLM推理中的内核启动开销和粗粒度同步问题，支持动态形状和数据依赖计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代GPU工作负载（特别是LLM推理）存在内核启动开销和粗粒度同步问题，限制了内核间并行性。现有的megakernel技术虽然通过融合多个算子来消除启动间隙，但难以处理实际工作负载中的动态形状和数据依赖计算。

Method: 提出Event Tensor统一编译器抽象，编码分块任务间的依赖关系，支持形状和数据依赖的动态性。基于此抽象构建Event Tensor Compiler（ETC），应用静态和动态调度转换来生成高性能持久内核。

Result: 评估显示ETC在LLM服务延迟方面达到最先进水平，同时显著减少系统预热开销。

Conclusion: Event Tensor为动态megakernel提供了有效的编译器抽象，解决了现有megakernel技术在动态工作负载中的局限性，实现了高性能的LLM推理服务。

Abstract: Modern GPU workloads, especially large language model (LLM) inference, suffer from kernel launch overheads and coarse synchronization that limit inter-kernel parallelism. Recent megakernel techniques fuse multiple operators into a single persistent kernel to eliminate launch gaps and expose inter-kernel parallelism, but struggle to handle dynamic shapes and data-dependent computation in real workloads. We present Event Tensor, a unified compiler abstraction for dynamic megakernels. Event Tensor encodes dependencies between tiled tasks, and enables first-class support for both shape and data-dependent dynamism. Built atop this abstraction, our Event Tensor Compiler (ETC) applies static and dynamic scheduling transformations to generate high-performance persistent kernels. Evaluations show that ETC achieves state-of-the-art LLM serving latency while significantly reducing system warmup overhead.

</details>
